68:const isDesktop = typeof window !== 'undefined' && (
69:  ('__TAURI__' in window) || 
70:  (window.process && (window.process as any).type) || 
71:  (navigator && navigator.userAgent && navigator.userAgent.toLowerCase().includes('electron')) || 
72:  (window.location && window.location.protocol && !['http:', 'https:'].includes(window.location.protocol))
73:);

75:const saveOrSharePDF = (doc: jsPDF, filename: string) => {
76:  const isMobile = typeof window !== 'undefined' && /Mobi|Android|iPhone|iPad/i.test(navigator.userAgent || '');
77:  
78:  if (isMobile) {
79:    try {
80:      const blob = doc.output('blob');
81:      const file = new File([blob], filename, { type: 'application/pdf' });
82:      
83:      if (navigator.canShare && navigator.canShare({ files: [file] })) {
84:        navigator.share({
85:          files: [file],
86:          title: filename,
87:          text: 'Document PDF - Acom Technologie'
88:        })
89:        .then(() => {
90:          toast.success('Document sauvegardé / partagé !', { position: 'top-center' });
91:        })
92:        .catch((err) => {
93:          if (err.name !== 'AbortError') {
94:            console.error('Error sharing PDF on save:', err);
95:            doc.save(filename);
96:            toast.success(`Le document PDF "${filename}" a été téléchargé.`, { position: 'top-center' });
97:          }
98:        });
99:        return;
100:      }
101:    } catch (e) {
102:      console.error('Failed mobile sharing in saveOrSharePDF, falling back to direct save:', e);
103:    }
104:  }
105:
106:  // Desktop or Mobile fallback
107:  try {
108:    doc.save(filename);
109:    toast.success('Le document PDF a été téléchargé.', { position: 'top-center' });
110:  } catch (err) {
111:    console.error('doc.save error:', err);
112:    toast.error('Une erreur est survenue lors du téléchargement.', { position: 'top-center' });
113:  }
114:};
115:
116:const printPDF = (doc: jsPDF, filename = 'document_imprimer.pdf') => {
117:  try {
118:    // 1. Tell jsPDF to add the auto-print script to the PDF
119:    doc.autoPrint();
120:
121:    // 2. Generate a standard, universally supported W3C Blob
122:    const blob = doc.output('blob');
123:    const blobUrl = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
124:
125:    const isMobile = typeof window !== 'undefined' && /Mobi|Android|iPhone|iPad/i.test(navigator.userAgent || '');
126:    if (isMobile) {
127:      const file = new File([blob], filename, { type: 'application/pdf' });
128:      if (navigator.canShare && navigator.canShare({ files: [file] })) {
129:        navigator.share({
130:          files: [file],
131:          title: filename,
132:          text: 'Document PDF - Acom Technologie'
133:        })
134:        .then(() => {
135:          toast.success('Impression mobile : Document envoyé au partage pour impression.', { position: 'top-center' });
136:        })
137:        .catch((err) => {
138:          if (err.name !== 'AbortError') {
139:            console.error('Error sharing PDF:', err);
140:            doc.save(filename);
141:            toast.success(`Le PDF "${filename}" a été téléchargé pour impression.`, { position: 'top-center' });
142:          }
143:        });
144:        return;
145:      } else {
146:        doc.save(filename);
147:        toast.success(`Le PDF "${filename}" a été téléchargé sur votre mobile pour impression.`, { duration: 6000, position: 'top-center' });
148:        return;
149:      }
150:    }
151:
152:    // If we are in Acom Gestion Desktop (Tauri/Electron context or local file), 
153:    // webview printing (IFrames) can be blocked by sandboxing or lack of native Webview2 print hooks.
154:    // Triggering direct download with a beautifully designed notice is 100% reliable and friendly.
155:    if (isDesktop) {
156:      const link = document.createElement('a');
157:      link.href = blobUrl;
158:      link.download = filename;
159:      document.body.appendChild(link);
160:      link.click();
161:      document.body.removeChild(link);
162:      
163:      toast.success(
164:        `Impression Desktop : Le fichier "${filename}" a été généré et téléchargé sur votre PC. Ouvrez-le pour l'imprimer directement.`, 
165:        { duration: 8000, position: 'top-center' }
166:      );
167:      
168:      setTimeout(() => {
169:        URL.revokeObjectURL(blobUrl);
170:      }, 5000);
171:      return;
172:    }
173:
174:    // 3. Web browser same-origin/cross-origin nested friendly tab popup opening.
175:    // Because modern browsers silently block nesting .print() on iframes inside sandboxed containers,
176:    // opening the PDF blob in a new tab is the absolute Gold Standard for web app printing.
177:    // Since doc.autoPrint() is embedded in the PDF, any PDF-capable browser (Chrome, Edge, Safari...)
178:    // will automatically summon the print dialog when the new sheet page finishes loading!
179:    const win = window.open(blobUrl, '_blank');
180:    if (win) {
181:      win.focus();
182:      toast.success('Génération réussie : l\'onglet d\'impression s\'est ouvert !', { position: 'top-center' });
183:    } else {
184:      // Safe fallback if popup blocker is aggressive
185:      const link = document.createElement('a');
186:      link.href = blobUrl;
187:      link.download = filename;
188:      document.body.appendChild(link);
189:      link.click();
190:      document.body.removeChild(link);
191:      toast(
192:        `Le bloqueur de fenêtres a empêché l'ouverture directe. Le document PDF "${filename}" a été téléchargé sur votre disque pour impression.`, 
193:        { duration: 8000, position: 'top-center' }
194:      );
195:    }
196:
197:    setTimeout(() => {
198:      URL.revokeObjectURL(blobUrl);
199:    }, 10000);
200:  } catch (err) {
201:    console.error('Error auto-printing PDF:', err);
202:    try {
203:      doc.save(filename);
204:      toast.success('Le document PDF a été téléchargé.', { position: 'top-center' });
205:    } catch (e) {
206:      toast.error('Une erreur est survenue lors de la génération de l\'impression.', { position: 'top-center' });
207:    }
208:  }
209:};
210:
211:
212:const printDirectHTML = (merchant: Merchant, type: 'receipt' | 'invoice' | 'unpaid' | 'quote', data: any) => {
213:  const isMobile = typeof window !== 'undefined' && /Mobi|Android|iPhone|iPad/i.test(navigator.userAgent || '');
214:  
215:  if (isMobile) {
216:    toast.success("Impression mobile : Préparation du document PDF...", { position: 'top-center' });
217:    if (type === 'receipt') {
218:      generateReceiptPDF(merchant, data, 'print');
219:    } else if (type === 'invoice' || type === 'unpaid') {
220:      generateA4InvoicePDF(merchant, data, 'print', type);
221:    } else if (type === 'quote') {
222:      generateA4QuotePDF(merchant, data, 'print');
223:    }
224:    return;
225:  }
226:
227:  const fmt = (num: number) => {
228:    if (num === undefined || num === null || isNaN(num)) return '0';
229:    const parts = Math.round(num).toString().split('.');
230:    parts[0] = parts[0].replace(/\B(?=(\d{3})+(?!\d))/g, " ");
231:    return parts.join('.');
232:  };
233:
234:  const getFormattedDate = (createdAt: any) => {
235:    if (!createdAt) return format(new Date(), 'dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm', { locale: fr });
236:    const dateVal = createdAt.seconds 
237:      ? new Date(createdAt.seconds * 1000) 
238:      : (createdAt instanceof Date ? createdAt : new Date(createdAt));
239:    try {
240:      return format(dateVal, 'dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm', { locale: fr });
241:    } catch (e) {
242:      return format(new Date(), 'dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm', { locale: fr });
243:    }
244:  };
245:
246:  const getFormattedExpiryDate = (validUntil: any) => {
247:    if (!validUntil) return "-";
248:    const dateVal = validUntil.seconds 
249:      ? new Date(validUntil.seconds * 1000) 
250:      : (validUntil instanceof Date ? validUntil : new Date(validUntil));
251:    try {
252:      return format(dateVal, 'dd/MM/yyyy', { locale: fr });
253:    } catch (e) {
254:      return "-";
255:    }
256:  };
257:
258:  const formattedDate = getFormattedDate(data.createdAt);
259:
260:  let htmlContent = "";
261:
262:  if (type === 'receipt') {
263:    // Elegant POS Ticket Thermal Layout (80mm)
264:    htmlContent = `
265:<!DOCTYPE html>
266:<html>
267:<head>
268:  <meta charset="utf-8">
269:  <title>Reçu POS - ${merchant.name.replace(/"/g, '&quot;')}</title>
270:  <style>
271:    @media print {
272:      @page {
273:        size: 80mm auto;
274:        margin: 0;
275:      }
276:      body {
277:        margin: 0;
278:        padding: 4mm;
279:        width: 72mm;
280:      }
281:    }
282:    body {
283:      font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, sans-serif;
284:      font-size: 11px;
285:      line-height: 1.4;
286:      color: #000;
287:      background-color: #fff;
288:      margin: 0 auto;
289:      padding: 6mm;
290:      width: 72mm;
291:    }
292:    .text-center { text-align: center; }
293:    .text-right { text-align: right; }
294:    .text-bold { font-weight: bold; }
295:    .flex { display: flex; }
296:    .justify-between { justify-content: space-between; }
297:    .logo-container { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 3mm; }
298:    .logo { max-width: 32mm; max-height: 16mm; object-fit: contain; }
299:    .divider { border-top: 1px dashed #000; margin: 3mm 0; }
300:    .merchant-name { font-size: 14px; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 1mm; text-transform: uppercase; }
301:    .doc-title { font-size: 11px; font-weight: bold; margin: 2mm 0; letter-spacing: 1.5px; }
302:    .item-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin-top: 2mm; }
303:    .item-table th { border-bottom: 1px solid #000; font-weight: bold; text-align: left; padding-bottom: 1mm; }
304:    .item-table td { padding: 1.5mm 0; vertical-align: top; }
305:    .total-section { margin-top: 3mm; font-size: 12px; }
306:    .footer { margin-top: 6mm; font-size: 9px; font-style: italic; text-align: center; }
307:  </style>
308:</head>
309:<body>
310:  ${merchant.logo ? `<div class="logo-container"><img class="logo" src="${merchant.logo}" alt="Logo" /></div>` : ''}
311:  <div class="text-center">
312:    <div class="merchant-name">${merchant.name.replace(/"/g, '&quot;')}</div>
313:    ${merchant.address ? `<div>${merchant.address.replace(/"/g, '&quot;')}</div>` : ''}
314:    ${merchant.phone ? `<div>Tél: ${merchant.phone}</div>` : ''}
315:    ${merchant.email ? `<div>Email: ${merchant.email}</div>` : ''}
316:  </div>
317:  
318:  <div class="divider"></div>
319:  
320:  <div class="flex justify-between" style="font-size: 10px;">
321:    <span>N° Ticket: RECU-${(data.id || '').slice(0, 8).toUpperCase()}</span>
322:    <span>Date: ${formattedDate}</span>
323:  </div>
324:  <div style="font-size: 10px; margin-top: 1mm;">Client: <span class="text-bold">${(data.customerName || 'Client POS').replace(/"/g, '&quot;')}</span></div>
325:  
326:  <div class="divider"></div>
327:  
328:  <div class="text-center text-bold doc-title">TICKET REÇU DE CAISSE</div>
329:  
330:  <table class="item-table">
331:    <thead>
332:      <tr>
333:        <th style="width: 50%;">Article</th>
334:        <th class="text-center" style="width: 15%;">Qté</th>
335:        <th class="text-right" style="width: 35%;">Total</th>
336:      </tr>
337:    </thead>
338:    <tbody>
339:      ${(data.items || []).map((it: any) => `
340:        <tr>
341:          <td>
342:            <div class="text-bold">${it.name.replace(/"/g, '&quot;')}</div>
343:            ${(it.sizes || it.colors) ? `
344:              <div style="font-size: 8.5px; color: #475569; background: #eef2f6; padding: 1px 4px; display: inline-block; border-radius: 3px; font-weight: bold; margin-top: 2px;">
345:                ${it.sizes ? `T: ${it.sizes}` : ''} ${it.sizes && it.colors ? '|' : ''} ${it.colors ? `C: ${it.colors}` : ''}
346:              </div>
347:            ` : ''}
348:            <div style="font-size: 9px; color: #444; margin-top: 2px;">${fmt(it.price)} ${merchant.currency} / u</div>
349:          </td>
350:          <td class="text-center">${it.quantity}</td>
351:          <td class="text-right">${fmt(it.price * it.quantity)}</td>
352:        </tr>
353:      `).join('')}
354:    </tbody>
355:  </table>
356:  
357:  <div class="divider"></div>
358:  
359:  <div class="total-section">
360:    <div class="flex justify-between text-bold" style="font-size: 13px; margin-bottom: 1.5mm;">
361:      <span>TOTAL TTC</span>
362:      <span>${fmt(data.totalAmount)} ${merchant.currency}</span>
363:    </div>
364:    ${data.paymentMethod ? `
365:      <div class="flex justify-between" style="font-size: 10px; color: #333;">
366:        <span>Mode de Paiement:</span>
367:        <span class="text-bold" style="text-transform: uppercase;">${data.paymentMethod}</span>
368:      </div>
369:    ` : ''}
370:    ${data.receivedAmount !== undefined && data.receivedAmount > 0 ? `
371:      <div class="flex justify-between font-mono" style="font-size: 10px; color: #333; margin-top: 0.5mm;">
372:        <span>Espèces Reçues:</span>
373:        <span>${fmt(data.receivedAmount)} ${merchant.currency}</span>
374:      </div>
375:    ` : ''}
376:    ${data.changeReturned !== undefined && data.changeReturned > 0 ? `
377:      <div class="flex justify-between font-mono" style="font-size: 10px; color: #333; margin-top: 0.5mm;">
378:        <span>Rendu de monnaie:</span>
379:        <span>${fmt(data.changeReturned)} ${merchant.currency}</span>
380:      </div>
381:    ` : ''}
382:  </div>
383:  
384:  <div class="divider"></div>
385:  
386:  <div class="footer">
387:    <p>Merci de votre confiance !</p>
388:    <p style="font-size: 8px; font-family: monospace; color: #777;">Généré par Acom Technologie Desktop</p>
389:  </div>
390:</body>
391:</html>
392:    `;
393:  } else {
394:    // Beautiful, Responsive A4 Layout (Invoice, Unpaid Reminder, or Quote)
395:    htmlContent = `
396:<!DOCTYPE html>
397:<html>
398:<head>
399:  <meta charset="utf-8">
400:  <title>${type === 'quote' ? 'Devis' : 'Facture'} - ${merchant.name.replace(/"/g, '&quot;')}</title>

413:      }

624:        <div style="color: #64748b; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4;">
625:          ${merchant.address ? `<div>${merchant.address.replace(/"/g, '&quot;')}</div>` : ''}
626:          ${merchant.phone ? `<div>Tél: ${merchant.phone}</div>` : ''}
627:          ${merchant.email ? `<div>Email: ${merchant.email}</div>` : ''}
628:        </div>
629:      </div>

632:        <div class="doc-banner accent-text">
633:          ${type === 'quote' ? 'DEVIS PROFORMA PRODUIT' : type === 'unpaid' ? "BON DE RÉCEPTION IMPAYÉ (A4)" : 'BON DE RÉCEPTION PRESSING & STOCK (A4)'}
634:        </div>
635:        <div class="doc-ref">
636:          N° ${type === 'quote' ? 'QT' : type === 'unpaid' ? 'DB' : 'PR'}-${(data.id || '').toUpperCase().slice(0, 8)}<br>
637:          Date dépôt : ${formattedDate.split(' ')[0]}<br>
638:          ${type === 'quote' ? 'Type Document : DEVIS PROFORMA' : `Retrait prévu : ${data.expectedDeliveryDate || formattedDate.split(' ')[0]}`}

680:          <th class="text-right" style="width: 25%;">Montant Total</th>

688:            <td class="text-center">${it.quantity}</td>
689:            <td class="text-right" style="font-weight: 700;">${fmt(it.price * it.quantity)} ${merchant.currency}</td>
690:          </tr>
691:        `).join('')}

693:    </table>

700:        </div>
701:        ${data.discount > 0 ? `
702:          <div class="totals-row" style="color: red;">
703:            <span>Remise de Caisse :</span>
704:            <span>-${fmt(data.discount)} ${merchant.currency}</span>
705:          </div>
706:        ` : ''}
707:        <div class="totals-row grand-total">
708:          <span>${type === 'quote' ? 'MONTANT DEVIS GLOBAL' : 'TOTAL TTC PAYER'}</span>
709:          <span class="accent-text">${fmt(data.totalAmount - (data.discount || 0))} ${merchant.currency}</span>
710:        </div>
711:        
712:        ${type !== 'quote' ? `
713:          <div class="totals-row" style="margin-top: 5px; border-top: 1px dashed #e2e8f0; padding-top: 5px;">
714:            <span>Règlement / Versé :</span>
715:            <span>${fmt(data.receivedAmount || 0)} ${merchant.currency}</span>
716:          </div>
717:          <div class="totals-row">
718:            <span>Reste à percevoir :</span>
719:            <span style="font-weight: bold; color: ${(data.totalAmount - (data.discount || 0) - (data.receivedAmount || 0)) > 0 ? '#e11d48' : '#16a34a'}">${fmt(Math.max(0, (data.totalAmount - (data.discount || 0) - (data.receivedAmount || 0))))} ${merchant.currency}</span>
720:          </div>
721:        ` : ''}
722:      </div>
723:    </div>
724:

726:      <div style="font-size: 8.5px; color: #64748b; line-height: 1.5; margin-bottom: 15px; border: 1px dashed #e2e8f0; padding: 10px; border-radius: 8px;">
727:        <strong>Instructions de lavage & livraison :</strong> ${data.notes}
728:      </div>
729:    ` : ''}
730:
731:    <div style="font-size: 8.5px; color: #64748b; line-height: 1.5; margin-top: 15px;">
732:      ${type === 'quote' ? `
733:        <strong>Conditions Générales du Devis</strong><br/><br/>
734:        Les produits figurant sur ce devis sont proposés sous réserve de disponibilité au moment de la confirmation de la commande.<br/><br/>
735:        Ce devis est valable pendant une durée de 15 jours à compter de sa date d'émission. Passé ce délai, les prix et conditions de vente pourront être modifiés.<br/><br/>
736:        Toute commande devient définitive après validation du présent devis par le client.<br/><br/>
737:        Ce devis devra être présenté lors de la confirmation de la commande afin de permettre l'établissement de la facture définitive.
738:      ` : `
739:        <strong>Conditions Générales de Dépôt</strong><br/><br/>
740:        Nous apportons le plus grand soin au traitement de votre linge. Toutefois, les articles délicats ou ne comportant pas d’étiquette d’entretien claire sont pris en charge sous l’entière responsabilité de leur propriétaire.<br/><br/>
741:        Le linge est à retirer à la date prévue et mentionnée sur la facture. Tout retrait effectué au-delà de cette date pourra entraîner l'application de frais de garde.<br/><br/>
742:        ${data.status === 'in_progress'
743:          ? "Votre linge est actuellement en cours de traitement. Ce document devra être présenté lors du retrait de votre commande."
744:          : data.status === 'ready'
745:          ? "Votre linge est prêt à être retiré. Veuillez présenter ce document lors de la remise de vos articles."
746:          : data.status === 'delivered'
747:          ? "Le linge a été retiré et la prestation est considérée comme terminée. Merci d'avoir fait confiance à notre service de pressing."
748:          : data.status === 'cancelled'
749:          ? "Cette commande a été annulée. Ce document est conservé à titre d'archive."
750:          : "Ce bon de réception / facture devra être présenté obligatoirement lors du retrait de votre linge. Veuillez le conserver soigneusement jusqu'à la restitution complète de vos articles."
751:        }
752:      `}
753:    </div>

756:      <div>
757:        <div class="section-title">
758:          ${type === 'quote' 
759:            ? 'VALIDATION DU CLIENT' 
760:            : data.status === 'delivered' || (data.status && data.amountPaid >= data.total)
761:              ? 'SIGNATURE DU CLIENT'
762:              : 'DÉPÔT CONFIRMÉ PAR LE CLIENT'
763:          }
764:        </div>
765:        <div style="font-size: 8px; color: #94a3b8; font-style: italic; margin-bottom: 5px;">
766:          ${type === 'quote' ? 'Signature précédée de la mention « Bon pour accord »' : 'Signature du client'}
767:        </div>
768:        <div class="signature-area"></div>
769:      </div>
770:      <div style="text-align: right;">
771:        <div class="section-title">
772:          ${type === 'quote' 
773:            ? 'VISA COMMERCIAL' 
774:            : 'CACHET DE L\'ÉTABLISSEMENT'
775:          }
776:        </div>
777:        <div style="font-size: 8px; color: #94a3b8; font-style: italic; margin-bottom: 5px;">${merchant.name || 'Acom Technologie Pressing'}</div>
778:        <div class="signature-area"></div>
779:      </div>
780:    </div>
781:
782:    <div class="footer-center">
783:      Solution de Pressing Acom Gestion v1.8 - Émise numériquement
784:    </div>
785:  </div>
786:</body>
787:</html>
788:    `;
789:  }
790:
791:  let printFrame = document.getElementById('print-iframe') as HTMLIFrameElement;
792:  if (printFrame) {
793:    printFrame.parentNode?.removeChild(printFrame);
794:  }
795:
796:  printFrame = document.createElement('iframe');
797:  printFrame.id = 'print-iframe';
798:  printFrame.style.position = 'fixed';
799:  printFrame.style.top = '-9999px';
800:  printFrame.style.left = '-9999px';
801:  printFrame.style.width = '850px';
802:  printFrame.style.height = '1100px';
803:  printFrame.style.border = 'none';
804:  printFrame.style.opacity = '0.01';
805:  document.body.appendChild(printFrame);
806:
807:  const frameDoc = printFrame.contentWindow?.document || printFrame.contentDocument;
808:  if (frameDoc) {
809:    frameDoc.open();
810:    frameDoc.write(htmlContent);
811:    frameDoc.close();
812:    
813:    // Give the browser window resources/images a brief moment to mount, then execute print
814:    setTimeout(() => {
815:      try {
816:        if (!printFrame?.contentWindow) {
817:          throw new Error("No contentWindow found on print iframe");
818:        }
819:        
820:        // In Acom Gestion Desktop (Electron), iframe.print() might fail or be blocked.
821:        // We can try to open a new popup window, write HTML there, and invoke print.
822:        if (isDesktop) {
823:          const printWin = window.open('', '_blank', 'width=800,height=900');
824:          if (printWin) {
825:            printWin.document.open();
826:            printWin.document.write(htmlContent);
827:            printWin.document.close();
828:            
829:            setTimeout(() => {
830:              try {
831:                printWin.focus();
832:                printWin.print();
833:                // Optionally close after print dialog appears
834:                // printWin.close(); 
835:              } catch (e) {
836:                console.error("Popup window print failed:", e);
837:              }
838:            }, 800);
839:            
840:            toast.success("Impression en cours...", { position: 'top-center' });
841:            return; // Done
842:          } else {
843:             console.warn("Popup blocked, falling back to normal iframe print.");
844:          }
845:        }
846:
847:        printFrame.contentWindow.focus();
848:        printFrame.contentWindow.print();
849:        toast.success("Aperçu d'impression ouvert !", { position: 'top-center' });
850:      } catch (err) {
851:        console.warn("Iframe direct printing bypassed or failed, triggering PDF fallback...", err);
852:        toast.success("Génération de l'aperçu d'impression en cours...", { duration: 3000, position: 'top-center' });
853:        
854:        // Automatic high-quality PDF generation fallback based on document type
855:        // Use 'print' action which handles both web (window.open PDF with autoPrint) and desktop (safe download)
856:        if (type === 'receipt') {
857:          generateReceiptPDF(merchant, data, 'print');
858:        } else if (type === 'invoice' || type === 'unpaid') {
859:          generateA4InvoicePDF(merchant, data, 'print', type);
860:        } else if (type === 'quote') {
861:          generateA4QuotePDF(merchant, data, 'print');
862:        }
863:      }
864:    }, 500);
865:  }
866:};
867:
868:const printDetergentSaleDirect = (merchant: Merchant, sale: any, formatType: '80mm' | '58mm' | 'A4', handleDownloadPDF: any) => {
869:  const isMobile = typeof window !== 'undefined' && /Mobi|Android|iPhone|iPad/i.test(navigator.userAgent || '');
870:  const isDesktop = typeof window !== 'undefined' && 
871:    (window.hasOwnProperty('process') || navigator.userAgent.toLowerCase().indexOf('electron') > -1);
872:  
873:  if (isMobile) {
874:    toast.success("Impression Vente mobile : Préparation du document PDF...", { position: 'top-center' });
875:    handleDownloadPDF(sale);
876:    return;
877:  }
878:
879:  const fmt = (num: number) => {
880:    if (num === undefined || num === null || isNaN(num)) return '0';
881:    const parts = Math.round(num).toString().split('.');
882:    parts[0] = parts[0].replace(/\B(?=(\d{3})+(?!\d))/g, " ");
883:    return parts.join('.');
884:  };
885:
886:  const formattedSaleDate = new Date(sale.date).toLocaleDateString('fr-FR') + ' ' + new Date(sale.date).toLocaleTimeString('fr-FR', {hour: '2-digit', minute:'2-digit'});
887:
888:  let htmlContent = "";
889:
890:  if (formatType === '80mm' || formatType === '58mm') {
891:    const rollWidth = formatType === '58mm' ? '58mm' : '80mm';
892:    const contentWidth = formatType === '58mm' ? '43mm' : '68mm';
893:    const paddingPrint = formatType === '58mm' ? '1mm 3.5mm 1mm 1mm' : '3mm';
894:    const paddingScreen = formatType === '58mm' ? '4mm' : '6mm';
895:    const fontSize = formatType === '58mm' ? '9.5px' : '11px';
896:    const logoWidth = formatType === '58mm' ? '24mm' : '32mm';
897:
898:    htmlContent = `
899:<!DOCTYPE html>
900:<html>
901:<head>
902:  <meta charset="utf-8">
903:  <title>Ticket Vente - ${sale.saleNumber}</title>
904:  <style>
905:    * { box-sizing: border-box; }
906:    @media print {
907:      @page {
908:        size: ${rollWidth} auto;
909:        margin: 0;
910:      }
911:      body {
912:        margin: 0;
913:        padding: ${paddingPrint};
914:        width: ${contentWidth};
915:      }
916:    }
917:    body {
918:      font-family: 'Segoe UI', Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;
919:      font-size: ${fontSize};
920:      line-height: 1.4;
921:      color: #000;
922:      background-color: #fff;
923:      margin: 0 auto;
924:      padding: ${paddingScreen};
925:      width: ${contentWidth};
926:    }
927:    .text-center { text-align: center; }
928:    .text-right { text-align: right; }
929:    .text-bold { font-weight: bold; }
930:    .flex { display: flex; }
931:    .justify-between { justify-content: space-between; }
932:    .logo-container { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 3mm; }
933:    .logo { max-width: ${logoWidth}; max-height: 16mm; object-fit: contain; }
934:    .divider { border-top: 1px dashed #000; margin: 3mm 0; }
935:    .merchant-name { font-size: 13px; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 1mm; text-transform: uppercase; }
936:    .doc-title { font-size: 11px; font-weight: bold; margin: 2mm 0; letter-spacing: 1px; text-transform: uppercase; }
937:    .item-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin-top: 2mm; }
938:    .item-table th { border-bottom: 1px solid #000; font-weight: bold; text-align: left; padding-bottom: 1mm; }
939:    .item-table td { padding: 1.5mm 0; vertical-align: top; }
940:    .total-section { margin-top: 3mm; font-size: 11px; }
941:    .footer { margin-top: 6mm; font-size: 9px; text-align: center; line-height: 1.5; }
942:  </style>
943:</head>
944:<body>
945:  ${merchant.logo ? `<div class="logo-container"><img class="logo" src="${merchant.logo}" alt="Logo" /></div>` : ''}
946:  <div class="text-center">
947:    <div class="merchant-name">${(merchant.name || 'ACOM Pressing').replace(/"/g, '&quot;')}</div>
948:    ${merchant.address ? `<div>${merchant.address.replace(/"/g, '&quot;')}</div>` : ''}
949:    ${merchant.phone ? `<div>Tél: ${merchant.phone}</div>` : ''}
950:    ${merchant.email ? `<div>Email: ${merchant.email}</div>` : ''}
951:  </div>
952:  
953:  <div class="divider"></div>
954:  
955:  <div class="flex justify-between">
956:    <span>Facture N°: ${sale.saleNumber}</span>
957:  </div>
958:  <div style="margin-top: 1mm;">Client : <span class="text-bold">${sale.customerName.replace(/"/g, '&quot;')}</span></div>
959:  ${sale.customerPhone ? `<div>Tél    : ${sale.customerPhone}</div>` : ''}
960:  <div>Date : ${formattedSaleDate}</div>
961:  
962:  <div class="divider"></div>
963:  
964:  <div class="text-center text-bold doc-title">REÇU DE VENTE BOUTIQUE</div>
965:  
966:  <table class="item-table">
967:    <thead>
968:      <tr>
969:        <th style="width: 50%;">Article</th>
970:        <th class="text-center" style="width: 15%;">Qté</th>
971:        <th class="text-right" style="width: 35%;">Total</th>
972:      </tr>
973:    </thead>
974:    <tbody>
975:      ${sale.items.map((it: any) => `
976:        <tr>
977:          <td style="text-transform: capitalize;">${it.productName}</td>
978:          <td class="text-center">${it.quantity}</td>
979:          <td class="text-right">${fmt(it.total)}</td>
980:        </tr>
981:      `).join('')}
982:    </tbody>
983:  </table>
984:  
985:  <div class="divider"></div>
986:  
987:  <div class="total-section">
988:    <div class="flex justify-between">
989:      <span>Sous-total:</span>
990:      <span>${fmt(sale.subtotal)} FCFA</span>
991:    </div>
992:    ${sale.discount > 0 ? `
993:      <div class="flex justify-between" style="color: red;">
994:        <span>Remise:</span>
995:        <span>-${fmt(sale.discount)} FCFA</span>
996:      </div>
997:    ` : ''}
998:    <div class="flex justify-between text-bold" style="font-size: 13px; margin-top: 1.5mm; margin-bottom: 2mm;">
999:      <span>TOTAL PAYÉ</span>
1000:      <span>${fmt(sale.total)} FCFA</span>
1001:    </div>
1002:  </div>
1003:  
1004:  <div class="divider"></div>
1005:  
1006:  <div class="footer">
1007:    <p class="text-bold">Merci de votre achat !</p>
1008:    <p>À bientôt chez ${merchant.name || 'notre établissement'}.</p>
1009:    <p style="font-size: 8px; font-family: monospace; color: #777; margin-top: 4mm;">Généré par Acom Technologie Desktop</p>
1010:  </div>
1011:</body>
1012:</html>
1013:    `;
1014:  } else {
1015:    // A4 Format
1016:    htmlContent = `
1017:<!DOCTYPE html>
1018:<html>
1019:<head>
1020:  <meta charset="utf-8">
1021:  <title>Facture Vente A4 - ${sale.saleNumber}</title>
1022:  <style>
1023:    @media print {
1024:      @page {

1310:  let printFrame = document.getElementById('sale-print-iframe') as HTMLIFrameElement;
1311:  if (printFrame) {
1312:    printFrame.parentNode?.removeChild(printFrame);
1313:  }
1314:
1315:  printFrame = document.createElement('iframe');
1316:  printFrame.id = 'sale-print-iframe';
1317:  printFrame.style.position = 'fixed';
1318:  printFrame.style.top = '-9999px';
1319:  printFrame.style.left = '-9999px';
1320:  printFrame.style.width = formatType === 'A4' ? '850px' : '400px';
1321:  printFrame.style.height = '1100px';
1322:  printFrame.style.border = 'none';
1323:  printFrame.style.opacity = '0.01';
1324:  document.body.appendChild(printFrame);
1325:
1326:  const frameDoc = printFrame.contentWindow?.document || printFrame.contentDocument;
1327:  if (frameDoc) {
1328:    frameDoc.open();
1329:    frameDoc.write(htmlContent);
1330:    frameDoc.close();
1331:    
1332:    setTimeout(() => {
1333:      try {
1334:        if (!printFrame?.contentWindow) {
1335:          throw new Error("No contentWindow found on print iframe");
1336:        }
1337:        
1338:        if (isDesktop) {
1339:          const printWin = window.open('', '_blank', formatType === 'A4' ? 'width=900,height=1000' : 'width=450,height=800');
1340:          if (printWin) {
1341:            printWin.document.open();
1342:            printWin.document.write(htmlContent);
1343:            printWin.document.close();
1344:            
1345:            setTimeout(() => {
1346:              try {
1347:                printWin.focus();
1348:                printWin.print();
1349:              } catch (e) {
1350:                console.error("Popup sales window print failed:", e);
1351:              }
1352:            }, 800);
1353:            
1354:            triggerAcomAlert("Impression Vente", "Impression Vente boutique lancée... Le ticket est en cours de traitement.", "success", "IMPRESSION");
1355:            return;
1356:          }
1357:        }
1358:
1359:        printFrame.contentWindow.focus();
1360:        printFrame.contentWindow.print();
1361:        triggerAcomAlert("Aperçu d'Impression", "Aperçu d'impression Vente boutique ouvert !", "success", "IMPRESSION");
1362:      } catch (err) {
1363:        console.warn("Iframe direct printing failed, triggering PDF fallback...", err);
1364:        handleDownloadPDF(sale);
1365:      }
1366:    }, 500);
1367:  }

1370:const printDetergentQuoteDirect = (merchant: Merchant, quote: any, formatType: '80mm' | '58mm' | 'A4') => {
1371:  const isMobile = typeof window !== 'undefined' && /Mobi|Android|iPhone|iPad/i.test(navigator.userAgent || '');
1372:  const isDesktop = typeof window !== 'undefined' && 
1373:    (window.hasOwnProperty('process') || navigator.userAgent.toLowerCase().indexOf('electron') > -1);
1374:  
1375:  if (isMobile) {
1376:    toast.success("Emission du Devis mobile (Format A4)...", { position: 'top-center' });
1377:    return;
1378:  }
1379:
1380:  const fmt = (num: number) => {
1381:    if (num === undefined || num === null || isNaN(num)) return '0';
1382:    const parts = Math.round(num).toString().split('.');
1383:    parts[0] = parts[0].replace(/\B(?=(\d{3})+(?!\d))/g, " ");
1384:    return parts.join('.');
1385:  };
1386:
1387:  const formattedQuoteDate = new Date(quote.date).toLocaleDateString('fr-FR') + ' ' + new Date(quote.date).toLocaleTimeString('fr-FR', {hour: '2-digit', minute:'2-digit'});
1388:
1389:  let htmlContent = "";
1390:
1391:  if (formatType === '80mm' || formatType === '58mm') {
1392:    const rollWidth = formatType === '58mm' ? '58mm' : '80mm';
1393:    const contentWidth = formatType === '58mm' ? '43mm' : '68mm';
1394:    const paddingPrint = formatType === '58mm' ? '1mm 3.5mm 1mm 1mm' : '3mm';
1395:    const paddingScreen = formatType === '58mm' ? '4mm' : '6mm';
1396:    const fontSize = formatType === '58mm' ? '9.5px' : '11px';
1397:    const logoWidth = formatType === '58mm' ? '24mm' : '32mm';
1398:
1399:    htmlContent = `
1400:<!DOCTYPE html>
1401:<html>
1402:<head>
1403:  <meta charset="utf-8">
1404:  <title>Ticket Devis - ${quote.quoteNumber}</title>
1405:  <style>
1406:    * { box-sizing: border-box; }
1407:    @media print {
1408:      @page {
1409:        size: ${rollWidth} auto;
1410:        margin: 0;
1411:      }
1412:      body {
1413:        margin: 0;
1414:        padding: ${paddingPrint};
1415:        width: ${contentWidth};
1416:      }
1417:    }
1418:    body {
1419:      font-family: 'Segoe UI', Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;
1420:      font-size: ${fontSize};
1421:      line-height: 1.4;
1422:      color: #000;
1423:      background-color: #fff;
1424:      margin: 0 auto;
1425:      padding: ${paddingScreen};
1426:      width: ${contentWidth};
1427:    }
1428:    .text-center { text-align: center; }
1429:    .text-right { text-align: right; }
1430:    .text-bold { font-weight: bold; }
1431:    .flex { display: flex; }
1432:    .justify-between { justify-content: space-between; }
1433:    .logo-container { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 3mm; }
1434:    .logo { max-width: ${logoWidth}; max-height: 16mm; object-fit: contain; }
1435:    .divider { border-top: 1px dashed #000; margin: 3mm 0; }
1436:    .merchant-name { font-size: 13px; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 1mm; text-transform: uppercase; }
1437:    .doc-title { font-size: 11px; font-weight: bold; margin: 2mm 0; letter-spacing: 1px; text-transform: uppercase; }
1438:    .item-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin-top: 2mm; }
1439:    .item-table th { border-bottom: 1px solid #000; font-weight: bold; text-align: left; padding-bottom: 1mm; }
1440:    .item-table td { padding: 1.5mm 0; vertical-align: top; }

1450:    ${merchant.phone ? `<div>Tél: ${merchant.phone}</div>` : ''}
1451:    ${merchant.email ? `<div>Email: ${merchant.email}</div>` : ''}
1452:  </div>
1453:

1455:

1495:        <span>Remise déduite:</span>
1496:        <span>-${fmt(quote.discount)} FCFA</span>
1497:      </div>
1498:    ` : ''}
1499:    <div class="flex justify-between text-bold" style="font-size: 13px; margin-top: 1.5mm; margin-bottom: 2mm;">
1500:      <span>TOTAL ESTIMÉ</span>
1501:      <span>${fmt(quote.total)} FCFA</span>
1502:    </div>
1503:  </div>

1510:    <p style="font-size: 8px; font-family: monospace; color: #777; margin-top: 4mm;">Généré par Acom Technologie Desktop</p>
1511:  </div>
1512:</body>
1513:</html>
1514:    `;
1515:  } else {
1516:    // A4 Format
1517:    htmlContent = `
1518:<!DOCTYPE html>
1519:<html>
1520:<head>
1521:  <meta charset="utf-8">
1522:  <title>Devis Proforma A4 - ${quote.quoteNumber}</title>

1545:    }
1546:    .print-container {

1554:    @media print {
1555:      .print-container {
1556:        box-shadow: none !important;
1557:        padding: 0 !important;
1558:        max-width: 100% !important;
1559:      }
1560:    }
1561:    
1562:    .accent-bg {
1563:      background-color: #3b82f6;
1564:    }

1829:
1830:  let printFrame = document.getElementById('quote-print-iframe') as HTMLIFrameElement;
1831:  if (printFrame) {
1832:    printFrame.parentNode?.removeChild(printFrame);
1833:  }
1834:
1835:  printFrame = document.createElement('iframe');
1836:  printFrame.id = 'quote-print-iframe';
1837:  printFrame.style.position = 'fixed';
1838:  printFrame.style.top = '-9999px';
1839:  printFrame.style.left = '-9999px';
1840:  printFrame.style.width = formatType === 'A4' ? '850px' : '400px';
1841:  printFrame.style.height = '1100px';
1842:  printFrame.style.border = 'none';
1843:  printFrame.style.opacity = '0.01';
1844:  document.body.appendChild(printFrame);
1845:
1846:  const frameDoc = printFrame.contentWindow?.document || printFrame.contentDocument;
1847:  if (frameDoc) {
1848:    frameDoc.open();
1849:    frameDoc.write(htmlContent);
1850:    frameDoc.close();
1851:    
1852:    setTimeout(() => {
1853:      try {
1854:        if (!printFrame?.contentWindow) {
1855:          throw new Error("No contentWindow found on print iframe");
1856:        }
1857:        
1858:        if (isDesktop) {
1859:          const printWin = window.open('', '_blank', formatType === 'A4' ? 'width=900,height=1000' : 'width=450,height=800');
1860:          if (printWin) {
1861:            printWin.document.open();
1862:            printWin.document.write(htmlContent);
1863:            printWin.document.close();
1864:            
1865:            setTimeout(() => {
1866:              try {
1867:                printWin.focus();
1868:                printWin.print();
1869:              } catch (e) {
1870:                console.error("Popup quote window print failed:", e);
1871:              }
1872:            }, 800);
1873:            
1874:            toast.success("Impression Devis boutique lancée...", { position: 'top-center' });
1875:            return;
1876:          }
1877:        }
1878:
1879:        printFrame.contentWindow.focus();
1880:        printFrame.contentWindow.print();
1881:        toast.success("Aperçu d'impression Devis proforma ouvert !", { position: 'top-center' });
1882:      } catch (err) {
1883:        console.warn("Iframe direct printing failed on devis:", err);
1884:      }
1885:    }, 500);
1886:  }
1887:};
1888:
1889:const printPressingTicketDirect = (merchant: Merchant, ticket: any, formatType: '80mm' | '58mm' | 'A4', tarifs: any, handleDownloadPDF: any) => {
1890:  const isMobile = typeof window !== 'undefined' && /Mobi|Android|iPhone|iPad/i.test(navigator.userAgent || '');
1891:  const isDesktop = typeof window !== 'undefined' && 
1892:    (window.hasOwnProperty('process') || navigator.userAgent.toLowerCase().indexOf('electron') > -1);
1893:  
1894:  if (isMobile) {
1895:    toast.success("Impression Pressing mobile : Préparation du document PDF...", { position: 'top-center' });
1896:    handleDownloadPDF(ticket);
1897:    return;
1898:  }
1899:
1900:  const fmt = (num: number) => {
1901:    if (num === undefined || num === null || isNaN(num)) return '0';
1902:    const parts = Math.round(num).toString().split('.');
1903:    parts[0] = parts[0].replace(/\B(?=(\d{3})+(?!\d))/g, " ");
1904:    return parts.join('.');
1905:  };
1906:
1907:  const formattedDepositDate = ticket.depositDate;
1908:  const formattedDeliveryDate = ticket.expectedDeliveryDate || '-';
1909:
1910:  let htmlContent = "";
1911:
1912:  if (formatType === '80mm' || formatType === '58mm') {
1913:    const rollWidth = formatType === '58mm' ? '58mm' : '80mm';
1914:    const contentWidth = formatType === '58mm' ? '43mm' : '68mm';
1915:    const paddingPrint = formatType === '58mm' ? '1mm 3.5mm 1mm 1mm' : '3mm';
1916:    const paddingScreen = formatType === '58mm' ? '4mm' : '6mm';
1917:    const fontSize = formatType === '58mm' ? '9.5px' : '11px';
1918:    const logoWidth = formatType === '58mm' ? '24mm' : '32mm';
1919:
1920:    htmlContent = `
1921:<!DOCTYPE html>
1922:<html>
1923:<head>
1924:  <meta charset="utf-8">
1925:  <title>Ticket Pressing - ${ticket.ticketNumber}</title>
1926:  <style>
1927:    * { box-sizing: border-box; }
1928:    @media print {
1929:      @page {
1930:        size: ${rollWidth} auto;
1931:        margin: 0;
1932:      }
1933:      body {
1934:        margin: 0;
1935:        padding: ${paddingPrint};
1936:        width: ${contentWidth};
1937:      }
1938:    }
1939:    body {
1940:      font-family: 'Segoe UI', Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;
1941:      font-size: ${fontSize};
1942:      line-height: 1.4;
1943:      color: #000;
1944:      background-color: #fff;
1945:      margin: 0 auto;
1946:      padding: ${paddingScreen};
1947:      width: ${contentWidth};
1948:    }
1949:    .text-center { text-align: center; }
1950:    .text-right { text-align: right; }
1951:    .text-bold { font-weight: bold; }
1952:    .flex { display: flex; }
1953:    .justify-between { justify-content: space-between; }
1954:    .logo-container { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 3mm; }
1955:    .logo { max-width: ${logoWidth}; max-height: 16mm; object-fit: contain; }
1956:    .divider { border-top: 1px dashed #000; margin: 3mm 0; }
1957:    .merchant-name { font-size: 13px; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 1mm; text-transform: uppercase; }
1958:    .doc-title { font-size: 11px; font-weight: bold; margin: 2mm 0; letter-spacing: 1px; text-transform: uppercase; }
1959:    .item-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin-top: 2mm; }
1960:    .item-table th { border-bottom: 1px solid #000; font-weight: bold; text-align: left; padding-bottom: 1mm; }
1961:    .item-table td { padding: 1.5mm 0; vertical-align: top; }
1962:    .total-section { margin-top: 3mm; font-size: 11px; }
1963:    .footer { margin-top: 6mm; font-size: 9px; text-align: center; line-height: 1.5; }
1964:  </style>
1965:</head>
1966:<body>
1967:  ${merchant.logo ? `<div class="logo-container"><img class="logo" src="${merchant.logo}" alt="Logo" /></div>` : ''}
1968:  <div class="text-center">
1969:    <div class="merchant-name">${(merchant.name || 'ACOM Pressing').replace(/"/g, '&quot;')}</div>
1970:    ${merchant.address ? `<div>${merchant.address.replace(/"/g, '&quot;')}</div>` : ''}
1971:    ${merchant.phone ? `<div>Tél: ${merchant.phone}</div>` : ''}
1972:    ${merchant.email ? `<div>Email: ${merchant.email}</div>` : ''}
1973:  </div>
1974:  
1975:  <div class="divider"></div>
1976:  
1977:  <div class="flex justify-between">
1978:    <span>Ticket N°: ${ticket.ticketNumber}</span>
1979:  </div>
1980:  <div style="margin-top: 1mm;">Client : <span class="text-bold">${ticket.clientName.replace(/"/g, '&quot;')}</span></div>
1981:  ${ticket.clientPhone ? `<div>Tél    : ${ticket.clientPhone}</div>` : ''}
1982:  <div>Dépôt  : ${formattedDepositDate}</div>
1983:  <div>Retrait: ${formattedDeliveryDate} (Prévu)</div>
1984:  
1985:  <div class="divider"></div>
1986:  
1987:  <div class="text-center text-bold doc-title">${ticket.status === 'quotation' ? 'DEVIS PROFORMA' : 'TICKET REÇU DE CAISSE'}</div>
1988:  
1989:  <table class="item-table">
1990:    <thead>
1991:      <tr>
1992:        <th style="width: 50%;">Article</th>
1993:        <th class="text-center" style="width: 15%;">Qté</th>
1994:        <th class="text-right" style="width: 35%;">Total</th>
1995:      </tr>
1996:    </thead>
1997:    <tbody>
1998:      ${ticket.billingType === 'article' ? 
1999:        Object.keys(ticket.articles).filter(k => ticket.articles[k] > 0).map(k => {
2000:          const qty = ticket.articles[k];
2001:          const singlePrice = tarifs.articles[k as keyof typeof tarifs.articles] || 0;
2002:          return `
2003:            <tr>
2004:              <td style="text-transform: capitalize;">${k}</td>
2005:              <td class="text-center">${qty}</td>
2006:              <td class="text-right">${fmt(qty * singlePrice)}</td>
2007:            </tr>
2008:          `;
2009:        }).join('')
2010:        : `
2011:          <tr>
2012:            <td>Lavage au poids (${ticket.weightKg} Kg, ${ticket.weightService})</td>
2013:            <td class="text-center">1</td>
2014:            <td class="text-right">${fmt(ticket.weightKg * (tarifs.poids[ticket.weightService] || 0))}</td>
2015:          </tr>
2016:        `
2017:      }
2018:      
2019:      ${Object.keys(ticket.supplements).filter(k => ticket.supplements[k]).map(k => {
2020:        const cost = ticket.supplementTarifs[k] || 0;
2021:        let displayName = tariffsDisplayLabels[k] || k;
2022:        return `
2023:          <tr>
2024:            <td>+ ${displayName}</td>
2025:            <td class="text-center">1</td>
2026:            <td class="text-right">${fmt(cost)}</td>
2027:          </tr>
2028:        `;
2029:      }).join('')}
2030:    </tbody>
2031:  </table>
2032:  
2033:  <div class="divider"></div>
2034:  
2035:  <div class="total-section">
2036:    <div class="flex justify-between">
2037:      <span>Sous-total:</span>
2038:      <span>${fmt(ticket.subtotal + ticket.supplementTotal)} FCFA</span>
2039:    </div>
2040:    ${ticket.discount > 0 ? `
2041:      <div class="flex justify-between" style="color: red;">
2042:        <span>Remise:</span>
2043:        <span>-${fmt(ticket.discount)} FCFA</span>
2044:      </div>
2045:    ` : ''}
2046:    <div class="flex justify-between text-bold" style="font-size: 13px; margin-top: 1.5mm; margin-bottom: 2mm;">
2047:      <span>TOTAL TTC</span>
2048:      <span>${fmt(ticket.total)} FCFA</span>
2049:    </div>
2050:    
2051:    <div class="divider"></div>
2052:    
2053:    ${ticket.status !== 'quotation' ? `
2054:      <div class="flex justify-between">
2055:        <span>Mode de Paiement:</span>
2056:        <span class="text-bold" style="text-transform: uppercase;">${ticket.paymentMethod || 'cash'}</span>
2057:      </div>
2058:      <div class="flex justify-between">
2059:        <span>Montant versé:</span>
2060:        <span>${fmt(ticket.amountPaid || 0)} FCFA</span>
2061:      </div>
2062:      <div class="flex justify-between text-bold">
2063:        <span>Reste à payer:</span>
2064:        <span>${fmt(Math.max(0, ticket.total - (ticket.amountPaid || 0)))} FCFA</span>
2065:      </div>
2066:    ` : ''}
2067:  </div>
2068:  
2069:  <div class="divider"></div>
2070:  
2071:  ${ticket.notes ? `
2072:    <div style="font-size: 9px; margin-bottom: 4mm;">
2073:      <strong>Note :</strong> ${ticket.notes}
2074:    </div>
2075:    <div class="divider"></div>
2076:  ` : ''}
2077:  
2078:  <div class="footer">
2079:    ${ticket.status === 'quotation' ? `
2080:      <p class="text-bold" style="margin-bottom: 2mm; font-size: 10px; text-transform: uppercase;">Conditions Générales de Dépôt</p>
2081:      <p style="text-align: justify; font-size: 8.5px; margin-bottom: 2mm; text-align-last: center; line-height: 1.3;">Nous apportons le plus grand soin au traitement de votre linge. Toutefois, les articles délicats ou ne comportant pas d’étiquette d’entretien claire sont pris en charge sous l’entière responsabilité de leur propriétaire.</p>
2082:      <p style="text-align: justify; font-size: 8.5px; margin-bottom: 2mm; text-align-last: center; line-height: 1.3;">Le linge est à retirer à la date prévue et mentionnée sur la facture. Tout retrait effectué au-delà de cette date pourra entraîner l'application de frais de garde.</p>
2083:      <p class="text-bold" style="font-size: 9px; margin-top: 2.5mm; line-height: 1.4; color: #000;">Ce devis devra être présenté lors de la confirmation du dépôt afin de valider les prestations demandées.</p>
2084:    ` : `
2085:      <p class="text-bold">Merci de votre confiance !</p>

2484:  let printFrame = document.getElementById('print-iframe') as HTMLIFrameElement;
2485:  if (printFrame) {
2486:    printFrame.parentNode?.removeChild(printFrame);
2487:  }
2488:
2489:  printFrame = document.createElement('iframe');
2490:  printFrame.id = 'print-iframe';
2491:  printFrame.style.position = 'fixed';
2492:  printFrame.style.top = '-9999px';
2493:  printFrame.style.left = '-9999px';
2494:  printFrame.style.width = formatType === 'A4' ? '850px' : '400px';
2495:  printFrame.style.height = '1100px';
2496:  printFrame.style.border = 'none';
2497:  printFrame.style.opacity = '0.01';
2498:  document.body.appendChild(printFrame);
2499:
2500:  const frameDoc = printFrame.contentWindow?.document || printFrame.contentDocument;
2501:  if (frameDoc) {
2502:    frameDoc.open();
2503:    frameDoc.write(htmlContent);
2504:    frameDoc.close();
2505:    
2506:    setTimeout(() => {
2507:      try {
2508:        if (!printFrame?.contentWindow) {
2509:          throw new Error("No contentWindow found on print iframe");
2510:        }
2511:        
2512:        if (isDesktop) {
2513:          const printWin = window.open('', '_blank', formatType === 'A4' ? 'width=900,height=1000' : 'width=450,height=800');
2514:          if (printWin) {
2515:            printWin.document.open();
2516:            printWin.document.write(htmlContent);
2517:            printWin.document.close();
2518:            
2519:            setTimeout(() => {
2520:              try {
2521:                printWin.focus();
2522:                printWin.print();
2523:              } catch (e) {
2524:                console.error("Popup pressing window print failed:", e);
2525:              }
2526:            }, 800);
2527:            
2528:            toast.success("Impression Pressing lancée...", { position: 'top-center' });
2529:            return;
2530:          }
2531:        }
2532:
2533:        printFrame.contentWindow.focus();
2534:        printFrame.contentWindow.print();
2535:        toast.success("Aperçu d'impression Pressing ouvert !", { position: 'top-center' });
2536:      } catch (err) {
2537:        console.warn("Iframe direct printing failed, triggering PDF fallback...", err);
2538:        handleDownloadPDF(ticket);
2539:      }
2540:    }, 500);
2541:  }

2544:const tariffsDisplayLabels: Record<string, string> = {
2545:  repassage: 'Repassage',
2546:  express: 'Lavage Express (unit.)',
2547:  detachage: 'Détachage spécial',
2548:  livraison: 'Livraison à domicile',

2552:
2553:const pdfFormatNum = (num: number) => {
2554:  if (num === undefined || num === null || isNaN(num)) return '0';
2555:  const parts = Math.round(num).toString().split('.');
2556:  parts[0] = parts[0].replace(/\B(?=(\d{3})+(?!\d))/g, " ");
2557:  return parts.join('.');
2558:};
2559:
2560:
2561:const generateReceiptPDF = (merchant: Merchant, sale: any, action: 'print' | 'download' = 'download') => {
2562:  const doc = new jsPDF({
2563:    unit: 'mm',
2564:    format: [80, 150] // Receipt printer format
2565:  });
2566:
2567:  const margin = 5;
2568:  let y = 10;
2569:
2570:  // Header
2571:  if (merchant.logo) {
2572:    try {
2573:      const imgData = merchant.logo;
2574:      const format = imgData.startsWith('data:image/png') ? 'PNG' : (imgData.startsWith('data:image/webp') ? 'WEBP' : 'JPEG');
2575:      doc.addImage(imgData, format, 30, y, 20, 20, undefined, 'FAST');
2576:      y += 25;
2577:    } catch (e) {
2578:      console.error('Error adding logo to PDF', e);
2579:    }
2580:  }
2581:
2582:  doc.setFontSize(12);
2583:  doc.setFont('helvetica', 'bold');
2584:  doc.text(merchant.name, 40, y, { align: 'center' });
2585:  y += 5;
2586:  doc.setFontSize(8);
2587:  doc.setFont('helvetica', 'normal');
2588:  if (merchant.address) {
2589:    doc.text(merchant.address, 40, y, { align: 'center' });
2590:    y += 4;
2591:  }
2592:  if (merchant.phone) {
2593:    doc.text(`Tel: ${merchant.phone}`, 40, y, { align: 'center' });
2594:    y += 4;
2595:  }
2596:  
2597:  doc.line(margin, y, 80 - margin, y);
2598:  y += 5;
2599:
2600:  // Sale Info
2601:  const saleDate = sale.createdAt?.seconds 
2602:    ? new Date(sale.createdAt.seconds * 1000) 
2603:    : sale.createdAt instanceof Date 
2604:      ? sale.createdAt 
2605:      : new Date();
2606:      
2607:  doc.text(`Date: ${format(saleDate, 'dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm')}`, margin, y);
2608:  y += 4;
2609:  doc.text(`Client: ${sale.customerName || 'Client POS'}`, margin, y);
2610:  y += 6;
2611:
2612:  // Items Header
2613:  doc.setFont('helvetica', 'bold');
2614:  doc.text('Article', margin, y);
2615:  doc.text('Qté', 45, y);
2616:  doc.text('Total', 75, y, { align: 'right' });
2617:  y += 3;
2618:  doc.line(margin, y, 80 - margin, y);
2619:  y += 5;
2620:
2621:  // Items
2622:  sale.items.forEach((item: any) => {
2623:    doc.setFont('helvetica', 'normal');
2624:    doc.setFontSize(8);
2625:    doc.text(item.name.substring(0, 20), margin, y);
2626:    doc.text(item.quantity.toString(), 45, y);
2627:    doc.text(`${pdfFormatNum(item.price * item.quantity)}`, 75, y, { align: 'right' });
2628:    y += 4;
2629:
2630:    const hasDetails = !!(item.sizes || item.colors);
2631:    if (hasDetails) {
2632:      doc.setFont('helvetica', 'italic');
2633:      doc.setFontSize(6.5);
2634:      const detailParts: string[] = [];
2635:      if (item.sizes) detailParts.push(`Taille: ${item.sizes}`);
2636:      if (item.colors) detailParts.push(`Couleur: ${item.colors}`);
2637:      doc.text(detailParts.join(' | '), margin, y - 1);
2638:      y += 3.5;
2639:    }
2640:  });
2641:
2642:  y += 2;
2643:  doc.line(margin, y, 80 - margin, y);
2644:  y += 6;
2645:
2646:  // Total
2647:  doc.setFontSize(10);
2648:  doc.setFont('helvetica', 'bold');
2649:  doc.text('TOTAL', margin, y);
2650:  doc.text(`${pdfFormatNum(sale.totalAmount)} ${merchant.currency}`, 75, y, { align: 'right' });
2651:  y += 8;
2652:
2653:  // Footer
2654:  doc.setFontSize(8);
2655:  doc.setFont('helvetica', 'italic');
2656:  doc.text('Merci de votre visite !', 40, y, { align: 'center' });
2657:
2658:  if (action === 'print') {
2659:    printPDF(doc, `recu_ticket_${sale.id || Date.now()}.pdf`);
2660:  } else {
2661:    saveOrSharePDF(doc, `recu_${sale.id || Date.now()}.pdf`);
2662:  }
2663:};

2665:const generateA4InvoicePDF = (merchant: Merchant, sale: any, action: 'print' | 'download' = 'download', customType?: 'invoice' | 'unpaid') => {
2666:  const doc = new jsPDF();
2667:  const margin = 20;
2668:  
2669:  // Track vertical coordinates independently to prevent any overlap
2670:  let leftY = 20;
2671:
2672:  // Diagonal stamp for unpaid notice
2673:  if (customType === 'unpaid') {
2674:    doc.setFontSize(40);
2675:    doc.setFont('helvetica', 'bold');
2676:    doc.setTextColor(254, 226, 226); // Soft light pink/red
2677:    doc.text('IMPAYÉ / RELANCE', 105, 140, { align: 'center', angle: -30 });
2678:    doc.setTextColor(0); // Reset grayscale color
2679:  }
2680:  
2681:  // Left Side Header - Company Information and Logo
2682:  if (merchant.logo) {
2683:    try {
2684:      const imgData = merchant.logo;
2685:      const format = imgData.startsWith('data:image/png') ? 'PNG' : (imgData.startsWith('data:image/webp') ? 'WEBP' : 'JPEG');
2686:      doc.addImage(imgData, format, margin, leftY, 26, 26, undefined, 'FAST');
2687:      leftY += 32;
2688:    } catch (e) {
2689:      console.error('Error adding logo to PDF', e);
2690:    }
2691:  }
2692:
2693:  doc.setFontSize(16);
2694:  doc.setFont('helvetica', 'bold');
2695:  doc.setTextColor(30, 41, 59); // Slate-800
2696:  doc.text(merchant.name || 'Sen Laundry', margin, leftY);
2697:  leftY += 7;
2698:  
2699:  doc.setFontSize(9);
2700:  doc.setFont('helvetica', 'normal');
2701:  doc.setTextColor(100, 116, 139); // Slate-500
2702:  if (merchant.address) { doc.text(merchant.address, margin, leftY); leftY += 4.5; }
2703:  if (merchant.phone) { doc.text(`Tél: ${merchant.phone}`, margin, leftY); leftY += 4.5; }
2704:  if (merchant.email) { doc.text(`Email: ${merchant.email}`, margin, leftY); leftY += 4.5; }
2705:
2706:  // Right Side Header - Invoice title and unique references in pressing style
2707:  let rightY = 20;
2708:  doc.setFontSize(15);
2709:  doc.setFont('helvetica', 'bold');
2710:  doc.setTextColor(59, 130, 246); // Blue accent color for Pressing template
2711:  doc.text(customType === 'unpaid' ? "BON DE RÉCEPTION IMPAYÉ (A4)" : "BON DE RÉCEPTION PRESSING & STOCK (A4)", 190, rightY, { align: 'right' });
2712:  rightY += 8;
2713:  
2714:  doc.setFontSize(9.5);
2715:  doc.setFont('helvetica', 'normal');
2716:  doc.setTextColor(71, 85, 105); // Slate-600
2717:  const refCode = `PR-${sale.id.slice(0, 8).toUpperCase()}`;
2718:  doc.text(`N° ${refCode}`, 190, rightY, { align: 'right' });
2719:  rightY += 5.5;
2720:  
2721:  const dateStr = sale.createdAt?.seconds 
2722:    ? format(new Date(sale.createdAt.seconds * 1000), 'dd/MM/yyyy') 
2723:    : format(new Date(sale.createdAt || Date.now()), 'dd/MM/yyyy');
2724:  doc.text(`Date dépôt : ${dateStr}`, 190, rightY, { align: 'right' });
2725:  rightY += 5.5;
2726:  doc.text(`Retrait prévu : ${sale.expectedDeliveryDate || dateStr}`, 190, rightY, { align: 'right' });
2727:  rightY += 5.5;
2728:
2729:  // Use the exact maximum height of left/right sections to start client block. Overlap impossible!
2730:  let y = Math.max(leftY, rightY) + 12;
2731:
2732:  // Client Information Section
2733:  doc.setFont('helvetica', 'bold');
2734:  doc.setFontSize(10);
2735:  doc.setTextColor(100, 116, 139); // Slate-500
2736:  doc.text("CLIENT D'ÉTABLISSEMENT :", margin, y);
2737:  y += 6;
2738:  
2739:  doc.setFont('helvetica', 'bold');
2740:  doc.setFontSize(12);
2741:  doc.setTextColor(15, 23, 42); // Slate-900 (Bold Name)
2742:  doc.text(sale.customerName || 'Client de passage', margin, y);
2743:  y += 5;
2744:  
2745:  doc.setFont('helvetica', 'normal');
2746:  doc.setFontSize(9.5);
2747:  doc.setTextColor(71, 85, 105); // Slate-600
2748:  if (sale.customerPhone) { 
2749:    doc.text(`Tél : ${sale.customerPhone}`, margin, y); 
2750:    y += 5; 
2751:  }
2752:
2753:  // Warning banner for unpaid status/reminders
2754:  if (customType === 'unpaid') {
2755:    y += 3;
2756:    doc.setFillColor(254, 242, 242); // Soft light red background card
2757:    doc.rect(margin, y, 170, 10, 'F');
2758:    doc.setFont('helvetica', 'bold');
2759:    doc.setFontSize(8);
2760:    doc.setTextColor(153, 27, 27); // Deep red text
2761:    doc.text("RAPPEL DE SOLDE DEBITEUR : Cette facture présente un reste à payer. Merci de bien vouloir régulariser le solde.", margin + 4, y + 6);
2762:    y += 12;
2763:  }
2764:
2765:  // Elegant Document Table Header
2766:  y += 8;
2767:  doc.setFillColor(241, 245, 249); // Slate-100 fill
2768:  doc.rect(margin, y, 170, 10, 'F');
2769:  
2770:  doc.setFont('helvetica', 'bold');
2771:  doc.setFontSize(9.5);
2772:  doc.setTextColor(71, 85, 105); // Slate-600
2773:  doc.text('Désignation Prestation (Services Pressing, Linge & Produits)', margin + 3, y + 6.5);
2774:  doc.text('Qté', 135, y + 6.5, { align: 'center' });
2775:  doc.text('PU', 160, y + 6.5, { align: 'right' });
2776:  doc.text('Total', 186, y + 6.5, { align: 'right' });
2777:
2778:  // Document Table Rows
2779:  y += 10;
2780:  doc.setFont('helvetica', 'normal');
2781:  doc.setFontSize(9.5);
2782:  doc.setTextColor(51, 65, 85); // Slate-700
2783:  
2784:  sale.items.forEach((item: any, index: number) => {
2785:    const hasDetails = !!(item.sizes || item.colors);
2786:    const rowHeight = hasDetails ? 13 : 9;
2787:
2788:    // Alternating rows style
2789:    if (index % 2 === 0) doc.setFillColor(248, 250, 252); // Slate-50
2790:    else doc.setFillColor(255, 255, 255);
2791:    doc.rect(margin, y, 170, rowHeight, 'F');
2792:    
2793:    // Light bottom divider lines
2794:    doc.setDrawColor(241, 245, 249); // Slate-100
2795:    doc.setLineWidth(0.2);
2796:    doc.line(margin, y + rowHeight, margin + 170, y + rowHeight);
2797:    
2798:    // Grid values mapping
2799:    doc.setFont('helvetica', 'bold');
2800:    doc.setFontSize(9.5);
2801:    doc.setTextColor(15, 23, 42); 
2802:    doc.text(`👕 Prestation : ${item.name}`, margin + 3, y + 5.5);
2803:
2804:    if (hasDetails) {
2805:      doc.setFont('helvetica', 'italic');
2806:      doc.setFontSize(8);
2807:      doc.setTextColor(100, 116, 139); // Slate-500
2808:      const detailParts: string[] = [];
2809:      if (item.sizes) detailParts.push(`Taille: ${item.sizes}`);
2810:      if (item.colors) detailParts.push(`Couleur: ${item.colors}`);
2811:      doc.text(detailParts.join(' | '), margin + 3, y + 9.5);
2812:      
2813:      // Reset font for standard columns
2814:      doc.setFont('helvetica', 'normal');
2815:      doc.setFontSize(9.5);
2816:      doc.setTextColor(51, 65, 85); // Slate-700
2817:    }
2818:
2819:    doc.setFont('helvetica', 'normal');
2820:    doc.text(item.quantity.toString(), 135, y + 5.5, { align: 'center' });
2821:    doc.text(pdfFormatNum(item.price), 160, y + 5.5, { align: 'right' });
2822:    doc.text(pdfFormatNum(item.price * item.quantity), 186, y + 5.5, { align: 'right' });
2823:    y += rowHeight;
2824:  });
2825:
2826:  // Table Bottom Summary Separator
2827:  y += 6;
2828:  doc.setDrawColor(226, 232, 240); // Slate-200
2829:  doc.setLineWidth(0.4);
2830:  doc.line(110, y, 190, y);
2831:  y += 7;
2832:  
2833:  // Total Volume Header
2834:  doc.setFontSize(9.5);
2835:  doc.setFont('helvetica', 'bold');
2836:  doc.setTextColor(100, 116, 139); // Slate-500
2837:  doc.text('Sous-total Prestations', 145, y, { align: 'right' });
2838:  doc.setFont('helvetica', 'bold');
2839:  doc.setTextColor(30, 41, 59); // Slate-800
2840:  doc.text(`${pdfFormatNum(sale.totalAmount)} ${merchant.currency}`, 186, y, { align: 'right' });
2841:
2842:  // Payments List
2843:  if (sale.payments && sale.payments.length > 0) {
2844:    y += 7;
2845:    doc.setDrawColor(241, 245, 249); // Slate-100
2846:    doc.setLineWidth(0.3);
2847:    doc.line(110, y, 190, y);
2848:    y += 5;
2849:    
2850:    doc.setFontSize(8);
2851:    doc.setFont('helvetica', 'bold');
2852:    doc.setTextColor(148, 163, 184); // Slate-400
2853:    doc.text('HISTORIQUE DES PAIEMENTS', 145, y, { align: 'right' });
2854:    y += 4.5;
2855:    
2856:    doc.setFont('helvetica', 'normal');
2857:    doc.setFontSize(8.5);
2858:    doc.setTextColor(71, 85, 105); // Slate-600
2859:    sale.payments.forEach((p: any) => {
2860:      const pDate = p.date?.seconds 
2861:        ? format(new Date(p.date.seconds * 1000), 'dd/MM/yy')
2862:        : format(new Date(p.date), 'dd/MM/yy');
2863:      doc.text(`${pDate} - ${p.method.toUpperCase()}`, 145, y, { align: 'right' });
2864:      doc.text(`${pdfFormatNum(p.amount)} ${merchant.currency}`, 186, y, { align: 'right' });
2865:      y += 4;
2866:    });
2867:    
2868:    y += 2;
2869:    doc.setDrawColor(226, 232, 240); // Slate-200
2870:    doc.setLineWidth(0.5);
2871:    doc.line(110, y, 190, y);
2872:    y += 7;
2873:  } else {
2874:    y += 7;
2875:    doc.setDrawColor(226, 232, 240); // Slate-200
2876:    doc.setLineWidth(0.5);
2877:    doc.line(110, y, 190, y);
2878:    y += 7;
2879:  }
2880:
2881:  // Outstanding/Remaining Debt Highlight Info
2882:  doc.setFontSize(11);
2883:  doc.setFont('helvetica', 'bold');
2884:  doc.setTextColor(59, 130, 246); // Pressing accent color
2885:  
2886:  const isPending = sale.balance !== undefined && sale.balance > 0;
2887:  doc.text('TOTAL TTC PAYER', 145, y, { align: 'right' });
2888:  doc.text(`${pdfFormatNum(sale.totalAmount)} ${merchant.currency}`, 186, y, { align: 'right' });
2889:  
2890:  y += 7;
2891:  doc.setFontSize(9.5);
2892:  doc.setFont('helvetica', 'normal');
2893:  doc.setTextColor(100, 116, 139);

2895:  doc.text(`${pdfFormatNum(sale.receivedAmount || 0)} ${merchant.currency}`, 186, y, { align: 'right' });
2896:
2897:  y += 5.5;
2898:  doc.setFont('helvetica', 'bold');
2899:  doc.text('Reste à percevoir :', 145, y, { align: 'right' });
2900:  if (isPending) {
2901:    doc.setTextColor(220, 38, 38); // Red-600 (Outstanding)
2902:  } else {
2903:    doc.setTextColor(22, 163, 74); // Green-600 (Fully cleared)
2904:  }
2905:  doc.text(`${pdfFormatNum(sale.balance || 0)} ${merchant.currency}`, 186, y, { align: 'right' });
2906:

2908:  y = Math.max(y + 15, 222);
2909:  doc.setFontSize(9);
2910:  doc.setFont('helvetica', 'bold');
2911:  doc.setTextColor(71, 85, 105); // Slate-600
2912:  doc.text("Déchargement Client (Dépôt)", margin + 10, y);
2913:  doc.text("Visa de Réception Pressing", 190 - 10, y, { align: 'right' });
2914:
2915:  y += 4;
2916:  doc.setFont('helvetica', 'italic');
2917:  doc.setFontSize(7.5);
2918:  doc.setTextColor(148, 163, 184); // Slate-400
2919:  doc.text("Signature du déposant", margin + 10, y);
2920:  doc.text(`${merchant.name || 'Acom Technologie Pressing'} authorized Stamp`, 190 - 10, y, { align: 'right' });
2921:
2922:  y += 18;
2923:  doc.setDrawColor(226, 232, 240); // Slate-200

2927:

2930:  doc.setFont('helvetica', 'normal');

2932:  doc.text('Solution de Pressing Acom Gestion v1.8 - Émise numériquement', 105, 280, { align: 'center' });
2933:
2934:  if (action === 'print') {
2935:    printPDF(doc, `facture_A4_${sale.id.slice(0, 8)}.pdf`);
2936:  } else {
2937:    saveOrSharePDF(doc, `facture_${sale.id.slice(0, 8)}.pdf`);
2938:  }

2941:const generateA4QuotePDF = (merchant: Merchant, quote: any, action: 'print' | 'download' = 'download') => {

2943:  const margin = 20;
2944:  
2945:  // Track vertical coordinates independently to prevent any overlap
2946:  let leftY = 20;
2947:  
2948:  // Left Side Header - Company Information and Logo

2950:    try {
2951:      const imgData = merchant.logo;
2952:      const format = imgData.startsWith('data:image/png') ? 'PNG' : (imgData.startsWith('data:image/webp') ? 'WEBP' : 'JPEG');
2953:      doc.addImage(imgData, format, margin, leftY, 26, 26, undefined, 'FAST');
2954:      leftY += 32;
2955:    } catch (e) {
2956:      console.error('Error adding logo to PDF', e);
2957:    }
2958:  }
2959:
2960:  doc.setFontSize(16);
2961:  doc.setFont('helvetica', 'bold');
2962:  doc.setTextColor(30, 41, 59); // Slate-800

2970:  if (merchant.phone) { doc.text(`Tél: ${merchant.phone}`, margin, leftY); leftY += 4.5; }

2997:  rightY += 5.5;

3057:    doc.text(item.name, margin + 3, y + 5.5);

3061:      doc.setFontSize(8);

3063:      const detailParts: string[] = [];
3064:      if (item.sizes) detailParts.push(`Taille: ${item.sizes}`);
3065:      if (item.colors) detailParts.push(`Couleur: ${item.colors}`);
3066:      doc.text(detailParts.join(' | '), margin + 3, y + 9.5);
3067:      
3068:      // Reset font for standard columns
3069:      doc.setFont('helvetica', 'normal');

3309:      if (!cleanActiveParent) return false;

3586:            // Fallback: fetch from cloud (Firestore)
3587:            try {
3588:              const { teacherRepository } = await import('../data/repositories/teacher.repository');
3589:              const tCloud = await teacherRepository.getById(activeTeacherId);
3590:              if (tCloud) {
3591:                teacher = tCloud;
3592:                await db.teachers.put({ ...tCloud, id: activeTeacherId });
3593:              }
3594:            } catch (err) {
3595:              console.error("Failed to fetch teacher from cloud:", err);
3596:            }
3597:          }
3598:          const mId = teacher?.merchantId || teacher?.merchant_id;
3599:          if (teacher && mId) {
3600:            let mLocal = await db.merchants.filter((m: any) => m.id === mId).first();
3601:            if (!mLocal) {
3602:              // Try to fetch from cloud (Firestore)
3603:              try {
3604:                const { merchantRepository } = await import('../data/repositories/merchant.repository');
3605:                const mCloud = await merchantRepository.getById(mId);
3606:                if (mCloud) {
3607:                  mLocal = mCloud;
3608:                  // Cache it/save it locally so next queries find it instantly!
3609:                  await db.merchants.put({ ...mCloud, id: mCloud.id });
3610:                }
3611:              } catch (cloudErr) {
3612:                console.error("Failed to fetch merchant from cloud for teacher:", cloudErr);
3613:              }
3614:            }
3615:            finalMerchant = mLocal;
3616:            setLoggedTeacherProfile(teacher); // Set Teacher info
3617:          }
3618:        } else if (user) {
3619:          let localMerchant = await db.merchants.where('owner_id').equals(user.uid).first();
3620:          if (!localMerchant) {
3621:            const allMerchants = await db.merchants.toArray();
3622:            localMerchant = allMerchants.find(m => m.ownerId === user.uid || m.owner_id === user.uid);
3623:          }
3624:
3625:          // Fetch from Supabase via dbService
3626:          const m = await dbService.merchants.getByOwner(user.uid);
3627:          
3628:          finalMerchant = m || localMerchant;
3629:          
3630:          if (m && m.id) {
3631:              // Update local cache
3632:              await db.merchants.put({ ...m, id: m.id });
3633:          } else if (localMerchant && localMerchant.id) {
3634:              // Rescue: it's local but not in cloud, push it to cloud now!
3635:              await dbService.merchants.save(localMerchant);
3636:          }
3637:        }
3638:        
3639:        // Check for quota
3640:        const quotaExceeded = localStorage.getItem('firebase_quota_exceeded');
3641:        if (quotaExceeded && !finalMerchant) {
3642:          setError(`Quota Firestore épuisé. Impossible de charger le profil marchand.`);
3643:        } else {
3644:          setMerchant(finalMerchant || null);
3645:        }
3646:      } catch (error: any) {
3647:        console.error('Error fetching merchant:', error);
3648:        // If it's a new user and there's an error fetching, we don't block them.
3649:        // We set merchant to null which will trigger the Onboarding screen.
3650:        setMerchant(null);
3651:      } finally {
3652:        setLoadingMerchant(false);
3653:      }
3654:    };
3655:    fetchMerchant();
3656:  }, [user, activeTeacherId, activeParentId, activeStudentId]);
3657:
3658:  const isCloudSyncEnabled = merchant?.plan === 'BASIC' || merchant?.plan === 'STANDARD' || merchant?.plan === 'PREMIUM';

3664:        const globalSettings = await dbService.settings.get('global');
3665:        setSiteSettings(globalSettings);
3666:      } catch (error) {
3667:        console.error('Error fetching global settings:', error);
3668:      }
3669:    };
3670:    fetchSettings();

4121:const PaymentPendingView = ({ merchant, onPaymentSuccess }: { merchant: Merchant, onPaymentSuccess: () => void }) => {
4122:  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
4123:  const [showMockPayment, setShowMockPayment] = useState(false);
4124:  const [isProcessing, setIsProcessing] = useState(false);
4125:
4126:  const handleRetryPayment = async () => {
4127:    setLoading(true);
4128:    // Simulate delay
4129:    setTimeout(() => {
4130:       setShowMockPayment(true);
4131:       setLoading(false);
4132:    }, 500);
4133:  };
4134:
4135:  const selectedPlan = PAYMENT_PLANS.find(p => p.id === merchant.plan);
4136:  const amountStr = selectedPlan?.price.replace(/\D/g, '') || '0';
4137:  const amountNum = parseInt(amountStr, 10);
4138:
4139:  if (showMockPayment) {
4140:    return (
4141:      <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[110] flex items-center justify-center p-4 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-md">

4151:              </div>

4153:                <h2 className="text-xl font-black text-gray-900">CARTE BANCAIRE</h2>
4154:                <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">Paiement Sécurisé (Mode Démo)</p>
4155:              </div>
4156:            </div>
4157:            <button onClick={() => setShowMockPayment(false)} className="p-2 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-full transition-colors">
4158:              <X className="w-5 h-5 text-gray-400" />
4159:            </button>
4160:          </div>

4165:                  <span className="text-sm font-black text-indigo-600 uppercase tracking-tight">Montant à régler</span>
4166:                  <span className="text-2xl font-black text-indigo-600">{amountNum.toLocaleString('fr-FR')} FCFA</span>
4167:                </div>
4168:             </div>
4169:
4170:             <div className="space-y-4">
4171:                <div>
4172:                  <label className="block text-xs font-bold text-gray-700 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">Numéro de carte</label>
4173:                  <div className="relative">
4174:                    <CreditCard className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-5 h-5 text-gray-400" />
4175:                    <input type="text" placeholder="0000 0000 0000 0000" className="w-full pl-10 pr-4 py-3 bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-xl focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:border-indigo-500 transition-all font-mono placeholder:text-gray-300" />

4183:                  </div>
4184:                  <div>
4185:                    <label className="block text-xs font-bold text-gray-700 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">CVC</label>
4186:                    <input type="text" placeholder="123" className="w-full px-4 py-3 bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-xl focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:border-indigo-500 transition-all font-mono placeholder:text-gray-300" />
4187:                  </div>

4197:                <button
4198:                  onClick={() => setShowMockPayment(false)}

4200:                >

4209:                      toast.loading("Validation en cours...", { id: 'payment' });

4211:                        ...merchant,

4221:                      setIsProcessing(false);

4223:                  }}

4241:        <button 
4242:          onClick={handleRetryPayment}
4243:          disabled={loading}
4244:          className="w-full bg-primary text-white py-3 px-4 rounded-xl font-bold hover:bg-primary/90 transition-all"
