4253:// --- Onboarding ---
4254:const MerchantOnboarding = ({ onComplete }: { onComplete: (m: Merchant) => void }) => {
4255:  const { user } = useAuth();
4256:  const [searchParams] = useSearchParams();
4257:  const urlType = searchParams.get('type') || 'boutique';
4258:  const [name, setName] = useState('');
4259:  const [currency, setCurrency] = useState('FCFA');
4260:  const [type, setType] = useState(urlType);
4261:  const [plan, setPlan] = useState<MerchantPlan>('FREE');
4262:  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
4263:  const [isProcessing, setIsProcessing] = useState(false);
4264:
4265:  const [showStripe, setShowStripe] = useState(false);
4266:  const [createdMerchant, setCreatedMerchant] = useState<Merchant | null>(null);
4267:
4268:  const managementTypes = [
4269:    { id: 'boutique', label: 'Commerce / Stock', icon: Package, color: 'text-blue-500', bgColor: 'bg-blue-50' },
4270:    { id: 'entreprise', label: 'Services / Interventions', icon: Wrench, color: 'text-purple-500', bgColor: 'bg-purple-50' },
4271:    { id: 'chantier', label: 'BTP / Chantier', icon: HardHat, color: 'text-orange-500', bgColor: 'bg-orange-50' },
4272:    { id: 'transport', label: 'Transport / Flotte', icon: Truck, color: 'text-emerald-500', bgColor: 'bg-emerald-50' },
4273:    { id: 'rh', label: 'Ressources Humaines', icon: Users, color: 'text-rose-500', bgColor: 'bg-rose-50' },
4274:    { id: 'scolaire', label: 'Établissement Scolaire', icon: GraduationCap, color: 'text-indigo-500', bgColor: 'bg-indigo-50' },
4275:    { id: 'medical', label: 'Établissement Médical', icon: Stethoscope, color: 'text-red-500', bgColor: 'bg-red-50' },
4276:    { id: 'pressing', label: 'Gestion de Pressing', icon: WashingMachine, color: 'text-cyan-500', bgColor: 'bg-cyan-50' },
4277:    { id: 'tailleur', label: 'Ateliers de Couture', icon: Scissors, color: 'text-violet-500', bgColor: 'bg-violet-50' },
4278:  ];
4279:
4280:  const plans = PAYMENT_PLANS;
4281:
4282:  const getSaaSConfig = (t: string) => {
4283:    switch (t) {
4284:      case 'entreprise':
4285:        return { label: "l'entreprise", placeholder: "ex: Mon Entreprise de Services" };
4286:      case 'chantier':
4287:        return { label: "le chantier / BTP", placeholder: "ex: Chantier Résidence Horizon" };
4288:      case 'transport':
4289:        return { label: "la flotte / transport", placeholder: "ex: Transports Express" };
4290:      case 'rh':
4291:        return { label: "l'organisation RH", placeholder: "ex: Ma Structure RH" };
4292:      case 'scolaire':
4293:        return { label: "l'établissement scolaire", placeholder: "ex: École Excellence" };
4294:      case 'medical':
4295:        return { label: "l'établissement médical", placeholder: "ex: Clinique du Parc" };
4296:      case 'pressing':
4297:        return { label: "le pressing / laverie", placeholder: "ex: Pressing Prestige" };
4298:      case 'tailleur':
4299:        return { label: "l'atelier de couture", placeholder: "ex: Atelier de Couture Élégance" };
4300:      default:
4301:        return { label: "votre organisation", placeholder: "ex: Mon Entreprise / Établissement" };
4302:    }
4303:  };
4304:
4305:  const { label, placeholder } = getSaaSConfig(type);
4306:
4307:  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
4308:    e.preventDefault();
4309:    console.log('MerchantOnboarding: handleSubmit called');
4310:    if (!user) return;
4311:    if (!name.trim()) {
4312:      toast.error('Veuillez entrer le nom de votre organisation');
4313:      return;
4314:    }
4315:    setLoading(true);
4316:    try {
4317:      // Final check to see if a merchant was created while the user was on this page
4318:      const existing = await dbService.merchants.getByOwner(user.uid);
4319:      if (existing && !createdMerchant) {
4320:        console.log('MerchantOnboarding: Found existing merchant');
4321:        onComplete(existing);
4322:        return;
4323:      }
4324:
4325:      const isPaidPlan = plan !== 'FREE';
4326:
4327:      const merchantData = {
4328:        ownerId: user.uid,
4329:        owner_id: user.uid, // Support both snake_case and camelCase for rules/queries
4330:        name,
4331:        currency,
4332:        type, // Store the type in the merchant profile
4333:        plan: plan, // Store the selected plan
4334:        subscriptionStatus: isPaidPlan ? 'pending' : 'active', // Pending if paid
4335:        createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
4336:        updatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
4337:        licenseType: plan === 'LOCAL' ? 'local' : 'cloud'
4338:      };
4339:      console.log('MerchantOnboarding: Saving merchant', merchantData);
4340:      const id = await dbService.merchants.save(merchantData as any);
4341:      const newMerchant = { ...merchantData, id } as Merchant;
4342:      setCreatedMerchant(newMerchant);
4343:      console.log('MerchantOnboarding: Merchant saved with ID', id);
4344:
4345:      if (isPaidPlan) {
4346:        const selectedPlan = plans.find(p => p.id === plan);
4347:        if (selectedPlan) {
4348:          try {
4349:            // Mode Démo: On affiche directement la modale de paiement sans faire d'appel API
4350:            setShowStripe(true);
4351:            setLoading(false);
4352:            console.log('MerchantOnboarding: Stripe modal shown');
4353:            return;
4354:          } catch (payError: any) {
4355:            console.error('Payment initialization error:', payError);
4356:            toast.error(payError.message || "Erreur lors de l'initialisation du paiement.");
4357:            setLoading(false);
4358:            return; // STOP HERE, DO NOT CONTINUE
4359:          }
4360:        }
4361:      }
4362:
4363:      console.log('MerchantOnboarding: Creating successful, calling onComplete', newMerchant);
4364:      onComplete(newMerchant);
4365:      toast.success(`Votre ${label} a été créée !`);
4366:    } catch (error: any) {
4367:      console.error('Erreur lors de la création du marchand:', error);
4368:      
4369:      // Check for missing table error from Supabase
4370:      if (error.message?.includes("Could not find the table 'public.merchants'")) {
4371:        toast.error("Base de données non configurée. Veuillez exécuter le script SQL dans votre console Supabase.");
4372:      } else {
4373:        toast.error(`Erreur lors de la création: ${error.message || 'Erreur inconnue'}`);
4374:      }
4375:    } finally {
4376:      setLoading(false);
4377:    }
4378:  };
4379:
4380:  const handleStripeSuccess = async () => {
4381:    console.log('MerchantOnboarding: handleStripeSuccess called');
4382:    if (!createdMerchant) {
4383:      console.error('MerchantOnboarding: No createdMerchant');
4384:      return;
4385:    }
4386:    try {
4387:      const updatedMerchant = { 
4388:        ...createdMerchant, 
4389:        subscriptionStatus: 'active' as const,
4390:        updatedAt: new Date() 
4391:      };
4392:      console.log('MerchantOnboarding: Saving updated merchant', updatedMerchant);
4393:      await dbService.merchants.save(updatedMerchant);
4394:      console.log('MerchantOnboarding: Updated merchant saved, calling onComplete', updatedMerchant);
4395:      onComplete(updatedMerchant);
4396:      toast.success(`Inscription et paiement validés avec succès !`);
4397:      setShowStripe(false);
4398:    } catch (error) {
4399:      console.error('MerchantOnboarding: Error saving updated merchant', error);
4400:      toast.error('Erreur lors de la validation finale de votre accès.');
4401:    }
4402:  };
4403:
4404:  if (showStripe && createdMerchant) {
4405:    return (
4406:      <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[110] flex items-center justify-center p-4 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-md">
4407:        <motion.div 
4408:          initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
4409:          animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
4410:          className="bg-white w-full max-w-lg rounded-[2.5rem] p-8 shadow-2xl overflow-hidden"
4411:        >
4412:          <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-8">
4413:            <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
4414:              <div className="w-10 h-10 bg-indigo-50 text-indigo-600 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center">
4415:                <CreditCard className="w-5 h-5" />
4416:              </div>
4417:              <div>
4418:                <h2 className="text-xl font-black text-gray-900">CARTE BANCAIRE</h2>
4419:                <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">Paiement Sécurisé (Mode Démo)</p>
4420:              </div>
4421:            </div>
4422:            <button onClick={() => {
4423:                setShowStripe(false);
4424:                toast.error("Paiement annulé. Vous devez payer pour accéder à votre espace.");
4425:                window.location.reload();
4426:            }} className="p-2 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-full transition-colors">
4427:              <X className="w-5 h-5 text-gray-400" />
4428:            </button>
4429:          </div>
4430:          
4431:          <div className="space-y-6">
4432:             <div className="bg-gray-50 p-4 rounded-xl border border-gray-200 mb-6">
4433:                <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
4434:                  <span className="text-sm font-black text-indigo-600 uppercase tracking-tight">Montant à régler</span>
4435:                  <span className="text-2xl font-black text-indigo-600">{parseInt(plans.find(p => p.id === plan)?.price.replace(/\D/g, '') || '0', 10).toLocaleString('fr-FR')} FCFA</span>
4436:                </div>
4437:             </div>

4665:const PlanUpgradeModal = ({ 
4666:  merchant, 
4667:  onClose, 
4668:  onUpdate 
4669:}: { 
4670:  merchant: Merchant, 
4671:  onClose: () => void, 
4672:  onUpdate: (m: Merchant) => void 
4673:}) => {
4674:  const [loading, setLoading] = useState<string | null>(null);
4675:  const [showStripe, setShowStripe] = useState(false);
4676:  const [mockPaymentPlanId, setMockPaymentPlanId] = useState<string | null>(null);
4677:  const [mockPhone, setMockPhone] = useState('');
4678:  const [clientSecret, setClientSecret] = useState<string | null>(null);
4679:  const [selectedPlanId, setSelectedPlanId] = useState<string | null>(null);
4680:
4681:  const stripeKey = import.meta.env.VITE_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY;
4682:  const stripePromise = useMemo(() => stripeKey ? loadStripe(stripeKey) : null, [stripeKey]);
4683:
4684:  const plans = [
4685:    {
4686:      id: 'FREE',
4687:      name: 'TESTE',
4688:      price: '0',
4689:      description: 'Pour débuter votre essai',
4690:      features: ['Gestion de stock basique', '2 ventes par jour', '2 Produits', '1 utilisateur'],
4691:      color: 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-600'
4692:    },
4693:    {
4694:      id: 'BASIC',
4695:      name: 'BASIC',
4696:      price: '10 000',
4697:      description: 'Pour les petites structures',
4698:      features: ['Ventes illimitées', '3 utilisateurs', 'Facturation PDF'],
4699:      color: 'bg-blue-50 text-blue-600'
4700:    },
4701:    {
4702:      id: 'STANDARD',
4703:      name: 'STANDARD',
4704:      price: '25 000',
4705:      recommended: true,
4706:      description: 'Pour les structures en croissance',
4707:      features: ['Multi-établissements', 'Analytique avancée', 'Support prioritaire'],
4708:      color: 'bg-primary/10 text-primary'
4709:    },
4710:    {
4711:      id: 'PREMIUM',
4712:      name: 'PREMIUM',
4713:      price: '45 000',
4714:      description: 'La solution complète',
4715:      features: ['Établissements illimités', 'API personnalisée', 'Account Manager'],
4716:      color: 'bg-purple-50 text-purple-600'
4717:    },
4718:    {
4719:      id: 'LOCAL',
4720:      name: 'LICENCE LOCALE',
4721:      price: '350 000',
4722:      description: 'Logiciel de Gestion Local (SQLite)',
4723:      features: ['Paiement unique', 'Données en local', 'Acom Gestion Desktop'],
4724:      color: 'bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-600'
4725:    }
4726:  ];
4727:
4728:  const handleUpgrade = async (planId: string) => {
4729:    if (planId === merchant.plan) return;
4730:    
4731:    setLoading(planId);
4732:    try {
4733:      if (planId === 'FREE') {
4734:        const updatedMerchant = { 
4735:          ...merchant, 
4736:          plan: 'FREE' as any, 
4737:          licenseType: 'cloud' as 'cloud' | 'local',
4738:          updatedAt: new Date() 
4739:        };
4740:        await dbService.merchants.save(updatedMerchant);
4741:        onUpdate(updatedMerchant);
4742:        toast.success(`Plan mis à jour vers FREE`);
4743:        onClose();
4744:        return;
4745:      }
4746:
4747:      const selectedPlan = plans.find(p => p.id === planId);
4748:      if (!selectedPlan) return;
4749:
4750:      const amount = parseInt(selectedPlan.price.replace(/\D/g, ''), 10);
4751:      const desc = `Abonnement Acom SaaS - Plan ${planId} (${merchant.name})`;
4752:      
4753:      const link = await payDunyaService.createPaymentLink({
4754:        amount,
4755:        description: desc,
4756:        orderId: `SUBSCRIPTION_${merchant.id}_${planId}_${Date.now()}`,
4757:        returnUrl: window.location.origin + `/merchant?payment_success=true&new_plan=${planId}&merchant_id=${merchant.id}`,
4758:        cancelUrl: window.location.href
4759:      });
4760:
4761:      // Show notification and redirect
4762:      toast.loading('Redirection vers PayDunya...');
4763:      
4764:      // Attempt to open in new tab (some browsers block this, so we also provide a manual way if needed)
4765:      const win = window.open(link, '_blank');
4766:      if (!win) {
4767:        window.location.href = link; // Fallback to current tab if popup blocked
4768:      } else {
4769:        toast.dismiss();
4770:        toast.success('Le lien de paiement a été ouvert dans un nouvel onglet.');
4771:        onClose();
4772:      }
4773:    } catch (error: any) {
4774:      console.error('Upgrade error:', error);
4775:      toast.error(error.message || "Erreur lors de l'initialisation du paiement");
4776:    } finally {
4777:      setLoading(null);
4778:    }
4779:  };
4780:
4781:  const handleUpgradeWithStripe = async (planId: string) => {
4782:    if (planId === merchant.plan) return;
4783:    setLoading(`${planId}_stripe`);
4784:    try {
4785:      const selectedPlan = plans.find(p => p.id === planId);
4786:      if (!selectedPlan) return;
4787:
4788:      const amount = parseInt(selectedPlan.price.replace(/\D/g, ''), 10);
4789:      
4790:      if (!stripeKey) {
4791:        throw new Error("La clé publique Stripe (VITE_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY) n'est pas configurée.");
4792:      }
4793:
4794:      const response = await fetch(getApiUrl('/api/create-payment-intent'), {
4795:        method: 'POST',
4796:        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
4797:        body: JSON.stringify({
4798:          amount,
4799:          orderId: `SUBSCRIPTION_${merchant.id}_${planId}_${Date.now()}`,
4800:          currency: 'xof'
4801:        }),
4802:      });
4803:
4804:      const data = await response.json();
4805:      if (data.error) throw new Error(data.error);
4806:
4807:      setClientSecret(data.clientSecret);
4808:      setSelectedPlanId(planId);
4809:      setShowStripe(true);
4810:    } catch (error: any) {
4811:      console.error('Stripe upgrade error:', error);
4812:      toast.error(error.message || "Erreur lors de l'initialisation de Stripe");
4813:    } finally {
4814:      setLoading(null);
4815:    }
4816:  };
4817:
4818:  const handleStripeSuccess = async () => {
4819:    if (!selectedPlanId) return;
4820:    try {
4821:      const updatedMerchant = { 
4822:        ...merchant, 
4823:        plan: selectedPlanId as any, 
4824:        licenseType: selectedPlanId === 'LOCAL' ? 'local' : merchant.licenseType,
4825:        updatedAt: new Date() 
4826:      };
4827:      await dbService.merchants.save(updatedMerchant);
4828:      onUpdate(updatedMerchant);
4829:      toast.success(`Plan mis à jour vers ${selectedPlanId} via Stripe !`);
4830:      onClose();
4831:    } catch (error) {
4832:      toast.error('Erreur lors de la mise à jour finale du plan');
4833:    }
4834:  };
4835:
4836:
4837:  if (showStripe && clientSecret && stripePromise) {
4838:    return (
4839:      <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[110] flex items-center justify-center p-4 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-md">
4840:        <motion.div 
4841:          initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
4842:          animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
4843:          className="bg-white w-full max-w-lg rounded-[2.5rem] p-8 shadow-2xl overflow-hidden"
4844:        >
4845:          <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-8">
4846:            <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
4847:              <div className="w-10 h-10 bg-indigo-50 text-indigo-600 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center">
4848:                <LockIcon className="w-5 h-5" />
4849:              </div>
4850:              <div>
4851:                <h2 className="text-xl font-black text-gray-900">CARTE PREPAYE</h2>
4852:                <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">Paiement sécurisé via Stripe</p>
4853:              </div>
4854:            </div>
4855:            <button onClick={() => setShowStripe(false)} className="p-2 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-full transition-colors">
4856:              <X className="w-5 h-5 text-gray-400" />
4857:            </button>
4858:          </div>
4859:          <Elements stripe={stripePromise} options={{ clientSecret }}>
4860:            <PaymentForm 
4861:              onSuccess={() => handleStripeSuccess()} 
4862:              onCancel={() => setShowStripe(false)}
4863:              amount={parseInt(plans.find(p => p.id === selectedPlanId)?.price.replace(/\D/g, '') || '0', 10)} 
4864:              totalAmount={parseInt(plans.find(p => p.id === selectedPlanId)?.price.replace(/\D/g, '') || '0', 10)}
4865:              orderId={`SUBSCRIPTION_${merchant.id}_${selectedPlanId}`}
4866:              paymentType="full"
4867:              returnUrl={`${window.location.origin}/merchant/settings?subscription_success=true`}
4868:            />
4869:          </Elements>
4870:        </motion.div>
4871:      </div>
4872:    );
4873:  }
4874:
4875:  return (
4876:    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[100] flex items-center justify-center p-4 bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-sm overflow-y-auto pt-20 pb-20 sm:pt-4 sm:pb-4">
4877:      <motion.div 
4878:        initial={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.95 }}
4879:        animate={{ opacity: 1, scale: 1 }}
4880:        className="bg-white w-full max-w-7xl rounded-3xl sm:rounded-[2.5rem] shadow-2xl overflow-hidden my-auto"
4881:      >
4882:        <div className="p-6 sm:p-8 border-b border-gray-100 flex items-center justify-between">
4883:          <div>
4884:            <h2 className="text-xl sm:text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 leading-tight">Passer au forfait supérieur</h2>
4885:            <p className="text-xs sm:text-sm text-gray-500">Choisissez le plan qui correspond à vos besoins actuels.</p>
4886:          </div>
4887:          <button onClick={onClose} className="p-2 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-full transition-colors flex-shrink-0">
4888:            <X className="w-5 h-5 sm:w-6 sm:h-6 text-gray-400" />
4889:          </button>
4890:        </div>
4891:
4892:        <div className="p-6 sm:p-8 grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-5 gap-4 sm:gap-6 max-h-[70vh] overflow-y-auto">
4893:          {plans.map((plan) => (
4894:            <div 
4895:              key={plan.id}
4896:              className={`relative p-6 rounded-3xl border-2 transition-all ${
4897:                merchant.plan === plan.id 
4898:                  ? 'border-primary bg-primary/5' 
4899:                  : plan.recommended 
4900:                    ? 'border-primary/20 bg-white' 
4901:                    : 'border-gray-100 bg-white'
4902:              }`}
4903:            >
4904:              {plan.recommended && (

4907:                </div>
4908:              )}
4909:

4911:                <Zap className="w-5 h-5" />

5327:              { id: 'custom', label: '✏️ Libre', defaultText: "Information administrative de l'établissement : Chers parents d'élèves, veuillez prendre connaissance de l'annonce suivante concernant [Élève] ([Classe]) : " }

5351:              </label>
5352:

5354:              <button
5355:                type="button"
5356:                disabled={!broadcastCustomBody || broadcastCustomBody.trim().length < 5}
5357:                onClick={async () => {
5358:                  const currentTxt = broadcastCustomBody.trim();
5359:                  const toastId = toast.loading("Optimisation IA du style en cours (ERP)... ✨");

Tu DEVES IMPÉRATIVEMENT préserver les mots-clés de fusion entre crochets comme [Élève], [Tuteur] ou [Classe] sans les altérer. Reste concis.
5362:Message d'origine: "${currentTxt}"`;
5363:                    const responseText = await geminiService.generateText(prompt);
5364:                    if (responseText) {
5365:                      setBroadcastCustomBody(responseText.trim());
5366:                      toast.success("Message embelli par l'I.A. ! 🎉", { id: toastId });
5367:                    } else {
5368:                      toast.error("La génération I.A. a retourné une réponse vide.", { id: toastId });
5369:                    }
5370:                  } catch (e) {
5371:                    console.error(e);
5372:                    toast.error("Échec de la réécriture IA, utilisation de la version actuelle.", { id: toastId });
5373:                  }
5374:                }}
5375:                className="px-3 py-1.5 bg-gradient-to-r from-indigo-600 to-indigo-800 text-white rounded-lg text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-wider transition-all flex items-center gap-1.5 cursor-pointer disabled:opacity-40 hover:scale-105 shadow-md shadow-indigo-500/20"
5376:              >

5378:                <span>Embellir avec I.A. ✨</span>
5379:              </button>
5380:            </div>
5381:

5383:              rows={4}
5384:              value={broadcastCustomBody}
5385:              onChange={(e) => setBroadcastCustomBody(e.target.value)}
5386:              placeholder="Rédigez le message de groupe..."

5388:            />
5389:          </div>
5390:        </div>
5391:

5402:                </h5>
5403:              </div>
5404:

5406:              <button
5407:                type="button"

5410:                  broadcastSelectedStudents.forEach(id => {

5412:                  });

5417:              >

5425:            </p>
5426:
5427:            <div className="space-y-2 max-h-[350px] overflow-y-auto pr-2 select-none custom-scrollbar bg-white p-4 rounded-2xl border border-indigo-100 shadow-inner">
5428:              {broadcastSelectedStudents.map((studentId, idx) => {
5429:                const student = students.find((s: any) => s.id === studentId);
5430:                if (!student) return null;
5431:
5432:                // Resolve parent phone and name
5433:                const parentChoice = student.primaryParentContact || 'father';
5434:                let resolvedPhone = '';
5435:                let parentName = '';
5436:                if (parentChoice === 'father') {
5437:                  resolvedPhone = student.fatherPhone;
5438:                  parentName = student.fatherName || `Mère de ${student.firstName}`;
5439:                } else if (parentChoice === 'mother') {
5440:                  resolvedPhone = student.motherPhone;
5441:                  parentName = student.motherName || `Mère de ${student.firstName}`;
5442:                } else {
5443:                  resolvedPhone = student.guardianPhone || student.parentContact || '';
5444:                  parentName = student.guardianName || `Tuteur de ${student.firstName}`;
5445:                }
5446:                const phone = resolvedPhone || student.parentContact || '';
5447:
5448:                // Personalize templates
5449:                const mergeText = (template: string) => {
5450:                  let text = template;
5451:                  text = text.replace(/\[Élève\]/g, `${student.firstName || ''} ${student.lastName || ''}`.trim() || student.name || "l'élève");
5452:                  text = text.replace(/\[Classe\]/g, student.class || 'CM1');
5453:                  text = text.replace(/\[Tuteur\]/g, parentName);
5454:                  return text;
5455:                };
5456:
5457:                const personalizedText = mergeText(broadcastCustomBody || 'Absent');
5458:
5459:                const whatsappUrl = `https://wa.me/${phone.replace(/[^0-9+]/g, '')}?text=${encodeURIComponent(personalizedText)}`;
5460:                const smsUrl = `sms:${phone.replace(/[^0-9+]/g, '')}?body=${encodeURIComponent(personalizedText)}`;
5461:
5462:                return (
5463:                  <div key={studentId} className="p-4 bg-slate-50 border border-gray-200/60 rounded-xl flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-center justify-between gap-4 hover:bg-indigo-50/40 transition-colors">
5464:                    <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
5465:                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2.5">
5466:                        <span className="w-6 h-6 bg-indigo-100 text-indigo-700 text-[10px] rounded-full flex items-center justify-center font-black shrink-0">
5467:                          {idx + 1}
5468:                        </span>
5469:                        <p className="text-sm font-black text-slate-800 truncate">
5470:                          {parentName} (Tuteur de {student.name || `${student.firstName} ${student.lastName}`})
5471:                        </p>
5472:                      </div>
5473:                      <div className="mt-2 p-3 bg-white rounded-lg text-[11px] text-gray-500 font-medium border border-gray-200 whitespace-pre-line shadow-sm relative">
5474:                        {personalizedText}
5475:                      </div>
5476:                    </div>
5477:

5479:                      {/* Preview / Details Button */}
5480:                      <button
5481:                        type="button"
5482:                        onClick={() => setDashboardDispatchModal({
5483:                          phone,
5484:                          studentName: student.name || `${student.firstName} ${student.lastName}`,
5485:                          parentName,
5486:                          message: personalizedText,
5487:                          title: broadcastCategory === 'absence' ? 'Absence' :
5488:                                 broadcastCategory === 'delay' ? 'Retard' :
5489:                                 broadcastCategory === 'grade_report' ? 'Évaluation' :
5490:                                 broadcastCategory === 'remind_payment' ? 'Écolage' : 'Annonce Libre'
5491:                        })}
5492:                        className="py-2 px-3 bg-slate-100 hover:bg-slate-200 text-slate-700 text-[10px] font-black rounded-xl uppercase tracking-wider cursor-pointer transition-colors"
5493:                      >
5494:                        🔎 Aperçu
5495:                      </button>
5496:

5499:                        href={whatsappUrl}
5500:                        target="_blank"

5502:                        onClick={() => {

5504:                          toast.success(`Redirection WhatsApp préparée pour ${parentName}`);
5505:                        }}
5506:                        className="py-2 px-3 bg-emerald-50 hover:bg-emerald-500 text-emerald-700 hover:text-white rounded-xl text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-wider transition-colors inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 border border-emerald-200 cursor-pointer shadow-sm"
5507:                      >
5508:                        <MessageSquare className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
5509:                        <span>WhatsApp</span>
5510:                      </a>
5511:

5513:                      <a
5514:                        href={smsUrl}
5515:                        onClick={() => {
5516:                          setBroadcastSentStatus(prev => ({ ...prev, [studentId]: 'sms' }));
5517:                          toast.success(`Lien SMS préparé pour ${parentName}`);
5518:                        }}
5519:                        className="py-2 px-3 bg-blue-50 hover:bg-blue-600 text-blue-700 hover:text-white rounded-xl text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-wider transition-colors inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 border border-blue-200 cursor-pointer shadow-sm"
5520:                      >
5521:                        <Mail className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
5522:                        <span>SMS</span>
5523:                      </a>
5524:                    </div>
5525:                  </div>
5526:                );
5527:              })}
5528:            </div>
5529:          </div>
5530:        )}
5531:
5532:        {broadcastSelectedStudents.length === 0 && (
5533:          <div className="p-10 border-2 border-dashed border-gray-200 rounded-3xl text-center bg-slate-50 text-gray-400">
5534:            <div className="w-16 h-16 bg-white rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mx-auto mb-4 shadow-sm border border-gray-100">
5535:              <Zap className="w-8 h-8 text-indigo-300 animate-pulse" />
5536:            </div>
5537:            <p className="text-sm font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-indigo-950">Sélectionnez des parents et tuteurs ci-dessus</p>
5538:            <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-2 font-medium">Cochez les tuteurs à qui diffuser le message intelligent pour déverrouiller le cockpit d'envoi.</p>
5539:          </div>
5540:        )}
5541:      </div>
5542:    </div>
5543:  );
5544:};
5545:
5546:const MerchantDashboard = ({ 
5547:  merchant, 
5548:  onUpdate,
5549:  showUpgradeModal,
5550:  setShowUpgradeModal,
5551:  setActiveTab
5552:}: { 
5553:  merchant: Merchant, 
5554:  onUpdate: (m: Merchant) => void,
5555:  showUpgradeModal: boolean,
5556:  setShowUpgradeModal: (val: boolean) => void,
5557:  setActiveTab?: (tab: string) => void
5558:}) => {
5559:  const [desktopOS, setDesktopOS] = useState<'windows' | 'mac' | 'linux'>('windows');
5560:  const [fileToRestore, setFileToRestore] = useState<File | null>(null);
5561:  const [dashboardSelectedMonth, setDashboardSelectedMonth] = useState<string>(new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 7));
5562:
5563:  // Load tailleur-specific data if merchant type is tailleur
5564:  const tailleurClients = useMemo<any[]>(() => {
5565:    if (merchant.type !== 'tailleur') return [];
5566:    try {
5567:      const saved = localStorage.getItem(`tailleur_clients_${merchant.id}`);
5568:      return saved ? JSON.parse(saved) : [];
5569:    } catch {
5570:      return [];
5571:    }
5572:  }, [merchant.id, merchant.type]);
5573:
5574:  const tailleurOrders = useMemo<any[]>(() => {
5575:    if (merchant.type !== 'tailleur') return [];
5576:    try {
5577:      const saved = localStorage.getItem(`tailleur_orders_${merchant.id}`);
5578:      return saved ? JSON.parse(saved) : [];
5579:    } catch {
5580:      return [];
5581:    }
5582:  }, [merchant.id, merchant.type]);
5583:
5584:  const tailleurTissus = useMemo<any[]>(() => {
5585:    if (merchant.type !== 'tailleur') return [];
5586:    try {
5587:      const saved = localStorage.getItem(`tailleur_tissus_${merchant.id}`);
5588:      return saved ? JSON.parse(saved) : [];
5589:    } catch {
5590:      return [];
5591:    }
5592:  }, [merchant.id, merchant.type]);
5593:
5594:  const tailleurDashboardStats = useMemo(() => {
5595:    if (merchant.type !== 'tailleur') return null;
5596:
5597:    const filteredOrders = dashboardSelectedMonth
5598:      ? tailleurOrders.filter(o => o.createdAt && o.createdAt.startsWith(dashboardSelectedMonth))
5599:      : tailleurOrders;
5600:
5601:    const ordersCount = filteredOrders.length;
5602:    const totalOrdersAmount = filteredOrders.reduce((sum, o) => sum + (Number(o.price) || 0), 0);
5603:    const totalAdvances = filteredOrders.reduce((sum, o) => sum + (Number(o.advance) || 0), 0);
5604:    const totalPaid = filteredOrders.filter(o => o.status === 'livre').length;
5605:    const activeOrders = filteredOrders.filter(o => o.status !== 'livre').length;
5606:
5607:    return {
5608:      ordersCount,
5609:      totalOrdersAmount,
5610:      totalAdvances,
5611:      totalPaid,
5612:      activeOrders,
5613:      clientsCount: tailleurClients.length,
5614:      tissusCount: tailleurTissus.length
5615:    };
5616:  }, [tailleurClients, tailleurOrders, tailleurTissus, merchant.type, dashboardSelectedMonth]);
5617:
5618:  // Load pressing-specific data if merchant type is pressing
5619:  const pressingTickets = useMemo<PressingTicket[]>(() => {
5620:    if (merchant.type !== 'pressing') return [];
5621:    try {
5622:      const saved = localStorage.getItem(`pressing_tickets_${merchant.id}`);
5623:      return saved ? JSON.parse(saved) : [];
5624:    } catch {
5625:      return [];
5626:    }
5627:  }, [merchant.id, merchant.type]);
5628:
5629:  const pressingProductSales = useMemo<any[]>(() => {
5630:    if (merchant.type !== 'pressing') return [];
5631:    try {
5632:      const saved = localStorage.getItem(`pressing_stock_sales_${merchant.id}`);
5633:      return saved ? JSON.parse(saved) : [];
5634:    } catch {
5635:      return [];
5636:    }
5637:  }, [merchant.id, merchant.type]);
5638:
5639:  const pressingDashboardTarifs = useMemo(() => {
5640:    if (merchant.type !== 'pressing') return null;
5641:    try {
5642:      const saved = localStorage.getItem(`pressing_tarifs_${merchant.id}`);
5643:      return saved ? JSON.parse(saved) : null;
5644:    } catch {
5645:      return null;
5646:    }
5647:  }, [merchant.id, merchant.type]);
5648:
5649:  const pressingDashboardStats = useMemo(() => {
5650:    if (merchant.type !== 'pressing') return null;
5651:
5652:    const filteredTickets = (dashboardSelectedMonth 
5653:      ? pressingTickets.filter(t => t.depositDate && t.depositDate.startsWith(dashboardSelectedMonth))
5654:      : pressingTickets).filter(t => t.status !== 'quotation');
5655:      
5656:    const filteredProductSales = dashboardSelectedMonth
5657:      ? pressingProductSales.filter(s => s.date && s.date.startsWith(dashboardSelectedMonth))
5658:      : pressingProductSales;
5659:
5660:    const totalTicketsAmount = filteredTickets.reduce((sum, t) => sum + (t.total || 0), 0);
5661:    const totalTicketsPaid = filteredTickets.reduce((sum, t) => sum + (t.amountPaid || 0), 0);
5662:    const totalTicketsDue = Math.max(0, totalTicketsAmount - totalTicketsPaid);
5663:    
5664:    const totalTicketsCost = filteredTickets.reduce((sum, t) => {
5665:      if (typeof t.totalCost === 'number') return sum + t.totalCost;
5666:      
5667:      let retroCost = 0;
5668:      const aCosts = pressingDashboardTarifs?.articles_costs || {};
5669:      const pCosts = pressingDashboardTarifs?.poids_costs || {};
5670:      const sCosts = pressingDashboardTarifs?.supplements_costs || {};
5671:
5672:      if (t.billingType === 'article' && t.articles) {
5673:        retroCost += Object.keys(t.articles).reduce((acc, key) => {
5674:           let defaultCost = 0;
5675:           if (key === 'chemise') defaultCost = 100;
5676:           if (key === 'pantalon') defaultCost = 150;
5677:           if (key === 'costume') defaultCost = 300;
5678:           if (key === 'robe') defaultCost = 200;
5679:           if (key === 'drap') defaultCost = 150;
5680:           if (key === 'couverture') defaultCost = 400;
5681:           if (key === 'rideau') defaultCost = 300;
5682:           if (key === 'autre') defaultCost = 100;
5683:           return acc + (t.articles[key] * (aCosts[key] !== undefined ? aCosts[key] : defaultCost));
5684:        }, 0);
5685:      } else if (t.billingType === 'poids' && t.weightKg) {
5686:         let defaultCost = 0;
5687:         if (t.weightService === 'standard') defaultCost = 200;
5688:         if (t.weightService === 'premium') defaultCost = 300;
5689:         if (t.weightService === 'express') defaultCost = 400;
5690:         retroCost += t.weightKg * (pCosts[t.weightService] !== undefined ? pCosts[t.weightService] : defaultCost);
5691:      }
5692:
5693:      if (t.supplements) {
5694:        retroCost += Object.keys(t.supplements).reduce((acc, key) => {
5695:           if (!t.supplements[key]) return acc;
5696:           let defaultCost = 0;
5697:           if (key === 'repassage') defaultCost = 100;
5698:           if (key === 'express') defaultCost = 200;
5699:           if (key === 'detachage') defaultCost = 150;
5700:           if (key === 'livraison') defaultCost = 400;
5701:           if (key === 'premiumPack') defaultCost = 100;
5702:           return acc + (sCosts[key] !== undefined ? sCosts[key] : defaultCost);
5703:        }, 0);
5704:      }
5705:      return sum + retroCost;
5706:    }, 0);
5707:    
5708:    const totalProductsAmount = filteredProductSales.reduce((sum, s) => sum + (s.total || 0), 0);
5709:    const totalProductsCost = filteredProductSales.reduce((sum, s) => sum + (s.totalCost || 0), 0);
5710:    
5711:    const totalRevenue = totalTicketsAmount + totalProductsAmount;
5712:    const totalCost = totalTicketsCost + totalProductsCost;
5713:    const totalProfit = totalRevenue - totalCost;
5714:    const totalEncashed = totalTicketsPaid + totalProductsAmount;
5715:    
5716:    return {
5717:      totalTicketsAmount,
5718:      totalTicketsPaid,
5719:      totalTicketsDue,
5720:      totalTicketsCost,
5721:      totalProductsAmount,
5722:      totalProductsCost,
5723:      totalRevenue,
5724:      totalCost,
5725:      totalProfit,
5726:      totalEncashed,
5727:      ticketsCount: filteredTickets.length,
5728:      salesCount: filteredProductSales.length
5729:    };
5730:  }, [pressingTickets, pressingProductSales, merchant.type, dashboardSelectedMonth, pressingDashboardTarifs]);
5731:
5732:  // States for Smart School Multi-Send communication hub on dashboard
5733:  const [dashboardSchoolTab, setDashboardSchoolTab] = useState<'inscriptions' | 'broadcast'>('inscriptions');
5734:  const [broadcastSelectedStudents, setBroadcastSelectedStudents] = useState<string[]>([]);
5735:  const [broadcastCategory, setBroadcastCategory] = useState<'absence' | 'delay' | 'remind_payment' | 'grade_report' | 'custom'>('absence');
5736:  const [broadcastCustomTitle, setBroadcastCustomTitle] = useState('Message Officiel Administration');
5737:  const [broadcastCustomBody, setBroadcastCustomBody] = useState('');
5738:  const [broadcastSearchQuery, setBroadcastSearchQuery] = useState('');
5739:  const [broadcastClassFilter, setBroadcastClassFilter] = useState('');
5740:  const [broadcastSentStatus, setBroadcastSentStatus] = useState<Record<string, 'pending' | 'whatsapp' | 'sms'>>({});
5741:  const [dashboardDispatchModal, setDashboardDispatchModal] = useState<{
5742:    phone: string;
5743:    studentName: string;
5744:    parentName: string;
5745:    message: string;
5746:    title: string;
5747:  } | null>(null);
5748:
5749:  // Read from Dexie (Offline-first)
5750:  const products = useLiveQuery(() => 
5751:    db.products.where('merchantId').equals(merchant.id).toArray()
5752:  , [merchant.id]) || [];
5753:
5754:  const sales = useLiveQuery(() => 
5755:    db.sales.where('merchantId').equals(merchant.id).toArray()
5756:  , [merchant.id]) || [];
5757:
5758:  const expenses = useLiveQuery(() => 
5759:    db.expenses.where('merchantId').equals(merchant.id).toArray()
5760:  , [merchant.id]) || [];
5761:  
5762:  const [siteSettings, setSiteSettings] = useState<any>(null);
5763:  useEffect(() => {
5764:    const fetchSettings = async () => {
5765:      try {
5766:        const globalSettings = await dbService.settings.get('global');
5767:        setSiteSettings(globalSettings);
5768:      } catch (error) {
5769:        console.error('Error fetching global settings:', error);
5770:      }
5771:    };
5772:    fetchSettings();
5773:  }, []);
5774:  
5775:  // Point 6: Aggregation - Global merchant stats (On-demand/Offline)
5776:  const [merchantStats, setMerchantStats] = useState<any>(null);
5777:  useEffect(() => {
5778:    const fetchStats = async () => {
5779:      // Pour les stats, on peut soit les calculer localement, soit les synchroniser
5780:      // Ici on les cherche dans Dexie (nécessite une table merchant_stats si on veut faire comme avant)
5781:      // Mais on peut aussi les calculer à la volée pour plus de précision
5782:    };
5783:    fetchStats();
5784:  }, [merchant.id]);
5785:
5786:  // Specialized data for stats
5787:  const isAuto = merchant.type === 'auto';
5788:  const isBeauty = merchant.type === 'beauty';
5789:  const isConstruction = merchant.type === 'construction';
5790:  const isHR = merchant.type === 'hr';
5791:  const isLogistics = merchant.type === 'logistics';
5792:  const isSchool = merchant.type === 'school' || merchant.type === 'scolaire';
5793:  const isMedical = merchant.type === 'medical';
5794:
5795:  // Sync SaaS data
5796:  useEffect(() => {
5797:    if (merchant?.id) {
5798:      syncService.syncAllMerchantData(merchant.id);
5799:    }
5800:  }, [merchant?.id]);
5801:
5802:  const interventions = useLiveQuery(() => 
5803:    (isAuto || isBeauty) ? db.interventions.where('merchantId').equals(merchant.id || '').toArray() : []
5804:  , [merchant.id, isAuto, isBeauty]) || [];
5805:  
5806:  const projects = useLiveQuery(() => 
5807:    (isConstruction) ? db.projects.where('merchantId').equals(merchant.id || '').toArray() : []
5808:  , [merchant.id, isConstruction]) || [];
5809:
5810:  const vehicles = useLiveQuery(() => 
5811:    (isLogistics) ? db.vehicles.where('merchantId').equals(merchant.id || '').toArray() : []
5812:  , [merchant.id, isLogistics]) || [];
5813:
5814:  const employees = useLiveQuery(() => 
5815:    (isHR) ? db.employees.where('merchantId').equals(merchant.id || '').toArray() : []
5816:  , [merchant.id, isHR]) || [];
5817:
5818:  const students = useLiveQuery(() => 
5819:    (isSchool) ? db.students.where('merchantId').equals(merchant.id || '').toArray() : []
5820:  , [merchant.id, isSchool]) || [];
5821:
5822:  const classes = useLiveQuery(() => 
5823:    (isSchool) ? db.classes?.where('merchantId').equals(merchant.id || '').toArray() : []
5824:  , [merchant.id, isSchool]) || [];
5825:
5826:  const patients = useLiveQuery(() => 
5827:    (isMedical) ? db.patients.where('merchantId').equals(merchant.id || '').toArray() : []
5828:  , [merchant.id, isMedical]) || [];
5829:
5830:  const appointments = useLiveQuery(() => 
5831:    (isMedical) ? db.appointments.where('merchantId').equals(merchant.id || '').toArray() : []
5832:  , [merchant.id, isMedical]) || [];
5833:
5834:  const stats = useMemo(() => {
5835:    const now = new Date();
5836:    const today = now.toISOString().split('T')[0];
5837:    const thisMonth = dashboardSelectedMonth || now.toISOString().slice(0, 7);
5838:    const thisYear = now.getFullYear().toString();
5839:
5840:    const getIsoDate = (date: any) => {
5841:      if (!date) return '';
5842:      if (typeof date === 'string') return date;
5843:      if (date.toDate) return date.toDate().toISOString();
5844:      if (date.seconds) return new Date(date.seconds * 1000).toISOString();
5845:      if (date instanceof Date) return date.toISOString();
5846:      return '';
5847:    };
5848:
5849:    const salesToday = sales.filter(s => getIsoDate(s.createdAt || s.created_at).startsWith(today));
5850:    const salesMonth = sales.filter(s => getIsoDate(s.createdAt || s.created_at).startsWith(thisMonth));
5851:    const salesYear = sales.filter(s => getIsoDate(s.createdAt || s.created_at).startsWith(thisYear));
5852:
5853:    const expensesToday = expenses.filter(e => getIsoDate(e.createdAt || e.created_at).startsWith(today));
5854:    const expensesMonth = expenses.filter(e => getIsoDate(e.createdAt || e.created_at).startsWith(thisMonth));
5855:    const expensesYear = expenses.filter(e => getIsoDate(e.createdAt || e.created_at).startsWith(thisYear));
5856:
5857:    const sumSales = (list: MerchantSale[]) => list.reduce((acc, s) => acc + s.totalAmount, 0);
5858:    const sumExpenses = (list: MerchantExpense[]) => list.reduce((acc, e) => acc + e.amount, 0);
5859:    const sumCOGS = (list: MerchantSale[]) => list.reduce((acc, sale) => {
5860:      return acc + (sale.items || []).reduce((itemAcc, item) => {
5861:        const product = products.find(p => p.id === item.productId);
5862:        const cost = (item as any).costPrice || (product?.costPrice || 0);
5863:        return itemAcc + ((item.quantity || 0) * cost);
5864:      }, 0);
5865:    }, 0);
5866:
5867:    // Point 6: Aggregation - Use aggregated stats if available, otherwise fallback to in-memory calculation
5868:    const revenue = merchantStats?.revenue ? {
5869:      today: merchantStats.lastUpdate === today ? merchantStats.revenue.today : sumSales(salesToday),
5870:      month: merchantStats.lastMonth === thisMonth ? merchantStats.revenue.month : sumSales(salesMonth),
5871:      year: merchantStats.lastYear === thisYear ? merchantStats.revenue.year : sumSales(salesYear),
5872:      total: merchantStats.revenue.total
5873:    } : {
5874:      today: sumSales(salesToday),
5875:      month: sumSales(salesMonth),
5876:      year: sumSales(salesYear),
5877:      total: sumSales(sales)
5878:    };
5879:
5880:    const expensesStats = merchantStats?.expenses ? {
5881:      today: merchantStats.lastUpdate === today ? merchantStats.expenses.today : sumExpenses(expensesToday),
5882:      month: merchantStats.lastMonth === thisMonth ? merchantStats.expenses.month : sumExpenses(expensesMonth),
5883:      year: merchantStats.lastYear === thisYear ? merchantStats.expenses.year : sumExpenses(expensesYear),
5884:      total: merchantStats.expenses.total
5885:    } : {
5886:      today: sumExpenses(expensesToday),
5887:      month: sumExpenses(expensesMonth),
5888:      year: sumExpenses(expensesYear),
5889:      total: sumExpenses(expenses)
5890:    };
5891:
5892:    const cogsTotal = merchantStats?.cogs?.total ? merchantStats.cogs.total : sumCOGS(sales);
5893:    const cogsMonth = merchantStats?.cogs?.month && merchantStats.lastMonth === thisMonth ? merchantStats.cogs.month : sumCOGS(salesMonth);
5894:
5895:    const netProfit = revenue.total - cogsTotal - expensesStats.total;
5896:    const netProfitMonth = revenue.month - cogsMonth - expensesStats.month;
5897:
5898:    // Specialized counts
5899:    const activeInterventions = interventions.filter((i: any) => i.status !== 'completed').length;
5900:    const activeProjects = projects.filter((p: any) => p.status === 'active').length;
5901:    const activeVehicles = vehicles.filter((v: any) => v.status === 'active').length;
5902:    const totalEmployees = employees.length;
5903:    const totalStudents = students.length;
5904:    const totalPatients = patients.length;
5905:    const appointmentsToday = appointments.filter((a: any) => getIsoDate(a.createdAt).startsWith(today)).length;
5906:
5907:    const totalStockValue = products.reduce((acc, p) => acc + (Number(p.price || 0) * Number(p.stockQuantity || 0)), 0);
5908:    const totalStockProfit = products.reduce((acc, p) => acc + ((Number(p.price || 0) - Number(p.costPrice || 0)) * Number(p.stockQuantity || 0)), 0);
5909:
5910:    const cashFlowMonth = revenue.month - expensesStats.month;
5911:    const totalSalesCountMonth = salesMonth.length;
5912:    const averageOrderValueMonth = salesMonth.length > 0 ? revenue.month / salesMonth.length : 0;
5913:
5914:    return {
5915:      revenue,
5916:      expenses: expensesStats,
5917:      netProfit,
5918:      netProfitMonth,
5919:      grossProfitMonth: revenue.month - cogsMonth,
5920:      totalStockValue,
5921:      totalStockProfit,
5922:      cashFlowMonth,
5923:      totalSalesCountMonth,
5924:      averageOrderValueMonth,
5925:      lowStockCount: products.filter(p => Number(p.stockQuantity || 0) <= (Number(p.minStockLevel) || 5)).length,
5926:      totalProducts: products.length,
5927:      specialized: {
5928:        interventions: activeInterventions,
5929:        projects: activeProjects,
5930:        vehicles: activeVehicles,
5931:        employees: totalEmployees,
5932:        students: totalStudents,
5933:        patients: totalPatients,
5934:        appointmentsToday
5935:      }
5936:    };
5937:  }, [sales, expenses, products, interventions, projects, vehicles, employees, students, patients, appointments, merchantStats, dashboardSelectedMonth]);
5938:
5939:  const chartData = useMemo(() => {
5940:    const now = new Date();
5941:    const last7Days = eachDayOfInterval({
5942:      start: subDays(now, 6),
5943:      end: now
5944:    });
5945:
5946:    const getIsoDate = (date: any) => {
5947:      if (!date) return null;
5948:      if (typeof date === 'string') return new Date(date);
5949:      if (date.toDate) return date.toDate();
5950:      if (date.seconds) return new Date(date.seconds * 1000);
5951:      if (date instanceof Date) return date;
5952:      return null;
5953:    };
5954:
5955:    return last7Days.map(day => {
5956:      const daySales = sales.filter(s => {
5957:        const d = getIsoDate(s.createdAt || s.created_at);
5958:        return d && isSameDay(d, day);
5959:      });
5960:      const dayExpenses = expenses.filter(e => {
5961:        const d = getIsoDate(e.createdAt || e.created_at);
5962:        return d && isSameDay(d, day);
5963:      });
5964:
5965:      return {
5966:        name: format(day, 'dd MMM', { locale: fr }),
5967:        ventes: daySales.reduce((acc, s) => acc + s.totalAmount, 0),
5968:        depenses: dayExpenses.reduce((acc, e) => acc + e.amount, 0),
5969:      };
5970:    });
5971:  }, [sales, expenses]);
5972:
5973:  const recentTransactions = useMemo(() => {
5974:    const getIsoDate = (date: any) => {
5975:      if (!date) return '';
5976:      if (typeof date === 'string') return date;
5977:      if (date.toDate) return date.toDate().toISOString();
5978:      if (date.seconds) return new Date(date.seconds * 1000).toISOString();
5979:      if (date instanceof Date) return date.toISOString();
5980:      return '';
5981:    };
5982:
5983:    const combined = [
5984:      ...sales.map(s => ({ ...s, type: 'sale' as const, date: getIsoDate(s.createdAt || s.created_at) })),
5985:      ...expenses.map(e => ({ ...e, type: 'expense' as const, date: getIsoDate(e.createdAt || e.created_at) }))
5986:    ];
5987:
5988:    return combined.sort((a, b) => b.date.localeCompare(a.date)).slice(0, 10);
5989:  }, [sales, expenses]);
5990:
5991:  return (
5992:    <motion.div 
5993:      initial={{ opacity: 0, x: 20 }}
5994:      animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0 }}
5995:      exit={{ opacity: 0, x: -20 }}
5996:      className="space-y-8"
5997:    >
5998:      {fileToRestore && (
5999:        <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm">
6000:          <div className="w-full max-w-lg bg-white rounded-3xl shadow-2xl border border-black/5 p-6 md:p-8 animate-in fade-in zoom-in-95 duration-200">
6001:            <div className="flex items-center gap-4 text-rose-600 mb-6">
6002:              <div className="p-3 bg-rose-50 rounded-2xl">
6003:                <AlertCircle className="w-8 h-8 text-rose-500" />
6004:              </div>
6005:              <div>
6006:                <h3 className="text-lg font-black text-gray-950 uppercase tracking-tight">Restauration de Base de Données</h3>
6007:                <p className="text-[10px] font-black text-rose-500 uppercase tracking-widest leading-none mt-1">Étape de validation requise</p>
6008:              </div>
6009:            </div>
6010:            
6011:            <div className="space-y-4 mb-8">
6012:              <div className="p-4 bg-rose-50 border border-rose-100 rounded-2xl text-xs text-rose-800 leading-relaxed font-semibold">
6013:                ⚠️ ATTENTION : Restaurer cette base de données SQLite écrasera définitivement toutes vos données locales actuelles (ventes, dépenses, stocks, produits) par celles du fichier téléversé. Cette action est irréversible !
6014:              </div>
6015:              
6016:              <div className="p-4 bg-gray-50 border border-gray-100 rounded-2xl space-y-2 text-xs text-gray-600">
6017:                <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
6018:                  <span className="font-semibold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wider text-[10px]">Fichier importé :</span>
6019:                  <span className="font-bold text-gray-950 font-mono text-right truncate max-w-[200px]">{fileToRestore.name}</span>
6020:                </div>
6021:                <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
6022:                  <span className="font-semibold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wider text-[10px]">Taille :</span>
6023:                  <span className="font-extrabold text-gray-950">{(fileToRestore.size / 1024 / 1024).toFixed(2)} Mo</span>
6024:                </div>
6025:              </div>
6026:            </div>
6027:            
6028:            <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-3">
6029:              <button
6030:                onClick={() => setFileToRestore(null)}
6031:                className="flex-1 px-6 py-4 border border-gray-100 hover:border-gray-200 rounded-2xl text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700 transition-all cursor-pointer text-center"
6032:              >
6033:                Annuler
6034:              </button>
6035:              <button
6036:                onClick={async () => {
6037:                  const file = fileToRestore;
6038:                  setFileToRestore(null);
6039:                  const toastId = toast.loading('Restauration et importation en cours...');
6040:                  try {
6041:                    const { restoreSQLiteDB } = await import('../services/sqliteService');
6042:                    const success = await restoreSQLiteDB(file);
6043:                    if (success) {
6044:                      toast.success('Restauration réussie ! Chargement des nouvelles données...', { id: toastId });
6045:                    } else {
6046:                      toast.error('Échec de la restauration (format .sqlite3 invalide)', { id: toastId });
6047:                    }
6048:                  } catch (err) {
6049:                    console.error(err);
6050:                    toast.error('Restauration impossible', { id: toastId });
6051:                  }
6052:                }}
6053:                className="flex-1 px-6 py-4 bg-rose-600 hover:bg-rose-700 rounded-2xl text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-white transition-all shadow-lg shadow-rose-600/10 hover:shadow-rose-600/20 active:scale-[0.98] cursor-pointer text-center"
6054:              >
6055:                Confirmer l'import
6056:              </button>
6057:            </div>
6058:          </div>
6059:        </div>
6060:      )}
6061:
6062:      {dashboardDispatchModal && (
6063:        <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[120] flex items-center justify-center p-4 bg-slate-900/60 backdrop-blur-sm z-[99999]">
6064:          <div className="w-full max-w-lg bg-white rounded-3xl shadow-2xl border border-black/5 p-6 md:p-8 animate-in fade-in zoom-in-95 duration-200">
6065:            <div className="flex items-center justify-between border-b border-gray-100 pb-4 mb-4">
6066:              <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">
6067:                <div className="p-2 bg-indigo-50 text-indigo-600 rounded-xl">
6068:                  <Zap className="w-5 h-5 animate-pulse" />
6069:                </div>
6070:                <div>
6071:                  <h4 className="font-black text-slate-900 text-sm">Aperçu Dépêche Parent</h4>
6072:                  <p className="text-[10px] font-mono font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wider">{dashboardDispatchModal.title}</p>
6073:                </div>
6074:              </div>
6075:              <button
6076:                type="button"
6077:                onClick={() => setDashboardDispatchModal(null)}
6078:                className="p-1 px-2.5 bg-slate-100 hover:bg-slate-200 text-slate-500 rounded-lg text-xs font-bold uppercase transition-colors"
6079:              >
6080:                Fermer
6081:              </button>
6082:            </div>
6083:            
6084:            <div className="space-y-4">
6085:              <div className="bg-slate-50 p-4 rounded-2xl border border-gray-200/60 divide-y divide-gray-100">
6086:                <div className="pb-2.5">
6087:                  <span className="text-[9px] font-mono font-black text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest block">Destinataire (Tuteur)</span>
6088:                  <span className="text-xs font-black text-slate-800">{dashboardDispatchModal.parentName}</span>
6089:                </div>
6090:                <div className="py-2.5">
6091:                  <span className="text-[9px] font-mono font-black text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest block">Élève Associé</span>
6092:                  <span className="text-xs font-black text-slate-800">{dashboardDispatchModal.studentName}</span>
6093:                </div>
6094:                <div className="py-2.5">
6095:                  <span className="text-[9px] font-mono font-black text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest block">Numéro Tuteur</span>
6096:                  <span className="text-xs font-mono font-black text-slate-800">{dashboardDispatchModal.phone}</span>
6097:                </div>
6098:              </div>
6099:
6100:              <div className="bg-indigo-50/50 p-4 rounded-2xl border border-indigo-100">
6101:                <span className="text-[9px] font-mono font-black text-indigo-600 uppercase tracking-widest block mb-1">Message de la dépêche personnalisé</span>
6102:                <p className="text-xs text-indigo-950 font-semibold leading-relaxed whitespace-pre-wrap">
6103:                  "{dashboardDispatchModal.message}"
6104:                </p>
6105:              </div>
6106:
6107:              <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2 pt-2">
6108:                <a
6109:                  href={`https://wa.me/${dashboardDispatchModal.phone.replace(/[^0-9+]/g, '')}?text=${encodeURIComponent(dashboardDispatchModal.message)}`}
6110:                  target="_blank"
6111:                  rel="noopener noreferrer"
6112:                  className="w-full py-2.5 bg-emerald-600 hover:bg-emerald-700 text-white text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-wider rounded-xl text-center shadow-md flex items-center justify-center gap-1.5"
6113:                >
6114:                  <MessageSquare className="w-4 h-4" />
6115:                  <span>Ouvrir WhatsApp</span>
6116:                </a>
6117:                <a
6118:                  href={`sms:${dashboardDispatchModal.phone.replace(/[^0-9+]/g, '')}?body=${encodeURIComponent(dashboardDispatchModal.message)}`}
6119:                  className="w-full py-2.5 bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700 text-white text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-wider rounded-xl text-center shadow-md flex items-center justify-center gap-1.5"
6120:                >
6121:                  <Mail className="w-4 h-4" />
6122:                  <span>Ouvrir SMS</span>
6123:                </a>
6124:              </div>
6125:            </div>
6126:          </div>
6127:        </div>
6128:      )}
6129:
6130:      <DailyBriefing 
6131:        merchantId={merchant.id} 
6132:        data={{ sales, products, expenses }} 
6133:      />
6134:
6135:      {/* Sync Control Bar - Phase 2 */}
6136:      {merchant.id && (
6137:        <div className="flex flex-col lg:flex-row items-start lg:items-center justify-between p-5 md:p-6 bg-white rounded-[2rem] border border-black/5 shadow-sm gap-4">
6138:          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 md:gap-4 w-full">
6139:            <div className={`p-3 shrink-0 rounded-2xl ${navigator.onLine && (merchant?.plan === 'BASIC' || merchant?.plan === 'STANDARD' || merchant?.plan === 'PREMIUM') ? 'bg-blue-50 text-blue-500' : 'bg-rose-50 text-rose-500'}`}>
6140:              {navigator.onLine && (merchant?.plan === 'BASIC' || merchant?.plan === 'STANDARD' || merchant?.plan === 'PREMIUM') ? <Database className="w-5 h-5" /> : <HardDrive className="w-5 h-5" />}
6141:            </div>
6142:            <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
6143:              <p className="text-[10px] font-black text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest leading-none mb-1 truncate">État du Moteur de Synchronisation</p>
6144:              <h4 className="text-sm font-black text-ink uppercase tracking-tight truncate">
6145:                {(merchant?.plan === 'BASIC' || merchant?.plan === 'STANDARD' || merchant?.plan === 'PREMIUM') 
6146:                  ? (navigator.onLine ? 'Mode Hybride (Local + Cloud)' : 'Mode Local (Hors ligne)') 
6147:                  : `Mode Local (Plan: ${merchant.plan || 'TESTE'})`}
6148:              </h4>
6149:            </div>
6150:          </div>
6151:          <div className="flex flex-wrap sm:flex-nowrap items-center gap-2 md:gap-3 w-full lg:w-auto">
6152:            <button 
6153:              onClick={async () => {
6154:                const toastId = toast.loading('Génération du fichier de base de données SQLite...');
6155:                try {
6156:                  const { exportSQLiteDB } = await import('../services/sqliteService');
6157:                  const file = await exportSQLiteDB(merchant.id);
6158:                  if (file) {
6159:                    const url = URL.createObjectURL(file);
6160:                    const a = document.createElement('a');
6161:                    a.href = url;
6162:                    a.download = `acom_studio_${new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]}.sqlite3`;
6163:                    document.body.appendChild(a);
6164:                    a.click();
6165:                    document.body.removeChild(a);
6166:                    URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
6167:                    toast.success('Base de données SQLite exportée !', { id: toastId });
6168:                  } else {
6169:                    toast.error('Échec de l\'exportation SQLite (base de données introuvable)', { id: toastId });
6170:                  }
6171:                } catch (err) {
6172:                  console.error(err);
6173:                  toast.error('Échec de l\'exportation SQLite', { id: toastId });
6174:                }
6175:              }}
6176:              className="flex items-center gap-2 px-6 py-3 bg-emerald-50 border border-emerald-100 rounded-xl text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-emerald-600 hover:bg-emerald-100 transition-all group cursor-pointer"
6177:              title="Exporter la base de données SQLite pour une utilisation Desktop"
6178:            >
6179:              <Download className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
6180:              Exporter (.sqlite3)
6181:            </button>
6182:            
6183:            <label className="flex items-center gap-2 px-6 py-3 bg-white border border-black/5 rounded-xl text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-ink hover:border-primary/30 transition-all cursor-pointer group">
6184:              <Upload className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
6185:              Restaurer
6186:              <input 
6187:                type="file" 
6188:                accept=".sqlite3" 
6189:                className="hidden" 
6190:                onChange={(e) => {
6191:                  const file = e.target.files?.[0];
6192:                  if (!file) return;
6193:                  setFileToRestore(file);
6194:                  // Clear value so the same file can be selected again
6195:                  e.target.value = '';
6196:                }}
6197:              />
6198:            </label>
6199:
6200:            {!(merchant?.plan === 'BASIC' || merchant?.plan === 'STANDARD' || merchant?.plan === 'PREMIUM') ? (

6511:          </>

7465:const StatCard = ({ title, value, currency, icon: Icon, color, bgColor, description, isLarge, profitDetails }: any) => {
7466:  const formattedValue = typeof value === 'number' ? value.toLocaleString() : String(value || '0');
7467:  const textLength = formattedValue.length + (currency ? currency.length : 0);
7468:  
7469:  // Decide responsive style based on content density and card layout size
7470:  let fontSizeClass = 'text-3xl sm:text-4xl';
7471:  if (isLarge) {
7472:    if (textLength > 18) {
7473:      fontSizeClass = 'text-xl sm:text-2xl md:text-3xl lg:text-4xl xl:text-5xl';
7474:    } else if (textLength > 14) {
7475:      fontSizeClass = 'text-2xl sm:text-3xl md:text-4xl lg:text-5xl xl:text-6xl';
7476:    } else {
7477:      fontSizeClass = 'text-3xl sm:text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl xl:text-7xl';
7478:    }
7479:  } else {
7480:    if (textLength > 16) {
7481:      fontSizeClass = 'text-sm sm:text-base md:text-lg lg:text-base min-[1400px]:text-lg';
7482:    } else if (textLength > 12) {
7483:      fontSizeClass = 'text-lg sm:text-xl md:text-2xl lg:text-xl min-[1400px]:text-2xl';
7484:    } else if (textLength > 9) {
7485:      fontSizeClass = 'text-xl sm:text-2xl md:text-3xl lg:text-2xl min-[1400px]:text-3xl';
7486:    }
7487:  }
7488:
7489:  return (
7490:    <div className={`bg-white p-6 sm:p-8 rounded-[2rem] border border-black/5 shadow-sm hover:shadow-xl transition-all group relative overflow-hidden flex flex-col justify-between h-full ${isLarge ? 'min-h-[200px] sm:min-h-[260px]' : 'min-h-[220px]'}`}>
7491:      <div className="absolute top-0 right-0 w-32 h-32 bg-gray-50 rounded-full -mr-16 -mt-16 opacity-50 group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform"></div>
7492:      
7493:      <div>
7494:        <div className={`w-12 h-12 sm:w-14 sm:h-14 ${bgColor} rounded-xl sm:rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center mb-4 sm:mb-6 group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform relative z-10 border border-black/5`}>
7495:          <Icon className={`w-6 h-6 sm:w-7 sm:h-7 ${color}`} />
7496:        </div>
7497:        <p className="text-[10px] sm:text-xs font-black text-gray-400 mb-2 uppercase tracking-[0.2em] relative z-10 line-clamp-1">{title}</p>
7498:      </div>
7499:
7500:      <div className="mt-auto relative z-10">
7501:        <div className="flex items-baseline flex-wrap gap-x-2 gap-y-1 items-end">
7502:          <span className={`${fontSizeClass} font-black text-ink tracking-tighter block break-all leading-none`}>
7503:            {formattedValue}
7504:          </span>
7505:          {currency && (
7506:            <span className={`${isLarge ? 'text-xs sm:text-sm md:text-base' : 'text-[10px] sm:text-xs'} font-black text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest break-keep`}>
7507:              {currency}
7508:            </span>
7509:          )}
7510:        </div>
7511:        {description && (
7512:          <p className="text-[9px] sm:text-[10px] text-gray-400 mt-3 font-mono font-bold uppercase tracking-widest relative z-10 line-clamp-2">
7513:            {description}
7514:          </p>
7515:        )}
7516:        {profitDetails && (
7517:          <div className="mt-3 pt-3 border-t border-gray-100 flex items-center justify-between text-[10px] font-bold">
7518:            <span className="text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-widest">{profitDetails.label || 'Bénéfice Net'}</span>
7519:            <span className={`${profitDetails.value >= 0 ? 'text-primary' : 'text-rose-500'} font-mono`}>
7520:              {profitDetails.value >= 0 ? '+' : ''}{profitDetails.value.toLocaleString()} {currency}
7521:            </span>
7522:          </div>
7523:        )}
7524:      </div>
7525:    </div>
7526:  );
7527:};

7534:    emerald: 'bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-600 border-emerald-100',

7541:      <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
7542:        <div className={`w-12 h-12 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center ${colors[color] || 'bg-gray-50'}`}>
7543:          <Icon className="w-6 h-6" />
7544:        </div>
7545:        {(warning || danger) && (
7546:          <div className={`px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-[8px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest ${warning ? 'bg-orange-100 text-orange-600' : 'bg-red-100 text-red-600'}`}>

7548:          </div>
