7586:const InventoryManager = ({ merchant, setShowUpgradeModal }: { merchant: Merchant, setShowUpgradeModal?: (s: boolean) => void }) => {
7587:  const [isEditing, setIsEditing] = useState(false);
7588:  const [isRestocking, setIsRestocking] = useState(false);
7589:  const [currentProduct, setCurrentProduct] = useState<Partial<MerchantProduct> | null>(null);
7590:  const [restockData, setRestockData] = useState({ 
7591:    quantity: 0, 
7592:    cost: 0, 
7593:    unitCostPrice: 0,
7594:    unitSellingPrice: 0,
7595:    reason: 'Réapprovisionnement standard' 
7596:  });
7597:  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');
7598:  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);
7599:  const [deleteConfirm, setDeleteConfirm] = useState<string | null>(null);
7600:  const [showNewCatInput, setShowNewCatInput] = useState(false);
7601:  const [showNewSubCatInput, setShowNewSubCatInput] = useState(false);
7602:  const [showBarcodeScanner, setShowBarcodeScanner] = useState(false);
7603:  const [showSKUScanner, setShowSKUScanner] = useState(false);
7604:  
7605:  const [productLimit, setProductLimit] = useState(10);
7606:  const [movementLimit, setMovementLimit] = useState(10);
7607:
7608:  // Products loaded from Dexie via useLiveQuery
7609:  useEffect(() => {
7610:    syncService.syncProducts(merchant.id);
7611:    syncService.syncCategories(merchant.id);
7612:    syncService.syncSales(merchant.id);
7613:  }, [merchant.id]);
7614:
7615:  const products = useLiveQuery(() => 
7616:    db.products.where('merchantId').equals(merchant.id).toArray()
7617:  , [merchant.id]) || [];
7618:
7619:  const categories = useLiveQuery(() => 
7620:    db.categories.where('merchantId').equals(merchant.id).toArray()
7621:  , [merchant.id]) || [];
7622:
7623:  const movements = useLiveQuery(() => 
7624:    db.movements.where('merchantId').equals(merchant.id).reverse().sortBy('createdAt')
7625:  , [merchant.id]) || [];
7626:
7627:  const sales = useLiveQuery(() => 
7628:    db.sales.where('merchantId').equals(merchant.id).toArray()
7629:  , [merchant.id]) || [];
7630:
7631:  const loading = false;
7632:
7633:  const filteredProducts = useMemo(() => {
7634:    let result = products;
7635:    if (searchTerm) {
7636:      result = result.filter(p => p.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) || p.sku?.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()));
7637:    }
7638:    return result;
7639:  }, [products, searchTerm]);
7640:
7641:  const handleBarcodeForNewProduct = async (code: string) => {
7642:    if (!currentProduct) return;
7643:    toast.loading("Recherche des détails...", { id: "barcode-search" });
7644:    try {
7645:      let foundName = '';
7646:      let foundImage = '';
7647:
7648:      // 1. Try OpenFoodFacts
7649:      try {
7650:        const offRes = await fetch(`https://world.openfoodfacts.org/api/v0/product/${code}.json`);
7651:        const offData = await offRes.json();
7652:        if (offData.status === 1 && offData.product) {
7653:          foundName = offData.product.product_name;
7654:          foundImage = offData.product.image_front_url || offData.product.image_url;
7655:        }
7656:      } catch (err) {
7657:        console.warn("OpenFoodFacts failed", err);
7658:      }
7659:
7660:      // 2. Try UPCitemdb if not found
7661:      if (!foundName) {
7662:        try {
7663:          const upcRes = await fetch(`https://api.upcitemdb.com/prod/trial/lookup?upc=${code}`);
7664:          const upcData = await upcRes.json();
7665:          if (upcData.code === 'OK' && upcData.items && upcData.items.length > 0) {
7666:            foundName = upcData.items[0].title;
7667:            if (upcData.items[0].images && upcData.items[0].images.length > 0) {
7668:              foundImage = upcData.items[0].images[0];
7669:            }
7670:          }
7671:        } catch (err) {
7672:          console.warn("UPCitemdb failed", err);
7673:        }
7674:      }
7675:
7676:      if (foundName) {
7677:        toast.success(`Produit détecté : ${foundName.substring(0, 30)}...`, { id: 'barcode-search' });
7678:        setCurrentProduct(prev => {
7679:           if (!prev) return prev;
7680:           return {
7681:             ...prev,
7682:             sku: code,
7683:             name: prev.name || foundName || '',
7684:             image: prev.image || foundImage || prev.image,
7685:           };
7686:        });
7687:      } else {
7688:        toast.success(`Code-barres scanné : ${code}`, { id: 'barcode-search' });
7689:        setCurrentProduct(prev => prev ? {...prev, sku: code} : prev);
7690:      }
7691:    } catch (err) {
7692:      toast.success(`Code-barres scanné : ${code}`, { id: 'barcode-search' });
7693:      setCurrentProduct(prev => prev ? {...prev, sku: code} : prev);
7694:    }
7695:  };
7696:
7697:  // Physical Barcode Scanner Effect for Inventory Manager
7698:  const scannedCodeRef = useRef('');
7699:  useEffect(() => {
7700:    let timeoutId: any;
7701:    
7702:    const handleKeyDown = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {
7703:      // Ignore if user is typing in generic input fields unless it's our inventory search explicitly
7704:      if (e.target instanceof HTMLInputElement || e.target instanceof HTMLTextAreaElement) {
7705:        if (e.target.id !== 'inventory-search' && e.target.id !== 'sku-input') return;
7706:      }
7707:      
7708:      if (e.key === 'Enter') {
7709:        const code = scannedCodeRef.current;
7710:        if (code.length > 2) {
7711:          if (isEditing) {
7712:            handleBarcodeForNewProduct(code);
7713:          } else {
7714:            // Find the product and open the restock OR edit modal
7715:            const match = products.find(p => p.sku && p.sku.trim().toLowerCase() === code.trim().toLowerCase());
7716:            if (match) {
7717:              setSearchTerm(code);
7718:              triggerAcomAlert('Succès', `Produit trouvé : ${match.name}`, 'success', 'SYSTÈME');
7719:            } else {
7720:              setSearchTerm(code);
7721:              triggerAcomAlert('Erreur', "Aucun produit trouvé avec ce code : " + code, 'error', 'ALERTE');
7722:            }
7723:          }
7724:        }
7725:        scannedCodeRef.current = '';
7726:      } else if (e.key.length === 1) { 
7727:        scannedCodeRef.current += e.key;
7728:        clearTimeout(timeoutId);
7729:        timeoutId = setTimeout(() => {
7730:          scannedCodeRef.current = '';
7731:        }, 100);
7732:      }
7733:    };
7734:
7735:    window.addEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown);
7736:    return () => {
7737:      window.removeEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown);
7738:      clearTimeout(timeoutId);
7739:    };
7740:  }, [products, isEditing, currentProduct, handleBarcodeForNewProduct]);
7741:
7742:  // Enhanced Stats
7743:  const stats = useMemo(() => {
7744:    const totalItems = products.length;
7745:    const totalQuantity = products.reduce((acc, p) => acc + Number(p.stockQuantity || 0), 0);
7746:    const lowStock = products.filter(p => Number(p.stockQuantity || 0) > 0 && Number(p.stockQuantity || 0) <= (Number(p.minStockLevel) || 5)).length;
7747:    const outOfStock = products.filter(p => Number(p.stockQuantity || 0) <= 0).length;
7748:    const totalValue = products.reduce((acc, p) => acc + (p.price * Number(p.stockQuantity || 0)), 0);
7749:    
7750:    return { totalItems, totalQuantity, lowStock, outOfStock, totalValue };
7751:  }, [products]);
7752:
7753:  // Dynamic Stock Health Indicators
7754:  const theoreticalProfit = useMemo(() => {
7755:    if (products.length === 0) return 0;
7756:    const totalPurchaseValue = products.reduce((acc, p) => acc + ((p.costPrice || 0) * Number(p.stockQuantity || 0)), 0);
7757:    const totalRetailValue = products.reduce((acc, p) => acc + (p.price * Number(p.stockQuantity || 0)), 0);
7758:    if (totalRetailValue > 0) {
7759:      return Math.max(0, Math.min(100, Math.round(((totalRetailValue - totalPurchaseValue) / totalRetailValue) * 100)));
7760:    }
7761:    const simpleMargins = products.map(p => p.price > 0 ? Math.max(0, ((p.price - (p.costPrice || 0)) / p.price) * 100) : 0);
7762:    const sumSimple = simpleMargins.reduce((acc, val) => acc + val, 0);
7763:    return Math.max(0, Math.min(100, Math.round(sumSimple / products.length)));
7764:  }, [products]);
7765:
7766:  const rotationStock = useMemo(() => {
7767:    const totalUnitsSold = sales.reduce((sum, s) => sum + (s.items ? s.items.reduce((acc: number, item: any) => acc + Number(item.quantity || 0), 0) : 0), 0);
7768:    const totalStock = products.reduce((acc, p) => acc + Number(p.stockQuantity || 0), 0);
7769:    if (totalStock === 0 && totalUnitsSold === 0) return 0;
7770:    if (totalStock === 0) return 100;
7771:    const ratio = (totalUnitsSold / (totalUnitsSold + totalStock)) * 100;
7772:    // Map to a realistic performance range or direct proportion, with a minimum representation helper
7773:    return Math.max(12, Math.min(100, Math.round(ratio)));
7774:  }, [sales, products]);
7775:
7776:  const handleSave = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
7777:    e.preventDefault();
7778:    if (!currentProduct?.name || currentProduct.price === undefined) return;
7779:    
7780:    if (!currentProduct.id && merchant.plan === 'FREE' && products.length >= 2) {
7781:      triggerAcomAlert('Erreur', 'Vous avez atteint la limite de 2 produits pour le plan TESTE. Veuillez passer au forfait supérieur.', 'error', 'ALERTE');
7782:      if (setShowUpgradeModal) setShowUpgradeModal(true);
7783:      return;
7784:    }
7785:
7786:    setSaving(true);
7787:    try {
7788:      await dbService.merchantProducts.save({
7789:        ...currentProduct,
7790:        sku: currentProduct.sku ? currentProduct.sku.trim() : undefined,
7791:        merchantId: merchant.id,
7792:        updatedAt: new Date()
7793:      });
7794:
7795:      // Memorize Category and Sub-category for future products
7796:      if (currentProduct.category) {
7797:        const existingCat = categories.find(c => c.name.toLowerCase() === currentProduct.category?.toLowerCase());
7798:        if (!existingCat) {
7799:          await dbService.merchantCategories.save({
7800:            merchantId: merchant.id,
7801:            name: currentProduct.category,
7802:            subCategories: currentProduct.subCategory ? [currentProduct.subCategory] : []
7803:          });
7804:        } else if (currentProduct.subCategory) {
7805:          const subCats = existingCat.subCategories || [];
7806:          if (!subCats.some(s => s.toLowerCase() === currentProduct.subCategory?.toLowerCase())) {
7807:            await dbService.merchantCategories.save({
7808:              ...existingCat,
7809:              subCategories: [...subCats, currentProduct.subCategory]
7810:            });
7811:          }
7812:        }
7813:      }
7814:
7815:      triggerAcomAlert('Succès', currentProduct.id ? 'Produit mis à jour' : 'Produit ajouté', 'success', 'SYSTÈME');
7816:      setIsEditing(false);
7817:      setCurrentProduct(null);
7818:    } catch (error) {
7819:      triggerAcomAlert('Erreur', 'Erreur lors de l\'enregistrement', 'error', 'ALERTE');
7820:    } finally {
7821:      setSaving(false);
7822:    }
7823:  };
7824:
7825:  const handleRestock = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
7826:    e.preventDefault();
7827:    if (!currentProduct?.id || restockData.quantity <= 0) return;
7828:    setSaving(true);
7829:    try {
7830:      // Met à jour la fiche produit avec le nouveau prix d'achat et prix de vente
7831:      const updatedProduct = {
7832:        ...currentProduct,
7833:        costPrice: Number(restockData.unitCostPrice || 0),
7834:        price: Number(restockData.unitSellingPrice || 0),
7835:        updatedAt: new Date()
7836:      };
7837:      await dbService.merchantProducts.save(updatedProduct as any);
7838:
7839:      // Le coût total est égal à la quantité multipliée par le coût unitaire
7840:      const calculatedCost = Number(restockData.quantity) * Number(restockData.unitCostPrice || 0);
7841:
7842:      await dbService.stockMovements.addStock(
7843:        merchant.id,
7844:        currentProduct.id,
7845:        restockData.quantity,
7846:        restockData.reason,
7847:        merchant.ownerId,
7848:        calculatedCost
7849:      );
7850:      triggerAcomAlert('Succès', 'Stock mis à jour', 'success', 'SYSTÈME');
7851:      setIsRestocking(false);
7852:      setRestockData({ 
7853:        quantity: 0, 
7854:        cost: 0, 
7855:        unitCostPrice: 0,
7856:        unitSellingPrice: 0,
7857:        reason: 'Réapprovisionnement standard' 
7858:      });
7859:    } catch (error) {
7860:      triggerAcomAlert('Erreur', 'Erreur lors de la mise à jour du stock', 'error', 'ALERTE');
7861:    } finally {
7862:      setSaving(false);
7863:    }
7864:  };
7865:
7866:  const handleDelete = async (id: string) => {
7867:    setSaving(true);
7868:    try {
7869:      await dbService.merchantProducts.delete(id);
7870:      triggerAcomAlert('Succès', 'Produit supprimé', 'success', 'SYSTÈME');
7871:      setDeleteConfirm(null);
7872:    } catch (error) {
7873:      triggerAcomAlert('Erreur', 'Erreur lors de la suppression', 'error', 'ALERTE');
7874:    } finally {
7875:      setSaving(false);
7876:    }
7877:  };
7878:
7879:  return (
7880:    <motion.div 
7881:      initial={{ opacity: 0, x: 20 }}
7882:      animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0 }}
7883:      exit={{ opacity: 0, x: -20 }}
7884:      className="space-y-8"
7885:    >
7886:      {/* Stock Quick Stats Container */}
7887:      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6">
7888:        <StockStatCard 
7889:          label="Total Articles" 
7890:          value={stats.totalItems.toString()} 
7891:          suffix="RÉVÉRENCES"
7892:          icon={Package} 
7893:          color="blue"
7894:        />
7895:        <StockStatCard 
7896:          label="Valeur du Stock" 
7897:          value={stats.totalValue.toLocaleString()} 
7898:          suffix={merchant.currency}
7899:          icon={Calculator} 
7900:          color="emerald"
7901:        />
7902:        <StockStatCard 
7903:          label="Points de rupture" 
7904:          value={stats.lowStock.toString()} 
7905:          suffix="ALERTES"
7906:          icon={AlertCircle} 
7907:          color="orange"
7908:          warning={stats.lowStock > 0}
7909:        />
7910:        <StockStatCard 
7911:          label="Articles épuisés" 
7912:          value={stats.outOfStock.toString()} 
7913:          suffix="RUPTURES"
7914:          icon={Trash2} 
7915:          color="rose"
7916:          danger={stats.outOfStock > 0}
7917:        />
7918:      </div>
7919:
7920:      <div className="flex flex-col xl:flex-row gap-8">
7921:        {/* Main Product Table / List */}
7922:        <div className="flex-1 space-y-6">
7923:          <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row justify-between items-center gap-4">
7924:            <div className="relative w-full sm:w-96 flex gap-3">
7925:              <div className="relative flex-1">
7926:                <Search className="absolute left-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-4 h-4 text-gray-400" />
7927:                <input
7928:                  type="text"
7929:                  id="inventory-search"
7930:                  placeholder="Rechercher ou scanner SKU..."
7931:                  value={searchTerm}
7932:                  onChange={(e) => setSearchTerm(e.target.value)}
7933:                  onKeyDown={(e) => {
7934:                    if (e.key === 'Enter' && searchTerm.trim().length > 2) {
7935:                      const match = products.find(p => p.sku && p.sku.trim().toLowerCase() === searchTerm.trim().toLowerCase());
7936:                      if (match) {
7937:                        triggerAcomAlert('Succès', `Produit trouvé : ${match.name}`, 'success', 'SYSTÈME');
7938:                      } else {
7939:                        triggerAcomAlert('Erreur', "Aucun produit trouvé avec ce code : " + searchTerm, 'error', 'ALERTE');
7940:                      }
7941:                    }
7942:                  }}
7943:                  className="w-full pl-12 pr-4 py-4 bg-white border border-black/5 rounded-[1.5rem] text-sm focus:ring-4 focus:ring-primary/10 shadow-sm outline-none transition-all"
7944:                />
7945:              </div>
7946:              <button
7947:                onClick={() => setShowBarcodeScanner(true)}
7948:                className="h-auto px-5 bg-indigo-50 text-indigo-600 rounded-[1.5rem] border border-indigo-100 hover:bg-indigo-600 hover:text-white transition-all flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm"
7949:                title="Scanner un code-barres"
7950:              >
7951:                <ScanLine className="w-5 h-5" />
7952:              </button>
7953:            </div>
7954:            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 w-full sm:w-auto">
7955:              <button
7956:                onClick={() => {
7957:                  setCurrentProduct({ name: '', price: 0, stockQuantity: 0, category: 'Général', minStockLevel: 5 });
7958:                  setIsEditing(true);
7959:                }}
7960:                className="flex-1 sm:flex-none flex items-center justify-center space-x-2 px-8 py-4 bg-ink text-white rounded-[1.5rem] font-black uppercase text-[10px] tracking-widest hover:bg-black transition-all shadow-xl shadow-ink/20"
7961:              >
7962:                <Plus className="w-4 h-4" />
7963:                <span>Nouveau produit</span>
7964:              </button>
7965:            </div>
7966:          </div>
7967:
7968:          {loading ? (
7969:            <div className="py-20 flex justify-center"><Loader2 className="w-8 h-8 animate-spin text-primary" /></div>
7970:          ) : (
7971:            <div className="bg-white rounded-[2.5rem] border border-black/5 shadow-sm overflow-hidden">
7972:              <div className="overflow-x-auto">
7973:                <table className="w-full text-left border-collapse">
7974:                  <thead>
7975:                    <tr className="bg-gray-50/50 text-[10px] font-mono font-black text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-[0.2em] border-b border-gray-100">
7976:                      <th className="px-4 sm:px-8 py-3 md:py-5">Article</th>
7977:                      <th className="px-4 sm:px-8 py-3 md:py-5">Prix & Valeur</th>
7978:                      <th className="px-4 sm:px-8 py-3 md:py-5">État Stock</th>
7979:                      <th className="px-4 sm:px-8 py-3 md:py-5 text-right">Actions</th>
7980:                    </tr>
7981:                  </thead>
7982:                  <tbody className="divide-y divide-gray-100">
7983:                    {filteredProducts.length === 0 ? (
7984:                      <tr>
7985:                        <td colSpan={4} className="py-20 text-center">
7986:                          <div className="flex flex-col items-center opacity-30">
7987:                            <Package className="w-12 h-12 mb-4" />
7988:                            <p className="font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-xs">Aucun produit trouvé</p>
7989:                          </div>
7990:                        </td>
7991:                      </tr>
7992:                    ) : (
7993:                      filteredProducts.slice(0, productLimit).map((product) => {
7994:                        const isLow = Number(product.stockQuantity || 0) > 0 && Number(product.stockQuantity || 0) <= (Number(product.minStockLevel) || 5);
7995:                        const isOut = Number(product.stockQuantity || 0) <= 0;
7996:                        
7997:                        return (
7998:                          <tr key={product.id} className="hover:bg-gray-50/20 transition-colors group">
7999:                            <td className="px-4 sm:px-8 py-4 md:py-6">
8000:                              <div className="flex items-center space-x-3 md:space-x-5">
8001:                                <div className="w-12 h-12 md:w-16 md:h-16 bg-gray-50 rounded-[1.25rem] flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden border border-black/5 group-hover:scale-105 transition-transform shadow-inner shrink-0">
8002:                                  {product.image ? (
8003:                                    <OptimizedImage src={product.image} alt={product.name} width={150} className="w-full h-full object-cover" />
8004:                                  ) : (
8005:                                    <Package className="w-6 h-6 md:w-8 md:h-8 text-gray-200" />
8006:                                  )}
8007:                                </div>
8008:                                <div className="flex flex-col min-w-0">
8009:                                  <span className="font-black text-ink text-sm leading-tight tracking-tight truncate">{product.name}</span>
8010:                                  <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2 mt-1.5">
8011:                                    <span className="text-[9px] font-mono font-black text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-[0.15em]">
8012:                                      {product.sku || 'SANS SKU'}
8013:                                    </span>
8014:                                    <span className="w-1 h-1 bg-gray-200 rounded-full"></span>
8015:                                    <span className="text-[9px] font-mono font-black text-primary uppercase tracking-[0.15em]">
8016:                                      {product.category}
8017:                                    </span>
8018:                                    {product.sizes && (
8019:                                      <>
8020:                                        <span className="w-1 h-1 bg-gray-200 rounded-full"></span>
8021:                                        <span className="text-[9px] font-mono font-bold text-gray-500 bg-gray-100 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded uppercase tracking-wider">
8022:                                          T: {product.sizes}
8023:                                        </span>
8024:                                      </>
8025:                                    )}
8026:                                    {product.colors && (
8027:                                      <>
8028:                                        <span className="w-1 h-1 bg-gray-200 rounded-full"></span>
8029:                                        <span className="text-[9px] font-mono font-bold text-gray-500 bg-gray-100 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded uppercase tracking-wider">
8030:                                          C: {product.colors}
8031:                                        </span>
8032:                                      </>
8033:                                    )}
8034:                                    {(product as any).syncStatus && (
8035:                                      <>
8036:                                        <span className="w-1 h-1 bg-gray-200 rounded-full"></span>
8037:                                        <div className={`flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full border ${
8038:                                          (product as any).syncStatus === 'synced' ? 'bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-600 border-emerald-100' : 
8039:                                          (product as any).syncStatus === 'pending' ? 'bg-amber-50 text-amber-600 border-amber-100' :
8040:                                          'bg-gray-50 text-gray-400 border-gray-100'
8041:                                        }`}>
8042:                                          {(product as any).syncStatus === 'synced' ? <Check className="w-2.5 h-2.5" /> : <RefreshCw className="w-2.5 h-2.5 animate-spin" />}
8043:                                          <span className="text-[8px] font-black uppercase tracking-wider">{(product as any).syncStatus}</span>
8044:                                        </div>
8045:                                      </>
8046:                                    )}
8047:                                  </div>
8048:                                </div>
8049:                              </div>
8050:                            </td>
8051:                            <td className="px-4 sm:px-8 py-4 md:py-6">
8052:                              <div className="flex flex-col">
8053:                                <span className="font-mono font-black text-ink text-sm">
8054:                                  {product.price.toLocaleString()} <span className="text-[9px] opacity-40">{merchant.currency}</span>
8055:                                </span>
8056:                                <span className="text-[9px] font-mono font-bold text-gray-400 mt-1 uppercase tracking-wider">
8057:                                  VAL: {(product.price * Number(product.stockQuantity || 0)).toLocaleString()}
8058:                                </span>
8059:                              </div>
8060:                            </td>
8061:                            <td className="px-4 sm:px-8 py-4 md:py-6">
8062:                              <div className="flex items-center space-x-4">
8063:                                <div className={`px-4 py-2 rounded-xl text-[10px] font-mono font-black border tracking-widest ${
8064:                                  isOut ? 'bg-rose-50 text-rose-600 border-rose-100 animate-pulse' :
8065:                                  isLow ? 'bg-orange-50 text-orange-600 border-orange-100 shadow-sm' : 
8066:                                  'bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-600 border-emerald-100 hover:bg-emerald-100 transition-colors cursor-help'
8067:                                }`}>
8068:                                  {(product.stockQuantity || 0).toString().padStart(2, '0')} UNITÉS
8069:                                </div>
8070:                                <button 
8071:                                  onClick={() => { 
8072:                                    setCurrentProduct(product); 
8073:                                    setRestockData({
8074:                                      quantity: 1,
8075:                                      cost: Number(product.costPrice || 0),
8076:                                      unitCostPrice: Number(product.costPrice || 0),
8077:                                      unitSellingPrice: Number(product.price || 0),
8078:                                      reason: 'Réapprovisionnement standard'
8079:                                    });
8080:                                    setIsRestocking(true); 
8081:                                  }}
8082:                                  className="w-10 h-10 flex items-center justify-center bg-gray-50 border border-black/5 text-gray-500 rounded-xl hover:bg-primary hover:text-white hover:border-primary transition-all shadow-sm"
8083:                                  title="Réapprovisionner"
8084:                                >
8085:                                  <Plus className="w-4 h-4" />
8086:                                </button>
8087:                              </div>
8088:                            </td>
8089:                            <td className="px-4 sm:px-8 py-4 md:py-6 text-right">
8090:                              <div className="flex items-center justify-end space-x-2">
8091:                                <button onClick={() => { setCurrentProduct(product); setIsEditing(true); }} className="p-3 bg-gray-50 text-gray-400 hover:text-primary hover:bg-primary/10 rounded-xl transition-all border border-black/5 hover:border-primary/20 shadow-sm"><Edit2 className="w-4 h-4" /></button>
8092:                                <button onClick={() => setDeleteConfirm(product.id || null)} className="p-3 bg-gray-50 text-gray-400 hover:text-rose-500 hover:bg-rose-50 rounded-xl transition-all border border-black/5 hover:border-rose-200 shadow-sm"><Trash2 className="w-4 h-4" /></button>
8093:                              </div>
8094:                            </td>
8095:                          </tr>
8096:                        );
8097:                      })
8098:                    )}
8099:                  </tbody>
8100:                </table>
8101:                {filteredProducts.length > productLimit && (
8102:                  <div className="p-4 flex justify-center border-t border-gray-100">
8103:                    <button 
8104:                      onClick={() => setProductLimit(prev => prev + 10)}
8105:                      className="px-6 py-2 bg-gray-50 text-gray-600 font-bold text-[10px] rounded-xl hover:bg-gray-100 transition-colors uppercase tracking-widest"
8106:                    >
8107:                      Voir plus
8108:                    </button>
8109:                  </div>
8110:                )}
8111:              </div>
8112:            </div>
8113:          )}
8114:        </div>
8115:
8116:        {/* Sidebar: Movement Summary or Chart */}
8117:        <div className="w-full xl:w-[400px] space-y-6">
8118:          <div className="bg-ink p-8 rounded-[2.5rem] shadow-2xl relative overflow-hidden group">
8119:            <div className="absolute top-0 right-0 p-8 opacity-10 group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform">
8120:              <TrendingUp className="w-32 h-32 text-white" />
8121:            </div>
8122:            <div className="relative">
8123:              <h3 className="text-xl font-bold text-white mb-2">Santé du Stock</h3>
8124:              <p className="text-white/50 text-[11px] leading-relaxed mb-6 font-medium uppercase tracking-widest">
8125:                Analyse de votre inventaire actuel
8126:              </p>
8127:              
8128:              <div className="space-y-5">
8129:                <HealthIndicator label="Disponibilité" value={products.length > 0 ? (products.filter(p => Number(p.stockQuantity || 0) > 0).length / products.length * 100).toFixed(0) : '0'} color="primary" />
8130:                <HealthIndicator label="Rentabilité théorique" value={theoreticalProfit.toString()} color="blue" />
8131:                <HealthIndicator label="Rotation de stock" value={rotationStock.toString()} color="purple" />
8132:              </div>
8133:
8134:              <div className="mt-8 pt-8 border-t border-white/10 grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
8135:                <div className="p-4 bg-white/5 rounded-2xl border border-white/5">
8136:                  <p className="text-[10px] text-white/40 uppercase font-black mb-1">Articles Bas</p>
8137:                  <p className="text-2xl font-black text-white">{stats.lowStock}</p>
8138:                </div>
8139:                <div className="p-4 bg-white/5 rounded-2xl border border-white/5">
8140:                  <p className="text-[10px] text-white/40 uppercase font-black mb-1">Ruptures</p>
8141:                  <p className="text-2xl font-black text-rose-400">{stats.outOfStock}</p>
8142:                </div>
8143:              </div>
8144:            </div>
8145:          </div>
8146:
8147:          <div className="bg-white p-8 rounded-[2.5rem] border border-black/5 shadow-sm">
8148:            <h4 className="text-sm font-black text-ink uppercase tracking-widest mb-6">Flux Récents</h4>
8149:            <div className="space-y-4 max-h-[500px] overflow-y-auto pr-2 custom-scrollbar">
8150:              {movements.slice(0, 8).map((m: any) => {
8151:                const product = products.find(p => p.id === m.productId);
8152:                return (
8153:                  <div key={m.id} className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 bg-gray-50/50 rounded-2xl border border-gray-100 group hover:shadow-md transition-all gap-4">
8154:                    <div className="flex items-center gap-3 flex-1 min-w-0">
8155:                      <div className={`w-10 h-10 shrink-0 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center border ${
8156:                        m.type === 'in' ? 'bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-600 border-emerald-100' : 
8157:                        m.type === 'sale' ? 'bg-blue-50 text-blue-600 border-blue-100' : 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-400 border-gray-200'
8158:                      }`}>
8159:                        {m.type === 'in' ? <ArrowDownRight className="w-4 h-4" /> : <ArrowUpRight className="w-4 h-4" />}
8160:                      </div>
8161:                      <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
8162:                        <p className="text-xs font-bold text-gray-900 truncate">{product?.name || 'Produit...'}</p>
8163:                        <p className="text-[9px] font-mono text-gray-400 font-bold uppercase tracking-widest mt-0.5">
8164:                          {m.createdAt?.seconds ? format(new Date(m.createdAt.seconds * 1000), 'dd MMM, HH:mm') : '-'}
8165:                        </p>
8166:                      </div>
8167:                    </div>
8168:                    <div className="text-right shrink-0">
8169:                      <p className={`text-xs font-black font-mono ${m.type === 'in' ? 'text-emerald-600' : 'text-rose-600'}`}>
8170:                        {m.type === 'in' ? '+' : '-'}{m.quantity}
8171:                      </p>

8173:                    </div>
8174:                  </div>
8175:                );
8176:              })}
8177:              {movements.length === 0 && (

8179:                  Aucun mouvement enregistré
8180:                </div>

8182:            </div>

8184:              onClick={() => {

8187:                el?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });
8188:              }}

8190:            >
8191:              Voir tout l'historique
8192:            </button>
8193:          </div>
8194:        </div>

8199:        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-8">
8200:          <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
8201:            <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-primary/10 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center border border-primary/10">
8202:              <Clock className="w-6 h-6 text-primary" />
8203:            </div>
8204:            <div>

8207:            </div>
8208:          </div>
8209:          <button className="px-6 py-3 bg-white border border-black/5 rounded-xl text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest hover:shadow-md transition-all">Exporter PDF</button>
8210:        </div>
8211:
8212:        <div className="bg-white rounded-[2.5rem] border border-black/5 shadow-sm overflow-hidden">
8213:          <div className="overflow-x-auto">
8214:            <table className="w-full text-left">
8215:              <thead>
8216:                <tr className="bg-gray-50/50 text-[10px] font-mono font-black text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-[0.2em] border-b border-gray-100">
8217:                  <th className="px-8 py-5">Horodatage</th>
8218:                  <th className="px-8 py-5">Article Impacté</th>
8219:                  <th className="px-8 py-5">Flux & Quantité</th>
8220:                  <th className="px-8 py-5">Commentaire / Justification</th>
8221:                </tr>
8222:              </thead>
8223:              <tbody className="divide-y divide-gray-100">
8224:                {movements.slice(0, movementLimit).map((m: any) => {
8225:                  const product = products.find(p => p.id === m.productId);
8226:                  return (
8227:                    <tr key={m.id} className="hover:bg-gray-50/50 transition-colors">
8228:                      <td className="px-8 py-6">
8229:                        <span className="text-[11px] font-mono font-black text-ink uppercase">
8230:                          {m.createdAt?.seconds ? format(new Date(m.createdAt.seconds * 1000), 'dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm') : '-'}
8231:                        </span>
8232:                      </td>

8239:                        </div>
8240:                      </td>

8242:                        <div className="flex items-center gap-4">

8245:                            m.type === 'sale' ? 'bg-blue-50 text-blue-600 border-blue-100' : 'bg-gray-50 text-gray-500 border-gray-200'
8246:                          }`}>

8250:                            {m.type === 'in' ? '+' : '-'}{m.quantity}
8251:                          </span>
8252:                        </div>

8255:                        <span className="text-[11px] font-bold text-gray-400 italic">"{m.reason || 'Aucune note'}"</span>
8256:                      </td>
8257:                    </tr>

8260:              </tbody>
8261:            </table>

8263:              <div className="p-4 flex justify-center border-t border-gray-100">
8264:                <button 
8265:                  onClick={() => setMovementLimit(prev => prev + 10)}
8266:                  className="px-6 py-2 bg-gray-50 text-gray-600 font-bold text-[10px] rounded-xl hover:bg-gray-100 transition-colors uppercase tracking-widest"
8267:                >
8268:                  Voir plus
8269:                </button>
8270:              </div>
8271:            )}
8272:          </div>
8273:        </div>
8274:      </div>
8275:
8276:      {/* Restock Modal */}
8277:      <AnimatePresence>
8278:        {isRestocking && (
8279:          <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[60] flex items-center justify-center p-4 bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-sm">
8280:            <motion.div 
8281:              initial={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.95, y: 20 }}
8282:              animate={{ opacity: 1, scale: 1, y: 0 }}
8283:              exit={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.95, y: 20 }}
8284:              className="bg-white w-full max-w-md rounded-[2.5rem] shadow-2xl overflow-hidden"
8285:            >
8286:              <div className="px-8 py-6 border-b border-gray-100 flex justify-between items-center bg-gray-50/50">
8287:                <div>

8290:                </div>

8292:                  <X className="w-5 h-5 text-gray-400" />
8293:                </button>
8294:              </div>
8295:
8296:              <div className="p-8 space-y-6">
8297:                <div className="p-4 bg-primary/5 rounded-2xl border border-primary/10 flex items-center space-x-4">
8298:                  <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-white rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm border border-black/5">
8299:                    <Package className="w-6 h-6 text-primary" />
8300:                  </div>
8301:                  <div>
8302:                    <p className="text-[10px] font-mono font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest">Produit sélectionné</p>

8304:                  </div>
8305:                </div>
8306:
8307:                <form onSubmit={handleRestock} className="space-y-5">
8308:                  <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-4">
8309:                    <div>
8310:                      <label className="block text-[10px] font-mono font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-2">Quantité à ajouter</label>
8311:                      <input 
8312:                        type="number" 
8313:                        required 
8314:                        min="1" 
8315:                        value={restockData.quantity || ''} 
8316:                        onChange={e => {
8317:                          const quantity = Number(e.target.value);
8318:                          setRestockData(prev => ({ ...prev, quantity }));
8319:                        }} 
8320:                        className="w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-xl border border-gray-100 outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 bg-gray-50/30 font-mono font-bold text-base" 
8321:                      />
8322:                    </div>
8323:                    
8324:                    <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
8325:                      <div>
8326:                        <label className="block text-[10px] font-mono font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-2">Prix d'achat unitaire ({merchant.currency})</label>
8327:                        <input 
8328:                          type="number" 
8329:                          min="0" 
8330:                          required
8331:                          value={restockData.unitCostPrice || ''} 
8332:                          onChange={e => {
8333:                            const unitCostPrice = Number(e.target.value);
8334:                            setRestockData(prev => ({ ...prev, unitCostPrice }));
8335:                          }} 
8336:                          className="w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-xl border border-gray-100 outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 bg-gray-50/30 font-mono font-bold" 
8337:                        />
8338:                      </div>
8339:                      
8340:                      <div>
8341:                        <label className="block text-[10px] font-mono font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-2">Prix de vente unitaire ({merchant.currency})</label>
8342:                        <input 
8343:                          type="number" 
8344:                          min="0" 
8345:                          required
8346:                          value={restockData.unitSellingPrice || ''} 
8347:                          onChange={e => {
8348:                            const unitSellingPrice = Number(e.target.value);
8349:                            setRestockData(prev => ({ ...prev, unitSellingPrice }));
8350:                          }} 
8351:                          className="w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-xl border border-gray-100 outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 bg-gray-50/30 font-mono font-bold" 
8352:                        />
8353:                      </div>
8354:                    </div>
8355:                  </div>
8356:
8357:                  {/* Résumé de l'approvisionnement */}
8358:                  <div className="p-4 bg-gray-50/80 rounded-2xl border border-gray-100 space-y-2">
8359:                    <div className="flex justify-between items-center text-xs">
8360:                      <span className="font-bold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wide">Coût Total Estimé :</span>
8361:                      <span className="font-mono font-black text-ink text-sm">
8362:                        {((restockData.quantity || 0) * (restockData.unitCostPrice || 0)).toLocaleString()} {merchant.currency}
8363:                      </span>
8364:                    </div>
8365:                    {restockData.unitSellingPrice > restockData.unitCostPrice && (
8366:                      <div className="flex justify-between items-center text-[10px] pt-1.5 border-t border-dashed border-gray-200">
8367:                        <span className="text-emerald-600 font-bold uppercase tracking-wider">Marge unitaire estimée :</span>
8368:                        <span className="font-mono font-bold text-emerald-600">
8369:                          {+(restockData.unitSellingPrice - restockData.unitCostPrice).toLocaleString()} {merchant.currency} ({Math.round(((restockData.unitSellingPrice - restockData.unitCostPrice) / restockData.unitSellingPrice) * 100)}%)
8370:                        </span>
8371:                      </div>
8372:                    )}
8373:                  </div>
8374:
8375:                  <div>
8376:                    <label className="block text-[10px] font-mono font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-2">Motif / Note</label>
8377:                    <input type="text" value={restockData.reason} onChange={e => setRestockData({...restockData, reason: e.target.value})} className="w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-xl border border-gray-100 outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 bg-gray-50/30 font-medium text-sm" placeholder="ex: Arrivage fournisseur..." />
8378:                  </div>
8379:                  
8380:                  <div className="flex space-x-3 pt-4">
8381:                    <button type="button" onClick={() => setIsRestocking(false)} className="flex-1 py-4 border border-gray-200 rounded-2xl font-bold text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors">Annuler</button>
8382:                    <button type="submit" disabled={saving} className="flex-[2] py-4 bg-primary text-white rounded-2xl font-bold hover:bg-primary-hover transition-all shadow-lg shadow-primary/20">
8383:                      {saving ? <Loader2 className="w-5 h-5 animate-spin mx-auto" /> : 'Confirmer l\'ajout'}
8384:                    </button>
8385:                  </div>
8386:                </form>
8387:              </div>
8388:            </motion.div>
8389:          </div>
8390:        )}
8391:      </AnimatePresence>
8392:
8393:      {/* Barcode Scanner Modal Modal */}
8394:      <ScannerModal
8395:        isOpen={showBarcodeScanner}
8396:        onClose={() => setShowBarcodeScanner(false)}
8397:        onScanSuccess={(code) => {
8398:          setShowBarcodeScanner(false);
8399:          setSearchTerm(code);
8400:          const match = products.find(p => p.sku && p.sku.trim().toLowerCase() === code.trim().toLowerCase());
8401:          if (match) {
8402:             triggerAcomAlert('Succès', `Produit trouvé : ${match.name}`, 'success', 'SYSTÈME');
8403:          } else {
8404:             triggerAcomAlert('Erreur', "Aucun produit trouvé.", 'error', 'ALERTE');
8405:          }
8406:        }}
8407:        title="Rechercher un produit"
8408:      />
8409:
8410:      <ScannerModal
8411:        isOpen={showSKUScanner}
8412:        onClose={() => setShowSKUScanner(false)}
8413:        onScanSuccess={(code) => {
8414:          setShowSKUScanner(false);
8415:          handleBarcodeForNewProduct(code);
8416:        }}
8417:        title="Scanner Code-barres / SKU"
8418:      />
8419:
8420:      {/* Product Modal */}
8421:      <AnimatePresence>
8422:        {isEditing && (
8423:          <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[60] flex items-center justify-center p-4 bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-sm">
8424:            <motion.div 
8425:              initial={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.95, y: 20 }}
8426:              animate={{ opacity: 1, scale: 1, y: 0 }}
8427:              exit={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.95, y: 20 }}

8433:                  <p className="text-[10px] font-mono text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mt-1">Configuration technique de l'article</p>
8434:                </div>
8435:                <button onClick={() => setIsEditing(false)} className="p-2 hover:bg-white rounded-xl transition-colors shadow-sm border border-black/5">

8437:                </button>
8438:              </div>
8439:
8440:              <form onSubmit={handleSave} className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-8 space-y-6">
8441:                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
8442:                  <div className="space-y-4">
8443:                    <div>

8445:                      <input

8447:                        required 
8448:                        value={currentProduct?.name || ''} 
8449:                        onChange={e => setCurrentProduct({...currentProduct!, name: e.target.value})}

8452:                      />
8453:                    </div>

8470:                        >
8471:                          <ScanLine className="w-5 h-5" />
8472:                        </button>
8473:                      </div>
8474:                    </div>
8475:                  </div>
8476:                  <div className="space-y-4">
8477:                    <div>
8478:                      <label className="block text-[10px] font-mono font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-2">Image (URL ou Fichier)</label>
8479:                      <div className="flex gap-3">
8480:                        <div className="flex-1 space-y-2">
8481:                          <input 
8482:                            type="text" 
8483:                            value={currentProduct?.image || ''} 
8484:                            onChange={e => setCurrentProduct({...currentProduct!, image: e.target.value})} 
8485:                            className="w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-xl border border-gray-100 outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 bg-gray-50/30 text-xs" 
8486:                            placeholder="https://..."
8487:                          />
8488:                          <label className="block w-full text-center px-4 py-2 border border-dashed border-gray-300 rounded-xl cursor-pointer hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors">
8489:                            <span className="text-xs font-bold text-gray-500">Ou uploader une image</span>
8490:                            <input 
8491:                              type="file"
8492:                              accept="image/*"
8493:                              className="hidden"
8494:                              onChange={(e) => {
8495:                                const file = e.target.files?.[0];
8496:                                if (file) {
8497:                                  const reader = new FileReader();
8498:                                  reader.onloadend = () => setCurrentProduct({...currentProduct!, image: reader.result as string});
8499:                                  reader.readAsDataURL(file);
8500:                                }
8501:                              }}
8502:                            />
8503:                          </label>
8504:                        </div>
8505:                        {currentProduct?.image && (
8506:                          <div className="w-16 h-16 rounded-xl border border-black/5 overflow-hidden bg-gray-100 flex-shrink-0">
8507:                            <OptimizedImage src={currentProduct.image} alt={currentProduct.name} width={100} className="w-full h-full object-cover" />
8508:                          </div>
8509:                        )}
8510:                      </div>
8511:                    </div>
8512:                    <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
8513:                      <div className="flex-1">
8514:                        <label className="flex justify-between items-center text-[10px] font-mono font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-2">
8515:                          <span>Catégorie</span>
8516:                          {showNewCatInput && (
8517:                            <button type="button" onClick={() => { setShowNewCatInput(false); setCurrentProduct({...currentProduct!, category: ''}); }} className="text-primary hover:text-primary-hover capitalize tracking-normal text-[10px]">Annuler</button>
8518:                          )}
8519:                        </label>
8520:                        {showNewCatInput ? (
8521:                          <input 
8522:                            type="text"
8523:                            value={currentProduct?.category || ''} 
8524:                            onChange={e => setCurrentProduct({...currentProduct!, category: e.target.value})} 
8525:                            className="w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-xl border border-gray-100 outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 bg-gray-50/30 font-bold"
8526:                            placeholder="Saisir la nouvelle catégorie..."
8527:                            autoFocus
8528:                          />
8529:                        ) : (
8530:                          <select

8770:    if (!sale || !phone) return '';
8771:    let cleanPhone = phone.replace(/[^0-9+]/g, '');
8772:    if (cleanPhone.startsWith('7') && cleanPhone.length === 9) {
8773:      cleanPhone = '221' + cleanPhone;
8774:    }
8775:    const cleanNumber = cleanPhone.replace(/[^0-9]/g, '');
8776:    if (!cleanNumber) return '';
8777:
8778:    const itemsText = (sale.items || []).map((item: any) => {
8779:      let itemStr = `• *${item.name}* : ${item.quantity} x ${item.price.toLocaleString()} ${merchant.currency}`;
8780:      const details = [];
8781:      if (item.sizes) details.push(`T: ${item.sizes}`);
8782:      if (item.colors) details.push(`C: ${item.colors}`);
8783:      if (details.length > 0) itemStr += ` (${details.join(', ')})`;
8784:      return itemStr;

8823:      clearTimeout(cartErrorTimeoutRef.current);

8834:    db.products.where('merchantId').equals(merchant.id).toArray()
8835:  , [merchant.id]) || [];
8836:
8837:  // --- Handlers ---
8838:  const handleBarcodeScanned = useCallback((code: string) => {
8839:    if (!code) return;
8840:    const searchCode = code.trim().toLowerCase();
8841:    const searchAlphanumeric = searchCode.replace(/[^a-z0-9]/g, '');
8842:    const searchNoZ = searchAlphanumeric.replace(/^0+/, '');
8843:
8844:    // Advanced, highly intelligent finder supporting EAN leading zeros, hyphens, and spaces
8845:    const match = products.find(p => {
8846:      if (!p.sku) return false;
8847:      const pSku = p.sku.trim().toLowerCase();
8848:      const pAlphanumeric = pSku.replace(/[^a-z0-9]/g, '');
8849:      const pNoZ = pAlphanumeric.replace(/^0+/, '');
8850:
8851:      return (
8852:        pSku === searchCode ||             // Exact match
8853:        pAlphanumeric === searchAlphanumeric || // Strip hyphens/spaces and compare (e.g. "978-020" vs "978020")
8854:        (pNoZ !== '' && pNoZ === searchNoZ) ||  // Strip leading zeros & compare (e.g. "000789" vs "789")
8855:        (pAlphanumeric.length > 4 && searchAlphanumeric.length > 4 && 
8856:         (pAlphanumeric.includes(searchAlphanumeric) || searchAlphanumeric.includes(pAlphanumeric))) // Substring tolerance
8857:      );
8858:    });
8859:
8860:    if (match) {
8861:      if (Number(match.stockQuantity || 0) <= 0) {
8862:        triggerCartError("ARTICLE EN RUPTURE : " + match.name);
8863:      } else {
8864:        addToCart(match);
8865:        triggerAcomAlert('Succès', `Ajouté : ${match.name}`, 'success', 'SYSTÈME');
8866:      }
8867:    } else {
8868:      triggerAcomAlert('Erreur', `Code non reconnu : ${code}`, 'error', 'ALERTE');
8869:    }
8870:  }, [products]);
8871:
8872:  // Physical Barcode Scanner Effect
8873:  const scannedCodeRef = useRef('');
8874:  useEffect(() => {
8875:    let timeoutId: any;
8876:    
8877:    const handleKeyDown = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {
8878:      // Ignore if user is typing in generic input fields unless it's our POS search explicitly
8879:      if (e.target instanceof HTMLInputElement || e.target instanceof HTMLTextAreaElement) {
8880:        if (e.target.id !== 'pos-search') return;
8881:      }
8882:      
8883:      if (e.key === 'Enter') {
8884:        const code = scannedCodeRef.current;
8885:        if (code.length > 2) {
8886:          handleBarcodeScanned(code);
8887:          setSearchTerm(''); // clear search input if they were positioned there
8888:        }
8889:        scannedCodeRef.current = '';
8890:      } else if (e.key.length === 1) { 
8891:        scannedCodeRef.current += e.key;
8892:        clearTimeout(timeoutId);
8893:        timeoutId = setTimeout(() => {
8894:          scannedCodeRef.current = '';
8895:        }, 150); // Increased debounce to 150ms to support slightly slower hardware/simulators
8896:      }
8897:    };
8898:
8899:    window.addEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown);
8900:    return () => {
8901:      window.removeEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown);
8902:      clearTimeout(timeoutId);
8903:    };
8904:  }, [handleBarcodeScanned]);

8907:  const [selectedCategory, setSelectedCategory] = useState<string>('all');
8908:  const [selectedSubCategory, setSelectedSubCategory] = useState<string>('all');
8909:  const [stockFilter, setStockFilter] = useState<'all' | 'instock' | 'lowstock' | 'outofstock'>('instock');
8910:  const [sortBy, setSortBy] = useState<'name' | 'price_asc' | 'price_desc' | 'stock_desc' | 'newest'>('name');
8911:  const [selectedSize, setSelectedSize] = useState<string>('all');
8912:  const [selectedColor, setSelectedColor] = useState<string>('all');
8913:
8914:  const availableSizes = useMemo(() => {
8915:    if (selectedCategory === 'all') return []; // Hide sizes to prevent confusing mix of laptop and shoe sizes
8916:    const list = new Set<string>();
8917:    const categoryFiltered = products.filter(p => {
8918:      const matchCat = selectedCategory === 'all' || p.category === selectedCategory;
8919:      const matchSubCat = selectedSubCategory === 'all' || p.subCategory === selectedSubCategory;
8920:      return matchCat && matchSubCat;
8921:    });
8922:    categoryFiltered.forEach(p => {
8923:      if (p.sizes) {
8924:        p.sizes.split(',').forEach(s => {
8925:          const trimmed = s.trim();
8926:          if (trimmed) list.add(trimmed.toUpperCase());
8927:        });
8928:      }
8929:    });
8930:    return Array.from(list).sort();
8931:  }, [products, selectedCategory, selectedSubCategory]);
8932:
8933:  const availableColors = useMemo(() => {
8934:    if (selectedCategory === 'all') return []; // Hide colors to prevent confusing mixture if no category is isolated
8935:    const list = new Set<string>();
8936:    const categoryFiltered = products.filter(p => {
8937:      const matchCat = selectedCategory === 'all' || p.category === selectedCategory;
8938:      const matchSubCat = selectedSubCategory === 'all' || p.subCategory === selectedSubCategory;
8939:      return matchCat && matchSubCat;
8940:    });
8941:    categoryFiltered.forEach(p => {
8942:      if (p.colors) {
8943:        p.colors.split(',').forEach(c => {
8944:          const trimmed = c.trim();
8945:          if (trimmed) list.add(trimmed.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + trimmed.slice(1).toLowerCase());
8946:        });
8947:      }
8948:    });
8949:    return Array.from(list).sort();
8950:  }, [products, selectedCategory, selectedSubCategory]);
8951:
8952:  const categories = useMemo(() => {
8953:    const cats = new Set<string>();
8954:    products.forEach(p => {
8955:      if (p.category) cats.add(p.category);
8956:    });
8957:    return Array.from(cats).sort((a, b) => a.localeCompare(b));
8958:  }, [products]);
8959:
8960:  const subCategories = useMemo(() => {
