8962:    const subs = new Set<string>();
8963:    products.forEach(p => {
8964:      if (p.category === selectedCategory && p.subCategory) {
8965:        subs.add(p.subCategory);
8966:      }
8967:    });
8968:    return Array.from(subs).sort((a, b) => a.localeCompare(b));
8969:  }, [products, selectedCategory]);
8970:
8971:  // Reset subcategory, sizes and colors when category changes
8972:  useEffect(() => {
8973:    setSelectedSubCategory('all');
8974:    setSelectedSize('all');
8975:    setSelectedColor('all');
8976:  }, [selectedCategory]);
8977:
8978:  // Reset sizes and colors when subcategory changes
8979:  useEffect(() => {
8980:    setSelectedSize('all');
8981:    setSelectedColor('all');
8982:  }, [selectedSubCategory]);
8983:
8984:  const filteredProducts = useMemo(() => {
8985:    let result = [...products];
8986:
8987:    // Search filter (name, SKU, category, description, sizes or colors match)
8988:    if (searchTerm.trim() !== '') {
8989:      const term = searchTerm.toLowerCase();
8990:      result = result.filter(p => 
8991:        p.name.toLowerCase().includes(term) || 
8992:        (p.sku && p.sku.toLowerCase().includes(term)) ||
8993:        (p.category && p.category.toLowerCase().includes(term)) ||
8994:        (p.subCategory && p.subCategory.toLowerCase().includes(term)) ||
8995:        (p.description && p.description.toLowerCase().includes(term)) ||
8996:        (p.sizes && p.sizes.toLowerCase().includes(term)) ||
8997:        (p.colors && p.colors.toLowerCase().includes(term))
8998:      );
8999:    }
9000:
9001:    // Category filter
9002:    if (selectedCategory !== 'all') {
9003:      result = result.filter(p => p.category === selectedCategory);
9004:      // Subcategory filter
9005:      if (selectedSubCategory !== 'all') {
9006:        result = result.filter(p => p.subCategory === selectedSubCategory);
9007:      }
9008:    }
9009:
9010:    // Stock Filter
9011:    if (stockFilter === 'instock') {
9012:      result = result.filter(p => Number(p.stockQuantity || 0) > 0);
9013:    } else if (stockFilter === 'lowstock') {
9014:      result = result.filter(p => {
9015:        const stock = Number(p.stockQuantity || 0);
9016:        const minLevel = Number(p.minStockLevel || 5);
9017:        return stock > 0 && stock <= minLevel;
9018:      });
9019:    } else if (stockFilter === 'outofstock') {
9020:      result = result.filter(p => Number(p.stockQuantity || 0) <= 0);
9021:    }
9022:
9023:    // Size Filter
9024:    if (selectedSize !== 'all') {
9025:      result = result.filter(p => p.sizes && p.sizes.split(',').map(s => s.trim().toUpperCase()).includes(selectedSize));
9026:    }
9027:
9028:    // Color Filter
9029:    if (selectedColor !== 'all') {
9030:      result = result.filter(p => p.colors && p.colors.split(',').map(c => c.trim().toUpperCase()).includes(selectedColor.toUpperCase()));
9031:    }
9032:
9033:    // Sort order
9034:    if (sortBy === 'name') {
9035:      result.sort((a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name));
9036:    } else if (sortBy === 'price_asc') {
9037:      result.sort((a, b) => a.price - b.price);
9038:    } else if (sortBy === 'price_desc') {
9039:      result.sort((a, b) => b.price - a.price);
9040:    } else if (sortBy === 'stock_desc') {
9041:      result.sort((a, b) => (b.stockQuantity || 0) - (a.stockQuantity || 0));
9042:    } else if (sortBy === 'newest') {
9043:      result.sort((a, b) => {
9044:        const dateA = a.id; // fallback comparison
9045:        const dateB = b.id;
9046:        return dateB.localeCompare(dateA);
9047:      });
9048:    }
9049:
9050:    return result;
9051:  }, [products, searchTerm, selectedCategory, selectedSubCategory, stockFilter, sortBy, selectedSize, selectedColor]);
9052:
9053:  const addToCart = (product: MerchantProduct) => {
9054:    if (Number(product.stockQuantity || 0) <= 0) {
9055:      triggerCartError("ARTICLE EN RUPTURE, LA VENTE EST ANNULÉE.");
9056:      return;
9057:    }
9058:    setCart(prev => {
9059:      const existing = prev.find(item => item.productId === product.id);
9060:      if (existing) {
9061:        if (existing.quantity >= (product.stockQuantity || 0)) {
9062:          triggerAcomAlert('Erreur', 'Stock insuffisant', 'error', 'ALERTE');
9063:          return prev;
9064:        }
9065:        return prev.map(item => item.productId === product.id ? { ...item, quantity: item.quantity + 1 } : item);
9066:      }
9067:      return [...prev, { 
9068:        productId: product.id, 
9069:        name: product.name, 
9070:        quantity: 1, 
9071:        price: product.price, 
9072:        costPrice: product.costPrice || 0,
9073:        sizes: product.sizes || '',
9074:        colors: product.colors || ''
9075:      }];
9076:    });
9077:  };
9078:
9079:  const removeFromCart = (productId: string) => setCart(prev => prev.filter(item => item.productId !== productId));
9080:
9081:  const total = useMemo(() => cart.reduce((acc, item) => acc + (item.price * item.quantity), 0), [cart]);
9082:
9083:  const handleCheckout = async () => {
9084:    if (cart.length === 0 || !user) return;
9085:    setIsSubmitting(true);
9086:    
9087:    // Check limit for TESTE plan
9088:    if (merchant.plan === 'FREE') {
9089:      const startOfDay = new Date();
9090:      startOfDay.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
9091:      const salesTodayCount = await db.sales
9092:        .where('merchantId')
9093:        .equals(merchant.id)
9094:        .filter(sale => new Date(sale.createdAt || sale.created_at || new Date()) >= startOfDay)
9095:        .count();
9096:
9097:      if (salesTodayCount >= 2) {
9098:        triggerAcomAlert('Erreur', 'Vous avez atteint la limite de 2 ventes par jour pour le plan TESTE. Veuillez passer au forfait supérieur.', 'error', 'ALERTE');
9099:        if (setShowUpgradeModal) setShowUpgradeModal(true);
9100:        setIsSubmitting(false);
9101:        return;
9102:      }
9103:    }
9104:
9105:    try {
9106:      const actualPaid = isPartial ? (Number(initialPaidAmount) || 0) : total;
9107:      
9108:      const saleData: Partial<MerchantSale> = {
9109:        merchantId: merchant.id,
9110:        items: cart.map(item => ({ ...item, total: item.price * item.quantity })),
9111:        totalAmount: total,
9112:        paidAmount: actualPaid,
9113:        balance: total - actualPaid,
9114:        payments: actualPaid > 0 ? [{
9115:          id: uuidv4(),
9116:          amount: actualPaid,
9117:          method: paymentMethod as any,
9118:          date: new Date()
9119:        }] : [],
9120:        paymentMethod: isPartial ? 'split' : paymentMethod as any,
9121:        customerName,
9122:        customerPhone,
9123:        processedBy: user.uid,
9124:        createdAt: new Date()
9125:      };
9126:      
9127:      // Save the sale (service handles stock update)
9128:      const saleId = await dbService.merchantSales.save(saleData);
9129:
9130:      // 1. Prepare WhatsApp URL if tracking is enabled
9131:      let whatsappUrl: string | undefined = undefined;
9132:      let methodLabel = isPartial ? 'Paiement partiel (Acompte) 💸' : 'Espèces 💵';
9133:      if (!isPartial) {
9134:        const paymentMethodLabels: Record<string, string> = {
9135:          cash: 'Espèces 💵',
9136:          card: 'Carte Bancaire 💳',
9137:          mobile_money: 'Mobile Money 📱'
9138:        };
9139:        methodLabel = paymentMethodLabels[paymentMethod] || paymentMethod;
9140:      }
9141:
9142:      if (sendToWhatsApp && managerPhone) {
9143:        let cleanManagerPhone = managerPhone.replace(/[^0-9+]/g, '');
9144:        if (cleanManagerPhone.startsWith('7') && cleanManagerPhone.length === 9) {
9145:          cleanManagerPhone = '221' + cleanManagerPhone; // Default to Senegal code
9146:        }
9147:        const cleanNumber = cleanManagerPhone.replace(/[^0-9]/g, '');
9148:        if (cleanNumber) {
9149:          const isPartialLabel = isPartial ? `\n*Montant reçu :* ${actualPaid.toLocaleString()} ${merchant.currency}\n*Reste dû :* ${(total - actualPaid).toLocaleString()} ${merchant.currency}` : '';
9150:
9151:          const itemsText = cart.map(item => {
9152:            let itemStr = `• *${item.name}* : ${item.quantity} x ${item.price.toLocaleString()} ${merchant.currency}`;
9153:            if (item.sizes || item.colors) {
9154:              const details = [];
9155:              if (item.sizes) details.push(`T: ${item.sizes}`);
9156:              if (item.colors) details.push(`C: ${item.colors}`);
9157:              itemStr += ` (${details.join(', ')})`;
9158:            }
9159:            return itemStr;
9160:          }).join('\n');
9161:
9162:          const receiptText = `🧾 *NOUVELLE VENTE - CAISSE POS* 🧾\n` +
9163:            `----------------------------------------\n` +
9164:            `🌐 *Boutique :* ${merchant.name}\n` +
9165:            `👤 *Opérateur :* ${user.displayName || user.email || 'N/A'}\n` +
9166:            `📅 *Date :* ${new Date().toLocaleString('fr-FR')}\n` +
9167:            `----------------------------------------\n` +
9168:            `📦 *DÉTAILS DES ARTICLES :*\n${itemsText}\n` +
9169:            `----------------------------------------\n` +
9170:            `💰 *TOTAL :* *${total.toLocaleString()} ${merchant.currency}*\n` +
9171:            `💳 *Mode de Règlement :* ${isPartial ? 'Acompte' : methodLabel}${isPartialLabel}\n` +
9172:            `----------------------------------------\n` +
9173:            `👥 *CLIENT :*\n` +
9174:            `• *Nom :* ${customerName || 'Client de passage'}\n` +
9175:            `• *Téléphone :* ${customerPhone || 'Non renseigné'}\n` +
9176:            `----------------------------------------\n` +
9177:            `_Envoyé instantanément depuis l'application de Caisse_`;
9178:
9179:          whatsappUrl = `https://wa.me/${cleanNumber}?text=${encodeURIComponent(receiptText)}`;
9180:        }
9181:      }
9182:
9183:      // 2. Prepare and send background Email tracking if enabled
9184:      if (sendToEmail && managerEmail) {
9185:        try {
9186:          const isPartialLabelEmail = isPartial ? `
9187:          <tr style="border-top: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
9188:            <td style="color: #64748b; padding-top: 8px;">Montant Reçu :</td>
9189:            <td style="color: #16a34a; font-weight: 800; text-align: right; padding-top: 8px;">${actualPaid.toLocaleString()} ${merchant.currency}</td>
9190:          </tr>
9191:          <tr>
9192:            <td style="color: #64748b; padding-bottom: 8px;">Reste Dû :</td>
9193:            <td style="color: #dc2626; font-weight: 800; text-align: right; padding-bottom: 8px;">${(total - actualPaid).toLocaleString()} ${merchant.currency}</td>
9194:          </tr>` : '';
9195:
9196:          const emailHtml = `
9197:            <div style="background-color: #f8f9fa; padding: 40px 15px; font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;">
9198:              <div style="max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto; background-color: white; border-radius: 16px; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); border: 1px solid #eee;">
9199:                <div style="background-color: #4f46e5; padding: 30px; text-align: center; color: white;">
9200:                  <h2 style="margin: 0; font-size: 24px; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: -0.5px;">NOUVELLE VENTE POS</h2>
9201:                  <p style="margin: 5px 0 0 0; font-size: 14px; opacity: 0.9;">Boutique : ${merchant.name}</p>
9202:                </div>
9203:                
9204:                <div style="padding: 30px; color: #1e293b;">
9205:                  <div style="text-align: center; margin-bottom: 30px;">
9206:                    <div style="font-size: 36px; font-weight: 900; color: #4f46e5;">${total.toLocaleString()} ${merchant.currency}</div>
9207:                    <p style="margin: 5px 0 0 0; font-size: 13px; color: #64748b; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; font-weight: bold;">Règlement : ${isPartial ? 'Acompte' : methodLabel}</p>
9208:                  </div>
9209:                  
9210:                  <table width="100%" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" style="border-collapse: collapse; margin-bottom: 25px;">
9211:                    <thead>
9212:                      <tr style="border-bottom: 2px solid #e2e8f0; text-align: left;">
9213:                        <th style="padding: 10px 0; font-size: 12px; text-transform: uppercase; color: #64748b;">Article</th>
9214:                        <th width="80" style="padding: 10px 0; font-size: 12px; text-transform: uppercase; color: #64748b; text-align: center;">Qté</th>
9215:                        <th width="120" style="padding: 10px 0; font-size: 12px; text-transform: uppercase; color: #64748b; text-align: right;">Prix</th>
9216:                      </tr>
9217:                    </thead>
9218:                    <tbody>
9219:                      ${cart.map(item => `
9220:                        <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9;">
9221:                          <td style="padding: 12px 0; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: #1e293b;">
9222:                            ${item.name}
9223:                            ${item.sizes || item.colors ? `<div style="font-size: 11px; color: #64748b; font-weight: normal; margin-top: 2px;">${[item.sizes ? `Taille: ${item.sizes}` : '', item.colors ? `Couleur: ${item.colors}` : ''].filter(Boolean).join(' | ')}</div>` : ''}
9224:                          </td>
9225:                          <td style="padding: 12px 0; font-size: 14px; color: #475569; text-align: center;">${item.quantity}</td>
9226:                          <td style="padding: 12px 0; font-size: 14px; color: #1e293b; text-align: right; font-weight: 600;">${(item.price * item.quantity).toLocaleString()} ${merchant.currency}</td>
9227:                        </tr>
9228:                      `).join('')}
9229:                    </tbody>
9230:                  </table>
9231:                  
9232:                  <div style="background-color: #f8f9fa; border-radius: 12px; padding: 20px; font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 25px;">
9233:                    <table width="100%" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0">
9234:                      <tr>
9235:                        <td style="color: #64748b; padding-bottom: 8px;">Date de transaction &nbsp;:</td>
9236:                        <td style="color: #1e293b; font-weight: 600; text-align: right; padding-bottom: 8px;">${new Date().toLocaleString('fr-FR')}</td>
9237:                      </tr>
9238:                      <tr>
9239:                        <td style="color: #64748b; padding-bottom: 8px;">Opérateur :</td>
9240:                        <td style="color: #1e293b; font-weight: 600; text-align: right; padding-bottom: 8px;">${user?.displayName || user?.email || 'N/A'}</td>
9241:                      </tr>
9242:                      <tr>
9243:                        <td style="color: #64748b; padding-bottom: 8px;">Client :</td>
9244:                        <td style="color: #1e293b; font-weight: 600; text-align: right; padding-bottom: 8px;">${customerName || 'Client de passage'}</td>
9245:                      </tr>
9246:                      ${customerPhone ? `
9247:                      <tr>
9248:                        <td style="color: #64748b; padding-bottom: 8px;">Téléphone :</td>
9249:                        <td style="color: #1e293b; font-weight: 600; text-align: right; padding-bottom: 8px;">${customerPhone}</td>
9250:                      </tr>
9251:                      ` : ''}
9252:                      ${isPartialLabelEmail}
9253:                    </table>
9254:                  </div>
9255:                </div>
9256:                
9257:                <div style="background-color: #1e293b; padding: 20px; text-align: center; color: #94a3b8; font-size: 11px;">
9258:                  <p style="margin: 0; color: white; font-weight: bold; font-size: 13px;">${merchant.name}</p>
9259:                  <p style="margin: 4px 0 0 0;">Notification de Suivi de Caisse en Temps Réel</p>
9260:                </div>
9261:              </div>
9262:            </div>
9263:          `;
9264:
9265:          setEmailSendStatus('sending');
9266:          setEmailSendError(null);
9267:          sendEmailDirectlyOrViaBackend({
9268:            to: managerEmail,
9269:            from: merchant.managerNotifications?.emailFrom || undefined,
9270:            subject: `[PRO POS - ${merchant.name}] Vente Réussie : ${total.toLocaleString()} ${merchant.currency}`,
9271:            html: emailHtml
9272:          }, { 
9273:            resendApiKey: merchant.managerNotifications?.resendApiKey, 
9274:            defaultFrom: merchant.managerNotifications?.emailFrom 
9275:          })
9276:          .then(async (res) => {
9277:            let data: any = {};
9278:            try {
9279:              const text = await res.text();
9280:              data = text ? JSON.parse(text) : {};
9281:            } catch (e) {
9282:              console.error("Failed to parse response as JSON:", e);
9283:              data = { error: `Format de réponse invalide (Erreur serveur)` };
9284:            }
9285:            if (res.ok) {
9286:              if (data.message && data.message.includes("missing")) {
9287:                setEmailSendStatus('simulated');
9288:              } else if (data.success) {
9289:                setEmailSendStatus('success');
9290:                triggerAcomAlert('Notification Gérant', "Ce mail envoyé en arrière-plan avec succès !", 'success', "ENVOI D'E-MAIL");
9291:              } else {
9292:                setEmailSendStatus('error');
9293:                setEmailSendError(data.error || "Erreur de transmission");
9294:              }
9295:            } else {
9296:              setEmailSendStatus('error');
9297:              setEmailSendError(data.error || `Erreur serveur (${res.status})`);
9298:            }
9299:          })
9300:          .catch(err => {
9301:            console.error("Error sending automatic email tracking:", err);
9302:            setEmailSendStatus('error');
9303:            setEmailSendError(err.message || "Erreur réseau");
9304:          });
9305:        } catch (emailErr) {
9306:          console.error("Error sending background email:", emailErr);
9307:          setEmailSendStatus('error');
9308:          setEmailSendError(String(emailErr));
9309:        }
9310:      }
9311:
9312:      // 3. Set Receipt modal data and whatsappUrl
9313:      setShowReceiptModal({ show: true, saleData: { ...saleData, id: saleId }, whatsappUrl: whatsappUrl });
9314:
9315:      setCart([]);
9316:      setCustomerName('');
9317:      setCustomerPhone('');
9318:      triggerAcomAlert('Succès', 'Vente enregistrée !', 'success', 'SYSTÈME');
9319:    } catch (error) {
9320:      console.error('Checkout error:', error);
9321:      triggerAcomAlert('Erreur', 'Erreur lors de la vente', 'error', 'ALERTE');
9322:    } finally {
9323:      setIsSubmitting(false);
9324:    }
9325:  };
9326:
9327:  const renderCartContent = (isMobile = false) => {
9328:    return (
9329:      <>
9330:        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-8">
9331:          <h3 className="text-xl font-bold text-ink flex items-center">
9332:            <div className="w-10 h-10 bg-primary/10 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center mr-3">
9333:              <ShoppingCart className="w-5 h-5 text-primary" />
9334:            </div>
9335:            {isMobile ? `Panier Mobile (${cart.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.quantity, 0)})` : "Panier"}
9336:          </h3>
9337:          <div className={`flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-[8px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest border ${
9338:            merchant.licenseType === 'local' ? 'bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-600 border-emerald-100' : 'bg-blue-50 text-blue-600 border-blue-100'
9339:          }`}>
9340:            {merchant.licenseType === 'local' ? <HardDrive className="w-2.5 h-2.5" /> : <Database className="w-2.5 h-2.5" />}
9341:            {merchant.licenseType === 'local' ? 'Mode Local' : 'Sync Cloud'}
9342:          </div>
9343:        </div>
9344:
9345:        <AnimatePresence>
9346:          {cartError && (
9347:            <motion.div
9348:              initial={{ opacity: 0, height: 0, y: -10 }}
9349:              animate={{ opacity: 1, height: "auto", y: 0 }}
9350:              exit={{ opacity: 0, height: 0, y: -10 }}
9351:              transition={{ duration: 0.3 }}
9352:              className="mb-6 p-4 bg-rose-50 border border-rose-100/80 rounded-2xl flex items-start gap-3 shadow-md relative overflow-hidden"
9353:            >
9354:              <div className="absolute top-0 left-0 w-1 h-full bg-rose-500"></div>
9355:              <div className="w-8 h-8 rounded-lg bg-rose-100 flex items-center justify-center shrink-0">
9356:                <AlertCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-rose-600 animate-pulse" />
9357:              </div>
9358:              <div className="flex-1 min-w-0 pr-6">
9359:                <p className="text-[11px] font-black text-rose-900 uppercase tracking-wide leading-snug">
9360:                  {cartError}
9361:                </p>
9362:                <p className="text-[8px] text-rose-500 font-black uppercase tracking-widest mt-1">
9363:                  Sélection annulée par précaution
9364:                </p>
9365:              </div>
9366:              <button
9367:                onClick={() => setCartError(null)}
9368:                className="absolute top-2 right-2 p-1 text-rose-400 hover:text-rose-600 rounded-lg hover:bg-rose-100 transition-all cursor-pointer animate-fadeIn"
9369:              >
9370:                <X className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
9371:              </button>
9372:            </motion.div>
9373:          )}
9374:        </AnimatePresence>
9375:
9376:        <div className={`space-y-4 mb-8 pr-2 custom-scrollbar ${isMobile ? 'max-h-[220px]' : 'max-h-[350px]'} overflow-y-auto`}>
9377:          {cart.length === 0 ? (
9378:            <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-16 text-center opacity-40">
9379:              <div className="w-16 h-16 bg-gray-50 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mb-4">
9380:                <ShoppingCart className="w-8 h-8" />
9381:              </div>
9382:              <p className="text-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-widest">Panier vide</p>
9383:            </div>
9384:          ) : (
9385:            cart.map((item) => (
9386:              <div key={item.productId} className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 bg-gray-50/50 rounded-2xl border border-gray-100 group">
9387:                <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
9388:                  <p className="text-sm font-bold text-gray-900 truncate">{item.name}</p>
9389:                  <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-1.5 mt-0.5">
9390:                    <p className="text-[10px] font-mono text-gray-400 font-bold uppercase tracking-widest">
9391:                      {item.quantity} x {item.price.toLocaleString()} {merchant.currency}
9392:                    </p>
9393:                    {item.sizes && (
9394:                      <span className="text-[9px] font-mono font-semibold bg-blue-50 text-blue-600 px-1 py-0.5 rounded">T: {item.sizes}</span>
9395:                    )}
9396:                    {item.colors && (
9397:                      <span className="text-[9px] font-mono font-semibold bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-600 px-1 py-0.5 rounded">C: {item.colors}</span>
9398:                    )}
9399:                  </div>
9400:                </div>
9401:                <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">
9402:                  <p className="text-sm font-black text-ink">{(item.price * item.quantity).toLocaleString()}</p>
9403:                  <button onClick={() => removeFromCart(item.productId)} className="p-2 text-gray-300 hover:text-rose-500 hover:bg-rose-50 rounded-xl transition-all">
9404:                    <Trash2 className="w-4 h-4" />
9405:                  </button>
9406:                </div>
9407:              </div>
9408:            ))

9417:            </div>

9421:            </div>

9439:            </label>

9441:            {isPartial && (

9443:                initial={{ opacity: 0, height: 0 }}

9445:                className="mt-4 space-y-2 overflow-hidden"

9451:                  onChange={e => setInitialPaidAmount(e.target.value)}
9452:                  placeholder="Entrez le montant reçu..."

9454:                />
9455:                {initialPaidAmount && Number(initialPaidAmount) < total && (
9456:                  <p className="text-[9px] font-bold text-amber-500 italic">Reste à payer: {(total - Number(initialPaidAmount)).toLocaleString()} {merchant.currency}</p>
9457:                )}
9458:              </motion.div>
9459:            )}
9460:          </div>
9461:
9462:          <div className="pt-4 border-t border-black/5 space-y-3">
9463:            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-3">

9467:                  <input 
9468:                    type="checkbox"
9469:                    checked={sendToWhatsApp}
9470:                    onChange={e => setSendToWhatsApp(e.target.checked)}
9471:                    className="rounded border-gray-300 text-primary focus:ring-primary/20 w-4.5 h-4.5 cursor-pointer"

9474:                    <span className="w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-emerald-500 animate-pulse shrink-0 inline-block mr-1"></span>
9475:                    Suivi WhatsApp Manager
9476:                  </span>
9477:                </label>
9478:
9479:                {sendToWhatsApp && (
9480:                  <div className="relative">
9481:                    <Smartphone className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-4 h-4 text-emerald-500" />
9482:                    <input 
9483:                      type="tel" 
9484:                      placeholder="Téléphone du Manager (ex: +22177...)" 
9485:                      value={managerPhone} 
9486:                      onChange={e => setManagerPhone(e.target.value)}

9488:                    />
9489:                  </div>

9491:              </div>

9533:                    Suivi Email Manager

9535:                </label>
9536:
9537:                {sendToEmail && (
9538:                  <div className="relative">

9543:                      value={managerEmail} 
9544:                      onChange={e => setManagerEmail(e.target.value)}

9566:              }

9576:  };
9577:
9578:  return (
9579:    <motion.div

9581:      animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0 }}
9582:      exit={{ opacity: 0, x: -20 }}

9584:    >
9585:      <div className="flex-1 space-y-6">
9586:        <div className="flex gap-3">
9587:          <div className="relative group flex-1">
9588:            <Search className="absolute left-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-focus-within:text-primary transition-colors" />
9589:            <input
9590:              type="text"
9591:              id="pos-search"
9592:              placeholder="Rechercher un produit ou scanner le code-barres (SKU)..."
9593:              value={searchTerm}
9594:              onChange={(e) => {
9595:                const val = e.target.value;
9596:                setSearchTerm(val);
9597:                
9598:                // Fine-tuned auto-detector for barcode scanning or manual entry matching exact SKU
9599:                const trimmed = val.trim();
9600:                if (trimmed.length >= 3) {
9601:                  const searchCode = trimmed.toLowerCase();
9602:                  const searchAlphanumeric = searchCode.replace(/[^a-z0-9]/g, '');
9603:                  const searchNoZ = searchAlphanumeric.replace(/^0+/, '');
9604:
9605:                  const match = products.find(p => {
9606:                    if (!p.sku) return false;
9607:                    const pSku = p.sku.trim().toLowerCase();
9608:                    const pAlphanumeric = pSku.replace(/[^a-z0-9]/g, '');
9609:                    const pNoZ = pAlphanumeric.replace(/^0+/, '');
9610:
9611:                    return (
9612:                      pSku === searchCode ||
9613:                      pAlphanumeric === searchAlphanumeric ||
9614:                      (pNoZ !== '' && pNoZ === searchNoZ)
9615:                    );
9616:                  });
9617:
9618:                  if (match) {
9619:                    if (Number(match.stockQuantity || 0) <= 0) {
9620:                      triggerCartError("ARTICLE EN RUPTURE : " + match.name);
9621:                      setSearchTerm('');
9622:                    } else {
9623:                      addToCart(match);
9624:                      triggerAcomAlert('Succès', `Ajouté : ${match.name}`, 'success', 'SYSTÈME');
9625:                      setSearchTerm('');
9626:                    }
9627:                  }
9628:                }
9629:              }}
9630:              onKeyDown={(e) => {
9631:                if (e.key === 'Enter' && searchTerm.trim().length > 2) {
9632:                  // Prioritize searchTerm if user manually typed or scanned directly into the focus
9633:                  handleBarcodeScanned(searchTerm.trim());
9634:                  setSearchTerm('');
9635:                }
9636:              }}
9637:              autoFocus
9638:              className="w-full pl-12 pr-4 py-4 bg-white border border-black/5 rounded-[1.5rem] text-sm focus:ring-4 focus:ring-primary/10 shadow-sm outline-none transition-all"
9639:            />
9640:          </div>
9641:          <button
9642:            onClick={() => setShowBarcodeScanner(true)}
9643:            className="h-auto px-5 bg-indigo-50 text-indigo-600 rounded-[1.5rem] border border-indigo-100 hover:bg-indigo-600 hover:text-white hover:border-indigo-600 transition-all flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm whitespace-nowrap"
9644:            title="Scanner un code-barres avec la caméra"
9645:          >
9646:            <ScanLine className="w-5 h-5 md:mr-2" />
9647:            <span className="hidden md:inline font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-xs">Scanner</span>
9648:          </button>
9649:        </div>
9650:
9651:        {/* Filtres Intelligents */}
9652:        <div className="space-y-4 bg-gray-50/50 p-4 rounded-3xl border border-black/5">
9653:          {/* Ligne 1: Catégories (Filtre rapide) */}
9654:          <div className="space-y-2">
9655:            <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
9656:              <span className="text-xs font-black text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest flex items-center gap-1.5">
9657:                <Tag className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
9658:                Catégories de l'établissement
9659:              </span>
9660:              {selectedCategory !== 'all' && (

9662:                  onClick={() => setSelectedCategory('all')} 
9663:                  className="text-[10px] font-bold text-primary hover:underline"
9664:                >
9665:                  Réinitialiser
9666:                </button>
9667:              )}
9668:            </div>
9669:            
9670:            <div className="flex gap-2 w-full overflow-x-auto pb-1 [scrollbar-width:none] [&::-webkit-scrollbar]:hidden -mx-4 px-4 sm:mx-0 sm:px-0">
9671:              <button
9672:                onClick={() => setSelectedCategory('all')}
9673:                className={`shrink-0 flex items-center gap-1.5 px-4 py-2 rounded-2xl text-xs font-bold whitespace-nowrap transition-all border ${
9674:                  selectedCategory === 'all'
9675:                    ? 'bg-primary text-white border-primary shadow-sm'
9676:                    : 'bg-white text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900 border-black/5 hover:border-gray-200 shadow-sm'
9677:                }`}
9678:              >
9679:                <span>Tous</span>
9680:                <span className={`text-[10px] px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full ${
9681:                  selectedCategory === 'all' ? 'bg-white/20 text-white' : 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-400'
9682:                }`}>
9683:                  {products.length}
9684:                </span>
9685:              </button>
9686:
9687:              {categories.map((cat) => {
9688:                const count = products.filter(p => p.category === cat).length;
9689:                return (
9690:                  <button
9691:                    key={cat}
9692:                    onClick={() => setSelectedCategory(cat)}
9693:                    className={`shrink-0 flex items-center gap-1.5 px-4 py-2 rounded-2xl text-xs font-bold whitespace-nowrap transition-all border ${
9694:                      selectedCategory === cat
9695:                        ? 'bg-primary text-white border-primary shadow-sm'
9696:                        : 'bg-white text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900 border-black/5 hover:border-gray-200 shadow-sm'

9698:                  >
9699:                    <span>{cat}</span>
9700:                    <span className={`text-[10px] px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full ${
9701:                      selectedCategory === cat ? 'bg-white/20 text-white' : 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-400'
9702:                    }`}>
9703:                      {count}
9704:                    </span>
9705:                  </button>
9706:                );
9707:              })}
9708:            </div>
9709:          </div>
9710:
9711:          {/* Ligne 1.5: Sous-catégories (Filtre rapide) */}
9712:          {selectedCategory !== 'all' && subCategories.length > 0 && (
9713:            <div className="space-y-2 pt-3 border-t border-black/5">
9714:              <div className="flex items-center justify-between">

9718:                </span>
9719:              </div>

9736:                </button>

9746:                          ? 'bg-primary/10 text-primary border-primary/20 shadow-sm'
9747:                          : 'bg-white text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-800 border-black/5 hover:border-gray-200'
9748:                      }`}
9749:                    >
9750:                      <span>{subCat}</span>
9751:                      <span className={`text-[9px] px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full ${
9752:                        selectedSubCategory === subCat ? 'bg-primary/20 text-primary' : 'bg-gray-50 text-gray-400'
9753:                      }`}>
9754:                        {count}
9755:                      </span>
9756:                    </button>
9757:                  );
9758:                })}
9759:              </div>
9760:            </div>
9761:          )}
9762:

9764:          {(availableSizes.length > 0 || availableColors.length > 0) && (

9766:              {availableSizes.length > 0 && (
9767:                <div className="space-y-1.5">
9768:                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
9769:                    <span className="text-[10px] font-black text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest flex items-center gap-1.5">
9770:                      <Scissors className="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-gray-400" />
9771:                      Filtrer par Taille
9772:                    </span>
9773:                    {selectedSize !== 'all' && (
9774:                      <button 
9775:                        onClick={() => setSelectedSize('all')} 
9776:                        className="text-[9px] font-bold text-primary hover:underline-offset-4 hover:underline"
9777:                      >
9778:                        Réinitialiser
9779:                      </button>
9780:                    )}
9781:                  </div>

9799:                          className={`shrink-0 flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-xl text-[10px] font-bold whitespace-nowrap transition-all border ${
9800:                            selectedSize === size
9801:                              ? 'bg-primary text-white border-primary shadow-sm'
9802:                              : 'bg-white text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900 border-black/5 hover:border-gray-200'

9804:                        >

9806:                          <span className={`text-[9px] px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full ${

9808:                          }`}>
9809:                            {count}
9810:                          </span>
9811:                        </button>
9812:                      );
9813:                    })}
9814:                  </div>
9815:                </div>
9816:              )}
9817:
9818:              {availableColors.length > 0 && (
9819:                <div className="space-y-1.5">
9820:                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
9821:                    <span className="text-[10px] font-black text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest flex items-center gap-1.5">
9822:                      <Palette className="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-gray-400" />
9823:                      Filtrer par Couleur

9829:                      >

9845:                    {availableColors.map(color => {

9847:                      return (
9848:                        <button
9849:                          key={color}
9850:                          onClick={() => setSelectedColor(color)}
9851:                          className={`shrink-0 flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-xl text-[10px] font-bold whitespace-nowrap transition-all border ${

9855:                          }`}
9856:                        >
9857:                          <span>{color}</span>
9858:                          <span className={`text-[9px] px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full ${
9859:                            selectedColor === color ? 'bg-white/20 text-white' : 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-400'
9860:                          }`}>
9861:                            {count}
9862:                          </span>
9863:                        </button>
9864:                      );
9865:                    })}
9866:                  </div>
9867:                </div>
9868:              )}
9869:            </div>
9870:          )}
9871:

9884:                  }`}

9889:                  onClick={() => setStockFilter('instock')}
9890:                  className={`shrink-0 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-xl text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-wider transition-all ${

9892:                      ? 'bg-emerald-500 text-white shadow-sm'

9894:                  }`}
9895:                >
9896:                  En Stock

9899:                  onClick={() => setStockFilter('lowstock')}
9900:                  className={`shrink-0 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-xl text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-wider transition-all flex items-center gap-1 ${
9901:                    stockFilter === 'lowstock'
9902:                      ? 'bg-amber-500 text-white shadow-sm'

9904:                  }`}

9909:                    const ml = Number(p.minStockLevel || 5);
9910:                    return st > 0 && st <= ml;
9911:                  }).length > 0 && (
9912:                    <span className={`w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full ${stockFilter === 'lowstock' ? 'bg-white' : 'bg-amber-500 animate-pulse'}`} />
9913:                  )}
9914:                </button>

9916:                  onClick={() => setStockFilter('outofstock')}

9918:                    stockFilter === 'outofstock'
9919:                      ? 'bg-rose-500 text-white shadow-sm'
9920:                      : 'text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-900 hover:bg-gray-50'
9921:                  }`}
9922:                >
9923:                  <span>Rupture</span>
9924:                  {products.filter(p => Number(p.stockQuantity || 0) <= 0).length > 0 && (
9925:                    <span className={`w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full ${stockFilter === 'outofstock' ? 'bg-white' : 'bg-rose-500 animate-pulse'}`} />

9937:                  <select
9938:                    value={sortBy}

10422:// --- Merchant Audit Log ---
10423:const MerchantAuditLog = ({ merchant }: { merchant: Merchant }) => {
10424:  const [auditLimit, setAuditLimit] = useState(10);
10425:  const products = useLiveQuery(() => 
10426:    db.products.where('merchantId').equals(merchant.id).toArray()
10427:  , [merchant.id]) || [];
10428:
10429:  const movements = useLiveQuery(() => 
10430:    db.movements.where('merchantId').equals(merchant.id).reverse().toArray()
10431:  , [merchant.id]) || [];
10432:
10433:  const loading = false;
10434:
10435:  return (
10436:    <motion.div 
10437:      initial={{ opacity: 0, x: 20 }}
10438:      animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0 }}
10439:      exit={{ opacity: 0, x: -20 }}
10440:      className="space-y-6"
10441:    >
10442:      <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row justify-between items-center gap-4">
10443:        <div>

10445:          <p className="text-[10px] font-mono text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mt-1">Traçabilité complète des flux de stock</p>

10450:        </div>
10451:      </div>

10454:        <div className="py-20 flex justify-center"><Loader2 className="w-8 h-8 animate-spin text-primary" /></div>
10455:      ) : (
10456:        <div className="bg-white rounded-[2rem] border border-black/5 shadow-sm overflow-hidden">
10457:          <div className="overflow-x-auto">
10458:            <table className="w-full text-left">
10459:              <thead>
10460:                <tr className="bg-gray-50/50 text-[10px] font-mono font-black text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-[0.2em] border-b border-gray-100">
10461:                  <th className="px-4 sm:px-8 py-3 md:py-5">Horodatage</th>
10462:                  <th className="px-4 sm:px-8 py-3 md:py-5">Produit</th>
10463:                  <th className="px-4 sm:px-8 py-3 md:py-5">Type de Flux</th>
10464:                  <th className="px-4 sm:px-8 py-3 md:py-5">Quantité</th>

10467:                </tr>
10468:              </thead>
10469:              <tbody className="divide-y divide-gray-100">
10470:                {movements.slice(0, auditLimit).map((m: any) => {

10472:                  return (
10473:                    <tr key={m.id} className="hover:bg-gray-50/50 transition-colors group">
10474:                      <td className="px-4 sm:px-8 py-4 sm:py-5">
10475:                        <p className="text-[11px] font-mono font-bold text-gray-400">
10476:                          {m.createdAt?.seconds ? format(new Date(m.createdAt.seconds * 1000), 'dd.MM.yyyy') : '--'}
10477:                        </p>
10478:                        <p className="text-[10px] font-mono text-gray-300">
10479:                          {m.createdAt?.seconds ? format(new Date(m.createdAt.seconds * 1000), 'HH:mm:ss') : '--'}
10480:                        </p>
10481:                      </td>
10482:                      <td className="px-4 sm:px-8 py-4 sm:py-5 max-w-[150px] sm:max-w-[200px]">
10483:                        <p className="font-bold text-gray-900 text-sm leading-tight truncate">{product?.name || 'Produit supprimé'}</p>
10484:                        <p className="text-[10px] font-mono text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-tighter mt-0.5 truncate">ID: {m.productId.slice(0, 8)}</p>
10485:                      </td>
10486:                      <td className="px-4 sm:px-8 py-4 sm:py-5">
10487:                        <span className={`px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest border ${
10488:                          m.type === 'in' ? 'bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-600 border-emerald-100' : 
10489:                          m.type === 'sale' ? 'bg-blue-50 text-blue-600 border-blue-100' : 'bg-gray-50 text-gray-600 border-gray-100'
10490:                        }`}>
10491:                          {m.type === 'in' ? 'ENTRÉE' : m.type === 'sale' ? 'VENTE' : m.type}
10492:                        </span>
10493:                      </td>
10494:                      <td className="px-4 sm:px-8 py-4 sm:py-5">
10495:                        <div className={`flex items-center font-mono font-black text-sm ${m.type === 'in' ? 'text-emerald-500' : 'text-rose-500'}`}>
10496:                          {m.type === 'in' ? <Plus className="w-3 h-3 mr-1" /> : <Minus className="w-3 h-3 mr-1" />}
10497:                          {m.quantity}
10498:                        </div>

10503:                          <ArrowRight className="w-3 h-3 text-gray-300" />
10504:                          <span className="text-[11px] font-mono font-black text-ink">{m.newQuantity}</span>
10505:                        </div>
10506:                      </td>

10508:                        <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 italic leading-relaxed max-w-[150px] sm:max-w-xs line-clamp-2">{m.reason || 'Aucune raison spécifiée'}</p>
10509:                      </td>
10510:                    </tr>
10511:                  );
10512:                })}
10513:              </tbody>
10514:            </table>
10515:            {movements.length > auditLimit && (
10516:              <div className="p-4 flex justify-center border-t border-gray-100">
10517:                <button 
10518:                  onClick={() => setAuditLimit(prev => prev + 10)}
10519:                  className="px-6 py-2 bg-gray-50 text-gray-600 font-bold text-[10px] rounded-xl hover:bg-gray-100 transition-colors uppercase tracking-widest"
10520:                >
10521:                  Voir plus
10522:                </button>
10523:              </div>
10524:            )}
10525:          </div>
10526:        </div>
10527:      )}
10528:    </motion.div>
10529:  );

10532:// --- Merchant Accounting ---
10533:const MerchantBuild = ({ merchant }: { merchant: Merchant & { id: string } }) => {
10534:  const [deferredPrompt, setDeferredPrompt] = useState<any>(null);
10535:  const [isInstallable, setIsInstallable] = useState(false);
10536:  const [isInstalled, setIsInstalled] = useState(false);
10537:
10538:  useEffect(() => {
10539:    // Check if already installed
10540:    if ((window.matchMedia && window.matchMedia('(display-mode: standalone)').matches) || (window.navigator as any).standalone) {
10541:      setIsInstalled(true);
10542:    }
10543:
10544:    const handleBeforeInstallPrompt = (e: Event) => {
10545:      e.preventDefault();
10546:      setDeferredPrompt(e);
10547:      setIsInstallable(true);
10548:    };
10549:
10550:    const handleAppInstalled = () => {
10551:      setIsInstalled(true);
10552:      setIsInstallable(false);
10553:      toast.success('Application installée avec succès !');
10554:    };
10555:
10556:    window.addEventListener('beforeinstallprompt', handleBeforeInstallPrompt);
10557:    window.addEventListener('appinstalled', handleAppInstalled);
10558:
10559:    return () => {
10560:      window.removeEventListener('beforeinstallprompt', handleBeforeInstallPrompt);
10561:      window.removeEventListener('appinstalled', handleAppInstalled);
10562:    };
10563:  }, []);
10564:
10565:  const handleInstallClick = async () => {
10566:    if (!deferredPrompt) {
10567:      toast.error("Votre navigateur/appareil ne remonte pas l'invite d'installation (ou vous l'avez déjà installée). Consultez la section de droite pour l'installation manuelle.");
10568:      return;
10569:    }
10570:    deferredPrompt.prompt();
10571:    const { outcome } = await deferredPrompt.userChoice;
10572:    if (outcome === 'accepted') {
10573:      setDeferredPrompt(null);
10574:      setIsInstallable(false);
10575:      toast.success("Installation PWA acceptée !");
10576:    }
10577:  };
10578:
10579:  return (
10580:    <div className="space-y-8 animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-bottom-4 duration-700">
10581:      <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-end justify-between gap-6 pb-8 border-b border-black/5">
10582:        <div className="space-y-1">
10583:          <p className="text-[10px] font-black text-primary uppercase tracking-[0.2em] leading-none mb-2">Technologie PWA & Native</p>
10584:          <h2 className="text-3xl font-black text-ink tracking-tight">Installation Bureau & Mobile</h2>
10585:          <p className="text-gray-400 font-medium max-w-xl">
10586:            Générez un exécutable autonome Bureau (.exe, .dmg) ou Mobile Android fonctionnant 100% hors-ligne avec SQLite.
10587:          </p>
10588:        </div>
10589:      </div>
10590:
10591:      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-3 gap-8">
10592:        <div className="bg-white rounded-[2.5rem] border border-black/5 p-10 shadow-sm relative overflow-hidden group flex flex-col justify-between">
10593:          <div className="absolute top-0 right-0 p-8 opacity-5 group-hover:opacity-10 transition-opacity">
10594:            <Cpu className="w-40 h-40" />
10595:          </div>
10596:
10597:          <div className="relative z-10 space-y-8 flex-1 flex flex-col justify-between">
10598:            <div className="space-y-6">
10599:              <div className="p-4 bg-emerald-50 rounded-2xl w-fit">
10600:                <Download className="w-8 h-8 text-emerald-500" />
10601:              </div>
10602:
10603:              <div className="space-y-4">
10604:                <h3 className="text-2xl font-black text-ink tracking-tight">Application PWA</h3>
10605:                <p className="text-gray-500 text-sm leading-relaxed">
10606:                  Utilisez la technologie PWA (Progressive Web App) pour une installation instantanée sans fichier exécutable (.exe/.dmg), garantie sans virus et toujours à jour.
10607:                </p>
10608:              </div>
10609:
10610:              <ul className="space-y-3">
10611:                {[
10612:                  "Expérience plein écran instantanée",
10613:                  "Moteur de base de données SQLite embarqué (OPFS)",
10614:                  "Support complet du mode Hors-ligne",
10615:                  "Mise à jour automatique en arrière-plan",
10616:                  "Icône sur le bureau et le menu Démarrer"
10617:                ].map((step, idx) => (
10618:                  <li key={idx} className="flex items-center gap-3 text-xs font-black text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest">
10619:                    <div className="w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-emerald-400" />
10620:                    {step}
10621:                  </li>
10622:                ))}
10623:              </ul>
10624:            </div>
10625:
10626:            <div className="space-y-4 relative pt-4">
10627:              {isInstalled ? (
10628:                <div className="p-4 bg-emerald-50 border border-emerald-200 rounded-xl text-emerald-600 text-sm font-semibold flex items-center gap-3">

11041:const MerchantBilling = ({ merchant }: { merchant: Merchant }) => {
11042:  const [subTab, setSubTab] = useState<'invoices' | 'quotes' | 'pending'>('invoices');
11043:  const [isQuoteModalOpen, setIsQuoteModalOpen] = useState(false);
11044:  const [selectedQuote, setSelectedQuote] = useState<MerchantQuote | null>(null);

11049:  const [invoiceLimit, setInvoiceLimit] = useState(10);
11050:  const [pendingLimit, setPendingLimit] = useState(10);
11051:  const [quoteLimit, setQuoteLimit] = useState(10);
11052:
11053:  const sales = useLiveQuery(() => 
11054:    db.sales.where('merchantId').equals(merchant.id).reverse().sortBy('createdAt')
11055:  , []) || [];
11056:

11058:    db.quotes.where('merchantId').equals(merchant.id).reverse().sortBy('createdAt')
11059:  , []) || [];
11060:

11062:    try {
11063:      await billingService.convertQuoteToInvoice(quote, merchant);
11064:      triggerAcomAlert('Succès', 'Devis converti en facture avec succès', 'success', 'SYSTÈME');
11065:    } catch (error: any) {
11066:      triggerAcomAlert('Erreur', error.message, 'error', 'ALERTE');
11067:    }
11068:  };
11069:

11080:        </div>

11082:          <button 
11083:            onClick={() => setSubTab('invoices')}

11087:          </button>

11089:            onClick={() => setSubTab('pending')}

11095:            onClick={() => setSubTab('quotes')}
11096:            className={`px-6 py-2 rounded-xl text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-widest transition-all ${subTab === 'quotes' ? 'bg-white text-ink shadow-sm' : 'text-gray-400 hover:text-ink'}`}

11099:          </button>
11100:        </div>
11101:      </div>
11102:
11103:      {subTab === 'invoices' && (

11105:          <div className="flex justify-between items-center">

11126:                  {sales.length === 0 ? (

11128:                  ) : (
11129:                    sales.slice(0, invoiceLimit).map((sale) => (

11131:                        <td className="px-8 py-6">
11132:                          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
11133:                            <p className="text-[11px] font-mono font-black text-ink">#INV-{sale.id.slice(0, 8).toUpperCase()}</p>
11134:                            {(sale as any).syncStatus && (
11135:                              <div className={`flex items-center gap-1 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full border ${
11136:                                (sale as any).syncStatus === 'synced' ? 'bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-600 border-emerald-100' : 
11137:                                (sale as any).syncStatus === 'pending' ? 'bg-amber-50 text-amber-600 border-amber-100' :
11138:                                'bg-gray-50 text-gray-400 border-gray-100'
11139:                              }`}>
11140:                                {(sale as any).syncStatus === 'synced' ? <Check className="w-2 h-2" /> : <RefreshCw className="w-2 h-2 animate-spin" />}
11141:                                <span className="text-[7px] font-black uppercase">{(sale as any).syncStatus}</span>
11142:                              </div>
11143:                            )}
11144:                          </div>

11146:                            {sale.createdAt?.seconds ? format(new Date(sale.createdAt.seconds * 1000), 'dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm') : format(new Date(sale.createdAt), 'dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm')}

11188:                               <span>Imprimer / Exp.</span>
11189:                             </button>
11190:                          </div>
11191:                        </td>
11192:                      </tr>
11193:                    ))
11194:                  )}
11195:                </tbody>
11196:              </table>

11199:                  <button 
11200:                    onClick={() => setInvoiceLimit(prev => prev + 10)}

11532:                          <ClipboardCheck className="w-5 h-5" />
11533:                        </div>
11534:                        <div>
11535:                          <h4 className="font-bold text-ink text-sm">Devis Proforma (Format A4)</h4>
11536:                          <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 max-w-sm mt-0.5">Proposition budgétaire officielle A4 avec validité d'offre et grilles de prix prévisionnels.</p>
11537:                        </div>
11538:                      </div>
11539:                      <div className="flex sm:flex-col gap-2 min-w-[120px]">
11540:                        <button 
11541:                          onClick={() => printDirectHTML(merchant, 'quote', activePrintDoc.item)}
11542:                          className="flex-1 py-1.5 px-3 bg-blue-500 hover:bg-blue-600 text-white rounded-xl text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-wider transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-1.5"
11543:                        >
11544:                          <Printer className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
11545:                          Imprimer
11546:                        </button>
11547:                        <button 
11548:                          onClick={() => generateA4QuotePDF(merchant, activePrintDoc.item, 'download')}

11550:                        >
11551:                          <Download className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
11552:                          PDF
11553:                        </button>

11555:                    </div>
11556:                  </>

11577:// --- Merchant Payment Modal ---
11578:const PaymentModal = ({ isOpen, onClose, merchant, sale }: { isOpen: boolean, onClose: () => void, merchant: Merchant, sale: MerchantSale | null }) => {
11579:  const [amount, setAmount] = useState(0);
11580:  const [method, setMethod] = useState<'cash' | 'card' | 'mobile_money' | 'transfer'>('cash');
11581:  const [isSaving, setIsSaving] = useState(false);
11582:
11583:  useEffect(() => {
11584:    if (sale) {
11585:      setAmount(sale.balance || 0);
11586:    }
11587:  }, [sale, isOpen]);
11588:
11589:  const handleSave = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
11590:    e.preventDefault();
11591:    if (!sale || amount <= 0) return;
11592:
11593:    if (amount > (sale.balance || sale.totalAmount)) {
11594:      toast.error('Le montant dépasse le solde restant');
11595:      return;
11596:    }
11597:
11598:    setIsSaving(true);
11599:    try {
11600:      await billingService.recordPayment(sale.id, amount, method);
11601:      toast.success('Paiement enregistré');
11602:      onClose();
11603:    } catch (error) {
11604:      toast.error('Erreur lors de l\'enregistrement');
11605:    } finally {
11606:      setIsSaving(false);
11607:    }
11608:  };
11609:
11610:  if (!isOpen || !sale) return null;
11611:
11612:  return (
11613:    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[110] flex items-center justify-center p-4">
11614:      <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0 }} animate={{ opacity: 1 }} onClick={onClose} className="absolute inset-0 bg-ink/60 backdrop-blur-md" />
11615:      <motion.div initial={{ scale: 0.9, opacity: 0 }} animate={{ scale: 1, opacity: 1 }} className="relative bg-white w-full max-w-md rounded-[2.5rem] shadow-2xl p-8 overflow-hidden">
11616:        <div className="mb-6">
11617:          <h3 className="text-xl font-black text-ink">Enregistrer un Paiement</h3>
11618:          <p className="text-[10px] font-mono font-black text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mt-1">Facture #INV-{sale.id.slice(0, 8).toUpperCase()}</p>
11619:        </div>
11620:
11621:        <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-2xl p-6 mb-6 flex justify-between items-center border border-black/5">
11622:          <div>
11623:            <p className="text-[10px] font-black text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest">Client</p>
11624:            <p className="font-bold text-ink">{sale.customerName || 'Client POS'}</p>
11625:          </div>
11626:          <div className="text-right">
11627:            <p className="text-[10px] font-black text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest">Solde</p>
11628:            <p className="text-xl font-black text-primary">{(sale.balance !== undefined ? sale.balance : sale.totalAmount).toLocaleString()} <span className="text-[10px] opacity-40 font-mono">{merchant.currency}</span></p>
11629:          </div>
11630:        </div>
11631:
11632:        <form onSubmit={handleSave} className="space-y-6">
11633:          <div className="space-y-2">
11634:            <label className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-400 ml-1">Montant à encaisser</label>
11635:            <input 
11636:              type="number" 
11637:              value={amount || ''}
11638:              onChange={e => setAmount(Number(e.target.value))}
11639:              required
11640:              className="w-full px-5 py-4 bg-gray-50 border border-transparent rounded-2xl focus:bg-white focus:border-primary/30 transition-all font-black text-lg outline-none"
11641:            />
11642:          </div>
11643:
11644:          <div className="space-y-2">
11645:            <label className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-400 ml-1">Mode de règlement</label>
11646:            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2">
11647:              {['cash', 'card', 'mobile_money', 'transfer'].map((m) => (
11648:                <button
11649:                  key={m}
11650:                  type="button"
11651:                  onClick={() => setMethod(m as any)}
11652:                  className={`py-3 rounded-xl text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest border transition-all ${method === m ? 'bg-primary text-white border-primary shadow-lg shadow-primary/20' : 'bg-white text-gray-400 border-black/5 hover:border-primary/20'}`}
11653:                >
11654:                  {m === 'mobile_money' ? 'MOBILE' : m}
11655:                </button>
11656:              ))}
11657:            </div>
11658:          </div>
11659:
11660:          <div className="flex gap-3 pt-4">
11661:            <button type="button" onClick={onClose} className="flex-1 py-4 font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-[10px] text-gray-400 hover:text-ink transition-all">Annuler</button>
11662:            <button type="submit" disabled={isSaving} className="flex-[2] py-4 bg-ink text-white rounded-2xl font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-[10px] hover:shadow-2xl transition-all disabled:opacity-50">
11663:              {isSaving ? <Loader2 className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin mx-auto" /> : 'Confirmer l\'encaissement'}
11664:            </button>
11665:          </div>
11666:        </form>
11667:      </motion.div>
11668:    </div>
11669:  );
11670:};

11672:// --- Supplier Manager ---
11673:const SupplierManager = ({ merchant }: { merchant: Merchant }) => {
11674:  const [isEditing, setIsEditing] = useState(false);
11675:  const [currentSupplier, setCurrentSupplier] = useState<Partial<MerchantSupplier> | null>(null);
11676:  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);
11677:
11678:  const suppliers = useLiveQuery(() => 
11679:    db.suppliers.where('merchantId').equals(merchant.id).toArray()
11680:  , [merchant.id]) || [];
11681:
11682:  const loading = false;
11683:
11684:  const handleSave = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
11685:    e.preventDefault();
11686:    if (!currentSupplier?.name) return;
11687:    setSaving(true);
11688:    try {
11689:      await dbService.merchantSuppliers.save({
11690:        ...currentSupplier,
11691:        merchantId: merchant.id
11692:      });
11693:      triggerAcomAlert('Succès', currentSupplier.id ? 'Fournisseur mis à jour' : 'Fournisseur ajouté', 'success', 'SYSTÈME');
11694:      setIsEditing(false);
11695:      setCurrentSupplier(null);
11696:    } catch (error) {
11697:      triggerAcomAlert('Erreur', 'Erreur lors de l\'enregistrement', 'error', 'ALERTE');
11698:    } finally {
11699:      setSaving(false);
11700:    }
11701:  };
11702:
11703:  const handleDelete = async (id: string) => {
11704:    if (!window.confirm('Supprimer ce fournisseur ?')) return;
11705:    try {
11706:      await dbService.merchantSuppliers.delete(id);
11707:      triggerAcomAlert('Succès', 'Fournisseur supprimé', 'success', 'SYSTÈME');
11708:    } catch (error) {
11709:      triggerAcomAlert('Erreur', 'Erreur lors de la suppression', 'error', 'ALERTE');
11710:    }
11711:  };
11712:
11713:  return (
11714:    <motion.div 
11715:      initial={{ opacity: 0, x: 20 }}
11716:      animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0 }}
11717:      exit={{ opacity: 0, x: -20 }}
11718:      className="space-y-6"
11719:    >
11720:      <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row justify-between items-center gap-4">
11721:        <div>
11722:          <h2 className="text-3xl font-black text-ink tracking-tight">Partenaires Logistiques</h2>
11723:          <p className="text-[10px] font-mono font-black text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-[0.2em] mt-1.5">Fournisseurs actifs: {suppliers.length.toString().padStart(2, '0')}</p>
11724:        </div>
11725:        <button
11726:          onClick={() => {
11727:            setCurrentSupplier({ name: '', contactName: '', email: '', phone: '', category: 'Général' });
11728:            setIsEditing(true);
11729:          }}
11730:          className="w-full sm:w-auto flex items-center justify-center space-x-3 px-8 py-4 bg-primary text-white rounded-2xl font-black uppercase text-xs tracking-widest hover:bg-primary-hover transition-all shadow-xl shadow-primary/20 hover:scale-105 transition-transform"
11731:        >
11732:          <Plus className="w-5 h-5" />
11733:          <span>Nouveau fournisseur</span>
11734:        </button>
11735:      </div>
11736:
11737:      {loading ? (
11738:        <div className="py-20 flex justify-center"><Loader2 className="w-8 h-8 animate-spin text-primary" /></div>
11739:      ) : (
11740:        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
11741:          {suppliers.map((supplier) => (
11742:            <div key={supplier.id} className="bg-white p-8 rounded-[2.5rem] border border-black/5 shadow-sm hover:shadow-xl transition-all group relative overflow-hidden">
11743:              <div className="flex justify-between items-start mb-6">
11744:                <div className="w-14 h-14 bg-primary/10 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center border border-primary/10 group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform">
11745:                  <Truck className="w-7 h-7 text-primary" />
11746:                </div>
11747:                <div className="flex space-x-2 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-all">
11748:                  <button onClick={() => { setCurrentSupplier(supplier); setIsEditing(true); }} className="p-2.5 hover:bg-primary/10 text-primary rounded-xl border border-transparent hover:border-primary/20 transition-all shadow-sm"><Edit2 className="w-4 h-4" /></button>
11749:                  <button onClick={() => handleDelete(supplier.id)} className="p-2.5 hover:bg-rose-50 text-rose-500 rounded-xl border border-transparent hover:border-rose-200 transition-all shadow-sm"><Trash2 className="w-4 h-4" /></button>
11750:                </div>

11760:                  </div>
11761:                  <span className="font-black text-ink">{supplier.contactName || '---'}</span>
11762:                </div>
11763:                <div className="flex items-center text-xs text-gray-600">
11764:                  <div className="w-8 h-8 bg-gray-50 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center mr-4 border border-black/5">

11772:                  </div>

11774:                </div>
11775:              </div>
11776:            </div>
11777:          ))}
11778:        </div>
11779:      )}
11780:
11781:      <AnimatePresence>
11782:        {isEditing && (
11783:          <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[60] flex items-center justify-center p-4 bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-sm">
11784:            <motion.div 
11785:              initial={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.95, y: 20 }} 
11786:              animate={{ opacity: 1, scale: 1, y: 0 }} 
11787:              className="bg-white w-full max-w-2xl rounded-[2rem] shadow-2xl overflow-hidden flex flex-col max-h-[90vh]"
11788:            >
11789:              <div className="px-8 py-6 border-b border-gray-100 flex justify-between items-center bg-gray-50/50">
11790:                <div>
11791:                  <h3 className="text-xl font-bold text-ink">{currentSupplier?.id ? 'Modifier le fournisseur' : 'Nouveau fournisseur'}</h3>
11792:                  <p className="text-[10px] font-mono text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mt-1">Gestion des partenaires logistiques</p>
11793:                </div>
11794:                <button onClick={() => setIsEditing(false)} className="p-2 hover:bg-white rounded-xl transition-colors shadow-sm border border-black/5">
11795:                  <X className="w-5 h-5 text-gray-400" />
11796:                </button>
11797:              </div>
11798:
11799:              <form onSubmit={handleSave} className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-8 space-y-6">
11800:                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
11801:                  <div className="md:col-span-2">
11802:                    <label className="block text-[10px] font-mono font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-2">Nom de l'entreprise</label>
11803:                    <input type="text" required value={currentSupplier?.name || ''} onChange={e => setCurrentSupplier({...currentSupplier, name: e.target.value})} className="w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-xl border border-gray-100 outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 bg-gray-50/30 font-bold" />
11804:                  </div>
