11837:
11838:// --- Merchant Reports ---
11839:const MerchantReports = ({ merchant }: { merchant: Merchant }) => {
11840:  const [reportSelectedMonth, setReportSelectedMonth] = useState<string>(new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 7));
11841:
11842:  const sales = useLiveQuery(() => db.sales.where('merchantId').equals(merchant.id).toArray(), [merchant.id]) || [];
11843:  const expenses = useLiveQuery(() => db.expenses.where('merchantId').equals(merchant.id).toArray(), [merchant.id]) || [];
11844:  const products = useLiveQuery(() => db.products.where('merchantId').equals(merchant.id).toArray(), [merchant.id]) || [];
11845:
11846:  const pressingTickets = useMemo<PressingTicket[]>(() => {
11847:    if (merchant.type !== 'pressing') return [];
11848:    try {
11849:      const saved = localStorage.getItem(`pressing_tickets_${merchant.id}`);
11850:      return saved ? JSON.parse(saved) : [];
11851:    } catch {
11852:      return [];
11853:    }
11854:  }, [merchant.id, merchant.type]);
11855:
11856:  const pressingProductSales = useMemo<DetergentSale[]>(() => {
11857:    if (merchant.type !== 'pressing') return [];
11858:    try {
11859:      const saved = localStorage.getItem(`pressing_stock_sales_${merchant.id}`);
11860:      return saved ? JSON.parse(saved) : [];
11861:    } catch {
11862:      return [];
11863:    }
11864:  }, [merchant.id, merchant.type]);
11865:
11866:  const pressingTarifs = useMemo(() => {
11867:    if (merchant.type !== 'pressing') return null;
11868:    try {
11869:      const saved = localStorage.getItem(`pressing_tarifs_${merchant.id}`);
11870:      return saved ? JSON.parse(saved) : null;
11871:    } catch {
11872:      return null;
11873:    }
11874:  }, [merchant.id, merchant.type]);
11875:
11876:  const financialSummary = useMemo(() => {
11877:    let totalRevenue = 0;
11878:    let totalCollected = 0;
11879:    let totalPending = 0;
11880:    
11881:    const filteredExpenses = reportSelectedMonth
11882:      ? expenses.filter(e => {
11883:          const d = e.createdAt?.seconds ? new Date(e.createdAt.seconds * 1000) : new Date(e.createdAt);
11884:          return d.toISOString().startsWith(reportSelectedMonth);
11885:        })
11886:      : expenses;
11887:      
11888:    let totalExpenses = filteredExpenses.reduce((acc, e) => acc + e.amount, 0);
11889:    let totalCOGS = 0;
11890:
11891:    if (merchant.type === 'pressing') {
11892:      const filteredTickets = (reportSelectedMonth
11893:        ? pressingTickets.filter(t => t.depositDate && t.depositDate.startsWith(reportSelectedMonth))
11894:        : pressingTickets).filter(t => t.status !== 'quotation');
11895:        
11896:      const filteredProducts = reportSelectedMonth
11897:        ? pressingProductSales.filter(s => s.date && s.date.startsWith(reportSelectedMonth))
11898:        : pressingProductSales;
11899:
11900:      const ticketsAmount = filteredTickets.reduce((sum, t) => sum + t.total, 0);
11901:      const ticketsPaid = filteredTickets.reduce((sum, t) => sum + (t.amountPaid || 0), 0);
11902:      
11903:      const ticketsCost = filteredTickets.reduce((sum, t) => {
11904:        if (typeof t.totalCost === 'number') return sum + t.totalCost;
11905:        
11906:        // Retro-compute cost for old tickets without totalCost
11907:        let retroCost = 0;
11908:        const aCosts = pressingTarifs?.articles_costs || {};
11909:        const pCosts = pressingTarifs?.poids_costs || {};
11910:        const sCosts = pressingTarifs?.supplements_costs || {};
11911:
11912:        if (t.billingType === 'article' && t.articles) {
11913:          retroCost += Object.keys(t.articles).reduce((acc, key) => {
11914:             // Fallbacks for default values if not explicitly in custom tarifs
11915:             let defaultCost = 0;
11916:             if (key === 'chemise') defaultCost = 100;
11917:             if (key === 'pantalon') defaultCost = 150;
11918:             if (key === 'costume') defaultCost = 300;
11919:             if (key === 'robe') defaultCost = 200;
11920:             if (key === 'drap') defaultCost = 150;
11921:             if (key === 'couverture') defaultCost = 400;
11922:             if (key === 'rideau') defaultCost = 300;
11923:             if (key === 'autre') defaultCost = 100;
11924:             return acc + (t.articles[key] * (aCosts[key] !== undefined ? aCosts[key] : defaultCost));
11925:          }, 0);
11926:        } else if (t.billingType === 'poids' && t.weightKg) {
11927:           let defaultCost = 0;
11928:           if (t.weightService === 'standard') defaultCost = 200;
11929:           if (t.weightService === 'premium') defaultCost = 300;
11930:           if (t.weightService === 'express') defaultCost = 400;
11931:           retroCost += t.weightKg * (pCosts[t.weightService] !== undefined ? pCosts[t.weightService] : defaultCost);
11932:        }
11933:
11934:        if (t.supplements) {
11935:          retroCost += Object.keys(t.supplements).reduce((acc, key) => {
11936:             if (!t.supplements[key]) return acc;
11937:             let defaultCost = 0;
11938:             if (key === 'repassage') defaultCost = 100;
11939:             if (key === 'express') defaultCost = 200;
11940:             if (key === 'detachage') defaultCost = 150;
11941:             if (key === 'livraison') defaultCost = 400;
11942:             if (key === 'premiumPack') defaultCost = 100;
11943:             return acc + (sCosts[key] !== undefined ? sCosts[key] : defaultCost);
11944:          }, 0);
11945:        }
11946:        return sum + retroCost;
11947:      }, 0);
11948:
11949:      const productsAmount = filteredProducts.reduce((sum, s) => sum + s.total, 0);
11950:      const productsCost = filteredProducts.reduce((sum, s) => sum + (s.totalCost || 0), 0);
11951:      
11952:      totalRevenue = ticketsAmount + productsAmount;
11953:      totalCollected = ticketsPaid + productsAmount; // Product sales are 100% paid
11954:      totalPending = Math.max(0, ticketsAmount - ticketsPaid);
11955:      totalCOGS = ticketsCost + productsCost;
11956:    } else {
11957:      const filteredSales = reportSelectedMonth
11958:        ? sales.filter(s => {
11959:            const d = s.createdAt?.seconds ? new Date(s.createdAt.seconds * 1000) : new Date(s.createdAt);
11960:            return d.toISOString().startsWith(reportSelectedMonth);
11961:          })
11962:        : sales;
11963:
11964:      totalRevenue = filteredSales.reduce((acc, s) => acc + s.totalAmount, 0);
11965:      totalCollected = filteredSales.reduce((acc, s) => acc + (s.paidAmount !== undefined ? s.paidAmount : s.totalAmount), 0);
11966:      totalPending = filteredSales.reduce((acc, s) => acc + (s.balance || 0), 0);
11967:      
11968:      totalCOGS = filteredSales.reduce((acc, sale) => {
11969:        if (typeof sale.totalCost === 'number') {
11970:          return acc + sale.totalCost;
11971:        }
11972:        return acc + (sale.items || []).reduce((itemAcc, item) => {
11973:          const product = products.find(p => p.id === item.productId);
11974:          const cost = (item as any).costPrice || (product?.costPrice || 0);
11975:          return itemAcc + ((item.quantity || 0) * cost);
11976:        }, 0);
11977:      }, 0);
11978:    }
11979:
11980:    const grossMargin = totalCollected - totalCOGS;
11981:    const netProfit = totalCollected - totalCOGS - totalExpenses;
11982:    const margin = totalCollected > 0 ? (netProfit / totalCollected) * 100 : 0;
11983:    const cashFlow = totalCollected - totalExpenses; // Approximate cash flow
11984:
11985:    return { totalRevenue, totalCollected, totalPending, totalExpenses, netProfit, margin, totalCOGS, grossMargin, cashFlow };
11986:  }, [sales, expenses, products, merchant.type, pressingTickets, pressingProductSales, reportSelectedMonth]);
11987:
11988:  const monthlyData = useMemo(() => {
11989:    // Group sales and expenses by month for the last 6 months
11990:    const now = new Date();
11991:    const months = eachMonthOfInterval({
11992:      start: subDays(now, 180),
11993:      end: now
11994:    });
11995:
11996:    return months.map(month => {
11997:      const label = format(month, 'MMM yy', { locale: fr });
11998:      
11999:      const monthExpenses = expenses.filter(e => {
12000:        const d = e.createdAt?.seconds ? new Date(e.createdAt.seconds * 1000) : new Date(e.createdAt);
12001:        return isSameMonth(d, month);
12002:      });
12003:      const exp = monthExpenses.reduce((acc, e) => acc + e.amount, 0);
12004:
12005:      let rev = 0;
12006:      let cogs = 0;
12007:
12008:      if (merchant.type === 'pressing') {
12009:        const monthTickets = pressingTickets.filter(t => isSameMonth(new Date(t.depositDate), month));
12010:        const monthProductSales = pressingProductSales.filter(s => isSameMonth(new Date(s.date), month));
12011:        
12012:        rev = monthTickets.reduce((acc, t) => acc + t.total, 0) + monthProductSales.reduce((acc, s) => acc + s.total, 0);
12013:        cogs = monthTickets.reduce((acc, t) => acc + (t.totalCost || 0), 0) + monthProductSales.reduce((acc, s) => acc + (s.totalCost || 0), 0);
12014:      } else {
12015:        const monthSales = sales.filter(s => {
12016:          const d = s.createdAt?.seconds ? new Date(s.createdAt.seconds * 1000) : new Date(s.createdAt);
12017:          return isSameMonth(d, month);
12018:        });
12019:        
12020:        rev = monthSales.reduce((acc, s) => acc + s.totalAmount, 0);
12021:        cogs = monthSales.reduce((acc, sale) => {
12022:          if (typeof sale.totalCost === 'number') {
12023:            return acc + sale.totalCost;
12024:          }
12025:          return acc + (sale.items || []).reduce((itemAcc, item) => {
12026:            const product = products.find(p => p.id === item.productId);
12027:            const cost = (item as any).costPrice || (product?.costPrice || 0);
12028:            return itemAcc + ((item.quantity || 0) * cost);
12029:          }, 0);
12030:        }, 0);
12031:      }
12032:      
12033:      return {
12034:        name: label,
12035:        Revenus: rev,
12036:        Dépenses: exp,
12037:        Profit: rev - cogs - exp
12038:      };
12039:    });
12040:  }, [sales, expenses, products, merchant.type, pressingTickets, pressingProductSales]);
12041:
12042:  const categoryData = useMemo(() => {
12043:    const categories: Record<string, number> = {};
12044:    const filteredExpenses = reportSelectedMonth
12045:      ? expenses.filter(e => {
12046:          const d = e.createdAt?.seconds ? new Date(e.createdAt.seconds * 1000) : new Date(e.createdAt);
12047:          return d.toISOString().startsWith(reportSelectedMonth);
12048:        })
12049:      : expenses;
12050:      
12051:    filteredExpenses.forEach(e => {
12052:      categories[e.category] = (categories[e.category] || 0) + e.amount;
12053:    });
12054:    
12055:    // Sort and take top 4
12056:    return Object.entries(categories)
12057:      .sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1])
12058:      .slice(0, 4)
12059:      .map(([name, value]) => {
12060:        const percentage = financialSummary.totalExpenses > 0 ? (value / financialSummary.totalExpenses * 100) : 0;
12061:        return { name, value, percentage: percentage.toFixed(0) };
12062:      });
12063:  }, [expenses, financialSummary.totalExpenses, reportSelectedMonth]);
12064:
12065:  // Export financial transactions to CSV
12066:  const exportToCSV = () => {
12067:    try {
12068:      const headers = ['Date', 'Type de flux', 'Catégorie', 'Description', 'Montant', 'Devise', 'Moyen de paiement / Statut'];
12069:      
12070:      const transactions: any[] = [];
12071:      
12072:      sales.forEach(s => {
12073:        const t = s.createdAt?.seconds ? s.createdAt.seconds * 1000 : new Date(s.createdAt).getTime();
12074:        transactions.push({
12075:          timestamp: t,
12076:          date: s.createdAt,
12077:          type: 'Entrée (Vente)',
12078:          category: 'Vente de produits',
12079:          description: s.items?.map((it: any) => `${it.name} (x${it.quantity})`).join(', ') + (s.customerName ? ` - Client: ${s.customerName}` : ''),
12080:          amount: s.totalAmount,
12081:          status: s.balance > 0 ? `Reste à recouvrir: ${s.balance}` : 'Encaissé entièrement'
12082:        });
12083:      });
12084:
12085:      expenses.forEach(e => {
12086:        const t = e.createdAt?.seconds ? e.createdAt.seconds * 1000 : new Date(e.createdAt).getTime();
12087:        transactions.push({
12088:          timestamp: t,
12089:          date: e.createdAt,
12090:          type: 'Sortie (Dépense)',
12091:          category: e.category || 'Général',
12092:          description: e.description || '',
12093:          amount: e.amount,
12094:          status: (e as any).paymentMethod || 'Espèces'
12095:        });
12096:      });
12097:
12098:      // Sort chronological descending (newest first)
12099:      transactions.sort((a, b) => b.timestamp - a.timestamp);
12100:
12101:      // Map to rows with semi-colons for perfect French Excel support
12102:      const csvRows = [
12103:        headers.join(';'),
12104:        ...transactions.map(t => {
12105:          const dateStr = t.date?.seconds 
12106:            ? format(new Date(t.date.seconds * 1000), 'dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm')
12107:            : format(new Date(t.date), 'dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm');
12108:          
12109:          const typeClean = (t.type || '').replace(/;/g, ',').replace(/"/g, '""');
12110:          const categoryClean = (t.category || '').replace(/;/g, ',').replace(/"/g, '""');
12111:          const descClean = (t.description || '').replace(/;/g, ',').replace(/"/g, '""');
12112:          const statusClean = (t.status || '').replace(/;/g, ',').replace(/"/g, '""');
12113:          
12114:          return `"${dateStr}";"${typeClean}";"${categoryClean}";"${descClean}";"${t.amount}";"${merchant.currency}";"${statusClean}"`;
12115:        })
12116:      ];
12117:
12118:      const csvContent = "\uFEFF" + csvRows.join("\n"); // UTF-8 BOM byte
12119:      const blob = new Blob([csvContent], { type: 'text/csv;charset=utf-8;' });
12120:      const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
12121:      const link = document.createElement("a");
12122:      link.setAttribute("href", url);
12123:      link.setAttribute("download", `rapport_financier_${merchant.name.toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g, '_')}_${format(new Date(), 'dd-MM-yyyy')}.csv`);
12124:      document.body.appendChild(link);
12125:      link.click();
12126:      document.body.removeChild(link);
12127:      triggerAcomAlert('Succès', 'Rapport exporté sous format CSV !', 'success', 'SYSTÈME');
12128:    } catch (error) {
12129:      console.error(error);
12130:      triggerAcomAlert('Erreur', "Échec de l'exportation CSV.", 'error', 'ALERTE');
12131:    }
12132:  };
12133:
12134:  // Export financial report to beautiful PDF
12135:  const exportToPDF = () => {
12136:    try {
12137:      const doc = new jsPDF();
12138:      const margin = 20;
12139:      let y = 20;
12140:
12141:      // Header Brand Accent
12142:      doc.setFillColor(30, 41, 59); // Slate-800
12143:      doc.rect(margin, y, 170, 1.5, 'F');
12144:      y += 8;
12145:
12146:      // Header Title
12147:      doc.setFontSize(22);
12148:      doc.setFont('helvetica', 'bold');
12149:      doc.setTextColor(30, 41, 59); // Slate-800
12150:      doc.text('RAPPORT FINANCIER', margin, y);
12151:      
12152:      // Right metadata
12153:      doc.setFontSize(9);
12154:      doc.setFont('helvetica', 'normal');
12155:      doc.setTextColor(71, 85, 105); // Slate-600
12156:      doc.text(`Généré le : ${format(new Date(), 'dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm')}`, 190, y, { align: 'right' });
12157:      y += 5.5;
12158:      doc.text(`Établissement : ${merchant.name}`, 190, y, { align: 'right' });
12159:      y += 12;
12160:
12161:      // Divider line
12162:      doc.setDrawColor(226, 232, 240); // Slate-200
12163:      doc.setLineWidth(0.4);
12164:      doc.line(margin, y, 190, y);
12165:      y += 10;
12166:
12167:      // Section: Synthèse Financière (Financial Summary)
12168:      doc.setFontSize(12);
12169:      doc.setFont('helvetica', 'bold');
12170:      doc.setTextColor(15, 23, 42); // Slate-900
12171:      doc.text('SYNTHÈSE DE LA PÉRIODE', margin, y);
12172:      y += 6;
12173:
12174:      // KPI boxes renderer helper
12175:      const drawKpi = (label: string, value: number, x: number, yPos: number, width: number, height: number, colorArr: [number, number, number]) => {
12176:        // Background card
12177:        doc.setFillColor(250, 250, 250);
12178:        doc.setDrawColor(226, 232, 240);
12179:        doc.setLineWidth(0.2);
12180:        doc.roundedRect(x, yPos, width, height, 2.5, 2.5, 'FD');
12181:
12182:        // Color ribbon side
12183:        doc.setFillColor(...colorArr);
12184:        doc.rect(x, yPos, 2, height, 'F');
12185:
12186:        // Text
12187:        doc.setFontSize(7.5);
12188:        doc.setFont('helvetica', 'bold');
12189:        doc.setTextColor(100, 116, 139); // Slate-500
12190:        doc.text(label.toUpperCase(), x + 5, yPos + 6);
12191:
12192:        doc.setFontSize(9.5);
12193:        doc.setFont('helvetica', 'bold');
12194:        doc.setTextColor(30, 41, 59); // Slate-800
12195:        doc.text(`${pdfFormatNum(value)} ${merchant.currency}`, x + 5, yPos + 13);
12196:      };
12197:
12198:      const boxWidth = 39;
12199:      const boxHeight = 18;
12200:      const bGap = 42;
12201:
12202:      // Draw first row of KPIs (4 columns)
12203:      drawKpi('Chiffre d\'Affaires', financialSummary.totalRevenue, margin, y, boxWidth, boxHeight, [99, 102, 241]); // Indigo
12204:      drawKpi('Total Encaissé', financialSummary.totalCollected, margin + bGap, y, boxWidth, boxHeight, [16, 185, 129]); // Emerald
12205:      drawKpi('Reste à Recouvrer', financialSummary.totalPending, margin + bGap * 2, y, boxWidth, boxHeight, [245, 158, 11]); // Amber
12206:      drawKpi('Coût Achat (COGS)', financialSummary.totalCOGS || 0, margin + bGap * 3, y, boxWidth, boxHeight, [249, 115, 22]); // Orange
12207:
12208:      y += boxHeight + 4;
12209:
12210:      // Draw second row of KPIs (4 columns)
12211:      drawKpi('Marge Brute', financialSummary.grossMargin || 0, margin, y, boxWidth, boxHeight, [6, 182, 212]); // Cyan
12212:      drawKpi('Total Dépenses', financialSummary.totalExpenses, margin + bGap, y, boxWidth, boxHeight, [244, 63, 94]); // Rose
12213:      drawKpi('Flux Trésorerie', financialSummary.cashFlow || 0, margin + bGap * 2, y, boxWidth, boxHeight, [99, 102, 241]); // Indigo
12214:      drawKpi('Bénéfice Net', financialSummary.netProfit, margin + bGap * 3, y, boxWidth, boxHeight, [59, 130, 246]); // Blue
12215:      
12216:      y += boxHeight + 14;
12217:
12218:      // Write Category Breakdown summary if there's any expense
12219:      if (categoryData.length > 0) {
12220:        doc.setFontSize(10);
12221:        doc.setFont('helvetica', 'bold');
12222:        doc.setTextColor(71, 85, 105);
12223:        doc.text('RÉPARTITION MAJEURE DES DÉPENSES', margin, y);
12224:        y += 5;
12225:
12226:        // Display category items side-by-side
12227:        doc.setFontSize(8);
12228:        doc.setFont('helvetica', 'normal');
12229:        doc.setTextColor(100, 116, 139);
12230:        const catStrList = categoryData.map(c => `${c.name}: ${pdfFormatNum(c.value)} ${merchant.currency} (${c.percentage}%)`);
12231:        doc.text(catStrList.slice(0, 3).join('   |   '), margin, y);
12232:        y += 11;
12233:      }
12234:
12235:      // Section: Detailed Tables
12236:      doc.setFontSize(11);
12237:      doc.setFont('helvetica', 'bold');
12238:      doc.setTextColor(15, 23, 42); // Slate-900
12239:      doc.text('DERNIÈRES OPÉRATIONS DE REVENUS (VENTES)', margin, y);
12240:      y += 5;
12241:
12242:      // Sales Table Header
12243:      doc.setFillColor(248, 250, 252); // Slate-50
12244:      doc.rect(margin, y, 170, 6, 'F');
12245:      
12246:      doc.setFontSize(8);
12247:      doc.setFont('helvetica', 'bold');
12248:      doc.setTextColor(100, 116, 139); // Slate-500
12249:      doc.text('Date', margin + 3, y + 4.5);
12250:      doc.text('Client', margin + 25, y + 4.5);
12251:      doc.text('Statut de Paiement', margin + 95, y + 4.5);
12252:      doc.text('Montant', 190 - 3, y + 4.5, { align: 'right' });
12253:      
12254:      y += 6;
12255:
12256:      // Render top 5 sales
12257:      doc.setFont('helvetica', 'normal');
12258:      doc.setTextColor(51, 65, 85); // Slate-700
12259:      
12260:      const topSales = [...sales].sort((a, b) => {
12261:        const tA = a.createdAt?.seconds ? a.createdAt.seconds : new Date(a.createdAt).getTime() / 1000;
12262:        const tB = b.createdAt?.seconds ? b.createdAt.seconds : new Date(b.createdAt).getTime() / 1000;
12263:        return tB - tA;
12264:      }).slice(0, 5);
12265:
12266:      if (topSales.length === 0) {
12267:        doc.text('Aucune vente enregistrée', margin + 3, y + 4.5);
12268:        y += 8;
12269:      } else {
12270:        topSales.forEach(s => {
12271:          const dateStr = s.createdAt?.seconds 
12272:            ? format(new Date(s.createdAt.seconds * 1000), 'dd/MM/yyyy')
12273:            : format(new Date(s.createdAt), 'dd/MM/yyyy');
12274:          
12275:          doc.text(dateStr, margin + 3, y + 4.5);
12276:          doc.text(s.customerName || 'Client de passage', margin + 25, y + 4.5);
12277:          doc.text(s.balance > 0 ? `Incomplet (Reste ${pdfFormatNum(s.balance)})` : 'Payé complétement', margin + 95, y + 4.5);
12278:          doc.text(`${pdfFormatNum(s.totalAmount)} ${merchant.currency}`, 190 - 3, y + 4.5, { align: 'right' });
12279:          
12280:          y += 6;
12281:          doc.setDrawColor(241, 245, 249);
12282:          doc.setLineWidth(0.2);
12283:          doc.line(margin, y, 190, y);
12284:        });
12285:        y += 8;
12286:      }
12287:
12288:      // Expenses Section
12289:      doc.setFontSize(11);
12290:      doc.setFont('helvetica', 'bold');
12291:      doc.setTextColor(15, 23, 42); // Slate-900
12292:      doc.text('DERNIÈRES OPÉRATIONS DE CHARGES (DÉPENSES)', margin, y);
12293:      y += 5;
12294:
12295:      // Expenses Table Header
12296:      doc.setFillColor(248, 250, 252); // Slate-50
12297:      doc.rect(margin, y, 170, 6, 'F');
12298:      
12299:      doc.setFontSize(8);
12300:      doc.setFont('helvetica', 'bold');
12301:      doc.setTextColor(100, 116, 139); // Slate-500
12302:      doc.text('Date', margin + 3, y + 4.5);
12303:      doc.text('Catégorie', margin + 25, y + 4.5);
12304:      doc.text('Description / Motif', margin + 65, y + 4.5);
12305:      doc.text('Montant', 190 - 3, y + 4.5, { align: 'right' });
12306:      
12307:      y += 6;
12308:
12309:      // Render top 5 expenses
12310:      doc.setFont('helvetica', 'normal');
12311:      doc.setTextColor(51, 65, 85); // Slate-700
12312:
12313:      const topExpenses = [...expenses].sort((a, b) => {
12314:        const tA = a.createdAt?.seconds ? a.createdAt.seconds : new Date(a.createdAt).getTime() / 1000;
12315:        const tB = b.createdAt?.seconds ? b.createdAt.seconds : new Date(b.createdAt).getTime() / 1000;
12316:        return tB - tA;
12317:      }).slice(0, 5);
12318:
12319:      if (topExpenses.length === 0) {
12320:        doc.text('Aucune dépense enregistrée', margin + 3, y + 4.5);
12321:        y += 8;
12322:      } else {
12323:        topExpenses.forEach(e => {
12324:          const dateStr = e.createdAt?.seconds 
12325:            ? format(new Date(e.createdAt.seconds * 1000), 'dd/MM/yyyy')
12326:            : format(new Date(e.createdAt), 'dd/MM/yyyy');
12327:          
12328:          const expDesc = e.description && e.description.length > 42 ? e.description.substring(0, 40) + '...' : (e.description || '-');
12329:          
12330:          doc.text(dateStr, margin + 3, y + 4.5);
12331:          doc.text(e.category, margin + 25, y + 4.5);
12332:          doc.text(expDesc, margin + 65, y + 4.5);
12333:          doc.text(`${pdfFormatNum(e.amount)} ${merchant.currency}`, 190 - 3, y + 4.5, { align: 'right' });
12334:          
12335:          y += 6;
12336:          doc.setDrawColor(241, 245, 249);
12337:          doc.setLineWidth(0.2);
12338:          doc.line(margin, y, 190, y);
12339:        });
12340:        y += 8;
12341:      }
12342:
12343:      // Final signature row of financial balance
12344:      y = Math.min(265, Math.max(y + 10, 255));
12345:      doc.setFontSize(8);
12346:      doc.setFont('helvetica', 'italic');
12347:      doc.setTextColor(148, 163, 184); // Slate-400
12348:      doc.text(`Rapport financier généré électroniquement par ACOM Technologie. Établissement : ${merchant.name}`, 105, y, { align: 'center' });
12349:
12350:      saveOrSharePDF(doc, `rapport_financier_${merchant.name.toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g, '_')}_${format(new Date(), 'dd-MM-yyyy')}.pdf`);
12351:    } catch (error) {
12352:      console.error(error);
12353:      triggerAcomAlert('Erreur', 'Échec de la génération du PDF.', 'error', 'ALERTE');
12354:    }
12355:  };
12356:
12357:  return (
12358:    <motion.div 
12359:      initial={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.98 }}
12360:      animate={{ opacity: 1, scale: 1 }}
12361:      className="space-y-8"
12362:    >
12363:      <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row justify-between items-end gap-4">
12364:        <div>
12365:          <h2 className="text-3xl font-black text-ink tracking-tight">Rapports Financiers</h2>
12366:          <p className="text-[10px] font-mono font-black text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-[0.2em] mt-1">Analyse de performance et rentabilité</p>
12367:        </div>
12368:        <div className="flex gap-2">
12369:          <button 
12370:            onClick={exportToCSV}
12371:            className="px-5 py-2.5 bg-white border border-black/5 rounded-xl text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest hover:shadow-md transition-all flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer"
12372:          >
12373:            <BarChart3 className="w-3 h-3" />
12374:            Exporter CSV
12375:          </button>
12376:          <button 
12377:            onClick={exportToPDF}
12378:            className="px-5 py-2.5 bg-ink text-white rounded-xl text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest hover:shadow-xl transition-all flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer"
12379:          >
12380:            <FileText className="w-3 h-3 text-primary" />
12381:            Rapport PDF
12382:          </button>
12383:        </div>
12384:      </div>
12385:
12386:      <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row justify-between items-start sm:items-center gap-4 bg-white p-4 rounded-2xl border border-gray-100 shadow-sm">
12387:        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-violet-600 font-bold">
12388:          <Calendar className="w-5 h-5 text-violet-600" />
12389:          <span>Période des statistiques de vente</span>
12390:        </div>
12391:        <div className="relative flex items-center">
12392:          <input
12393:            type="month"
12394:            value={reportSelectedMonth}
12395:            onChange={(e) => setReportSelectedMonth(e.target.value)}
12396:            className="relative pl-4 pr-10 py-2 border border-slate-200 rounded-xl focus:ring-2 focus:ring-violet-500 focus:border-transparent cursor-pointer font-medium text-slate-700 bg-slate-50 hover:bg-white transition-all text-sm outline-none [&::-webkit-calendar-picker-indicator]:absolute [&::-webkit-calendar-picker-indicator]:left-0 [&::-webkit-calendar-picker-indicator]:top-0 [&::-webkit-calendar-picker-indicator]:w-full [&::-webkit-calendar-picker-indicator]:h-full [&::-webkit-calendar-picker-indicator]:opacity-0 [&::-webkit-calendar-picker-indicator]:cursor-pointer [&::-webkit-calendar-picker-indicator]:z-10 z-0"
12397:            max={new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 7)}
12398:          />
12399:          <Calendar className="absolute right-3 w-4 h-4 text-slate-400 pointer-events-none z-0" />
12400:        </div>

12425:              </div>

12437:                     <stop offset="5%" stopColor="#ff0000" stopOpacity={0.1}/>

12443:                 <YAxis hide />

12470:                        initial={{ width: 0 }}
12471:                        animate={{ width: `${cat.percentage}%` }}
12472:                        className={`h-full ${idx === 0 ? 'bg-primary' : idx === 1 ? 'bg-blue-400' : idx === 2 ? 'bg-purple-400' : 'bg-rose-400'}`} 
12473:                      />
12474:                    </div>
12475:                  </div>
12476:                ))

12485:                ) : (

12487:                )}

12496:
12497:const ReportKPI = ({ label, value, currency, suffix, icon: Icon, trend, cardColor }: any) => {
12498:  const colors: any = {
12499:    primary: 'bg-primary/10 text-primary border-primary/10',
12500:    rose: 'bg-rose-50 text-rose-500 border-rose-100',
12501:    emerald: 'bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-600 border-emerald-100',
12502:    blue: 'bg-blue-50 text-blue-500 border-blue-100',
12503:    amber: 'bg-amber-50 text-amber-500 border-amber-100',
12504:    orange: 'bg-orange-50 text-orange-500 border-orange-100',
12505:  };
12506:
12507:  return (
12508:    <div className="bg-white p-7 rounded-[2.5rem] border border-black/5 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all group">
12509:      <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-6">
12510:        <div className={`w-12 h-12 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center ${colors[cardColor] || 'bg-gray-50'}`}>
12511:          <Icon className="w-6 h-6" />
12512:        </div>
12513:        <div className="px-2 py-1 bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-600 text-[8px] font-black rounded-lg border border-emerald-100 uppercase tracking-widest">
12514:           {trend}
12515:        </div>
12516:      </div>
12517:      <div>
12518:        <h4 className="text-[10px] font-mono font-black text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest">{label}</h4>
12519:        <div className="flex items-baseline mt-1.5">
12520:          <span className="text-2xl font-black text-ink">{typeof value === 'number' ? value.toLocaleString() : value}</span>
12521:          <span className="text-[10px] font-mono font-bold text-gray-400 ml-1.5 uppercase">{suffix || currency}</span>
12522:        </div>
12523:      </div>
12524:    </div>
12525:  );
12526:};
12527:
12528:// --- Merchant Quote Modal ---
12529:const QuoteModal = ({ isOpen, onClose, merchant, quote }: { isOpen: boolean, onClose: () => void, merchant: Merchant, quote?: MerchantQuote | null }) => {
12530:  const [customerName, setCustomerName] = useState('');
12531:  const [customerPhone, setCustomerPhone] = useState('');
12532:  const [customerEmail, setCustomerEmail] = useState('');
12533:  const [customerAddress, setCustomerAddress] = useState('');
12534:  const [items, setItems] = useState<MerchantQuoteItem[]>([]);
12535:  const [notes, setNotes] = useState('');
12536:  const [expiryDays, setExpiryDays] = useState(30);
12537:  const [isSaving, setIsSaving] = useState(false);
12538:
12539:  useEffect(() => {
12540:    if (quote) {
12541:      setCustomerName(quote.customerName || '');
12542:      setCustomerPhone(quote.customerPhone || '');
12543:      setCustomerEmail(quote.customerEmail || '');
12544:      setCustomerAddress(quote.customerAddress || '');
12545:      setItems(quote.items || []);
12546:      setNotes(quote.notes || '');
12547:      // Calculate expiry days from validUntil
12548:      const expiry = quote.validUntil?.seconds ? new Date(quote.validUntil.seconds * 1000) : new Date(quote.validUntil);
12549:      const diff = Math.ceil((expiry.getTime() - new Date().getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
12550:      setExpiryDays(diff > 0 ? diff : 30);
12551:    } else {
12552:      setCustomerName('');
12553:      setCustomerPhone('');
12554:      setCustomerEmail('');
12555:      setCustomerAddress('');
12556:      setItems([]);
12557:      setNotes('');
12558:      setExpiryDays(30);
12559:    }
12560:  }, [quote, isOpen]);
12561:
12562:  const products = useLiveQuery(() => db.products.where('merchantId').equals(merchant.id).toArray(), [merchant.id]) || [];
12563:
12564:  const addItem = (product?: MerchantProduct) => {
12565:    if (product) {
12566:      setItems([...items, { 
12567:        productId: product.id, 
12568:        name: product.name, 
12569:        quantity: 1, 
12570:        price: product.price, 
12571:        total: product.price,
12572:        sizes: product.sizes || '',
12573:        colors: product.colors || ''
12574:      }]);
12575:    } else {
12576:      setItems([...items, { name: '', quantity: 1, price: 0, total: 0, sizes: '', colors: '' }]);
12577:    }
12578:  };
12579:
12580:  const updateItem = (index: number, updates: Partial<MerchantQuoteItem>) => {
12581:    const newItems = [...items];
12582:    const item = { ...newItems[index], ...updates };
12583:    item.total = (item.quantity || 0) * (item.price || 0);
12584:    newItems[index] = item;
12585:    setItems(newItems);
12586:  };
12587:
12588:  const removeItem = (index: number) => {
12589:    setItems(items.filter((_, i) => i !== index));
12590:  };
12591:
12592:  const total = items.reduce((acc, item) => acc + item.total, 0);
12593:
12594:  const handleSave = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
12595:    e.preventDefault();
12596:    if (items.length === 0 || !customerName) {
12597:      toast.error('Veuillez remplir les informations obligatoires');
12598:      return;
12599:    }
12600:
12601:    setIsSaving(true);
12602:    try {
12603:      const validUntil = new Date();
12604:      validUntil.setDate(validUntil.getDate() + expiryDays);
12605:
12606:      if (quote) {
12607:        await db.quotes.update(quote.id, {
12608:          items,
12609:          totalAmount: total,
12610:          customerName,
12611:          customerPhone,
12612:          customerEmail,
12613:          customerAddress,
12614:          validUntil,
12615:          notes,
12616:          updatedAt: new Date()
12617:        });
12618:        toast.success('Devis mis à jour');
12619:      } else {
12620:        await billingService.createQuote({
12621:          merchantId: merchant.id,
12622:          items,
12623:          totalAmount: total,
12624:          customerName,
12625:          customerPhone,
12626:          customerEmail,
12627:          customerAddress,
12628:          validUntil,
12629:          notes,
12630:          status: 'draft',
12631:          processedBy: merchant.ownerId
12632:        });
12633:        toast.success('Devis enregistré');
12634:      }
12635:
12636:      onClose();
12637:      setCustomerName('');
12638:      setCustomerPhone('');
12639:      setItems([]);
12640:    } catch (error) {
12641:      toast.error('Erreur lors de l\'enregistrement');
12642:    } finally {
12643:      setIsSaving(false);
12644:    }
12645:  };
12646:
12647:  if (!isOpen) return null;
12648:
12649:  return (
12650:    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[100] flex items-center justify-center p-4">
12651:      <motion.div 
12652:        initial={{ opacity: 0 }}
12653:        animate={{ opacity: 1 }}
12654:        exit={{ opacity: 0 }}
12655:        onClick={onClose}
12656:        className="absolute inset-0 bg-ink/60 backdrop-blur-md"
12657:      />
12658:      <motion.div 
12659:        initial={{ scale: 0.9, opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
12660:        animate={{ scale: 1, opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
12661:        className="relative bg-white w-full max-w-4xl max-h-[90vh] rounded-[3rem] shadow-2xl overflow-hidden flex flex-col"
12662:      >
12663:        <div className="p-8 border-b border-gray-100 flex justify-between items-center bg-gray-50/50">
12664:          <div>
12665:            <h3 className="text-2xl font-black text-ink">Nouveau Devis</h3>
12666:            <p className="text-[10px] font-mono text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mt-1">Créez une proposition commerciale</p>
12667:          </div>
12668:          <button onClick={onClose} className="p-3 hover:bg-white rounded-2xl transition-all"><X className="w-6 h-6" /></button>
12669:        </div>
12670:
12671:        <form onSubmit={handleSave} className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-8 space-y-8 custom-scrollbar">
12672:          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
12673:            <div className="space-y-4">
12674:              <h4 className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-primary">Informations Client</h4>
12675:              <div className="space-y-4">
12676:                <div className="space-y-1.5">
12677:                  <label className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-400 ml-1">Nom / Entreprise *</label>
12678:                  <input 
12679:                    type="text" 
12680:                    value={customerName}
12681:                    onChange={e => setCustomerName(e.target.value)}
12682:                    required
12683:                    className="w-full px-5 py-4 bg-gray-50 border border-transparent rounded-2xl focus:bg-white focus:border-primary/30 transition-all font-bold text-sm outline-none"
12684:                    placeholder="Ex: Jean Dupont"
12685:                  />
12686:                </div>
12687:                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
12688:                  <div className="space-y-1.5">
12689:                    <label className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-400 ml-1">Téléphone</label>
12690:                    <input 
12691:                      type="tel" 
12692:                      value={customerPhone}
12693:                      onChange={e => setCustomerPhone(e.target.value)}
12694:                      className="w-full px-5 py-4 bg-gray-50 border border-transparent rounded-2xl focus:bg-white focus:border-primary/30 transition-all font-bold text-sm outline-none"
12695:                    />
12696:                  </div>
12697:                  <div className="space-y-1.5">
12698:                     <label className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-400 ml-1">Validité (Jours)</label>
12699:                     <input 
12700:                       type="number" 
12701:                       value={expiryDays}
12702:                       onChange={e => setExpiryDays(parseInt(e.target.value))}
12703:                       className="w-full px-5 py-4 bg-gray-50 border border-transparent rounded-2xl focus:bg-white focus:border-primary/30 transition-all font-bold text-sm outline-none"
12704:                     />
12705:                  </div>
12706:                </div>
12707:              </div>
12708:            </div>
12709:            <div className="space-y-4">
12710:               <h4 className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-gray-400">Détails Expédition (Optionnel)</h4>
12711:               <textarea 
12712:                  value={customerAddress}
12713:                  onChange={e => setCustomerAddress(e.target.value)}
12714:                  className="w-full h-[120px] px-5 py-4 bg-gray-50 border border-transparent rounded-2xl focus:bg-white focus:border-primary/30 transition-all font-bold text-sm outline-none resize-none"
12715:                  placeholder="Adresse complète du client..."
12716:               />
12717:            </div>
12718:          </div>
12719:
12720:          <div className="space-y-4">
12721:            <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
12722:              <h4 className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-primary">Articles du Devis</h4>
12723:              <div className="flex gap-2">
12724:                <select 
12725:                  onChange={(e) => {
12726:                    const p = products.find(prod => prod.id === e.target.value);
12727:                    if (p) addItem(p);
12728:                    e.target.value = "";
12729:                  }}
12730:                  className="px-4 py-2 bg-gray-100 rounded-xl text-[10px] font-bold outline-none border-none cursor-pointer"
12731:                >

12733:                  {products.map(p => (

12738:                  type="button"
12739:                  onClick={() => addItem()}

12741:                >
12742:                  + Manuel

12744:              </div>
12745:            </div>
12746:
12747:            <div className="space-y-3">
12748:               {items.map((item, idx) => (

12750:                    <div className="flex flex-wrap md:flex-nowrap gap-3 items-end">
12751:                      <div className="flex-1 min-w-[200px] space-y-1">
12752:                        <label className="text-[8px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-400 ml-1">Désignation</label>
12753:                        <input 
12754:                          type="text" 
12755:                          value={item.name}
12756:                          onChange={e => updateItem(idx, { name: e.target.value })}
12757:                          className="w-full px-4 py-3 bg-white border border-black/5 rounded-xl text-xs font-bold font-mono outline-none focus:border-primary/50"
12758:                          placeholder="Nom de l'article"
12759:                        />
12760:                      </div>
12761:                      <div className="w-24 space-y-1">
12762:                        <label className="text-[8px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-400 ml-1">Qté</label>
12763:                        <input 
12764:                          type="number" 
12765:                          value={item.quantity}
12766:                          onChange={e => updateItem(idx, { quantity: parseFloat(e.target.value) || 0 })}

12828:            <div className="flex-1 w-full">
12829:              <label className="text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-white/40 mb-3 block">Conditions de règlement & Notes</label>
12830:              <textarea 
12831:                value={notes}
12832:                onChange={e => setNotes(e.target.value)}
12833:                className="w-full bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-2xl px-5 py-4 font-medium text-xs outline-none focus:border-primary/50 text-white placeholder-white/20 h-24 resize-none"
12834:                placeholder="Ex: Acompte de 50% à la commande, solde à la livraison..."
12835:              />
12836:            </div>

12866:// --- Merchant Settings ---
12867:const MerchantSettings = ({ 
12868:  merchant, 
12869:  onUpdate, 
12870:  setActiveTab 
12871:}: { 
12872:  merchant: Merchant, 
12873:  onUpdate: (m: Merchant) => void, 
12874:  setActiveTab: (tab: string) => void 
12875:}) => {
12876:  const [formData, setFormData] = useState(() => {
12877:    const data = { ...merchant };
12878:    if (!data.managerNotifications) {
12879:      data.managerNotifications = {};
12880:    }
12881:    return data;
12882:  });
12883:  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);
12884:  const [isExporting, setIsExporting] = useState(false);
12885:
12886:  const handleExportLocalData = async () => {
12887:    setIsExporting(true);
12888:    try {
12889:      const allSales = await db.sales.toArray();
12890:      const allProducts = await db.products.toArray();
12891:      const exportData = {
12892:        sales: allSales,
12893:        products: allProducts,
12894:        exportedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
12895:        merchantId: merchant.id
12896:      };
12897:      
12898:      const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(exportData, null, 2)], { type: 'application/json' });
12899:      const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
12900:      const link = document.createElement('a');
12901:      link.href = url;
12902:      link.download = `studio-acom-backup-${merchant.id}-${new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]}.json`;
12903:      link.click();
12904:      triggerAcomAlert('Succès', 'Données exportées avec succès', 'success', 'SYSTÈME');
12905:    } catch (error) {
12906:      triggerAcomAlert('Erreur', 'Erreur lors de l\'exportation', 'error', 'ALERTE');
12907:    } finally {
12908:      setIsExporting(false);
12909:    }
12910:  };
12911:
12912:  const handleClearCache = async () => {
12913:    if (confirm('Voulez-vous vraiment vider le cache local ? Cela ne supprimera pas vos données sur le Cloud, mais nécessitera une nouvelle synchronisation.')) {
12914:      try {
12915:        await db.sales.clear();
12916:        await db.products.clear();
12917:        await db.expenses.clear();
12918:        localStorage.clear();
12919:        triggerAcomAlert('Succès', 'Cache vidé. L\'application va redémarrer.', 'success', 'SYSTÈME');
12920:        window.location.reload();
12921:      } catch (error) {
12922:        triggerAcomAlert('Erreur', 'Erreur lors du nettoyage', 'error', 'ALERTE');
12923:      }
12924:    }
12925:  };
12926:
12927:  const handleSave = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
12928:    e.preventDefault();
12929:    setSaving(true);
12930:    try {
12931:      await dbService.merchants.save({ ...formData, updatedAt: new Date() } as any);
12932:      onUpdate(formData);
12933:      triggerAcomAlert('Succès', 'Réglages mis à jour', 'success', 'SYSTÈME');
12934:    } catch (error) {
12935:      triggerAcomAlert('Erreur', 'Erreur lors de la mise à jour', 'error', 'ALERTE');
12936:    } finally {
12937:      setSaving(false);
12938:    }
12939:  };
12940:
12941:  return (
12942:    <motion.div 
12943:      initial={{ opacity: 0, x: 20 }}
12944:      animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0 }}
12945:      exit={{ opacity: 0, x: -20 }}
12946:      className="max-w-4xl mx-auto"
12947:    >
12948:      <div className="bg-white p-6 md:p-10 rounded-[3rem] border border-black/5 shadow-xl mb-12">
12949:        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-8">
12950:          <div>
12951:            <h3 className="text-2xl font-black text-ink">Gestion des Données Locales</h3>
12952:            <p className="text-[10px] font-mono text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-[0.2em] mt-1">Données stockées sur cet appareil</p>
12953:          </div>

12955:            <Database className="w-7 h-7 text-emerald-600" />
12956:          </div>
12957:        </div>
12958:
12959:        <div className="space-y-6">
12960:          <div className="bg-emerald-50/30 rounded-[2rem] p-8 border border-emerald-100/50">
12961:            <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-start gap-6">
12962:              <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-sm flex items-center justify-center border border-emerald-100 shrink-0">
12963:                <HardDrive className="w-6 h-6 text-emerald-600" />
12964:              </div>
12965:              <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
12966:                <h4 className="text-sm font-black text-ink uppercase tracking-wider">Mode Local-First (Optimisé)</h4>
12967:                <p className="text-xs text-emerald-800/70 mt-2 leading-relaxed break-words">
12968:                  Studio Acom enregistre automatiquement chaque transaction dans la mémoire locale (IndexedDB) de votre ordinateur.

13227:                <div className="w-20 h-20 rounded-2xl border border-gray-200 flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden bg-white shrink-0 shadow-sm relative group">
13228:                  {formData.logo ? (
13229:                    <img src={formData.logo} alt="Logo" className="w-full h-full object-contain p-2" />
13230:                  ) : (
13231:                    <Store className="w-8 h-8 text-gray-300" />
13232:                  )}
13233:                </div>
13234:                <div className="flex-1">
13235:                  <input 
13236:                    type="file" 
13237:                    accept="image/*"
13238:                    onChange={(e) => {
13239:                      const file = e.target.files?.[0];
13240:                      if (file) {
13241:                        if (file.size > 2 * 1024 * 1024) {
13242:                          alert("Le fichier est trop volumineux (max 2MB)");
13243:                          return;
13244:                        }
13245:                        const reader = new FileReader();
13246:                        reader.onloadend = () => {
13247:                          setFormData({...formData, logo: reader.result as string});
13248:                        };
13249:                        reader.readAsDataURL(file);
13250:                      }
13251:                    }}
13252:                    className="hidden"
13253:                    id="logo-upload"
13254:                  />
13255:                  <label htmlFor="logo-upload" className="cursor-pointer inline-flex items-center px-6 py-3 bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-xl text-xs font-bold shadow-sm uppercase tracking-widest hover:border-primary/50 transition-all text-gray-600">
13256:                    <Upload className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
13257:                    Changer le logo
13258:                  </label>
13259:                  <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-400 mt-2 font-medium">Format JPG, PNG ou WEBP. Le logo apparaîtra sur vos devis et factures.</p>
13260:                </div>
13261:              </div>
13262:            </div>
13263:
13264:            <div>
13265:              <label className="block text-[10px] font-mono font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-3">Téléphone Professionnel</label>
13266:              <input type="tel" value={formData.phone || ''} onChange={e => setFormData({...formData, phone: e.target.value})} className="w-full px-5 py-4 rounded-2xl border border-gray-100 outline-none focus:ring-4 focus:ring-primary/10 bg-gray-50/30 font-mono font-bold" />
13267:            </div>
13268:            <div>
13269:              <label className="block text-[10px] font-mono font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-3">Email de Contact</label>
13270:              <input type="email" value={formData.email || ''} onChange={e => setFormData({...formData, email: e.target.value})} className="w-full px-5 py-4 rounded-2xl border border-gray-100 outline-none focus:ring-4 focus:ring-primary/10 bg-gray-50/30 font-bold" />
13271:            </div>
13272:
13273:            <div className="md:col-span-2">
13274:              <label className="block text-[10px] font-mono font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-3">Adresse Physique</label>
13275:              <div className="relative">
13276:                <MapPin className="absolute left-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-5 h-5 text-gray-300" />
13277:                <input type="text" value={formData.address || ''} onChange={e => setFormData({...formData, address: e.target.value})} className="w-full pl-12 pr-5 py-4 rounded-2xl border border-gray-100 outline-none focus:ring-4 focus:ring-primary/10 bg-gray-50/30 font-medium" />
13278:              </div>
13279:            </div>
13280:            <div className="md:col-span-2">
13281:              <label className="block text-[10px] font-mono font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-3">Description / Slogan</label>
13282:              <textarea rows={4} value={formData.description || ''} onChange={e => setFormData({...formData, description: e.target.value})} className="w-full px-5 py-4 rounded-2xl border border-gray-100 outline-none focus:ring-4 focus:ring-primary/10 bg-gray-50/30 resize-none font-medium leading-relaxed" placeholder="Décrivez votre activité en quelques mots..." />
13283:            </div>
13284:
13285:            {formData.type === 'scolaire' && (
13286:              <div className="md:col-span-2 pt-6 border-t border-gray-100 mt-2">
13287:                 <label className="block text-[10px] font-mono font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-3">Paramétrage des Périodes Scolaires</label>
13288:                 <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
13289:                   <div>
13290:                      <select 
13291:                        value={formData.academicPeriodType || 'trimestriel'}
13292:                        onChange={e => {
13293:                          const type = e.target.value as any;
13294:                          let periods = ['Trimestre 1', 'Trimestre 2', 'Trimestre 3'];
13295:                          if (type === 'semestriel') periods = ['Semestre 1', 'Semestre 2'];
13296:                          if (type === 'bimestriel') periods = ['Bimestre 1', 'Bimestre 2', 'Bimestre 3', 'Bimestre 4', 'Bimestre 5'];
13297:                          setFormData({...formData, academicPeriodType: type, academicPeriods: periods});
13298:                        }}
13299:                        className="w-full px-5 py-4 rounded-xl border border-gray-200 outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 bg-white font-medium"
13300:                      >
13301:                        <option value="trimestriel">Trimestriel (3 bulletins)</option>
13302:                        <option value="semestriel">Semestriel (2 bulletins)</option>
13303:                        <option value="bimestriel">Bimestriel (5 bulletins)</option>
13304:                      </select>
13305:                      <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-2">Sélectionnez le rythme d'évaluation officiel de l'établissement (par défaut: 3 Trimestres).</p>
13306:                   </div>
13307:                 </div>
13308:              </div>
13309:            )}
13310:          </div>
13311:          
13312:          <div className="pt-6 border-t border-gray-100">
13313:            <button 
13314:              type="submit" 
13315:              disabled={saving} 
13316:              className="w-full py-5 bg-ink text-white rounded-[1.5rem] font-black text-xs md:text-sm uppercase tracking-widest md:tracking-[0.2em] hover:bg-black transition-all flex items-center justify-center shadow-2xl shadow-black/20 active:scale-[0.98]"
13317:            >
13318:              {saving ? <Loader2 className="w-6 h-6 animate-spin" /> : <><Save className="w-5 h-5 mr-3 shrink-0" /> <span>Enregistrer les modifications</span></>}
13319:            </button>
13320:          </div>
13321:        </form>
13322:      </div>
13323:    </motion.div>
13324:  );
13325:};
13326:
13327:// --- Specialized SaaS Managers ---
13328:
13329:// 1. Service Manager (Gestion des services)
13330:const ServiceManager = ({ merchant }: { merchant: Merchant }) => {
13331:  const [isEditing, setIsEditing] = useState(false);
13332:  const [currentIntervention, setCurrentIntervention] = useState<any>(null);
13333:  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);
13334:  const [viewMode, setViewMode] = useState<'list' | 'kanban' | 'calendar'>('calendar');
13335:  const [currentDate, setCurrentDate] = useState(new Date());
13336:  const [interventionLimit, setInterventionLimit] = useState(10);
13337:
13338:  const interventions = useLiveQuery(() => 
13339:    db.interventions.where('merchantId').equals(merchant.id).reverse().sortBy('updatedAt')
13340:  , [merchant.id]) || [];
13341:
13342:  const loading = false;
13343:
13344:  const handleDragStart = (e: React.DragEvent, id: string) => {
13345:    e.dataTransfer.setData('interventionId', id);
13346:  };
13347:
13348:  const handleDragOver = (e: React.DragEvent) => {
13349:    e.preventDefault();
13350:  };
13351:
13352:  const handleDrop = async (e: React.DragEvent, status: string) => {
13353:    e.preventDefault();
13354:    const id = e.dataTransfer.getData('interventionId');
13355:    if (!id) return;
13356:    
13357:    try {
13358:      const item = interventions.find((i:any) => i.id === id);
13359:      if (item && item.status !== status) {
13360:        await dbService.interventions.save({
13361:          ...item,
13362:          status
13363:        });
13364:        toast.success(`Statut mis à jour`);
13365:      }
13366:    } catch(err) {
13367:      toast.error('Erreur lors de la mise à jour du statut');
13368:    }
13369:  };
13370:
13371:  const handleGenerateInvoice = async (intervention: any) => {
13372:    try {
13373:      setSaving(true);
13374:      const saleData = {
13375:        merchantId: merchant.id,
13376:        items: [{
13377:          productId: `intervention_${intervention.id}`, // Placeholder or a generic service product
13378:          name: intervention.title || intervention.serviceType,
13379:          quantity: 1,
13380:          price: intervention.price
13381:        }],
13382:        totalAmount: intervention.price,
13383:        customerInfo: {
13384:          name: intervention.customerName,
13385:          phone: intervention.customerPhone,
13386:          email: intervention.customerEmail
13387:        },
13388:        paymentMethod: 'invoice', // Marked as awaiting payment
13389:        status: 'pending',
13390:        date: new Date().toISOString()
13391:      };
13392:      await dbService.merchantSales.save(saleData);
13393:      
13394:      // Update the intervention to mark it as billed
13395:      await dbService.interventions.save({
13396:        ...intervention,
13397:        billed: true
13398:      });
13399:      
13400:      toast.success('Facture générée avec succès');
13401:      setIsEditing(false);
13402:    } catch (error) {
13403:      toast.error('Erreur lors de la génération de la facture');
13404:    } finally {
13405:      setSaving(false);
13406:    }
13407:  };
13408:
13409:  const columns = [
13410:    { id: 'pending', title: 'En Attente', color: 'bg-amber-500', bgColor: 'bg-amber-50', textColor: 'text-amber-600', borderColor: 'border-amber-200' },
13411:    { id: 'in-progress', title: 'En Cours', color: 'bg-blue-500', bgColor: 'bg-blue-50', textColor: 'text-blue-600', borderColor: 'border-blue-200' },
13412:    { id: 'completed', title: 'Terminé', color: 'bg-emerald-500', bgColor: 'bg-emerald-50', textColor: 'text-emerald-600', borderColor: 'border-emerald-200' },
13413:    { id: 'cancelled', title: 'Annulé', color: 'bg-rose-500', bgColor: 'bg-rose-50', textColor: 'text-rose-600', borderColor: 'border-rose-200' },
13414:  ];
13415:
13416:  const handleSave = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
13417:    e.preventDefault();
13418:    setSaving(true);
13419:    try {
13420:      await dbService.interventions.save({
13421:        ...currentIntervention,
13422:        merchantId: merchant.id
13423:      });
13424:      toast.success('Intervention enregistrée');
13425:      setIsEditing(false);
13426:    } catch (error) {
13427:      toast.error('Erreur lors de l\'enregistrement');
13428:    } finally {
13429:      setSaving(false);
13430:    }
13431:  };
13432:
13433:  return (
13434:    <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0 }} animate={{ opacity: 1 }} className="space-y-6">
13435:      <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row justify-between items-center gap-4">
13436:        <div>
13437:          <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-ink">Gestion des Interventions</h2>
13438:          <div className="flex items-center gap-4 mt-2">
13439:            <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 font-mono uppercase tracking-widest pl-1">Total: {interventions.length.toString().padStart(3, '0')}</p>
13440:            <div className="flex bg-gray-100 rounded-xl p-0.5">
13441:              <button 
13442:                onClick={() => setViewMode('list')} 
13443:                className={`px-4 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-bold transition-all ${viewMode === 'list' ? 'bg-white text-ink shadow-sm' : 'text-gray-500 hover:text-ink'}`}
13444:              >
13445:                Liste
13446:              </button>
13447:              <button 
13448:                onClick={() => setViewMode('kanban')} 
13449:                className={`px-4 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-bold transition-all flex items-center gap-2 ${viewMode === 'kanban' ? 'bg-white text-ink shadow-sm' : 'text-gray-500 hover:text-ink'}`}
13450:              >
13451:                Kanban
13452:              </button>
13453:              <button 
13454:                onClick={() => setViewMode('calendar')} 
13455:                className={`px-4 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-bold transition-all flex items-center gap-2 ${viewMode === 'calendar' ? 'bg-white text-ink shadow-sm' : 'text-gray-500 hover:text-ink'}`}
13456:              >
13457:                Calendrier
13458:              </button>
13459:            </div>
13460:          </div>
13461:        </div>
13462:        <button 
13463:          onClick={() => {
13464:            setCurrentIntervention({ 
13465:              title: '',
13466:              customerName: '', 
13467:              customerPhone: '',
13468:              customerEmail: '',
13469:              serviceType: '', 
13470:              description: '',
13471:              status: 'pending', 
13472:              priority: 'normal',
13473:              date: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0], 
13474:              time: '09:00',
13475:              address: '',
13476:              assignedTo: '',
13477:              price: 0 
13478:            });
13479:            setIsEditing(true);
13480:          }}
13481:          className="w-full sm:w-auto flex items-center justify-center space-x-2 px-6 py-3 bg-primary text-white rounded-2xl font-bold shadow-lg shadow-primary/20 hover:scale-105 transition-transform"
13482:        >
13483:          <Plus className="w-4 h-4" />
13484:          <span>Nouvelle Intervention</span>
13485:        </button>
13486:      </div>
13487:
13488:      {loading ? (
13489:        <div className="py-20 flex justify-center"><Loader2 className="w-8 h-8 animate-spin text-primary" /></div>
13490:      ) : (
13491:        <>
13492:          {/* KPIs */}
13493:          <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4 mb-6">
13494:            {[
13495:              { label: 'En attente', value: interventions.filter((i:any) => i.status === 'pending').length, color: 'text-amber-600', bgColor: 'bg-amber-50' },
13496:              { label: 'En cours', value: interventions.filter((i:any) => i.status === 'in-progress').length, color: 'text-blue-600', bgColor: 'bg-blue-50' },
13497:              { label: 'CA Potentiel', value: interventions.filter((i:any) => i.status !== 'cancelled').reduce((acc: number, i:any) => acc + (Number(i.price) || 0), 0).toLocaleString() + ' ' + merchant.currency, color: 'text-emerald-600', bgColor: 'bg-emerald-50' },
13498:              { label: 'Terminés', value: interventions.filter((i:any) => i.status === 'completed').length, color: 'text-purple-600', bgColor: 'bg-purple-50' }
13499:            ].map((kpi, idx) => (
13500:              <div key={idx} className={`${kpi.bgColor} p-4 rounded-2xl flex flex-col justify-center`}>
13501:                <p className="text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-widest">{kpi.label}</p>
13502:                <p className={`text-xl font-black ${kpi.color} mt-1`}>{kpi.value}</p>
13503:              </div>
13504:            ))}
13505:          </div>
13506:
13507:          {viewMode === 'list' ? (
13508:            <div className="bg-white rounded-[2rem] border border-black/5 shadow-sm overflow-hidden">
13509:              <div className="overflow-x-auto">
13510:            <table className="w-full text-left">
13511:              <thead>
13512:                <tr className="bg-gray-50/50 text-[10px] font-mono font-black text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-[0.2em] border-b border-gray-100">
13513:                  <th className="px-8 py-5">Intervention / Client</th>
13514:                  <th className="px-8 py-5">Contact</th>
13515:                  <th className="px-8 py-5">Planification</th>
13516:                  <th className="px-8 py-5">Statut & Priorité</th>
13517:                  <th className="px-8 py-5 text-right">Montant TTC</th>
13518:                  <th className="px-8 py-5 text-right">Actions</th>
13519:                </tr>
13520:              </thead>
13521:              <tbody className="divide-y divide-gray-100">
13522:                {interventions.slice(0, interventionLimit).map((item: any) => (
13523:                  <tr key={item.id} className="hover:bg-gray-50/50 transition-colors group">
13524:                    <td className="px-8 py-5">
13525:                      <div className="flex items-center space-x-4">
13526:                        <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-primary/10 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center border border-primary/10 group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform">
13527:                          <Wrench className="w-6 h-6 text-primary" />
13528:                        </div>
13529:                        <div className="flex flex-col max-w-[200px]">
13530:                          <span className="font-black text-ink text-sm leading-tight truncate" title={item.title || item.serviceType}>{item.title || item.serviceType || 'Intervention'}</span>
13531:                          <span className="text-[10px] font-mono text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mt-0.5 truncate" title={item.customerName}>{item.customerName}</span>
13532:                        </div>
13533:                      </div>
13534:                    </td>
13535:                    <td className="px-8 py-5">
13536:                      <div className="flex flex-col">
13537:                        {item.customerPhone ? <span className="font-bold text-ink text-xs">{item.customerPhone}</span> : <span className="text-gray-300 text-xs">-</span>}
13538:                        {item.customerEmail && <span className="text-[10px] text-gray-400 truncate">{item.customerEmail}</span>}
13539:                      </div>
13540:                    </td>
13541:                    <td className="px-8 py-5">
13542:                      <div className="flex flex-col">
13543:                        <span className="text-[11px] font-mono font-black text-ink uppercase">{item.date}</span>
13544:                        {item.time && <span className="text-[10px] text-gray-400 font-mono mt-0.5">{item.time}</span>}
13545:                      </div>
13546:                    </td>
13547:                    <td className="px-8 py-5">
13548:                      <div className="flex flex-col gap-2 items-start">
13549:                        <span className={`px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest border ${
13550:                          item.status === 'completed' ? 'bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-600 border-emerald-100' : 
13551:                          item.status === 'in-progress' ? 'bg-blue-50 text-blue-600 border-blue-100' : 
13552:                          item.status === 'cancelled' ? 'bg-rose-50 text-rose-600 border-rose-100' :
13553:                          'bg-amber-50 text-amber-600 border-amber-100'
13554:                        }`}>
13555:                          {item.status === 'pending' ? 'EN ATTENTE' : item.status === 'in-progress' ? 'EN COURS' : item.status === 'cancelled' ? 'ANNULÉ' : 'TERMINÉ'}
13556:                        </span>
13557:                        {item.priority && item.priority !== 'normal' && (
13558:                          <span className={`px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-[8px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest ${
13559:                            item.priority === 'urgent' ? 'bg-rose-500 text-white' : 
13560:                            item.priority === 'high' ? 'bg-orange-100 text-orange-600' : 
13561:                            'bg-gray-100 text-gray-500'
13562:                          }`}>
13563:                            {item.priority === 'urgent' ? 'URGENT' : item.priority === 'high' ? 'HAUTE PRIORITÉ' : 'BASSE'}
13564:                          </span>
13565:                        )}
13566:                      </div>
13567:                    </td>
13568:                    <td className="px-8 py-5 text-right">
13569:                      <p className="font-mono font-black text-ink text-sm">
13570:                        {Number(item.price || 0).toLocaleString()} <span className="text-[10px] opacity-60 font-mono">{merchant.currency}</span>
13571:                      </p>
13572:                    </td>
13573:                    <td className="px-8 py-5 text-right">
13574:                      <button onClick={() => { setCurrentIntervention(item); setIsEditing(true); }} className="p-2.5 hover:bg-primary/10 text-primary rounded-xl opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-all border border-transparent hover:border-primary/20"><Edit2 className="w-4 h-4" /></button>
13575:                    </td>
13576:                  </tr>
13577:                ))}
13578:              </tbody>
13579:            </table>
13580:            {interventions.length > interventionLimit && (
13581:              <div className="p-4 flex justify-center border-t border-gray-100">
13582:                <button 
13583:                  onClick={() => setInterventionLimit(prev => prev + 10)}
13584:                  className="px-6 py-2 bg-gray-50 text-gray-600 font-bold text-[10px] rounded-xl hover:bg-gray-100 transition-colors uppercase tracking-widest"
13585:                >
13586:                  Voir plus
13587:                </button>
13588:              </div>
13589:            )}
13590:          </div>
13591:        </div>
13592:      ) : viewMode === 'kanban' ? (
13593:        <div className="flex gap-6 overflow-x-auto pb-4 snap-x custom-scrollbar">
13594:          {columns.map((col) => {
13595:            const columnItems = interventions.filter((item:any) => item.status === col.id);
13596:            return (
13597:              <div 
13598:                key={col.id} 
13599:                className={`flex-shrink-0 w-80 flex flex-col rounded-3xl ${col.bgColor} border ${col.borderColor} snap-start`}
13600:                onDragOver={handleDragOver}
13601:                onDrop={(e) => handleDrop(e, col.id)}
13602:              >
13603:                <div className="p-5 border-b border-black/5 flex justify-between items-center bg-white/50 rounded-t-3xl backdrop-blur-sm">
13604:                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
13605:                    <div className={`w-3 h-3 rounded-full ${col.color}`} />
13606:                    <h3 className={`font-black text-sm uppercase tracking-widest ${col.textColor}`}>{col.title}</h3>
13607:                  </div>
13608:                  <span className="text-xs font-mono font-bold bg-white px-2 py-1 rounded-lg border border-black/5 text-gray-500 shadow-sm">{columnItems.length}</span>
13609:                </div>
13610:                
13611:                <div className="p-4 flex-1 overflow-y-auto space-y-4 min-h-[500px]">
13612:                  {columnItems.map((item: any) => (
13613:                    <div 
13614:                      key={item.id}
13615:                      draggable
13616:                      onDragStart={(e) => handleDragStart(e, item.id)}
13617:                      className="bg-white p-5 rounded-2xl border border-black/5 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing group"
13618:                    >
13619:                      <div className="flex justify-between items-start mb-3">
13620:                        <div className="flex-1 min-w-0 pr-2">
13621:                          <h4 className="font-bold text-ink text-sm leading-tight truncate" title={item.title || item.serviceType}>{item.title || item.serviceType || 'Intervention'}</h4>
13622:                          <p className="text-[10px] font-mono text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mt-1 truncate" title={item.customerName}>{item.customerName}</p>
13623:                        </div>
13624:                        <button 
13625:                          onClick={() => { setCurrentIntervention(item); setIsEditing(true); }}
13626:                          className="p-1.5 hover:bg-primary/10 text-gray-400 hover:text-primary rounded-lg transition-colors"
13627:                        >
13628:                          <Edit2 className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
13629:                        </button>
13630:                      </div>
13631:                      
13632:                      <div className="space-y-2 mb-4">
13633:                        <div className="flex items-center text-xs text-gray-500 bg-gray-50 px-2 py-1.5 rounded-lg border border-gray-100">
13634:                          <Calendar className="w-3.5 h-3.5 mr-2 text-primary" />
13635:                          <span className="font-mono">{item.date} {item.time && `- ${item.time}`}</span>
13636:                        </div>
13637:                        {item.address && (
13638:                          <div className="flex items-center text-xs text-gray-500 bg-gray-50 px-2 py-1.5 rounded-lg border border-gray-100">
13639:                            <MapPin className="w-3.5 h-3.5 mr-2 text-primary flex-shrink-0" />
13640:                            <span className="truncate">{item.address}</span>
13641:                          </div>
13642:                        )}
13643:                        {item.assignedTo && (
13644:                          <div className="flex items-center text-xs text-gray-500 bg-gray-50 px-2 py-1.5 rounded-lg border border-gray-100">
13645:                            <User className="w-3.5 h-3.5 mr-2 text-primary" />
13646:                            <span className="truncate">{item.assignedTo}</span>
13647:                          </div>
13648:                        )}
13649:                      </div>
13650:
13651:                      <div className="flex items-center justify-between pt-3 border-t border-gray-50">
13652:                        <div className="flex flex-col gap-1">
13653:                          {item.priority && item.priority !== 'normal' ? (
13654:                            <span className={`px-2 py-0.5 w-fit rounded text-[9px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest ${
13655:                              item.priority === 'urgent' ? 'bg-rose-50 text-rose-600 border border-rose-100' : 
13656:                              item.priority === 'high' ? 'bg-orange-50 text-orange-600 border border-orange-100' : 
13657:                              'bg-gray-100 text-gray-500'
13658:                            }`}>
13659:                              {item.priority === 'urgent' ? 'URGENT' : item.priority === 'high' ? 'HAUTE PRIORITÉ' : 'BASSE'}
13660:                            </span>
13661:                          ) : (
13662:                            <div />
13663:                          )}
13664:                          {item.billed && (
13665:                             <span className="px-2 py-0.5 w-fit rounded text-[9px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-600 border border-emerald-100 flex items-center">
13666:                               <FileText className="w-2.5 h-2.5 mr-1" />
13667:                               Facturé
13668:                             </span>
13669:                          )}
13670:                        </div>
13671:                        <span className="font-mono font-black text-ink text-sm">
13672:                          {Number(item.price || 0).toLocaleString()} <span className="text-[10px] opacity-60 font-mono">{merchant.currency}</span>
13673:                        </span>
13674:                      </div>
13675:                    </div>
13676:                  ))}
13677:                  {columnItems.length === 0 && (
13678:                    <div className="h-24 flex items-center justify-center border-2 border-dashed border-black/5 rounded-2xl">
13679:                      <p className="text-xs font-mono font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest">Glisser ici</p>
13680:                    </div>
13681:                  )}
13682:                </div>
13683:              </div>
13684:            );
13685:          })}
13686:        </div>
13687:      ) : (
13688:        <div className="bg-white rounded-[2rem] border border-black/5 shadow-sm overflow-hidden p-6">
13689:          <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-6">
13690:            <h3 className="font-black text-lg text-ink capitalize">{format(currentDate, 'MMMM yyyy', { locale: fr })}</h3>
13691:            <div className="flex space-x-2">

13694:              <button onClick={() => setCurrentDate(addDays(currentDate, 30))} className="p-2 bg-gray-50 rounded-xl hover:bg-gray-100">&gt;</button>
13695:            </div>
13696:          </div>
13697:

13699:            {['Lun', 'Mar', 'Mer', 'Jeu', 'Ven', 'Sam', 'Dim'].map(day => (
13700:              <div key={day} className="bg-gray-50 py-3 text-center text-xs font-black text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-widest">
13701:                {day}
13702:              </div>
13703:            ))}
13704:            
13705:            {eachDayOfInterval({ start: startOfWeek(startOfMonth(currentDate), { weekStartsOn: 1 }), end: endOfWeek(endOfMonth(currentDate), { weekStartsOn: 1 }) }).map((day, idx) => {
13706:              const dayInterventions = interventions.filter((i:any) => i.date === format(day, 'yyyy-MM-dd'));
13707:              const isCurrentMonth = isSameMonth(day, currentDate);
13708:              const isToday = isSameDay(day, new Date());
13709:              return (
13710:                <div key={idx} className={`bg-white min-h-[120px] p-2 ${!isCurrentMonth ? 'opacity-50 bg-gray-50/50' : ''}`}>
13711:                  <div className="flex justify-between items-start mb-2">
13712:                    <span className={`text-xs font-bold w-6 h-6 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full ${isToday ? 'bg-primary text-white' : 'text-gray-400'}`}>
13713:                      {format(day, 'd')}
13714:                    </span>
13715:                  </div>

13717:                    {dayInterventions.map((item:any) => (
13718:                      <div 
13719:                        key={item.id} 
13720:                        onClick={() => { setCurrentIntervention(item); setIsEditing(true); }}
13721:                        className={`text-[9px] p-1.5 rounded-md cursor-pointer truncate font-bold ${
13722:                          item.status === 'completed' ? 'bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-600' :

13724:                          item.status === 'cancelled' ? 'bg-rose-50 text-rose-600' :
13725:                          'bg-amber-50 text-amber-600'

13736:            })}
13737:          </div>
13738:        </div>

13742:

13745:          <motion.div 
13746:            initial={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.95, y: 20 }} 
13747:            animate={{ opacity: 1, scale: 1, y: 0 }} 
13748:            className="bg-white w-full max-w-2xl rounded-[2rem] shadow-2xl overflow-hidden flex flex-col max-h-[90vh]"
13749:          >
13750:            <div className="px-8 py-6 border-b border-gray-100 flex justify-between items-center bg-gray-50/50">
13751:              <div>
13752:                <h3 className="text-xl font-bold text-ink">Détails de l'Intervention</h3>
13753:                <p className="text-[10px] font-mono text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mt-1">Configuration technique du service</p>
13754:              </div>
13755:              <button onClick={() => setIsEditing(false)} className="p-2 hover:bg-white rounded-xl transition-colors shadow-sm border border-black/5">
13756:                <X className="w-5 h-5 text-gray-400" />
13757:              </button>
13758:            </div>
13759:
13760:            <form onSubmit={handleSave} className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-8 space-y-6">
13761:              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
13762:                <div className="md:col-span-2">
13763:                  <label className="block text-[10px] font-mono font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-2">Titre de l'intervention</label>
13764:                  <input type="text" required value={currentIntervention.title || ''} onChange={e => setCurrentIntervention({...currentIntervention, title: e.target.value})} className="w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-xl border border-gray-100 outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 bg-gray-50/30 font-bold" placeholder="Ex: Maintenance annuelle climatisation" />
