13769:                  <datalist id="service-types">

13772:                    ))}
13773:                  </datalist>

13803:                  </div>

13838:                        }`}
13839:                      >

13841:                      </button>
13842:                    ))}
13843:                  </div>
13844:                </div>

13854:                          currentIntervention.priority === priority 
13855:                            ? (priority === 'urgent' ? 'bg-rose-500 text-white border-rose-500 shadow-lg shadow-rose-500/20' : priority === 'high' ? 'bg-orange-500 text-white border-orange-500 shadow-lg shadow-orange-500/20' : 'bg-ink text-white border-ink shadow-lg shadow-black/20')
13856:                            : 'bg-white text-gray-400 border-gray-100 hover:border-gray-200'
13857:                        }`}
13858:                      >
13859:                        {priority === 'low' ? 'Basse' : priority === 'normal' ? 'Normale' : priority === 'high' ? 'Haute' : 'Urgente'}
13860:                      </button>
13861:                    ))}
13862:                  </div>
13863:                </div>
13864:              </div>
13865:            </form>
13866:
13867:            <div className="p-8 bg-gray-50/50 border-t border-gray-100 flex space-x-4">
13868:              <button type="button" onClick={() => setIsEditing(false)} className="flex-1 py-4 border border-gray-200 rounded-2xl font-bold text-gray-600 hover:bg-white transition-colors">Annuler</button>
13869:              
13870:              {currentIntervention.id && currentIntervention.status === 'completed' && !currentIntervention.billed && (
13871:                <button type="button" onClick={() => handleGenerateInvoice(currentIntervention)} disabled={saving} className="flex-1 py-4 bg-emerald-500 text-white rounded-2xl font-bold hover:bg-emerald-600 transition-all shadow-lg shadow-emerald-500/20 disabled:opacity-50 flex items-center justify-center">
13872:                  <FileText className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
13873:                  Facturer
13874:                </button>
13875:              )}
13876:
13877:              <button onClick={handleSave} disabled={saving} className="flex-[2] py-4 bg-primary text-white rounded-2xl font-bold hover:bg-primary-hover transition-all shadow-lg shadow-primary/20 disabled:opacity-50 flex items-center justify-center">
13878:                {saving ? <Loader2 className="w-5 h-5 animate-spin" /> : 'Enregistrer'}
13879:              </button>
13880:            </div>
13881:          </motion.div>
13882:        </div>
13883:      )}
13884:    </motion.div>
13885:  );
13886:};
13887:
13888:// 2. Project Manager (Gestion de chantier)
13889:const ProjectManager = ({ merchant }: { merchant: Merchant }) => {
13890:  const [isEditing, setIsEditing] = useState(false);
13891:  const [currentProject, setCurrentProject] = useState<any>(null);
13892:  const [selectedProject, setSelectedProject] = useState<any>(null);
13893:  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);
13894:  const [deleteConfirm, setDeleteConfirm] = useState<string | null>(null);
13895:  const [projectLimit, setProjectLimit] = useState(10);
13896:
13897:  const projects = useLiveQuery(() => 
13898:    db.projects.where('merchantId').equals(merchant.id).reverse().sortBy('updatedAt')
13899:  , [merchant.id]) || [];
13900:
13901:  const loading = false;
13902:
13903:  const handleSave = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
13904:    e.preventDefault();
13905:    setSaving(true);
13906:    try {
13907:      await dbService.projects.save({
13908:        ...currentProject,
13909:        merchantId: merchant.id
13910:      });
13911:      toast.success('Projet enregistré');
13912:      setIsEditing(false);
13913:      if (selectedProject?.id === currentProject.id) {
13914:        setSelectedProject({ ...currentProject, merchantId: merchant.id });
13915:      }
13916:    } catch (error) {
13917:      toast.error('Erreur lors de l\'enregistrement');
13918:    } finally {
13919:      setSaving(false);
13920:    }
13921:  };
13922:
13923:  const handleDelete = async (id: string) => {
13924:    setSaving(true);
13925:    try {
13926:      await db.projects.delete(id);
13927:      toast.success('Projet supprimé');
13928:      setDeleteConfirm(null);
13929:      if (selectedProject?.id === id) setSelectedProject(null);
13930:    } catch (error) {
13931:      toast.error('Erreur lors de la suppression');
13932:    } finally {
13933:      setSaving(false);
13934:    }
13935:  };
13936:  
13937:  const handleAddTask = async (columnId: string) => {
13938:    const title = prompt('Titre de la tâche:');
13939:    if (!title) return;
13940:    const newTask = { id: uuidv4(), title, status: columnId, createdAt: Date.now() };
13941:    const tasks = selectedProject.tasks || [];
13942:    const updatedProject = { ...selectedProject, tasks: [...tasks, newTask] };
13943:    setCurrentProject(updatedProject);
13944:    setSaving(true);
13945:    try {
13946:      await dbService.projects.save(updatedProject);
13947:      setSelectedProject(updatedProject);
13948:    } catch (e) {
13949:      toast.error('Erreur');
13950:    } finally {
13951:      setSaving(false);
13952:    }
13953:  };
13954:
13955:  const updateTaskStatus = async (taskId: string, newStatus: string) => {
13956:    if (!selectedProject?.tasks) return;
13957:    const updatedTasks = selectedProject.tasks.map((t:any) => t.id === taskId ? { ...t, status: newStatus } : t);
13958:    const updatedProject = { ...selectedProject, tasks: updatedTasks };
13959:    setSelectedProject(updatedProject);
13960:    await dbService.projects.save(updatedProject);
13961:  };
13962:
13963:  if (selectedProject) {
13964:    const project = projects.find(p => p.id === selectedProject.id) || selectedProject;
13965:    const tasks = project.tasks || [];
13966:    const columns = [
13967:      { id: 'todo', title: 'À Faire', color: 'bg-amber-50', textColor: 'text-amber-600', dot: 'bg-amber-500', border: 'border-amber-200' },
13968:      { id: 'doing', title: 'En Cours', color: 'bg-blue-50', textColor: 'text-blue-600', dot: 'bg-blue-500', border: 'border-blue-200' },
13969:      { id: 'done', title: 'Terminé', color: 'bg-emerald-50', textColor: 'text-emerald-600', dot: 'bg-emerald-500', border: 'border-emerald-200' }
13970:    ];
13971:
13972:    return (
13973:      <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0 }} animate={{ opacity: 1 }} className="space-y-6">
13974:        <div className="flex items-center gap-4 border-b border-gray-100 pb-4">
13975:          <button onClick={() => setSelectedProject(null)} className="p-2 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-xl transition-colors">
13976:            <ArrowRight className="w-5 h-5 text-gray-500 rotate-180" />
13977:          </button>
13978:          <div className="flex-1">
13979:            <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-ink">{project.name}</h2>
13980:            <div className="flex gap-4 text-xs font-mono text-gray-400 mt-1">
13981:              <span className="flex items-center"><MapPin className="w-3 h-3 mr-1" /> {project.location}</span>
13982:              <span className="flex items-center"><Banknote className="w-3 h-3 mr-1" /> {Number(project.budget || 0).toLocaleString()} {merchant.currency}</span>
13983:            </div>
13984:          </div>
13985:          <button onClick={() => { setCurrentProject(project); setIsEditing(true); }} className="px-4 py-2 bg-gray-100 hover:bg-gray-200 rounded-xl text-sm font-bold transition-colors">
13986:            Modifier
13987:          </button>
13988:        </div>
13989:
13990:        <div className="flex gap-6 overflow-x-auto pb-4 snap-x custom-scrollbar min-h-[500px]">
13991:          {columns.map(col => {
13992:            const columnTasks = tasks.filter((t:any) => t.status === col.id);
13993:            return (
13994:              <div 
13995:                key={col.id} 
13996:                className={`flex-shrink-0 w-80 flex flex-col rounded-3xl ${col.color} border ${col.border} snap-start`}
13997:                onDragOver={(e) => e.preventDefault()}
13998:                onDrop={(e) => {
13999:                  const taskId = e.dataTransfer.getData('taskId');
14000:                  if (taskId) updateTaskStatus(taskId, col.id);
14001:                }}
14002:              >
14003:                <div className="p-5 border-b border-black/5 flex justify-between items-center bg-white/50 rounded-t-3xl backdrop-blur-sm">
14004:                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
14005:                    <div className={`w-3 h-3 rounded-full ${col.dot}`} />
14006:                    <h3 className={`font-black text-sm uppercase tracking-widest ${col.textColor}`}>{col.title}</h3>
14007:                  </div>

14009:                </div>

14074:                  </div>

14206:const FleetManager = ({ merchant }: { merchant: Merchant }) => {
14207:  const [isEditing, setIsEditing] = useState(false);
14208:  const [currentVehicle, setCurrentVehicle] = useState<any>(null);
14209:  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);
14210:  const [vehicleLimit, setVehicleLimit] = useState(10);
14211:
14212:  const vehicles = useLiveQuery(() => 
14213:    db.vehicles.where('merchantId').equals(merchant.id).reverse().sortBy('updatedAt')
14214:  , [merchant.id]) || [];
14215:
14216:  const loading = false;
14217:
14218:  const handleSave = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
14219:    e.preventDefault();
14220:    setSaving(true);
14221:    try {
14222:      await dbService.vehicles.save({
14223:        ...currentVehicle,
14224:        merchantId: merchant.id
14225:      });
14226:      toast.success('Véhicule enregistré');
14227:      setIsEditing(false);
14228:    } catch (error) {
14229:      toast.error('Erreur lors de l\'enregistrement');
14230:    } finally {
14231:      setSaving(false);
14232:    }
14233:  };
14234:
14235:  return (
14236:    <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0 }} animate={{ opacity: 1 }} className="space-y-6">
14237:      <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row justify-between items-center gap-4">
14238:        <div>
14239:          <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-ink">Gestion de la Flotte</h2>
14240:          <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 font-mono uppercase tracking-widest mt-1">Véhicules: {vehicles.length.toString().padStart(2, '0')}</p>
14241:        </div>
14242:        <button 
14243:          onClick={() => {
14244:            setCurrentVehicle({ plateNumber: '', model: '', type: 'car', status: 'active', lastMaintenance: '' });
14245:            setIsEditing(true);
14246:          }}
14247:          className="w-full sm:w-auto flex items-center justify-center space-x-2 px-6 py-3 bg-primary text-white rounded-2xl font-bold shadow-lg shadow-primary/20 hover:scale-105 transition-transform"

14254:      {loading ? (

14256:      ) : (

14626:const TeacherGradePortal = ({ merchant }: { merchant: Merchant }) => {
14627:  const { user } = useAuth();
14628:  const [selectedTeacherId, setSelectedTeacherId] = useState('');
14629:  const [selectedClass, setSelectedClass] = useState('');
14630:  const [selectedSubject, setSelectedSubject] = useState('');
14631:  const [term, setTerm] = useState(merchant.academicPeriods?.[0] || 'Trimestre 1');
14632:  const [isSaving, setIsSaving] = useState(false);
14633:  const [lastSaved, setLastSaved] = useState<Date | null>(null);
14634:
14635:  // Read data from IndexedDB
14636:  const classes = useLiveQuery(() => 
14637:    db.classes?.where('merchantId').equals(merchant.id).toArray()
14638:  , [merchant.id]) || [];
14639:
14640:  const students = useLiveQuery(() => 
14641:    db.students?.where('merchantId').equals(merchant.id).toArray()
14642:  , [merchant.id]) || [];
14643:
14644:  const teachers = useLiveQuery(() => 
14645:    db.teachers?.where('merchantId').equals(merchant.id).toArray()
14646:  , [merchant.id]) || [];
14647:
14648:  const storedGrades = useLiveQuery(() => 
14649:    db.grades?.where('merchantId').equals(merchant.id).toArray()
14650:  , [merchant.id]) || [];
14651:
14652:  // Local state map for fast editing
14653:  const [gradesMap, setGradesMap] = useState<Record<string, { devoir1: string, devoir2: string, compo: string }>>({});
14654:  const [hasInitializedTeacher, setHasInitializedTeacher] = useState(false);
14655:  const [isSyncingGrades, setIsSyncingGrades] = useState(false);
14656:
14657:  // Pull latest data (classes, students, teachers, grades, etc.) using safe delta sync on mount
14658:  useEffect(() => {
14659:    if (merchant.id) {
14660:      syncService.syncSchoolPortalData(merchant.id, false)
14661:        .catch(err => console.error("Auto-sync school data error:", err));
14662:    }
14663:  }, [merchant.id]);
14664:
14665:  const handleForceSync = async () => {
14666:    if (!merchant.id) return;
14667:    setIsSyncingGrades(true);
14668:    try {
14669:      // Force sync true bypasses throttles and retrieves any newly added notes/grades/classes directly from the remote database
14670:      await syncService.syncSchoolPortalData(merchant.id, true);
14671:      toast.success("Synchronisation forcée réussie : Les notes et données existantes sont à jour !");
14672:    } catch (err) {
14673:      console.error("Force sync grades failed:", err);
14674:      toast.error("Erreur de synchronisation à distance.");
14675:    } finally {
14676:      setIsSyncingGrades(false);
14677:    }
14678:  };
14679:
14680:  // 1. Resolve selected teacher details
14681:  const selectedTeacherObj = useMemo(() => {
14682:    return teachers.find(t => t.id === selectedTeacherId);
14683:  }, [teachers, selectedTeacherId]);
14684:
14685:  // 2. Class options: Always provide all system classes for full offline capability
14686:  const availableClasses = classes;
14687:
14688:  // Filtered list of teachers for the selected class (including primary and extra classes)
14689:  const filteredTeachersForClass = useMemo(() => {
14690:    if (!selectedClass) return teachers;
14691:    const currentClassObj = classes.find(c => c.id === selectedClass);
14692:    return teachers.filter(t => {
14693:      const isPrimaryClass = t.classId === selectedClass || 
14694:        (currentClassObj?.name && t.className?.trim().toLowerCase() === currentClassObj.name.trim().toLowerCase());
14695:        
14696:      const isExtraClass = Array.isArray(t.extraClasses) && t.extraClasses.some((cl: any) => {
14697:        if (!cl) return false;
14698:        const clStr = cl.toString().trim().toLowerCase();
14699:        return clStr === selectedClass.trim().toLowerCase() || 
14700:          (currentClassObj?.name && clStr === currentClassObj.name.trim().toLowerCase());
14701:      });
14702:
14703:      return isPrimaryClass || isExtraClass;
14704:    });
14705:  }, [teachers, selectedClass, classes]);
14706:
14707:  // 3. Subjects list filtered: based on class subjects and selected teacher's focus subject
14708:  const availableSubjects = useMemo(() => {
14709:    if (!selectedClass) return [];
14710:    const currentClassObj = classes.find(c => c.id === selectedClass);
14711:    
14712:    let baseSubjects: string[] = [];
14713:    if (currentClassObj?.subjects && currentClassObj.subjects.length > 0) {
14714:      baseSubjects = currentClassObj.subjects;
14715:    } else {
14716:      baseSubjects = ['Mathématiques', 'Physique-Chimie', 'SVT', 'Français', 'Histoire-Géographie', 'Anglais', 'Éducation Physique'];
14717:    }
14718:
14719:    if (!selectedTeacherId || !selectedTeacherObj) return baseSubjects;
14720:
14721:    if (selectedTeacherObj.subject) {
14722:      const set = new Set<string>();
14723:      set.add(selectedTeacherObj.subject);
14724:      baseSubjects.forEach(s => set.add(s));
14725:      return Array.from(set);
14726:    }
14727:    return baseSubjects;
14728:  }, [classes, selectedClass, selectedTeacherId, selectedTeacherObj]);
14729:
14730:  // Format class name beautifully and prevent duplicate "Classe : " prefixes
14731:  const formatClassName = (name: string) => {
14732:    if (!name) return '';
14733:    const clean = name.replace(/^classe\s*:\s*/i, '');
14734:    return `Classe : ${clean}`;
14735:  };
14736:
14737:  // Synchronized bidirectional handlers
14738:  const handleTeacherChange = (teacherId: string) => {
14739:    setSelectedTeacherId(teacherId);
14740:    if (teacherId) {
14741:      const teacherObj = teachers.find(t => t.id === teacherId);
14742:      if (teacherObj) {
14743:        if (teacherObj.subject) {
14744:          setSelectedSubject(teacherObj.subject);
14745:        }
14746:        // Match a primary or extra class
14747:        const teacherClass = classes.find(c => 
14748:          c.id === teacherObj.classId || 
14749:          c.name === teacherObj.className
14750:        ) || (teacherObj.extraClasses && classes.find(c => teacherObj.extraClasses.includes(c.id) || teacherObj.extraClasses.includes(c.name)));
14751:
14752:        if (teacherClass) {
14753:          setSelectedClass(teacherClass.id);
14754:        }
14755:      }
14756:    }
14757:  };
14758:
14759:  const handleSubjectChange = (subject: string) => {
14760:    setSelectedSubject(subject);
14761:    if (subject) {
14762:      const classObj = classes.find(c => c.id === selectedClass);
14763:      // Filter teachers by class first
14764:      const classTeachers = teachers.filter(t => {
14765:        const isPrimaryClass = t.classId === selectedClass || 
14766:          (classObj?.name && t.className?.trim().toLowerCase() === classObj.name.trim().toLowerCase());
14767:          
14768:        const isExtraClass = Array.isArray(t.extraClasses) && t.extraClasses.some((cl: any) => {
14769:          if (!cl) return false;
14770:          const clStr = cl.toString().trim().toLowerCase();
14771:          return clStr === selectedClass.trim().toLowerCase() || 
14772:            (classObj?.name && clStr === classObj.name.trim().toLowerCase());
14773:        });
14774:
14775:        return isPrimaryClass || isExtraClass;
14776:      });
14777:
14778:      // Find teacher teaching this subject in the class
14779:      const matchingTeacher = classTeachers.find(t => 
14780:        (t.subject || '').trim().toLowerCase() === subject.trim().toLowerCase()
14781:      );
14782:
14783:      if (matchingTeacher) {
14784:        setSelectedTeacherId(matchingTeacher.id);
14785:      } else {
14786:        setSelectedTeacherId(''); // Non attribué
14787:      }
14788:    }
14789:  };
14790:
14791:  const handleClassChange = (classId: string) => {
14792:    setSelectedClass(classId);
14793:    if (classId) {
14794:      const classObj = classes.find(c => c.id === classId);
14795:      
14796:      // Filter teachers by this class first
14797:      const classTeachers = teachers.filter(t => {
14798:        const isPrimaryClass = t.classId === classId || 
14799:          (classObj?.name && t.className?.trim().toLowerCase() === classObj.name.trim().toLowerCase());
14800:          
14801:        const isExtraClass = Array.isArray(t.extraClasses) && t.extraClasses.some((cl: any) => {
14802:          if (!cl) return false;
14803:          const clStr = cl.toString().trim().toLowerCase();
14804:          return clStr === classId.trim().toLowerCase() || 
14805:            (classObj?.name && clStr === classObj.name.trim().toLowerCase());
14806:        });
14807:
14808:        return isPrimaryClass || isExtraClass;
14809:      });
14810:
14811:      // Find a teacher assigned to this class and preferably teaching the current subject, or any subject
14812:      const matchingTeacher = classTeachers.find(t => 
14813:        selectedSubject && (t.subject || '').trim().toLowerCase() === selectedSubject.trim().toLowerCase()
14814:      ) || classTeachers[0];
14815:
14816:      if (matchingTeacher) {
14817:        setSelectedTeacherId(matchingTeacher.id);
14818:        if (matchingTeacher.subject) {
14819:          setSelectedSubject(matchingTeacher.subject);
14820:        }
14821:      } else {
14822:        setSelectedTeacherId(''); // Non attribué
14823:      }
14824:    }
14825:  };
14826:
14827:  // Populate dynamic default teacher once on initial load to avoid overriding manual selection of "Saisie Directe Admin"
14828:  useEffect(() => {
14829:    if (teachers.length > 0 && !hasInitializedTeacher) {
14830:      setSelectedTeacherId(teachers[0].id);
14831:      setHasInitializedTeacher(true);
14832:    }
14833:  }, [teachers, hasInitializedTeacher]);
14834:
14835:  // Handle cascading dropdown state reset on class change
14836:  useEffect(() => {
14837:    if (availableClasses.length > 0) {
14838:      const isStillAvailable = availableClasses.some(c => c.id === selectedClass);
14839:      if (!selectedClass || !isStillAvailable) {
14840:        setSelectedClass(availableClasses[0].id);
14841:      }
14842:    } else {
14843:      setSelectedClass('');
14844:    }
14845:  }, [availableClasses, selectedClass]);
14846:
14847:  // Handle cascading dropdown state reset on subject change
14848:  useEffect(() => {
14849:    if (selectedClass) {
14850:      const isStillAvailable = availableSubjects.includes(selectedSubject);
14851:      if (!selectedSubject || !isStillAvailable) {
14852:        setSelectedSubject(availableSubjects[0] || '');
14853:      }
14854:    } else {
14855:      setSelectedSubject('');
14856:    }
14857:  }, [selectedClass, availableSubjects, selectedSubject]);
14858:
14859:  // Filter student records enrolled in the active selected class with highly robust matching
14860:  const classStudents = useMemo(() => {
14861:    if (!selectedClass) return [];
14862:    const currentClassObj = classes.find(c => c.id === selectedClass);
14863:    return students.filter((s: any) => {
14864:      const studentClassVal = (s.classId || s.class_id || s.class || s.grade || '').toString().trim().toLowerCase();
14865:      const selClassId = selectedClass.trim().toLowerCase();
14866:      const selClassName = currentClassObj ? currentClassObj.name.trim().toLowerCase() : '';
14867:      
14868:      const cleanClassVal = studentClassVal.replace(/^classe\s*:\s*/, '');
14869:      const cleanClassName = selClassName.replace(/^classe\s*:\s*/, '');
14870:      
14871:      return studentClassVal === selClassId || 
14872:             (selClassName && studentClassVal === selClassName) ||
14873:             (cleanClassName && cleanClassVal === cleanClassName);
14874:    });
14875:  }, [students, selectedClass, classes]);
14876:
14877:  useEffect(() => {
14878:    // Populate form data maps from historical grade inputs synchronised from the database with maximum robustness
14879:    const initial: Record<string, { devoir1: string, devoir2: string, compo: string }> = {};
14880:    classStudents.forEach((s: any) => {
14881:      const existing = storedGrades.find(g => {
14882:        const gStudent = (g.studentId || g.student_id || '').toString().trim().toLowerCase();
14883:        const gSubject = (g.subjectId || g.subject_id || g.subject || '').toString().trim().toLowerCase();
14884:        const gTerm = (g.term || g.periode || '').toString().trim().toLowerCase();
14885:        
14886:        const targetStudent = s.id.toString().trim().toLowerCase();
14887:        const targetSubject = (selectedSubject || '').toString().trim().toLowerCase();
14888:        const targetTerm = (term || '').toString().trim().toLowerCase();
14889:        
14890:        return gStudent === targetStudent && gSubject === targetSubject && gTerm === targetTerm;
14891:      });
14892:
14893:      if (existing) {
14894:        initial[s.id] = { 
14895:          devoir1: existing.devoir1 !== undefined && existing.devoir1 !== null ? existing.devoir1.toString() : '', 
14896:          devoir2: existing.devoir2 !== undefined && existing.devoir2 !== null ? existing.devoir2.toString() : '', 
14897:          compo: existing.compo !== undefined && existing.compo !== null ? existing.compo.toString() : '' 
14898:        };
14899:      } else {
14900:        initial[s.id] = { devoir1: '', devoir2: '', compo: '' };
14901:      }
14902:    });
14903:    setGradesMap(initial);
14904:  }, [selectedClass, selectedSubject, term, classStudents, storedGrades]);
14905:
14906:  const handleGradeChange = (studentId: string, field: 'devoir1' | 'devoir2' | 'compo', value: string) => {
14907:    if (value !== '' && (isNaN(Number(value)) || Number(value) < 0 || Number(value) > 20)) {
14908:      toast.error('La note doit être entre 0 et 20');
14909:      return;
14910:    }
14911:
14912:    setGradesMap(prev => ({
14913:      ...prev,
14914:      [studentId]: {
14915:        ...prev[studentId],
14916:        [field]: value
14917:      }
14918:    }));
14919:  };
14920:
14921:  const autoSave = async () => {
14922:    if(!selectedClass || !selectedSubject) return;
14923:    setIsSaving(true);
14924:    try {
14925:      const updates = Object.entries(gradesMap).map(([studentId, scores]) => {
14926:        const existing = storedGrades.find(g => {
14927:          const gStudent = (g.studentId || g.student_id || '').toString().trim().toLowerCase();
14928:          const gSubject = (g.subjectId || g.subject_id || g.subject || '').toString().trim().toLowerCase();
14929:          const gTerm = (g.term || g.periode || '').toString().trim().toLowerCase();
14930:          
14931:          const targetStudent = studentId.toString().trim().toLowerCase();
14932:          const targetSubject = (selectedSubject || '').toString().trim().toLowerCase();
14933:          const targetTerm = (term || '').toString().trim().toLowerCase();
14934:          
14935:          return gStudent === targetStudent && gSubject === targetSubject && gTerm === targetTerm;
14936:        });
14937:
14938:        return {
14939:          id: existing ? existing.id : uuidv4(),
14940:          merchantId: merchant.id,
14941:          studentId,
14942:          classId: selectedClass,
14943:          subjectId: selectedSubject,
14944:          teacherId: selectedTeacherId || existing?.teacherId || '',
14945:          term,
14946:          devoir1: scores.devoir1,
14947:          devoir2: scores.devoir2,
14948:          compo: scores.compo,
14949:          updatedAt: new Date().toISOString()
14950:        };
14951:      });
14952:
14953:      await db.grades.bulkPut(updates);
14954:      try {
14955:        const { firestoreService } = await import('../services/firestoreService');
14956:        for (const up of updates) {
14957:          await firestoreService.save('grades', up);
14958:        }
14959:      } catch(e) {}
14960:      setLastSaved(new Date());
14961:    } catch (e) {
14962:      console.error(e);
14963:    }
14964:    setIsSaving(false);
14965:  };
14966:
14967:  // Run periodic automated background sync when values are written by the user
14968:  useEffect(() => {
14969:    const handler = setTimeout(() => {
14970:      const hasData = Object.values(gradesMap).some(g => g.devoir1 || g.devoir2 || g.compo);
14971:      if (hasData) {
14972:        autoSave();
14973:      }
14974:    }, 2000);
14975:    return () => clearTimeout(handler);
14976:  }, [gradesMap]);
14977:
14978:  const triggerManualSubmit = async () => {
14979:    await autoSave();
14980:    toast.success("Toutes les notes de ce niveau ont été transmises à la Direction générale !");
14981:  };
14982:
14983:  const calculateAverage = (gradeObj: { devoir1: string, devoir2: string, compo: string }) => {
14984:    if(!gradeObj) return '-';
14985:    let dev1 = parseFloat(gradeObj.devoir1);
14986:    let dev2 = parseFloat(gradeObj.devoir2);
14987:    let compo = parseFloat(gradeObj.compo);
14988:
14989:    let devAvg = 0;
14990:    let countDev = 0;
14991:    if (!isNaN(dev1)) { devAvg += dev1; countDev++; }
14992:    if (!isNaN(dev2)) { devAvg += dev2; countDev++; }
14993:    
14994:    if (countDev > 0) devAvg = devAvg / countDev;
14995:
14996:    if (!isNaN(compo)) {
14997:      if (countDev > 0) return ((devAvg + (compo * 2)) / 3).toFixed(2);
14998:      return compo.toFixed(2);
14999:    }
15000:    
15001:    return countDev > 0 ? devAvg.toFixed(2) : '-';
15002:  };
15003:
15004:  const getAppreciation = (avgStr: string) => {
15005:    if (avgStr === '-') return '';
15006:    const avg = parseFloat(avgStr);
15007:    if (avg >= 16) return <span className="bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 border border-emerald-200 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-black shadow-sm inline-flex items-center gap-1">✨ Excellent</span>;
15008:    if (avg >= 14) return <span className="bg-blue-50 text-blue-700 border border-blue-200 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-black shadow-sm inline-flex items-center gap-1">🌸 Très Bien</span>;
15009:    if (avg >= 12) return <span className="bg-indigo-50 text-indigo-700 border border-indigo-200 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-black shadow-sm inline-flex items-center gap-1">👍 Assez Bien</span>;
15010:    if (avg >= 10) return <span className="bg-gray-50 text-gray-700 border border-gray-200 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-black shadow-sm inline-flex items-center gap-1">Passable</span>;
15011:    if (avg >= 8) return <span className="bg-orange-50 text-orange-700 border border-orange-200 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-black shadow-sm inline-flex items-center gap-1">⚠️ Insuffisant</span>;
15012:    return <span className="bg-rose-50 text-rose-700 border border-rose-200 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-black shadow-sm inline-flex items-center gap-1">🚨 Médiocre</span>;
15013:  };
15014:
15015:  return (
15016:    <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0 }} animate={{ opacity: 1 }} className="space-y-6">
15017:      <div className="bg-white rounded-[2rem] shadow-sm border border-gray-100 overflow-hidden min-h-[600px] flex flex-col">
15018:        <div className="bg-gradient-to-r from-indigo-900 to-indigo-800 p-6 md:p-8 text-white flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center justify-between gap-4">
15019:          <div>
15020:            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
15021:              <span className="bg-indigo-500/30 text-indigo-100 text-xs font-bold px-3 py-1 rounded-full uppercase tracking-widest border border-indigo-400/30">
15022:                Professeur
15023:              </span>
15024:              <span className="text-indigo-200 text-sm">Mode Hors-ligne Actif</span>
15025:            </div>
15026:            <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold">Saisie des Notes</h2>
15027:            <p className="text-indigo-200 mt-1">Ajoutez vos notes à distance, synchronisation automatique dès le retour de la connexion.</p>
15028:          </div>
15029:          
15030:          <div className="flex flex-col sm:grid sm:grid-cols-2 gap-2 bg-indigo-950/40 p-3 rounded-[1.5rem] border border-indigo-500/15 max-w-lg w-full sm:w-auto">
15031:            {/* 1. SELECTION DE LA CLASSE CONCERNÉE - PREMIÈRE POSITION */}
15032:            <select 
15033:              value={selectedClass} 
15034:              onChange={e => handleClassChange(e.target.value)}
15035:              className="bg-white text-indigo-950 font-black rounded-xl px-4 py-2.5 text-xs cursor-pointer outline-none shadow-sm w-full transition-all hover:bg-slate-50 border border-slate-100"
15036:            >
15037:              <option value="">Sélectionner Classe</option>
15038:              {availableClasses.map((c: any) => (
15039:                <option key={c.id} value={c.id}>{formatClassName(c.name)}</option>
15040:              ))}
15041:            </select>
15042:
15043:            {/* 2. SYSTEME DE PERIODE DIRECTE */}
15044:            <select 
15045:              value={term} 
15046:              onChange={e => setTerm(e.target.value)}
15047:              className="bg-white text-indigo-950 font-black rounded-xl px-4 py-2.5 text-xs cursor-pointer outline-none shadow-sm w-full transition-all hover:bg-slate-50 border border-slate-100"
15048:            >
15049:              {(merchant.academicPeriods || ['Trimestre 1', 'Trimestre 2', 'Trimestre 3']).map(p => (
15050:                <option key={p} value={p}>{p}</option>
15051:              ))}
15052:            </select>
15053:
15054:            {/* 3. SELECTION DE LA MATIÈRE À EVALUATION DE NOTES */}
15055:            <select 
15056:              value={selectedSubject} 
15057:              onChange={e => handleSubjectChange(e.target.value)}
15058:              className="bg-white text-indigo-950 font-black rounded-xl px-4 py-2.5 text-xs cursor-pointer outline-none shadow-sm w-full transition-all hover:bg-slate-50 border border-slate-100"
15059:            >
15060:              <option value="">Sélectionner Matière</option>
15061:              {availableSubjects.map((sub: string) => (
15062:                <option key={sub} value={sub}>
15063:                  {sub}
15064:                </option>
15065:              ))}
15066:            </select>
15067:
15068:            {/* 4. SELECTION DE L'ENSEIGNANT RECONNU SUR LE DOSSIER */}
15069:            <select 
15070:              value={selectedTeacherId} 
15071:              onChange={e => handleTeacherChange(e.target.value)}
15072:              className="bg-white text-indigo-950 font-black rounded-xl px-4 py-2.5 text-xs cursor-pointer outline-none shadow-sm w-full transition-all hover:bg-slate-50 border border-slate-100"
15073:            >
15074:              <option value="">
15075:                {selectedSubject && !filteredTeachersForClass.some(t => (t.subject || '').trim().toLowerCase() === selectedSubject.trim().toLowerCase())
15076:                  ? "Enseignant non attribué"
15077:                  : "Saisie Directe Admin"}
15078:              </option>
15079:              {filteredTeachersForClass.map(t => (
15080:                <option key={t.id} value={t.id}>
15081:                  Enseignant : {t.firstName} {t.lastName || ''}
15082:                </option>
15083:              ))}
15084:            </select>
15085:          </div>
15086:        </div>
15087:
15088:        <div className="bg-indigo-50/50 px-6 py-3 border-b border-indigo-100 flex items-center justify-between">
15089:          <div className="flex items-center gap-4 text-sm font-medium text-gray-600">
15090:            <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
15091:              {isSaving || isSyncingGrades ? (
15092:                <RefreshCw className="w-4 h-4 text-indigo-500 animate-spin" />
15093:              ) : (
15094:                <CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-emerald-500" />
15095:              )}
15096:              {isSyncingGrades ? 'Synchronisation forcée en cours...' : isSaving ? 'Enregistrement automatique...' : lastSaved ? `Dernière sauvegarde locale : ${lastSaved.toLocaleTimeString()}` : 'Prêt pour la saisie'}
15097:            </div>
15098:          </div>
15099:          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
15100:            <button
15101:              onClick={handleForceSync}
15102:              disabled={isSyncingGrades}
15103:              className="flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 bg-white hover:bg-slate-50 text-indigo-700 border border-indigo-200 rounded-xl text-xs font-bold shadow-sm transition-colors disabled:opacity-50"
15104:              title="Actualise et récupère toutes les notes déjà sauvegardées sur le serveur"
15105:            >
15106:              <RefreshCw className={`w-3.5 h-3.5 ${isSyncingGrades ? 'animate-spin' : ''}`} />
15107:              Récupérer les notes existantes
15108:            </button>
15109:            <button 
15110:              onClick={triggerManualSubmit}
15111:              className="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 bg-indigo-600 hover:bg-indigo-700 text-white rounded-xl text-xs font-bold shadow-md transition-colors"
15112:            >
15113:              <Save className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
15114:              Soumettre à la Direction
15115:            </button>
15116:          </div>
15117:        </div>
15118:
15119:        <div className="flex-1 overflow-auto p-0">
15120:          <table className="w-full text-left border-collapse">
15121:            <thead>
15122:              <tr className="bg-gray-50 border-b border-gray-200">
15123:                <th className="font-bold text-gray-600 p-4 sticky top-0 bg-gray-50 z-10 w-1/3">Élève</th>
15124:                <th className="font-bold text-gray-600 p-4 text-center sticky top-0 bg-gray-50 z-10">Interrogation 1 (/20)</th>
15125:                <th className="font-bold text-gray-600 p-4 text-center sticky top-0 bg-gray-50 z-10">Interrogation 2 (/20)</th>
15126:                <th className="font-bold text-indigo-800 p-4 text-center sticky top-0 bg-indigo-50 z-10 border-x border-indigo-100">Composition (/20)</th>
15127:                <th className="font-bold text-gray-600 p-4 text-center sticky top-0 bg-gray-50 z-10">Moyenne (/20)</th>
15128:                <th className="font-bold text-gray-600 p-4 sticky top-0 bg-gray-50 z-10">Décision IA / Appréciation</th>
15129:              </tr>
15130:            </thead>
15131:            <tbody>
15132:              {classStudents.length === 0 ? (
15133:                <tr>
15134:                  <td colSpan={6} className="p-12 text-center text-gray-450 font-semibold bg-gray-50/20">
15135:                    <div className="text-2xl mb-2">📁</div>
15136:                    Aucun élève trouvé pour les sélections actuelles.<br />
15137:                    Veuillez ajouter des dossiers d'élèves dans l'onglet Administration ou associer la classe concernée.
15138:                  </td>
15139:                </tr>
15140:              ) : classStudents.map((student: any) => {
15141:                const g = gradesMap[student.id] || { devoir1: '', devoir2: '', compo: '' };
15142:                const avg = calculateAverage(g);
15143:                const appreciation = getAppreciation(avg);
15144:
15145:                return (
15146:                  <tr key={student.id} className="border-b border-gray-50 hover:bg-indigo-50/30 transition-colors">
15147:                    <td className="p-4">
15148:                      <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
15149:                        <div className="w-9 h-9 rounded-full bg-indigo-100 text-indigo-850 font-black flex items-center justify-center text-sm shadow-inner uppercase">
15150:                          {student.firstName?.[0] || ''}{student.lastName?.[0] || ''}
15151:                        </div>
15152:                        <div>
15153:                          <div className="font-bold text-gray-900">{student.firstName} {student.lastName}</div>
15154:                          <div className="text-[10px] text-gray-500 font-mono">MAT-{student.id.substring(0, 8).toUpperCase()}</div>
15155:                        </div>
15156:                      </div>
15157:                    </td>
15158:                    <td className="p-4 text-center">
15159:                      <input 
15160:                        type="number" 
15161:                        min="0" max="20"
15162:                        value={g.devoir1}
15163:                        onChange={e => handleGradeChange(student.id, 'devoir1', e.target.value)}
15164:                        className="w-16 h-10 text-center font-mono font-bold bg-gray-50 border border-gray-200 rounded-lg focus:bg-white focus:border-indigo-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-200 outline-none transition-all"
15165:                        placeholder="-"
15166:                      />
15167:                    </td>
15168:                    <td className="p-4 text-center">
15169:                      <input 
15170:                        type="number" 
15171:                        min="0" max="20"
15172:                        value={g.devoir2}
15173:                        onChange={e => handleGradeChange(student.id, 'devoir2', e.target.value)}
15174:                        className="w-16 h-10 text-center font-mono font-bold bg-gray-50 border border-gray-200 rounded-lg focus:bg-white focus:border-indigo-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-200 outline-none transition-all"
15175:                        placeholder="-"
15176:                      />
15177:                    </td>
15178:                    <td className="p-4 text-center bg-indigo-50/30 border-x border-indigo-50">
15179:                      <input 
15180:                        type="number" 
15181:                        min="0" max="20"
15182:                        value={g.compo}
15183:                        onChange={e => handleGradeChange(student.id, 'compo', e.target.value)}
15184:                        className="w-20 h-10 text-center font-mono font-bold text-indigo-700 bg-white border border-indigo-200 rounded-lg focus:border-indigo-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-200 outline-none transition-all"
15185:                        placeholder="-"
15186:                      />
15187:                    </td>
15188:                    <td className="p-4 text-center">
15189:                      <div className={`font-mono font-black text-base ${avg !== '-' && parseFloat(avg) < 10 ? 'text-red-500 animate-pulse' : 'text-slate-800'}`}>
15190:                        {avg}
15191:                      </div>
15192:                    </td>
15193:                    <td className="p-4 text-sm">
15194:                      {appreciation}
15195:                    </td>
15196:                  </tr>
15197:                );
15198:              })}
15199:            </tbody>
15200:          </table>
15201:        </div>
15202:        
15203:        <div className="bg-gray-50 p-4 border-t border-gray-200 text-xs text-gray-500 flex items-center gap-2">
15204:          <AlertCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-indigo-500" />
15205:          Les données de saisie rapide sont issues de l'ERP connecté et reliées aux dossiers d'inscription des élèves et des enseignants.
15206:        </div>
15207:      </div>
15208:    </motion.div>
15209:  );
15210:};
15211:
15212:export const TeacherDashboardSpace = ({ 
15213:  teacher, 
15214:  merchant, 
15215:  classes, 
15216:  students, 
15217:  storedGrades,
15218:  onClose 
15219:}: { 
15220:  teacher: any; 
15221:  merchant: Merchant; 
15222:  classes: any[]; 
15223:  students: any[]; 
15224:  storedGrades: any[];
15225:  onClose: () => void; 
15226:}) => {
15227:  const [selectedClassId, setSelectedClassId] = useState<string>(teacher.classId || '');
15228:  const [term, setTerm] = useState<string>(merchant.academicPeriods?.[0] || 'Trimestre 1');
15229:  const [isSaving, setIsSaving] = useState(false);
15230:  const [lastSaved, setLastSaved] = useState<Date | null>(null);
15231:
15232:  // Homework state
15233:  const [homeworkTitle, setHomeworkTitle] = useState('');
15234:  const [homeworkDesc, setHomeworkDesc] = useState('');
15235:  const [homeworkDueDate, setHomeworkDueDate] = useState('');
15236:  const [submittingHomework, setSubmittingHomework] = useState(false);
15237:
15238:  // Active view tab inside the portal: grades, homework or parent notifications
15239:  const [teacherTab, setTeacherTab] = useState<'grades' | 'homework' | 'notifications' | 'schedule'>('grades');
15240:
15241:  // Notifications & Contacts parents state
15242:  const [selectedStudentIds, setSelectedStudentIds] = useState<string[]>([]);
15243:  const [notifType, setNotifType] = useState<'absence' | 'grades' | 'custom'>('absence');
15244:  const [customMsg, setCustomMsg] = useState('');
15245:  const [sendingNotifs, setSendingNotifs] = useState(false);
15246:  const [notifSearchQuery, setNotifSearchQuery] = useState('');
15247:  const [sentLogsExpanded, setSentLogsExpanded] = useState(false);
15248:  const [pendingDispatches, setPendingDispatches] = useState<any[]>([]);
15249:
15250:  const dbParents = useLiveQuery(() => 
15251:    db.parents?.where('merchantId').equals(merchant.id).toArray()
15252:  , [merchant.id]) || [];
15253:
15254:  const todayStr = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];
15255:  const todayAttendances = useLiveQuery(() => 
15256:    db.attendance?.where('merchantId').equals(merchant.id).and(a => a.date === todayStr).toArray()
15257:  , [merchant.id, todayStr]) || [];
15258:
15259:  const studentAttendanceStatus = useMemo(() => {
15260:    const map: Record<string, string> = {};
15261:    todayAttendances.forEach((a: any) => {
15262:      map[a.studentId] = a.status; // 'absent', 'late', 'present'
15263:    });
15264:    return map;
15265:  }, [todayAttendances]);
15266:
15267:  // Dynamic calculation of the active assignment (class, subject, filiere) matching selectedClassId
15268:  const activeAssignment = useMemo(() => {
15269:    if (selectedClassId === teacher.classId) {
15270:      return {
15271:        classId: teacher.classId,
15272:        className: teacher.className,
15273:        filiere: teacher.filiere,
15274:        subject: teacher.subject
15275:      };
15276:    }
15277:    const extras = teacher.extraClasses || [];
15278:    const found = extras.find((ec: any) => ec.classId === selectedClassId);
15279:    if (found) return found;
15280:    return {
15281:      classId: selectedClassId,
15282:      className: '',
15283:      filiere: teacher.filiere,
15284:      subject: teacher.subject
15285:    };
15286:  }, [teacher, selectedClassId]);
15287:
15288:  const activeSubject = activeAssignment.subject;
15289:  const activeFiliere = activeAssignment.filiere;
15290:
15291:  const getPrebuiltMessage = useCallback((studentName: string, studentAvg: string, type: 'absence' | 'grades' | 'custom') => {
15292:    if (type === 'absence') {
15293:      return `Cher Parent, nous vous informons que votre enfant ${studentName} est absent ce jour en cours de ${activeSubject}. Merci de contacter la Direction de ${merchant.name || 'ACOM Éducation'}. Cordialement, M./Mme ${teacher.lastName}.`;
15294:    }
15295:    if (type === 'grades') {
15296:      const avgFormatted = studentAvg !== '-' ? `${studentAvg}/20` : 'non évaluée';
15297:      return `Cher Parent, nous vous transmettons la moyenne de ${studentName} en ${activeSubject} pour le ${term} : Elle est de ${avgFormatted}. Merci d'encourager ses efforts continus. Cordialement, M./Mme ${teacher.lastName}.`;
15298:    }
15299:    return customMsg || `Cher Parent, message de l'enseignant M./Mme ${teacher.lastName} concernant votre enfant ${studentName} : [votre message]`;
15300:  }, [activeSubject, merchant.name, teacher.lastName, term, customMsg]);
15301:
15302:  // The subset of classes that this teacher is actually assigned to
15303:  const assignedClasses = useMemo(() => {
15304:    const list: any[] = [];
15305:    if (teacher.classId) {
15306:      const primaryClState = classes.find((cl: any) => cl.id === teacher.classId);
15307:      if (primaryClState) {
15308:        list.push(primaryClState);
15309:      } else {
15310:        list.push({ id: teacher.classId, name: teacher.className, level: teacher.filiere });
15311:      }
15312:    }
15313:    if (teacher.extraClasses && teacher.extraClasses.length > 0) {
15314:      teacher.extraClasses.forEach((ec: any) => {
15315:        if (!list.some(cl => cl.id === ec.classId)) {
15316:          const matched = classes.find((cl: any) => cl.id === ec.classId);
15317:          if (matched) {
15318:            list.push(matched);
15319:          } else {
15320:            list.push({ id: ec.classId, name: ec.className, level: ec.filiere });
15321:          }
15322:        }
15323:      });
15324:    }
15325:    return list;
15326:  }, [teacher, classes]);
15327:
15328:  // Load communications (for homework persistence)
15329:  const classCommunications = useLiveQuery(() => 
15330:    db.communications?.where('merchantId').equals(merchant.id).toArray()
15331:  , [merchant.id]) || [];
15332:
15333:  // Load homeworks (for Cahier de Texte)
15334:  const allHomeworks = useLiveQuery(() =>

15336:  , [merchant.id]) || [];
15337:

15340:      h.classId === selectedClassId && 
15341:      (h.subjectName === activeSubject || h.subject === activeSubject || h.subjectId === activeSubject)
15342:    );
15343:  }, [allHomeworks, selectedClassId, activeSubject]);
15344:
15345:  const activeClassObj = useMemo(() => {
15346:    return assignedClasses.find((c: any) => c.id === selectedClassId) || classes.find((c: any) => c.id === selectedClassId);
15347:  }, [classes, assignedClasses, selectedClassId]);
15348:
15349:  // Filter students belonging strictly to the selected class
15350:  const classStudents = useMemo(() => {
15351:    if (!selectedClassId) return [];
15352:    return students.filter((s: any) => 
15353:      s.classId === selectedClassId || 
15354:      s.gradeId === selectedClassId || 
15355:      (s.grade && s.grade.toLowerCase() === activeClassObj?.name?.toLowerCase())
15356:    );
15357:  }, [students, selectedClassId, activeClassObj]);
15358:
15359:  const [localGradesMap, setLocalGradesMap] = useState<Record<string, { devoir1: string, devoir2: string, compo: string }>>({});
15360:
15361:  useEffect(() => {
15362:    if (selectedClassId) {
15363:      const initialGrades: any = {};
15364:      classStudents.forEach((student: any) => {
15365:        const gradeRecord = storedGrades.find(g => 
15366:          g.studentId === student.id && 
15367:          g.classId === selectedClassId && 
15368:          g.subjectId === activeSubject && 
15369:          g.term === term
15370:        );
15371:        initialGrades[student.id] = {
15372:          devoir1: gradeRecord?.devoir1 || '',
15373:          devoir2: gradeRecord?.devoir2 || '',
15374:          compo: gradeRecord?.compo || ''
15375:        };
15376:      });
15377:      setLocalGradesMap(initialGrades);
15378:    }
15379:  }, [selectedClassId, classStudents, storedGrades, term, activeSubject]);
15380:
15381:  const updateStudentGrade = (studentId: string, field: 'devoir1' | 'devoir2' | 'compo', val: string) => {
15382:    if (val !== '' && (isNaN(Number(val)) || Number(val) < 0 || Number(val) > 20)) {
15383:       toast.error("La note doit être un nombre entre 0 et 20");
15384:       return;
15385:    }
15386:    setLocalGradesMap(prev => ({
15387:      ...prev,
15388:      [studentId]: {
15389:        ...prev[studentId],
15390:        [field]: val
15391:      }
15392:    }));
15393:  };
15394:
15395:  const handleSaveGrades = async () => {
15396:    if (!selectedClassId) return;
15397:    setIsSaving(true);
15398:    try {
15399:      const updates = Object.entries(localGradesMap).map(([studentId, scores]) => {
15400:        const existing = storedGrades.find(g => 
15401:          g.studentId === studentId && 
15402:          g.classId === selectedClassId && 
15403:          g.subjectId === activeSubject && 
15404:          g.term === term
15405:        );
15406:        return {
15407:          id: existing ? existing.id : uuidv4(),
15408:          merchantId: merchant.id,
15409:          studentId,
15410:          classId: selectedClassId,
15411:          subjectId: activeSubject,
15412:          term,
15413:          devoir1: scores.devoir1,
15414:          devoir2: scores.devoir2,
15415:          compo: scores.compo,
15416:          updatedAt: new Date().toISOString()
15417:        };
15418:      });
15419:      await db.grades.bulkPut(updates);
15420:      try {
15421:        const { firestoreService } = await import('../services/firestoreService');
15422:        for (const up of updates) {
15423:          await firestoreService.save('grades', up);
15424:        }
15425:      } catch(e) {}
15426:      setLastSaved(new Date());
15427:      toast.success("Notes de la classe enregistrées avec succès !");
15428:    } catch (err) {
15429:      console.error(err);
15430:      toast.error("Erreur de sauvegarde des notes.");
15431:    } finally {
15432:      setIsSaving(false);
15433:    }
15434:  };
15435:
15436:  const handleAddHomework = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
15437:    e.preventDefault();
15438:    if (!homeworkTitle.trim() || !homeworkDueDate) {
15439:      toast.error("Veuillez remplir le titre et la date d'échéance");
15440:      return;
15441:    }
15442:    setSubmittingHomework(true);
15443:    try {
15444:      const payload = {
15445:        id: uuidv4(),
15446:        merchantId: merchant.id,
15447:        title: homeworkTitle,
15448:        description: homeworkDesc, // mapped appropriately for StudentPortal
15449:        targetAudience: 'students_classes',
15450:        classId: selectedClassId,
15451:        subjectName: activeSubject, // mapped appropriately for StudentPortal
15452:        subjectId: activeSubject,
15453:        dueDate: homeworkDueDate,
15454:        syncStatus: 'synced',
15455:        updatedAt: new Date().toISOString()
15456:      };
15457:      
15458:      await db.homeworks.put(payload);
15459:      
15460:      try {
15461:        const { firestoreService } = await import('../services/firestoreService');
15462:        await firestoreService.save('homeworks', payload);
15463:      } catch (fsErr) {
15464:        console.warn("Could not push homework to Firestore", fsErr);
15465:      }
15466:
15467:      toast.success("Cahier de Texte programmé et visible des élèves & parents !");
15468:      setHomeworkTitle('');
15469:      setHomeworkDesc('');
15470:      setHomeworkDueDate('');
15471:    } catch (err) {
15472:      toast.error("Erreur de programmation");
15473:    } finally {
15474:      setSubmittingHomework(false);
15475:    }
15476:  };
15477:
15478:  const handleDeleteHomework = async (id: string) => {
15479:    try {
15480:      await db.homeworks.delete(id);
15481:      try {
15482:        const { firestoreService } = await import('../services/firestoreService');
15483:        await firestoreService.delete('homeworks', id);
15484:      } catch (fsErr) {
15485:        console.warn("Could not delete homework from Firestore", fsErr);
15486:      }
15487:      toast.success("Cahier de Texte retiré");
15488:    } catch (e) {
15489:      toast.error("Erreur de suppression");
15490:    }
15491:  };
15492:
15493:  const getPersonalizedMessageForStudent = (student: any) => {
15494:    let template = customMsg || "";
15495:    if (!template) {
15496:      if (notifType === 'absence') {
15497:        template = `Cher Parent, nous vous informons que votre enfant {Nom} est absent ce jour en cours de {Matiere}. Merci de contacter la Direction de ${merchant.name || 'ACOM Éducation'}. Cordialement.`;
15498:      } else if (notifType === 'grades') {
15499:        template = `Cher Parent, nous vous transmettons la moyenne de {Nom} en {Matiere} pour le {Periode} : Elle est de {Note}/20. Merci de suivre ses efforts. Cordialement.`;
15500:      } else {
15501:        template = `Cher Parent, note de l'enseignant M./Mme {Prof} concernant {Nom} : [votre message]`;
15502:      }
15503:    }
15504:    
15505:    const rowScores = localGradesMap[student.id] || { devoir1: '', devoir2: '', compo: '' };
15506:    const studentAvg = calculateStudentAvg(rowScores);
15507:    
15508:    return template
15509:      .replace(/\{Nom\}/g, `${student.firstName} ${student.lastName}`)
15510:      .replace(/\{Matiere\}/g, activeSubject || teacher.subject || "sa matière")
15511:      .replace(/\{Note\}/g, studentAvg !== '-' ? studentAvg : "non évaluée")
15512:      .replace(/\{Periode\}/g, term)
15513:      .replace(/\{Prof\}/g, `${teacher.firstName} ${teacher.lastName}`);
15514:  };
15515:
15516:  const handleSendGroupNotifications = async (channel: 'sms' | 'whatsapp') => {
15517:    if (selectedStudentIds.length === 0) {
15518:      toast.error("Veuillez sélectionner au moins un élève.");
15519:      return;
15520:    }
15521:    setSendingNotifs(true);
15522:    let successCount = 0;
15523:    const dispatchesList: any[] = [];
15524:    
15525:    try {
15526:      for (const studentId of selectedStudentIds) {
15527:        const student = classStudents.find(s => s.id === studentId);
15528:        if (!student) continue;
15529:        
15530:        const finalMsg = getPersonalizedMessageForStudent(student);
15531:        const parentObj = dbParents.find(p => p.studentId === student.id);
15532:        const parentChoice = student.primaryParentContact || 'father';
15533:        let resolvedPhone = '';
15534:        if (parentChoice === 'father') resolvedPhone = student.fatherPhone;
15535:        else if (parentChoice === 'mother') resolvedPhone = student.motherPhone;
15536:        else if (parentChoice === 'guardian') resolvedPhone = student.guardianPhone;
15537:        else if (parentChoice === 'emergency') resolvedPhone = student.emergencyPhone;
15538:
15539:        const recipientPhone = resolvedPhone || 
15540:                               student.parentContact || 
15541:                               student.fatherPhone || 
15542:                               student.motherPhone || 
15543:                               student.guardianPhone || 
15544:                               student.parentAccountPhone || 
15545:                               parentObj?.phone || 
15546:                               '';
15547:        
15548:        const commId = uuidv4();
15549:        await db.communications.put({
15550:          id: commId,
15551:          merchantId: merchant.id,
15552:          studentId: student.id,
15553:          title: notifType === 'absence' ? 'Alerte Absence Directe' : notifType === 'grades' ? 'Note de Bulletin Directe' : 'Message Enseignant',
15554:          content: finalMsg,
15555:          type: channel,
15556:          recipientPhone: recipientPhone || 'Non configuré',
15557:          date: new Date().toISOString(),
15558:          syncStatus: 'synced',
15559:          updatedAt: new Date().toISOString()
15560:        });
15561:        successCount++;
15562:
15563:        if (recipientPhone) {
15564:          dispatchesList.push({
15565:            studentId: student.id,
15566:            studentName: `${student.firstName} ${student.lastName}`,
15567:            phone: recipientPhone,
15568:            message: finalMsg,
15569:            channel,
15570:            sent: false
15571:          });
15572:        }
15573:      }
15574:      
15575:      setPendingDispatches(dispatchesList);
15576:      toast.success(`${successCount} messages préparés ! Utilisez la file de dispatching ci-dessous pour envoyer.`);
15577:      setSelectedStudentIds([]);
15578:    } catch (err) {
15579:      console.error(err);
15580:      toast.error("Impossible de finaliser l'envoi des communications");
15581:    } finally {
15582:      setSendingNotifs(false);
15583:    }
15584:  };
15585:
15586:  const sentCommunicationsFiltered = useMemo(() => {
15587:    return classCommunications.filter((c: any) => 
15588:      c.merchantId === merchant.id && 
15589:      (c.title?.includes('Directe') || c.title?.includes('Enseignant') || c.type === 'sms' || c.type === 'whatsapp') &&
15590:      classStudents.some(s => s.id === c.studentId)
15591:    ).sort((a: any, b: any) => new Date(b.date).getTime() - new Date(a.date).getTime());
15592:  }, [classCommunications, merchant.id, classStudents]);
15593:
15594:  const calculateStudentAvg = (gradeObj: { devoir1: string, devoir2: string, compo: string }) => {
15595:    if(!gradeObj) return '-';
15596:    let dev1 = parseFloat(gradeObj.devoir1);
15597:    let dev2 = parseFloat(gradeObj.devoir2);
15598:    let compo = parseFloat(gradeObj.compo);
15599:
15600:    let devAvg = 0;
15601:    let countDev = 0;
15602:    if (!isNaN(dev1)) { devAvg += dev1; countDev++; }
15603:    if (!isNaN(dev2)) { devAvg += dev2; countDev++; }
15604:    
15605:    if (countDev > 0) devAvg = devAvg / countDev;
15606:
15607:    if (!isNaN(compo)) {
15608:      if (countDev > 0) return ((devAvg + (compo * 2)) / 3).toFixed(2);
15609:      return compo.toFixed(2);
15610:    }
15611:    
15612:    if (countDev > 0) return devAvg.toFixed(2);
15613:    return '-';
15614:  };
15615:
15616:  const getAppreciation = (avgStr: string) => {
15617:    if (avgStr === '-') return '';
15618:    const avg = parseFloat(avgStr);
15619:    if (avg >= 16) return <span className="text-emerald-600 font-bold">Excellent</span>;
15620:    if (avg >= 14) return <span className="text-blue-600 font-semibold">Très Bien</span>;
15621:    if (avg >= 12) return <span className="text-indigo-600 font-medium">Assez Bien</span>;
15622:    if (avg >= 10) return <span className="text-gray-600">Passable</span>;
15623:    if (avg >= 8) return <span className="text-orange-500 font-semibold">Insuffisant</span>;
15624:    return <span className="text-red-600 font-bold">Médiocre</span>;
15625:  };
15626:
15627:  return (
15628:    <div className="space-y-6">
15629:      <div className="bg-slate-900 text-white rounded-[2rem] p-6 md:p-8 shadow-xl overflow-hidden relative">
15630:        <div className="absolute right-0 top-0 w-96 h-96 bg-indigo-500/10 rounded-full blur-3xl -z-10" />
15631:        <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row justify-between items-start md:items-center gap-4">
15632:          <div className="space-y-1">
15633:            <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-1 bg-indigo-500/30 text-indigo-300 font-bold px-3 py-1 text-[10px] rounded-full uppercase tracking-wider border border-white/5 font-mono">
15634:              🟢 Espace Enseignant Actif
15635:            </span>
15636:            <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold tracking-tight">Bonjour, {teacher.firstName} {teacher.lastName} !</h1>
15637:            <p className="text-slate-400 text-sm">
15638:              Matière : <span className="text-white font-bold">{teacher.subject}</span> &bull; Niveau / Filière : <span className="text-white font-bold">{teacher.filiere}</span>
15639:            </p>
15640:          </div>
15641:          <button 
15642:            id="quit-teacher-portal"
15643:            onClick={onClose}
15644:            className="px-5 py-3 bg-white/10 hover:bg-white/15 text-white font-bold rounded-2xl transition-all text-xs flex items-center gap-2 border border-white/10"
15645:          >
15646:            <X className="w-4 h-4" />
15647:            <span>Quitter l'Espace</span>
15648:          </button>
15649:        </div>
15650:      </div>
15651:
15652:      <div className="flex flex-wrap bg-gray-100 p-1.5 rounded-2xl max-w-lg gap-1">
15653:        <button
15654:          id="tab-grades"
15655:          onClick={() => setTeacherTab('grades')}
15656:          className={`flex-1 py-2 px-3.5 text-xs font-black rounded-xl transition-all ${teacherTab === 'grades' ? 'bg-white text-indigo-950 shadow-sm' : 'text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-900'}`}
15657:        >
15658:          Saisie des Notes
15659:        </button>
15660:        <button
15661:          id="tab-homework"
15662:          onClick={() => setTeacherTab('homework')}
15663:          className={`flex-1 py-2 px-3.5 text-xs font-black rounded-xl transition-all ${teacherTab === 'homework' ? 'bg-white text-indigo-950 shadow-sm' : 'text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-900'}`}
15664:        >
15665:          Cahier de Texte
15666:        </button>
15667:        <button
15668:          id="tab-notifications"
15669:          onClick={() => setTeacherTab('notifications')}
15670:          className={`flex-1 py-2 px-3.5 text-xs font-black rounded-xl transition-all ${teacherTab === 'notifications' ? 'bg-white text-indigo-950 shadow-sm' : 'text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-900'}`}
15671:        >
15672:          Notifications Parents
15673:        </button>
15674:        <button
15675:          id="tab-schedule"
15676:          onClick={() => setTeacherTab('schedule')}
15677:          className={`flex-1 py-2 px-3.5 text-xs font-black rounded-xl transition-all ${teacherTab === 'schedule' ? 'bg-white text-indigo-950 shadow-sm' : 'text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-900'}`}
15678:        >
15679:          Emploi du Temps
15680:        </button>
15681:      </div>
15682:
15683:      {teacherTab === 'grades' && (
15684:        <div className="bg-white rounded-[2rem] border border-black/5 shadow-sm overflow-hidden flex flex-col min-h-[450px]">
15685:          <div className="p-6 md:p-8 bg-slate-50 border-b border-gray-100 flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-center justify-between gap-4">
15686:            <div className="space-y-1">
15687:              <h3 className="text-base font-bold text-gray-900">Calcul du carnet de notes</h3>
15688:              <p className="text-xs text-gray-505">Matière concernée : <span className="font-bold text-indigo-600">{teacher.subject}</span></p>
15689:            </div>
15690:            
15691:            <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3">
15692:              <select 
15693:                id="select-active-class"
15694:                value={selectedClassId} 
15695:                onChange={e => setSelectedClassId(e.target.value)}
15696:                className="px-4 py-2.5 bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-xl text-xs font-bold text-gray-700 outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20"
15697:              >
15698:                <option value="">Sélectionner la classe...</option>
15699:                {assignedClasses.map((cl: any) => (
15700:                  <option key={cl.id} value={cl.id}>{cl.name}</option>
15701:                ))}
15702:              </select>
15703:
15704:              <select 
15705:                id="select-active-term"
15706:                value={term} 
15707:                onChange={e => setTerm(e.target.value as any)}
15708:                className="px-4 py-2.5 bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-xl text-xs font-bold text-gray-700 outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20"
15709:              >
15710:                {(merchant.academicPeriods || ['Trimestre 1', 'Trimestre 2', 'Trimestre 3']).map(p => (
15711:                  <option key={p} value={p}>{p}</option>
15712:                ))}
15713:              </select>
15714:            </div>
15715:          </div>
15716:
15717:          {!selectedClassId ? (
15718:            <div className="p-20 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center space-y-4">
15719:              <div className="w-16 h-16 bg-slate-100 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-slate-400">
15720:                <BookOpen className="w-8 h-8" />
15721:              </div>
15722:              <div>
15723:                <h4 className="font-bold text-gray-800 text-lg">Choisissez une classe affectée</h4>
15724:                <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 max-w-sm mt-1">Sélectionnez la classe dans le filtre ci-dessus pour charger l'effectif des élèves et saisir les notes.</p>
15725:              </div>
15726:            </div>
15727:          ) : classStudents.length === 0 ? (
15728:            <div className="p-20 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center space-y-4">
15729:              <div className="w-16 h-16 bg-indigo-50 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-indigo-600">
15730:                <Users className="w-8 h-8" />
15731:              </div>
15732:              <div>
15733:                <h4 className="font-bold text-gray-800 text-lg">Aucun élève trouvé dans {activeClassObj?.name}</h4>
15734:                <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 max-w-sm mt-1">Renseignez des étudiants et affectez-les à la classe ou niveau <span className="font-bold">{activeClassObj?.name}</span> dans l'onglet des étudiants.</p>
15735:              </div>
15736:            </div>
15737:          ) : (
15738:            <div className="flex-1 overflow-x-auto">
15739:              <table className="w-full text-left">
15740:                <thead>

15753:                    return (

15763:                            </div>
15764:                          </div>

15770:                            onChange={(e) => updateStudentGrade(student.id, 'devoir1', e.target.value)}

15773:                          />
15774:                        </td>
15775:                        <td className="px-8 py-4 text-center">

15777:                            type="text"

15780:                            placeholder="ND"

15782:                          />
15783:                        </td>

15785:                          <input

15791:                          />
15792:                        </td>
15793:                        <td className="px-8 py-4 text-right">
15794:                          <div className="flex flex-col items-end">

15797:                          </div>
15798:                        </td>
15799:                      </tr>
15800:                    );
15801:                  })}
15802:                </tbody>
15803:              </table>

15805:          )}
15806:

15814:                onClick={handleSaveGrades}

15817:              >
15818:                {isSaving ? <Loader2 className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin" /> : <Save className="w-4 h-4" />}

15821:            </div>

16503:
16504:const TeacherManager = ({ merchant }: { merchant: Merchant }) => {
16505:  const [isEditing, setIsEditing] = useState(false);
16506:  const [currentTeacher, setCurrentTeacher] = useState<any>(null);
16507:  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);
16508:
16509:  // States for search and filtering
16510:  const [teachersSearchQuery, setTeachersSearchQuery] = useState('');
16511:  const [teachersSelectedSubject, setTeachersSelectedSubject] = useState('Tous');
16512:  const [teachersSelectedClass, setTeachersSelectedClass] = useState('Tous');
16513:
16514:  // Teacher portal states
16515:  const [activeTeacherView, setActiveTeacherView] = useState<any>(null);
16516:  const [selectedEmailTeacher, setSelectedEmailTeacher] = useState<any>(null);
16517:  const [emailSending, setEmailSending] = useState(false);
16518:  const [customEmailBody, setCustomEmailBody] = useState('');
16519:
16520:  const teachers = useLiveQuery(() => 
16521:    db.teachers?.where('merchantId').equals(merchant.id).reverse().sortBy('updatedAt')
16522:  , [merchant.id]) || [];
16523:
16524:  const dbClasses = useLiveQuery(() => 
16525:    db.classes?.where('merchantId').equals(merchant.id).toArray()
16526:  , [merchant.id]) || [];
16527:
16528:  const students = useLiveQuery(() => 
16529:    db.students?.where('merchantId').equals(merchant.id).toArray()
16530:  , [merchant.id]) || [];
16531:
16532:  const storedGrades = useLiveQuery(() => 
16533:    db.grades?.where('merchantId').equals(merchant.id).toArray()
16534:  , [merchant.id]) || [];
16535:
16536:  // Compute unique classes and subjects dynamically from teachers list
16537:  const uniqueSubjects = useMemo(() => {
16538:    const subjects = new Set<string>();
16539:    teachers.forEach((t: any) => {
16540:      if (t.subject) subjects.add(t.subject);
16541:    });
16542:    return ['Tous', ...Array.from(subjects).sort()];
16543:  }, [teachers]);
16544:
16545:  const uniqueClassesFromTeachers = useMemo(() => {
16546:    const classNames = new Set<string>();
16547:    teachers.forEach((t: any) => {
16548:      if (t.className) classNames.add(t.className);
16549:    });
16550:    return ['Tous', ...Array.from(classNames).sort()];
16551:  }, [teachers]);
16552:
16553:  const filteredTeachers = useMemo(() => {
16554:    return teachers.filter((t: any) => {
16555:      const q = teachersSearchQuery.trim().toLowerCase();
16556:      const fName = (t.firstName || '').toLowerCase();
16557:      const lName = (t.lastName || '').toLowerCase();
16558:      const full = `${fName} ${lName}`;
16559:      const reversedFull = `${lName} ${fName}`;
16560:      const subject = (t.subject || '').toLowerCase();
16561:      const className = (t.className || '').toLowerCase();
16562:      const phone = (t.phone || '').toLowerCase();
16563:      const email = (t.email || '').toLowerCase();
16564:
16565:      const matchesSearch = !q ||
16566:        fName.includes(q) ||
16567:        lName.includes(q) ||
16568:        full.includes(q) ||
16569:        reversedFull.includes(q) ||
16570:        subject.includes(q) ||
16571:        className.includes(q) ||
16572:        phone.includes(q) ||
16573:        email.includes(q);
16574:
16575:      const matchesSubject = teachersSelectedSubject === 'Tous' || t.subject === teachersSelectedSubject;
16576:      const matchesClass = teachersSelectedClass === 'Tous' || t.className === teachersSelectedClass;
16577:
16578:      return matchesSearch && matchesSubject && matchesClass;
16579:    });
16580:  }, [teachers, teachersSearchQuery, teachersSelectedSubject, teachersSelectedClass]);
16581:
16582:  const handleSave = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
16583:    e.preventDefault();
16584:    setSaving(true);
16585:    try {
16586:      const data = { ...currentTeacher, merchantId: merchant.id, updatedAt: new Date().toISOString() };
16587:      if (!data.id) data.id = uuidv4();
16588:      
16589:      // Auto-generate credentials for Espace Enseignant if not existing
16590:      if (!data.username) {
16591:        data.username = 'prof_' + (data.firstName || '').toLowerCase().trim().replace(/[^a-z0-9]/g, '') + '_' + (data.lastName || '').toLowerCase().trim().replace(/[^a-z0-9]/g, '') + Math.floor(100 + Math.random() * 900);
16592:      }
16593:      if (!data.password) {
16594:        data.password = Math.floor(100000 + Math.random() * 900000).toString();
16595:      }
16596:
16597:      await dbService.teachers.save(data);
16598:      toast.success("Enseignant et son Espace créés avec succès");
16599:      setIsEditing(false);
16600:    } catch (error) {
16601:      toast.error("Erreur lors de l'enregistrement");
16602:    } finally {
16603:      setSaving(false);
16604:    }
16605:  };
16606:
16607:  if (activeTeacherView) {
16608:    return (
16609:      <TeacherDashboardSpace
16610:        teacher={activeTeacherView}
16611:        merchant={merchant}
16612:        classes={dbClasses}
16613:        students={students}
16614:        storedGrades={storedGrades}
16615:        onClose={() => {

16617:            localStorage.removeItem('activeTeacherId');
16618:            localStorage.removeItem('merchantId');
16619:            window.location.href = '/login';
16620:          } else {
16621:            setActiveTeacherView(null);
16622:          }
16623:        }}
16624:      />
16625:    );
16626:  }
16627:
16628:  return (
16629:    <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0 }} animate={{ opacity: 1 }} className="space-y-6">
16630:      <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row justify-between items-center gap-4 animate-fade-in">
16631:        <div>
16632:          <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-ink">Gestion des Enseignants</h2>
16633:          <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 font-mono uppercase tracking-widest mt-1">
16634:            {filteredTeachers.length !== teachers.length ? (
16635:              <span>Affichés : {filteredTeachers.length} / {teachers.length} enseignants</span>
16636:            ) : (
16637:              <span>Effectif: {teachers.length.toString().padStart(3, '0')}</span>
16638:            )}
16639:          </p>
16640:        </div>

16645:            setIsEditing(true);
16646:          }}

16648:        >
16649:          <Plus className="w-4 h-4" />
16650:          <span>Nouvel Enseignant</span>
16651:        </button>
16652:      </div>
16653:

16801:                      <button 
16802:                        id={`whatsapp-teacher-${t.id}`}

Bonne rentrée !`;
16806:                          const encoded = encodeURIComponent(msg);
16807:                          const cleanPhone = t.phone ? t.phone.replace(/[^0-9+]/g, '') : '';
16808:                          const target = cleanPhone ? `https://wa.me/${cleanPhone}?text=${encoded}` : `https://web.whatsapp.com/send?text=${encoded}`;
