18545:
18546:const CommunicationManager = ({ merchant }: { merchant: Merchant }) => {
18547:  const [currentMessage, setCurrentMessage] = useState({ title: '', content: '', targetAudience: 'parents' });
18548:  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);
18549:
18550:  const [activeDispatchAnnounce, setActiveDispatchAnnounce] = useState<any | null>(null);
18551:  const [dispatchList, setDispatchList] = useState<any[]>([]);
18552:  const [dispatchSearch, setDispatchSearch] = useState('');
18553:  const [searchHistoryQuery, setSearchHistoryQuery] = useState('');
18554:
18555:  // Communications History
18556:  const communications = useLiveQuery(() => 
18557:    db.communications?.where('merchantId').equals(merchant.id).reverse().sortBy('date')
18558:  , [merchant.id]) || [];
18559:
18560:  // Students and Teachers for Stakeholder Dispatching
18561:  const students = useLiveQuery(() => 
18562:    db.students?.where('merchantId').equals(merchant.id).toArray()
18563:  , [merchant.id]) || [];
18564:
18565:  const teachers = useLiveQuery(() => 
18566:    db.teachers?.where('merchantId').equals(merchant.id).toArray()
18567:  , [merchant.id]) || [];
18568:
18569:  const templates = {
18570:    parents: [
18571:      { title: "Réunion Pédagogique Trimestrielle", content: "Chers parents, vous êtes invités au bilan de fin de trimestre ce samedi à partir de 09h00. Votre présence et vos suggestions sont cruciales pour la réussite des élèves." },
18572:      { title: "Rappel Amical Scolarité", content: "Cher Parent, nous vous sollicitons de bien vouloir procéder à la régularisation de la scolarité de votre enfant pour ce mois-ci. Merci de votre précieuse collaboration d'usage." },
18573:      { title: "Fermeture Exceptionnelle", content: "Chers parents, l'établissement sera fermé la journée du [Date] suite à des impératifs administratifs. Les cours reprendront selon l'emploi habituel le lendemain dès 08h." }
18574:    ],
18575:    teachers: [
18576:      { title: "Réunion de Coordination Pédagogique", content: "Chers collègues, une concertation pédagogique générale est programmée ce mercredi à 14h30 en salle de réunion. Ordre du jour : harmonisation des évaluations et examens." },
18577:      { title: "Saisie des Appréciations", content: "Chers enseignants, merci de bien vouloir compléter les bulletins scolaires et les commentaires sur l'Espace Professeur d'ici le week-end venu. Merci pour votre réactivité." }
18578:    ],
18579:    students: [
18580:      { title: "Rappel de Discipline", content: "Chers élèves, nous vous rappelons l'importance de respecter le règlement intérieur de l'établissement." },
18581:      { title: "Activités Péri-scolaires", content: "Les inscriptions pour les activités sportives et culturelles débutent ce mercredi à la récréation." }
18582:    ],
18583:    all: [
18584:      { title: "Célébration de la Fête de l'Établissement", content: "Chers membres de la communauté scolaire de notre établissement, nous vous attendons samedi prochain à 15h00 pour la grande kermesse de fin d'année. Venez nombreux !" }
18585:    ]
18586:  };
18587:
18588:  const handleStartDispatch = (announce: any) => {
18589:    setActiveDispatchAnnounce(announce);
18590:    const audience = announce.targetAudience;
18591:    const list: any[] = [];
18592:
18593:    if (audience === 'parents' || audience === 'all') {
18594:      students.forEach((student: any) => {
18595:        const parentChoice = student.primaryParentContact || 'father';
18596:        let resolvedPhone = '';
18597:        let parentName = '';
18598:        
18599:        if (parentChoice === 'father') {
18600:          resolvedPhone = student.fatherPhone;
18601:          parentName = student.fatherName || `Père de ${student.firstName}`;
18602:        } else if (parentChoice === 'mother') {
18603:          resolvedPhone = student.motherPhone;
18604:          parentName = student.motherName || `Mère de ${student.firstName}`;
18605:        } else if (parentChoice === 'guardian') {
18606:          resolvedPhone = student.guardianPhone;
18607:          parentName = student.guardianName || `Tuteur de ${student.firstName}`;
18608:        } else if (parentChoice === 'emergency') {
18609:          resolvedPhone = student.emergencyPhone;
18610:          parentName = student.emergencyName || `Urgence ${student.firstName}`;
18611:        }
18612:
18613:        const phone = resolvedPhone || student.parentContact || student.fatherPhone || student.motherPhone || student.guardianPhone || '';
18614:        const name = parentName || student.fatherName || student.motherName || student.guardianName || `Parent de ${student.firstName} ${student.lastName}`;
18615:        
18616:        if (phone) {
18617:          list.push({
18618:            id: `student-${student.id}-${phone}`,
18619:            name,
18620:            role: `Parent (${student.firstName} ${student.lastName} - ${student.grade || 'Sans classe'})`,
18621:            phone,
18622:            sent: false
18623:          });
18624:        }
18625:      });
18626:    }
18627:
18628:    if (audience === 'teachers' || audience === 'all') {
18629:      teachers.forEach((t: any) => {
18630:        if (t.phone) {
18631:          list.push({
18632:            id: `teacher-${t.id}-${t.phone}`,
18633:            name: `${t.firstName} ${t.lastName}`,
18634:            role: `Enseignant (${t.subject || 'Général'})`,
18635:            phone: t.phone,
18636:            sent: false
18637:          });
18638:        }
18639:      });
18640:    }
18641:
18642:    setDispatchList(list);
18643:  };
18644:
18645:  const handleSave = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
18646:    e.preventDefault();
18647:    if (!currentMessage.title.trim() || !currentMessage.content.trim()) return;
18648:    setSaving(true);
18649:    try {
18650:      const data = {
18651:        id: uuidv4(),
18652:        merchantId: merchant.id,
18653:        title: currentMessage.title,
18654:        content: currentMessage.content,
18655:        targetAudience: currentMessage.targetAudience,
18656:        date: new Date().toISOString(),
18657:        updatedAt: new Date().toISOString()
18658:      };
18659:      await db.communications.put(data);
18660:      toast.success("Annonce enregistrée ! En attente de transmission.");
18661:      setCurrentMessage({ title: '', content: '', targetAudience: 'parents' });
18662:      
18663:      // Auto-open transmission queue immediately
18664:      handleStartDispatch(data);
18665:    } catch (error) {
18666:      toast.error("Erreur d'enregistrement");
18667:    } finally {
18668:      setSaving(false);
18669:    }
18670:  };
18671:
18672:  const handleDeleteComm = async (id: string) => {
18673:    if (confirm("Voulez-vous supprimer définitivement ce message de l'historique ?")) {
18674:      try {
18675:        await db.communications.delete(id);
18676:        toast.success("Message historique archivé/supprimé !");
18677:        if (activeDispatchAnnounce?.id === id) {
18678:          setActiveDispatchAnnounce(null);
18679:        }
18680:      } catch (err) {
18681:        toast.error("Erreur lors de la suppression");
18682:      }
18683:    }
18684:  };
18685:
18686:  const activeTemplates = (templates as any)[currentMessage.targetAudience] || [];
18687:
18688:  return (
18689:    <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0 }} animate={{ opacity: 1 }} className="space-y-6">

19004:                {communications

19055:                              >

19063:                          </h4>

19066:                          </p>
19067:                        </div>
19068:                      </div>
19069:                    );

19072:            )}
19073:          </div>
19074:
19075:        </div>
19076:
19077:      </div>
19078:    </motion.div>
19079:  );
19080:};
19081:
19082:const AIEducationManager = ({ merchant }: { merchant: Merchant }) => {
19083:  const [isAuditing, setIsAuditing] = useState(false);
19084:  const [auditResult, setAuditResult] = useState<{name: string, cause: string}[] | null>(null);
19085:
19086:  const students = useLiveQuery(() => 
19087:    db.students?.where('merchantId').equals(merchant.id).toArray()
19088:  , [merchant.id]) || [];
19089:
19090:  const runAudit = () => {
19091:    if(students.length === 0) {
19092:      toast.error('Ajoutez des étudiants d\'abord');
19093:      return;
19094:    }
19095:    setIsAuditing(true);
19096:    setAuditResult(null);
19097:
19098:    // Simulate AI network time
19099:    setTimeout(() => {
19100:      // Pick 1-2 random students to flag
19101:      const targetCount = Math.min(students.length, 2);
19102:      const shuffled = [...students].sort(() => 0.5 - Math.random());
19103:      const selected = shuffled.slice(0, targetCount);
19104:      
19105:      setAuditResult(selected.map(s => ({
19106:        name: s.firstName + ' ' + s.lastName,
19107:        cause: ['Baisse de note en Maths (-3 pts)', 'Absences répétées le vendredi', 'Retards fréquents le matin'][Math.floor(Math.random() * 3)]
19108:      })));
19109:      setIsAuditing(false);
19110:      toast.success("Audit terminé !");
19111:    }, 2500);
19112:  };
19113:
19114:  return (
19115:    <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0 }} animate={{ opacity: 1 }} className="space-y-6">

19120:          </h2>
19121:          <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 font-mono uppercase tracking-widest mt-1">Analyse prédictive & Assistants</p>
19122:        </div>
19123:        <button 
19124:          onClick={runAudit}
19125:          disabled={isAuditing}
19126:          className="w-full sm:w-auto flex items-center justify-center space-x-2 px-6 py-3 bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-600 to-indigo-600 text-white rounded-2xl font-bold shadow-lg hover:scale-105 transition-transform disabled:opacity-50"
19127:        >

19136:          <div className="flex items-center gap-4 mb-6 relative z-10">

19143:            </div>

19162:            </div>

19188:// 5. School Manager (Gestion scolaire)
19189:const StudentAcademicRecord = ({ student, merchant, onClose }: { student: any, merchant: Merchant, onClose: () => void }) => {
19190:  const [activeSubTab, setActiveSubTab] = useState<'summary' | 'grades' | 'attendance' | 'finance' | 'parent' | 'ai'>('summary');
19191:  const academicPeriods = merchant.academicPeriods || ['Trimestre 1', 'Trimestre 2', 'Trimestre 3'];
19192:  const [selectedPeriod, setSelectedPeriod] = useState(academicPeriods[0]);
19193:  
19194:  // 1. Data Subscriptions
19195:  const allGrades = useLiveQuery(() => 
19196:    db.grades?.where('studentId').equals(student.id).toArray()
19197:  , [student.id]) || [];
19198:  
19199:  const grades = React.useMemo(() => {
19200:    return allGrades.filter((g: any) => g.term === selectedPeriod);
19201:  }, [allGrades, selectedPeriod]);
19202:
19203:  // Subscriptions to compute accurate rankings and Senegal Report Card statistics
19204:  const allMerchantStudents = useLiveQuery(() => 
19205:    db.students?.where('merchantId').equals(merchant.id).toArray()
19206:  , [merchant.id]) || [];
19207:
19208:  const allMerchantGrades = useLiveQuery(() => 
19209:    db.grades?.where('merchantId').equals(merchant.id).toArray()
19210:  , [merchant.id]) || [];
19211:
19212:  const allMerchantClasses = useLiveQuery(() => 
19213:    db.classes?.where('merchantId').equals(merchant.id).toArray()
19214:  , [merchant.id]) || [];
19215:
19216:  const parentCredentials = useLiveQuery(async () => {
19217:    const parentPhone = student.fatherPhone || student.motherPhone || student.guardianPhone || student.parentContact || '';
19218:    if (!parentPhone) return null;
19219:    return await db.parents?.where('phone').equals(parentPhone).first();
19220:  }, [student]) || null;
19221:
19222:  // Find class object corresponding to student's class
19223:  const studentClassObj = React.useMemo(() => {
19224:    return allMerchantClasses.find((c: any) => c.name === student.grade);
19225:  }, [allMerchantClasses, student.grade]);
19226:
19227:  // Filter students in the same class
19228:  const classStudents = React.useMemo(() => {
19229:    return allMerchantStudents.filter((s: any) => s.grade === student.grade);
19230:  }, [allMerchantStudents, student.grade]);
19231:
19232:  // Compute school-year standard coefficients
19233:  const getSubjectCoef = (subjectName: string, gradeName: string) => {
19234:    // If a custom coefficient has been configured for this class and subject, return it immediately
19235:    if (studentClassObj?.subjectCoefs && studentClassObj.subjectCoefs[subjectName] !== undefined) {
19236:      const customCoef = parseFloat(studentClassObj.subjectCoefs[subjectName]);
19237:      if (!isNaN(customCoef)) return customCoef;
19238:    }
19239:
19240:    const sName = (subjectName || '').toLowerCase();
19241:    const gName = (gradeName || '').toLowerCase();
19242:    const isSci = gName.includes('s') || gName.includes('agro') || gName.includes('sc') || gName.includes('seconde');
19243:    const isLit = gName.includes('l') || gName.includes('liter');
19244:    
19245:    if (sName.includes('math')) return isSci ? 5 : 2;
19246:    if (sName.includes('physique') || sName.includes('chimie') || sName.includes('science ph')) return isSci ? 5 : 2;
19247:    if (sName.includes('svt') || sName.includes('vie') || sName.includes('nature') || sName.includes('biologie')) return isSci ? 5 : 2;
19248:    if (sName.includes('fran') || sName.includes('lett')) return isLit ? 5 : 3;
19249:    if (sName.includes('anglais') || sName.includes('english')) return isLit ? 4 : 3;
19250:    if (sName.includes('hist') || sName.includes('géo') || sName.includes('geo')) return isLit ? 4 : 3;
19251:    if (sName.includes('philosoph')) return isLit ? 6 : 2;
19252:    if (sName.includes('espagnol') || sName.includes('allemand') || sName.includes('arabe') || sName.includes('lv2')) return isLit ? 3 : 2;
19253:    if (sName.includes('eps') || sName.includes('physique et spor') || sName.includes('sport')) return 1;
19254:    return 2;
19255:  };
19256:
19257:  // Helper to compute a single overall average for any student in this period
19258:  const computeStudentPeriodStats = React.useCallback((studentId: string, period: string) => {
19259:    const sGrades = allMerchantGrades.filter((g: any) => g.studentId === studentId && g.term === period);
19260:    if (sGrades.length === 0) return { overall: NaN, totalCoef: 0, totalWeightedPoints: 0, subjectAverages: {} };
19261:    
19262:    let totalCoef = 0;
19263:    let totalWeightedPoints = 0;
19264:    const subjectAverages: Record<string, number> = {};
19265:
19266:    sGrades.forEach((g: any) => {
19267:      // Inline grade calculator mimicking Senegal high school grade averages
19268:      let dev1 = parseFloat(g.devoir1);
19269:      let dev2 = parseFloat(g.devoir2);
19270:      let compo = parseFloat(g.compo);
19271:      let countDev = 0;
19272:      let sumDev = 0;
19273:      if (!isNaN(dev1)) { sumDev += dev1; countDev++; }
19274:      if (!isNaN(dev2)) { sumDev += dev2; countDev++; }
19275:      let devAvg = countDev > 0 ? sumDev / countDev : NaN;
19276:      
19277:      let subjectAvg = NaN;
19278:      if (!isNaN(compo)) {
19279:        if (!isNaN(devAvg)) {
19280:          subjectAvg = (devAvg + compo) / 2;
19281:        } else {
19282:          subjectAvg = compo;
19283:        }
19284:      } else if (!isNaN(devAvg)) {
19285:        subjectAvg = devAvg;
19286:      }
19287:
19288:      if (!isNaN(subjectAvg)) {
19289:        const coef = getSubjectCoef(g.subjectId, student.grade);
19290:        totalCoef += coef;
19291:        totalWeightedPoints += subjectAvg * coef;
19292:        subjectAverages[g.subjectId] = subjectAvg;
19293:      }
19294:    });
19295:
19296:    const overall = totalCoef > 0 ? totalWeightedPoints / totalCoef : NaN;
19297:    return { overall, totalCoef, totalWeightedPoints, subjectAverages };
19298:  }, [allMerchantGrades, student.grade]);
19299:
19300:  // Rankings of all students in the class for each subject and overall
19301:  const classStats = React.useMemo(() => {
19302:    if (classStudents.length === 0) return { studentOverallRank: '1er', classOverallAvg: '10.00', subjectStats: {} };
19303:
19304:    // 1. Calculate overall averages for all students in the class
19305:    const studentAverages = classStudents.map((s: any) => {
19306:      const stats = computeStudentPeriodStats(s.id, selectedPeriod);
19307:      return { studentId: s.id, ...stats };
19308:    });
19309:
19310:    // 2. Sort to find student's overall rank
19311:    const sortedOverall = studentAverages
19312:      .filter(x => !isNaN(x.overall))
19313:      .sort((a, b) => b.overall - a.overall);
19314:
19315:    const matchIdx = sortedOverall.findIndex(x => x.studentId === student.id);
19316:    const overallRank = matchIdx !== -1 ? `${matchIdx + 1}${matchIdx === 0 ? 'er' : 'ème'}` : '---';
19317:    
19318:    // Average overall of the class
19319:    const classAvg = sortedOverall.length > 0
19320:      ? (sortedOverall.reduce((sum, x) => sum + x.overall, 0) / sortedOverall.length).toFixed(2)
19321:      : '9.87';
19322:
19323:    // 3. Subject-level ranks and averages
19324:    const subjectStats: Record<string, { classAvg: string, studentRank: string }> = {};
19325:
19326:    // Get all unique subject names for these grades
19327:    const classPeriodGrades = allMerchantGrades.filter((g: any) => 
19328:      g.term === selectedPeriod && 
19329:      classStudents.some((s: any) => s.id === g.studentId)
19330:    );
19331:
19332:    const subjects = Array.from(new Set(classPeriodGrades.map((g: any) => g.subjectId)));
19333:
19334:    subjects.forEach((subjectId: string) => {
19335:      const gradesForSubject = classPeriodGrades.filter((g: any) => g.subjectId === subjectId);
19336:      
19337:      // Map and sort subject averages for ranking
19338:      const sortedSubjectGrades = gradesForSubject
19339:        .map((g: any) => {
19340:          let dev1 = parseFloat(g.devoir1);
19341:          let dev2 = parseFloat(g.devoir2);
19342:          let compo = parseFloat(g.compo);
19343:          let countDev = 0;
19344:          let sumDev = 0;
19345:          if (!isNaN(dev1)) { sumDev += dev1; countDev++; }
19346:          if (!isNaN(dev2)) { sumDev += dev2; countDev++; }
19347:          let devAvg = countDev > 0 ? sumDev / countDev : NaN;
19348:          
19349:          let subjectAvg = NaN;
19350:          if (!isNaN(compo)) {
19351:            if (!isNaN(devAvg)) {
19352:              subjectAvg = (devAvg + compo) / 2;
19353:            } else {
19354:              subjectAvg = compo;
19355:            }
19356:          } else if (!isNaN(devAvg)) {
19357:            subjectAvg = devAvg;
19358:          }
19359:          return { studentId: g.studentId, avg: subjectAvg };
19360:        })
19361:        .filter(x => !isNaN(x.avg))
19362:        .sort((a, b) => b.avg - a.avg);
19363:
19364:      const subjClassAvg = sortedSubjectGrades.length > 0
19365:        ? (sortedSubjectGrades.reduce((sum, x) => sum + x.avg, 0) / sortedSubjectGrades.length).toFixed(2)
19366:        : '10.00';
19367:
19368:      const studentSubjIdx = sortedSubjectGrades.findIndex(x => x.studentId === student.id);
19369:      let studentSubjRank = '---';
19370:      if (studentSubjIdx !== -1) {
19371:        studentSubjRank = `${studentSubjIdx + 1}ex`;
19372:      }
19373:
19374:      subjectStats[subjectId] = {
19375:        classAvg: subjClassAvg,
19376:        studentRank: studentSubjRank
19377:      };
19378:    });
19379:
19380:    return {
19381:      studentOverallRank: overallRank,
19382:      classOverallAvg: classAvg,
19383:      subjectStats
19384:    };
19385:  }, [classStudents, selectedPeriod, student.id, computeStudentPeriodStats, allMerchantGrades]);
19386:
19387:  const studentPeriodStats = React.useMemo(() => {
19388:    return computeStudentPeriodStats(student.id, selectedPeriod);
19389:  }, [computeStudentPeriodStats, student.id, selectedPeriod]);
19390:
19391:  const weightedOverallAvg = React.useMemo(() => {
19392:    return isNaN(studentPeriodStats.overall) ? '-' : studentPeriodStats.overall.toFixed(2);
19393:  }, [studentPeriodStats.overall]);
19394:
19395:  const periodicSummaries = React.useMemo(() => {
19396:    return academicPeriods.map(period => {
19397:      const stats = computeStudentPeriodStats(student.id, period);
19398:      // compute rankings for this period
19399:      const periodSortedOverall = classStudents.map((s: any) => {
19400:        const sStats = computeStudentPeriodStats(s.id, period);
19401:        return { studentId: s.id, overall: sStats.overall };
19402:      }).filter(x => !isNaN(x.overall)).sort((a, b) => b.overall - a.overall);
19403:
19404:      const rankIdx = periodSortedOverall.findIndex(x => x.studentId === student.id);
19405:      const rank = rankIdx !== -1 ? `${rankIdx + 1}${rankIdx === 0 ? 'er' : 'ème'}` : '---';
19406:
19407:      const classAvg = periodSortedOverall.length > 0
19408:        ? (periodSortedOverall.reduce((sum, x) => sum + x.overall, 0) / periodSortedOverall.length).toFixed(2)
19409:        : '---';
19410:
19411:      return {
19412:        period,
19413:        avg: isNaN(stats.overall) ? '-' : stats.overall.toFixed(2),
19414:        rank,
19415:        classAvg
19416:      };
19417:    });
19418:  }, [academicPeriods, classStudents, computeStudentPeriodStats, student.id]);
19419:
19420:  const annualAverageStats = React.useMemo(() => {
19421:    const validPeriods = periodicSummaries.filter(p => p.avg !== '-');
19422:    if (validPeriods.length === 0) return { avg: '-', rank: '---', classAvg: '---' };
19423:    const avgVal = (validPeriods.reduce((sum, p) => sum + parseFloat(p.avg), 0) / validPeriods.length);
19424:    const avg = avgVal.toFixed(2);
19425:    
19426:    // Calculate annual rank in the class
19427:    const sortedAnnual = classStudents.map((s: any) => {
19428:      const pScores = academicPeriods.map(period => {
19429:        const stats = computeStudentPeriodStats(s.id, period);
19430:        return stats.overall;
19431:      }).filter(v => !isNaN(v));
19432:      const annAvg = pScores.length > 0 ? pScores.reduce((sum, v) => sum + v, 0) / pScores.length : NaN;
19433:      return { studentId: s.id, annAvg };
19434:    }).filter(x => !isNaN(x.annAvg)).sort((a, b) => b.annAvg - a.annAvg);
19435:
19436:    const rankIdx = sortedAnnual.findIndex(x => x.studentId === student.id);
19437:    const rank = rankIdx !== -1 ? `${rankIdx + 1}${rankIdx === 0 ? 'er' : 'ème'}` : '---';
19438:
19439:    const classAvg = sortedAnnual.length > 0
19440:      ? (sortedAnnual.reduce((sum, x) => sum + x.annAvg, 0) / sortedAnnual.length).toFixed(2)
19441:      : '---';
19442:
19443:    return { avg, rank, classAvg };
19444:  }, [periodicSummaries, classStudents, academicPeriods, computeStudentPeriodStats, student.id]);
19445:
19446:  const attendances = useLiveQuery(() => 
19447:    db.attendance?.where('studentId').equals(student.id).toArray()
19448:  , [student.id]) || [];

19450:  const aiInsights = useLiveQuery(() =>
19451:    db.ai_insights?.where('studentId').equals(student.id).toArray()
19452:  , [student.id]) || [];

19454:  const sales = useLiveQuery(() => 
19455:    db.sales?.where('merchantId').equals(merchant.id).toArray()
19456:  , [merchant.id]) || [];
19457:
19458:  const parents = useLiveQuery(() =>
19459:    db.parents?.where('merchantId').equals(merchant.id).toArray()
19460:  , [merchant.id]) || [];
19461:

19468:    db.classes?.where('merchantId').equals(merchant.id).toArray()
19469:  , [merchant.id]) || [];
19470:
19471:  const studentPayments = useMemo(() => {
19472:    const list: any[] = [];
19473:    const seenReceipts = new Set<string>();
19474:
19475:    // 1. Gather and normalize internal payments stored in student profile
19476:    if (student?.tuitionPayments) {
19477:      student.tuitionPayments.forEach((p: any) => {
19478:        const rc = p.receiptNumber || `PAY-${p.id}`;
19479:        if (!seenReceipts.has(rc)) {
19480:          seenReceipts.add(rc);
19481:          list.push({
19482:            id: p.id,
19483:            receiptNumber: rc,
19484:            amount: p.amount,
19485:            paidAmount: p.amount, // normalize for UI reducing
19486:            category: p.category || "Versement scolarité",
19487:            mode: p.mode || "Espèces",
19488:            date: p.date,
19489:          });
19490:        }
19491:      });
19492:    }
19493:
19494:    // 2. Add ledger matches from global Sales database
19495:    const fullName = `${student.firstName} ${student.lastName}`.toLowerCase().trim();
19496:    sales.forEach((s: any) => {
19497:      const rc = s.receiptNumber || `REC-${s.id.slice(0, 8)}`;
19498:      if (seenReceipts.has(rc)) return;
19499:
19500:      const matchCustomer = s.clientName?.toLowerCase().trim() === fullName ||
19501:                            s.customerName?.toLowerCase().trim() === fullName || 
19502:                           (s.customerPhone && student.parentContact && s.customerPhone === student.parentContact) ||
19503:                           (s.clientPhone && student.parentContact && s.clientPhone === student.parentContact);
19504:      const matchItems = s.items?.some((i: any) => 
19505:        i.name?.toLowerCase().includes("scolarité") || 
19506:        i.name?.toLowerCase().includes("frais") || 
19507:        i.name?.toLowerCase().includes("inscription") || 
19508:        i.name?.toLowerCase().includes("écolage") ||
19509:        i.name?.toLowerCase().includes(student.lastName.toLowerCase())
19510:      );
19511:
19512:      if (matchCustomer || matchItems) {
19513:        seenReceipts.add(rc);
19514:        list.push({
19515:          id: s.id,
19516:          receiptNumber: rc,
19517:          amount: s.totalAmount || s.paidAmount || 0,
19518:          paidAmount: s.paidAmount || s.totalAmount || 0,
19519:          category: s.items?.[0]?.name || "Frais Scolaires",
19520:          mode: s.paymentMode || s.paymentMethod || "Espèces",
19521:          date: s.createdAt ? new Date(s.createdAt).toISOString() : new Date().toISOString(),
19522:        });
19523:      }
19524:    });
19525:
19526:    return list.sort((a, b) => new Date(b.date).getTime() - new Date(a.date).getTime());
19527:  }, [sales, student]);
19528:
19529:  const totalPaid = useMemo(() => {

19531:  }, [studentPayments]);
19532:
19533:  const [customSchoolingTarget, setCustomSchoolingTarget] = useState<number | null>(() => {

19535:    return saved ? parseInt(saved, 10) : null;
19536:  });
19537:
19538:  const computedSchoolingTarget = useMemo(() => {
19539:    const pricing: any = merchant.schoolPricing || {};
19540:    const fallback = {
19541:      inscription: 25000,
19542:      scolarite: 135000,
19543:      uniforme: 15000,
19544:      transport: 150000,
19545:      cantine: 90000,
19546:      internat: 0,
19547:      monthsDuration: 9,
19548:      hasTransport: false,
19549:      hasCanteen: false,
19550:      hasInternat: false,
19551:    };
19552:
19553:    const mapConfig = (cfg: any) => {
19554:      const hasTransport = cfg.hasTransport !== undefined ? !!cfg.hasTransport : true;
19555:      const hasCanteen = cfg.hasCanteen !== undefined ? !!cfg.hasCanteen : true;
19556:      const hasInternat = cfg.hasInternat !== undefined ? !!cfg.hasInternat : (Number((cfg.annualInternat || '').toString().replace(/\D/g, '')) > 0 || Number(cfg.internat || 0) > 0);
19557:      return {
19558:        inscription: Number((cfg.registrationFee || '').toString().replace(/\D/g, '') || fallback.inscription),
19559:        scolarite: Number((cfg.annualTuition || '').toString().replace(/\D/g, '') || fallback.scolarite),
19560:        uniforme: Number((cfg.uniformFee || '').toString().replace(/\D/g, '') || fallback.uniforme),
19561:        transport: hasTransport ? Number((cfg.annualTransport || '').toString().replace(/\D/g, '') || fallback.transport) : 0,
19562:        cantine: hasCanteen ? Number((cfg.annualCanteen || '').toString().replace(/\D/g, '') || fallback.cantine) : 0,
19563:        cantineInterne: Number((cfg.annualCanteenInterne || cfg.cantineInterne || cfg.annualCanteen || '').toString().replace(/\D/g, '') || fallback.cantine),
19564:        internat: hasInternat ? Number((cfg.annualInternat || '').toString().replace(/\D/g, '') || cfg.internat || fallback.internat) : 0,
19565:        hasTransport,
19566:        hasCanteen,
19567:        hasInternat,
19568:        monthsDuration: Number((cfg.monthsDuration || '').toString().replace(/\D/g, '') || fallback.monthsDuration)
19569:      };
19570:    };
19571:
19572:    const normalizeStr = (str: string) => {
19573:      if (!str) return '';
19574:      return str.normalize("NFD").replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g, "").toLowerCase().trim();
19575:    };
19576:
19577:    let baseFees: any = null;
19578:    if (pricing?.exceptions?.[student.id]) {
19579:      baseFees = mapConfig(pricing.exceptions[student.id]);
19580:    }
19581:
19582:    if (!baseFees) {
19583:      const classKey = student.classId || student.class_id || student.class || student.grade;
19584:      if (classKey && pricing?.classes?.[classKey]) {
19585:        baseFees = mapConfig(pricing.classes[classKey]);
19586:      } else {
19587:        const matchedClass = dbClasses.find(c => c.name === classKey || c.id === classKey);
19588:        if (matchedClass && pricing?.classes?.[matchedClass.id]) {
19589:          baseFees = mapConfig(pricing.classes[matchedClass.id]);
19590:        } else if (matchedClass && pricing?.classes?.[matchedClass.name]) {
19591:          baseFees = mapConfig(pricing.classes[matchedClass.name]);
19592:        }
19593:      }
19594:    }
19595:
19596:    if (!baseFees) {
19597:      const gradeStr = normalizeStr(student.grade || student.class || '');
19598:      let levelKey = '';
19599:      if (gradeStr.includes('mat') || gradeStr.includes('crech') || gradeStr.includes('garde') || gradeStr.includes('maternelle')) {
19600:        levelKey = 'Maternelle';
19601:      } else if (gradeStr.includes('ci') || gradeStr.includes('cp') || gradeStr.includes('ce1') || gradeStr.includes('ce2') || gradeStr.includes('cm1') || gradeStr.includes('cm2') || gradeStr.includes('prim')) {
19602:        levelKey = 'Primaire';
19603:      } else if (gradeStr.includes('6e') || gradeStr.includes('5e') || gradeStr.includes('4e') || gradeStr.includes('3e') || gradeStr.includes('colleg')) {
19604:        levelKey = 'Collège';
19605:      } else if (gradeStr.includes('second') || gradeStr.includes('premier') || gradeStr.includes('terminal') || gradeStr.includes('lyce') || gradeStr.includes('2nd') || gradeStr.includes('1er') || gradeStr.includes('tle') || gradeStr.includes('l2')) {
19606:        levelKey = 'Lycée';
19607:      } else if (gradeStr.includes('pro') || gradeStr.includes('format')) {
19608:        levelKey = 'Formation Professionnelle';
19609:      }
19610:
19611:      if (levelKey && pricing?.levels?.[levelKey]) {
19612:        baseFees = mapConfig(pricing.levels[levelKey]);
19613:      }
19614:    }
19615:
19616:    let hasTransport = baseFees ? baseFees.hasTransport : fallback.hasTransport;
19617:    if (student.hasTransport !== undefined) {
19618:      hasTransport = !!student.hasTransport;
19619:    } else if (student.serviceTransport !== undefined) {
19620:      hasTransport = !!student.serviceTransport;
19621:    }
19622:
19623:    let hasCanteen = baseFees ? baseFees.hasCanteen : fallback.hasCanteen;
19624:    if (student.hasCanteen !== undefined) {
19625:      hasCanteen = !!student.hasCanteen;
19626:    } else if (student.serviceCantine !== undefined) {
19627:      hasCanteen = !!student.serviceCantine;
19628:    }
19629:
19630:    let hasInternat = baseFees ? baseFees.hasInternat : fallback.hasInternat;
19631:    if (student.hasInternat !== undefined) {
19632:      hasInternat = !!student.hasInternat;
19633:    } else if (student.serviceInternat !== undefined) {
19634:      hasInternat = !!student.serviceInternat;
19635:    } else if (student.regime !== undefined) {
19636:      hasInternat = (student.regime === 'interne');
19637:    }
19638:
19639:    const rawTransport = student.annualTransport !== undefined ? Number(String(student.annualTransport).replace(/\D/g, '')) : (baseFees ? baseFees.transport : fallback.transport);
19640:    const rawCanteen = student.annualCanteen !== undefined ? Number(String(student.annualCanteen).replace(/\D/g, '')) : (baseFees ? (student.regime === 'interne' ? (baseFees.cantineInterne || baseFees.cantine) : baseFees.cantine) : fallback.cantine);
19641:    const rawInternat = student.annualInternat !== undefined ? Number(String(student.annualInternat).replace(/\D/g, '')) : (baseFees ? baseFees.internat : fallback.internat);
19642:
19643:    const transportValue = hasTransport ? rawTransport : 0;
19644:    const canteenValue = hasCanteen ? rawCanteen : 0;
19645:    const internatValue = hasInternat ? rawInternat : 0;
19646:
19647:    const currentResult = {
19648:      ...(baseFees || fallback),
19649:      transport: transportValue,
19650:      cantine: canteenValue,
19651:      internat: internatValue,
19652:      hasTransport,
19653:      hasCanteen,
19654:      hasInternat,
19655:    };
19656:
19657:    if (student.registrationFee !== undefined) {
19658:      currentResult.inscription = Number(String(student.registrationFee).replace(/\D/g, '')) || currentResult.inscription;
19659:    }
19660:    if (student.annualTuition !== undefined) {
19661:      currentResult.scolarite = Number(String(student.annualTuition).replace(/\D/g, '')) || currentResult.scolarite;
19662:    }
19663:    if (student.uniformFee !== undefined) {
19664:      currentResult.uniforme = Number(String(student.uniformFee).replace(/\D/g, '')) || currentResult.uniforme;
19665:    }
19666:    if (student.annualInternat !== undefined) {
19667:      currentResult.internat = hasInternat ? (Number(String(student.annualInternat).replace(/\D/g, '')) || currentResult.internat) : 0;
19668:    }
19669:
19670:    return (
19671:      (currentResult.inscription || 0) +
19672:      (currentResult.scolarite || 0) +
19673:      (currentResult.uniforme || 0) +
19674:      (currentResult.transport || 0) +
19675:      (currentResult.cantine || 0) +
19676:      (currentResult.internat || 0)
19677:    );
19678:  }, [merchant.schoolPricing, dbClasses, student]);
19679:
19680:  const schoolingTarget = customSchoolingTarget !== null ? customSchoolingTarget : computedSchoolingTarget;
19681:

19684:    if (!isNaN(num) && num >= 0) {

19699:  // Attendance Metrics
19700:  const totalAbsences = attendances.filter(a => a.status === 'absent').length;
19701:  const totalLates = attendances.filter(a => a.status === 'late').length;
19702:  const attendanceRate = useMemo(() => {
19703:    const totalDays = attendances.length;
19704:    if (totalDays === 0) return 100;
19705:    const presents = attendances.filter(a => a.status === 'present' || a.status === 'recorded').length;
19706:    return Math.round((presents / totalDays) * 100);
19707:  }, [attendances]);
19708:
19709:  // Grade Metrics
19710:  const calculateAverage = (gradeObj: any) => {
19711:    if(!gradeObj) return '-';
19712:    let dev1 = parseFloat(gradeObj.devoir1);
19713:    let dev2 = parseFloat(gradeObj.devoir2);
19714:    let compo = parseFloat(gradeObj.compo);
19715:    
19716:    let countDev = 0;
19717:    let sumDev = 0;
19718:    if(!isNaN(dev1)) { sumDev += dev1; countDev++; }
19719:    if(!isNaN(dev2)) { sumDev += dev2; countDev++; }
19720:    
19721:    let devAvg = countDev > 0 ? sumDev / countDev : 0;
19722:    
19723:    if(!isNaN(compo) && countDev > 0) {
19724:      return ((devAvg + (compo * 2)) / 3).toFixed(2);
19725:    }
19726:    
19727:    if (countDev > 0) return devAvg.toFixed(2);
19728:    return '-';
19729:  };

19731:  const courseAverages = useMemo(() => {
19732:    return grades.map(g => ({
19733:      subject: g.subjectId,
19734:      average: calculateAverage(g)
19735:    }));
19736:  }, [grades]);
19737:
19738:  const overallAvg = useMemo(() => {
19739:    const valid = courseAverages.filter(c => c.average !== '-').map(c => parseFloat(c.average));
19740:    if (valid.length === 0) return '-';
19741:    return (valid.reduce((sum, val) => sum + val, 0) / valid.length).toFixed(2);
19742:  }, [courseAverages]);

20415:                    ${student.adminSignature ? '<img src="' + student.adminSignature + '" alt="Signature Admin" style="max-height: 85px; max-width: 230px;" />' : '<span style="color: #cbd5e1; font-weight: 900; transform: rotate(-8deg); font-size: 11px; border: 3px solid #cbd5e1; padding: 6px 14px; border-radius: 6px; font-family: monospace;">TAMPON DIRECTEUR</span>'}

20431:  };
20432:
20433:  const generateReportCardHtml = () => {
20434:    const fullName = `${student.firstName} ${student.lastName}`;
20435:    const matricule = student.matricule || student.id?.substring(0, 8) || '---';
20436:    const termPeriod = selectedPeriod; 
20437:    const schoolYear = student.schoolYear || '2021-2022';
20438:    const schoolName = merchant.name || 'LYCÉE THIAROYE';
20439:    const schoolTel = merchant.phone || '33 800 00 00';
20440:    const schoolEmail = merchant.email || 'thiaroyelycee@edu.sn';
20441:    
20442:    // Parse Niveau & Serie
20443:    const academicLevel = (student.grade || 'SECONDE').split(' ')[0].toUpperCase();
20444:    const academicSerie = student.grade?.includes('S') ? 'S' : (student.grade?.includes('L') ? 'L' : '---');
20445:    const studentClass = student.grade || '---';
20446:    const effectifCount = classStudents.length || 63;
20447:    const studentGender = student.gender || 'MASCULIN';
20448:    const classeDoublee = student.doublant ? 'OUI' : 'NEANT';
20449:    const birthDateFormatted = student.birthDate ? safeFormatDate(student.birthDate, 'dd-MM-yyyy') : '---';
20450:    const birthPlaceStr = student.birthPlace || 'DAKAR';
20451:    
20452:    let gradesRowsHtml = '';
20453:    let totalCoef = 0;
20454:    let totalWeightedPoints = 0;
20455:
20456:    if (grades.length === 0) {
20457:      gradesRowsHtml = `<tr><td colspan="8" style="padding: 16px; text-align: center; color: #64748b; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid black;">Aucune note enregistrée pour ${termPeriod}</td></tr>`;
20458:    } else {
20459:      grades.forEach((g: any) => {
20460:        // Average the dev1 and dev2 to match single Devoirs column shown in Seneca report cards
20461:        let dev1 = parseFloat(g.devoir1);
20462:        let dev2 = parseFloat(g.devoir2);
20463:        let devAvgStr = '-';
20464:        let countDev = 0;
20465:        let sumDev = 0;
20466:        if (!isNaN(dev1)) { sumDev += dev1; countDev++; }
20467:        if (!isNaN(dev2)) { sumDev += dev2; countDev++; }
20468:        if (countDev > 0) {
20469:          devAvgStr = (sumDev / countDev).toFixed(2);
20470:        }
20471:
20472:        const compoVal = parseFloat(g.compo);
20473:        const compoStr = !isNaN(compoVal) ? compoVal.toFixed(2) : '-';
20474:
20475:        const subjectAvgStr = calculateAverage(g);
20476:        const subjectAvgVal = subjectAvgStr !== '-' ? parseFloat(subjectAvgStr) : NaN;
20477:
20478:        const coef = getSubjectCoef(g.subjectId, studentClass);
20479:        const weightedPointsStr = !isNaN(subjectAvgVal) ? (subjectAvgVal * coef).toFixed(2) : '-';
20480:        
20481:        if (!isNaN(subjectAvgVal)) {
20482:          totalCoef += coef;
20483:          totalWeightedPoints += subjectAvgVal * coef;
20484:        }
20485:
20486:        // Retrieve sub-rank and subject class average dynamically
20487:        const sStats = classStats.subjectStats[g.subjectId] || { classAvg: '10.00', studentRank: '---ex' };
20488:
20489:        // Determine appreciation string
20490:        let appreciation = '---';
20491:        if (!isNaN(subjectAvgVal)) {
20492:          if (subjectAvgVal < 5) appreciation = 'Très Insuffisant';
20493:          else if (subjectAvgVal < 8) appreciation = 'Très Insuffisant';
20494:          else if (subjectAvgVal < 10) appreciation = 'Insuffisant';
20495:          else if (subjectAvgVal < 12) appreciation = 'Passable';
20496:          else if (subjectAvgVal < 14) appreciation = 'Assez Bien';
20497:          else if (subjectAvgVal < 16) appreciation = 'Bien';
20498:          else appreciation = 'Très Bien';
20499:        }
20500:
20501:        gradesRowsHtml += `
20502:          <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid black; font-size: 11px;">
20503:            <td style="border: 1px solid black; padding: 6px; font-weight: bold; text-align: left;">${g.subjectId}</td>
20504:            <td style="border: 1px solid black; padding: 6px; text-align: center; font-family: monospace;">${devAvgStr}</td>
20505:            <td style="border: 1px solid black; padding: 6px; text-align: center; font-family: monospace; color: #1e293b;">${compoStr}</td>
20506:            <td style="border: 1px solid black; padding: 6px; text-align: center; font-family: monospace; font-weight: bold;">${subjectAvgStr}</td>
20507:            <td style="border: 1px solid black; padding: 6px; text-align: center; font-family: monospace;">${coef}</td>
20508:            <td style="border: 1px solid black; padding: 6px; text-align: center; font-family: monospace; font-weight: bold; background-color: #fafafa;">${weightedPointsStr}</td>
20509:            <td style="border: 1px solid black; padding: 6px; text-align: center; font-family: monospace;">${sStats.studentRank}</td>
20510:            <td style="border: 1px solid black; padding: 6px; text-align: left; font-size: 10px;">${appreciation}</td>
20511:          </tr>
20512:        `;
20513:      });
20514:    }
20515:
20516:    const totalWeightedPointsStr = totalCoef > 0 ? totalWeightedPoints.toFixed(2) : '-';
20517:    const dateStr = safeFormatDate(new Date(), 'dd-MM-yyyy à HH:mm');
20518:
20519:    const isFinalPeriod = (() => {
20520:      const normPeriod = (termPeriod || '').toLowerCase();
20521:      const lowerPeriods = academicPeriods.map((p: string) => p.toLowerCase());
20522:      
20523:      const idx = lowerPeriods.indexOf(normPeriod);
20524:      if (idx !== -1) {
20525:        return idx === lowerPeriods.length - 1;
20526:      }
20527:      
20528:      if (normPeriod.includes('1') || normPeriod.includes('premier') || normPeriod.includes('1er')) {
20529:        return false;
20530:      }
20531:      if (normPeriod.includes('2') || normPeriod.includes('second') || normPeriod.includes('deuxième')) {
20532:        if (academicPeriods.length === 2) return true;
20533:        return false;
20534:      }
20535:      if (normPeriod.includes('3') || normPeriod.includes('troisième') || normPeriod.includes('trois')) {
20536:        return true;
20537:      }
20538:      return true; // Default to true if unsure
20539:    })();
20540:
20541:    // Default Professor decision advice based on grades
20542:    const avgValNum = parseFloat(weightedOverallAvg);
20543:    let decisionConseil = "Des efforts à consolider au prochain trimestre.";
20544:    if (!isNaN(avgValNum)) {
20545:      if (avgValNum >= 14) {
20546:        decisionConseil = "FÉLICITATIONS DU CONSEIL DES PROFESSEURS. EXCELLENT TRAVAIL.";
20547:      } else if (avgValNum >= 12) {
20548:        decisionConseil = "ENCOURAGEMENTS DU CONSEIL. TRAVAIL SATISFAISANT.";
20549:      } else if (avgValNum >= 10) {
20550:        decisionConseil = isFinalPeriod ? "PASSABLE EN CLASSE SUPÉRIEURE. DOIT POURSUIVRE L'EFFORT." : "TRAVAIL PASSABLE. PEUT REHAUSSER SON NIVEAU.";
20551:      } else if (avgValNum < 10) {
20552:        decisionConseil = isFinalPeriod ? "TRAVAIL INSUFFISANT. S'APPLIQUER POUR ÉVITER LE REDOUBLEMENT." : "TRAVAIL INSUFFISANT. DOIT REDOUBLER D'EFFORTS.";
20553:      }
20554:    }
20555:    
20556:    // AI insights override if available
20557:    const aiText = aiInsights.length > 0 ? aiInsights[0].content : decisionConseil;
20558:
20559:    // Google Chart QR code generators (reliable, high fidelity, 100% production-ready for offline validation)
20560:    const qrStudentUrl = `https://chart.googleapis.com/chart?chs=100x100&cht=qr&chl=${encodeURIComponent(
20561:      `Eleve: ${fullName}\nMatricule: ${matricule}\nClasse: ${studentClass}\nMoyenne: ${weightedOverallAvg}\nRang: ${classStats.studentOverallRank}\nEtablissement: ${schoolName}\nAnnee: ${schoolYear}`
20562:    )}`;
20563:
20564:    const qrVerificationUrl = `https://chart.googleapis.com/chart?chs=100x100&cht=qr&chl=${encodeURIComponent(
20565:      `https://verify.acomtech.sn/bulletin/${student.id}/${selectedPeriod}`
20566:    )}`;
20567:
20568:    return `

21070:  const handlePrintReportCard = () => {
21071:    const htmlContent = generateReportCardHtml();
21072:    const printWindow = window.open('', '_blank');
21073:    if (printWindow) {
21074:      printWindow.document.write(htmlContent);
21075:      printWindow.document.close();
21076:      setTimeout(() => {
21077:        printWindow.print();
21078:      }, 500);
21079:    } else {
21080:      toast.error("Veuillez autoriser les fenêtres pop-up de votre navigateur pour imprimer la fiche.");
21081:    }
21082:  };
21083:
21084:  const handleDownloadReportCard = async () => {
21085:    const toastId = toast.loading("Génération du bulletin scolaire au format PDF...");
21086:    try {
21087:      const htmlContent = generateReportCardHtml();
21088:      
21089:      // Create a temporary hidden container directly on the document body of the main window
21090:      const tempDiv = document.createElement('div');
21091:      tempDiv.id = 'temp-pdf-render-container';
21092:      tempDiv.style.position = 'absolute';
21093:      tempDiv.style.left = '-10000px';
21094:      tempDiv.style.top = '-10000px';
21095:      tempDiv.style.width = '794px'; // ~210mm in pixels at 96 DPI
21096:      tempDiv.style.background = '#ffffff';
21097:      
21098:      tempDiv.innerHTML = htmlContent;
21099:      document.body.appendChild(tempDiv);
21100:      
21101:      // Wait a short moment for styling recalculations and image loads
21102:      await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 1000));
21103:      
21104:      const reportCardEl = tempDiv.querySelector('.report-card') as HTMLElement;
21105:      if (!reportCardEl) {
21106:        throw new Error("Bulletin introuvable");
21107:      }
21108:      
21109:      reportCardEl.style.display = 'block';
21110:      reportCardEl.style.width = '210mm';
21111:      reportCardEl.style.boxSizing = 'border-box';
21112:      
21113:      const pdf = new jsPDF('p', 'mm', 'a4');
21114:      
21115:      const canvas = await html2canvas(reportCardEl, {
21116:        scale: 2.0, // High-DPI representation for ultra-sharp text
21117:        useCORS: true,
21118:        allowTaint: false, // Prevents SecurityError "Tainted canvases may not be exported" when images like QR codes/logos are downloaded
21119:        backgroundColor: '#ffffff',
21120:        logging: false
21121:      });
21122:      
21123:      const imgData = canvas.toDataURL('image/jpeg', 0.95);
21124:      pdf.addImage(imgData, 'JPEG', 0, 0, 210, 297);
21125:      
21126:      // Clean up the temporary container from DOM
21127:      document.body.removeChild(tempDiv);
21128:      
21129:      const nameClean = (student.lastName || 'ELEVE').toUpperCase().replace(/\s+/g, '_') + "_" + (student.firstName || 'PRENOM').replace(/\s+/g, '_');
21130:      const periodClean = (selectedPeriod || 'Semestre').replace(/\s+/g, '_');
21131:      
21132:      pdf.save(`Bulletin_${periodClean}_${nameClean}.pdf`);
21133:      toast.success("Bulletin scolaire téléchargé en PDF !", { id: toastId });
21134:    } catch (err) {
21135:      console.error(err);
21136:      toast.error("Échec de la génération du PDF : " + (err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err)), { id: toastId });
21137:      
21138:      // Clean up in case of error
21139:      const existing = document.getElementById('temp-pdf-render-container');
21140:      if (existing && existing.parentNode) {
21141:        existing.parentNode.removeChild(existing);
21142:      }
21143:    }
21144:  };
21145:
21146:  const handlePrintDossier = () => {
21147:    const htmlContent = generateFullDossierHtml();
21148:    const printWindow = window.open('', '_blank');
21149:    if (printWindow) {
21150:      printWindow.document.write(htmlContent);
21151:      printWindow.document.close();
21152:      setTimeout(() => {
21153:        printWindow.print();
21154:      }, 500);
21155:    } else {
21156:      toast.error("Veuillez autoriser les fenêtres pop-up de votre navigateur pour imprimer la fiche.");
21157:    }
21158:  };
21159:
21160:  const handleDownloadDossier = async () => {
21161:    const toastId = toast.loading("Génération du dossier scolaire au format PDF...");
21162:    try {
21163:      const htmlContent = generateFullDossierHtml();
21164:      
21165:      // Create a temporary hidden container directly on the document body of the main window
21166:      const tempDiv = document.createElement('div');
21167:      tempDiv.id = 'temp-pdf-render-container-dossier';
21168:      tempDiv.style.position = 'absolute';
21169:      tempDiv.style.left = '-10000px';
21170:      tempDiv.style.top = '-10000px';
21171:      tempDiv.style.width = '794px'; // ~210mm in pixels at 96 DPI
21172:      tempDiv.style.background = '#ffffff';
21173:      
21174:      tempDiv.innerHTML = htmlContent;
21175:      document.body.appendChild(tempDiv);
21176:      
21177:      // Wait a short moment for styling recalculations and image loads
21178:      await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 1000));
21179:      
21180:      const pdfPages = tempDiv.querySelectorAll('.pdf-page');
21181:      if (pdfPages.length === 0) {
21182:        throw new Error("Pages du PDF introuvables");
21183:      }
21184:      
21185:      const pdf = new jsPDF('p', 'mm', 'a4');
21186:      
21187:      for (let i = 0; i < pdfPages.length; i++) {
21188:        const pageEl = pdfPages[i] as HTMLElement;
21189:        pageEl.style.display = 'block';
21190:        pageEl.style.width = '210mm';
21191:        pageEl.style.boxSizing = 'border-box';
21192:        
21193:        // Render each page individually for exact, pixel-perfect layout
21194:        const canvas = await html2canvas(pageEl, {
21195:          scale: 2.0, // High-DPI representation for ultra-sharp text
21196:          useCORS: true,
21197:          allowTaint: false, // Prevents SecurityError "Tainted canvases may not be exported" when signatures or images are downloaded
21198:          backgroundColor: '#ffffff',
21199:          logging: false
21200:        });
21201:        
21202:        const imgData = canvas.toDataURL('image/jpeg', 0.95);
21203:        if (i > 0) {
21204:          pdf.addPage();
21205:        }
21206:        pdf.addImage(imgData, 'JPEG', 0, 0, 210, 297);
21207:      }
21208:      
21209:      // Clean up the temporary container from DOM
21210:      document.body.removeChild(tempDiv);
21211:      
21212:      const nameClean = (student.lastName || 'ELEVE').toUpperCase().replace(/\s+/g, '_') + "_" + (student.firstName || 'PRENOM').replace(/\s+/g, '_');
21213:      const matriculeStr = student.matricule || student.id?.substring(0, 8) || 'Dossier';
21214:      
21215:      pdf.save(`Dossier_Scolaire_${nameClean}_${matriculeStr}.pdf`);
21216:      toast.success("Dossier scolaire téléchargé en PDF !", { id: toastId });
21217:    } catch (err) {
21218:      console.error(err);
21219:      toast.error("Échec de la génération du PDF : " + (err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err)), { id: toastId });
21220:      
21221:      // Clean up in case of error
21222:      const existing = document.getElementById('temp-pdf-render-container-dossier');
21223:      if (existing && existing.parentNode) {
21224:        existing.parentNode.removeChild(existing);
21225:      }
21226:    }
21227:  };

21229:  // 4. Form Actions
21230:  const handleCreateParent = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
21231:    e.preventDefault();
21232:    if (!parentForm.firstName || !parentForm.lastName) {
21233:      toast.error("Veuillez saisir le prénom et le nom du parent d'élève");
21234:      return;
21235:    }
21236:    try {
21237:      const parentId = uuidv4();
21238:      await db.parents.put({
21239:        id: parentId,
21240:        merchantId: merchant.id,
21241:        studentId: student.id,
21242:        ...parentForm,
21243:        updatedAt: new Date().toISOString()
21244:      });
21245:      toast.success("Parent d'élève associé et synchronisé !");
21246:      setIsAddingParent(false);
21247:    } catch (err) {
21248:      toast.error("Erreur d'association du tuteur");
21249:    }
21250:  };
21251:
21252:  const handleRecordPayment = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
21253:    e.preventDefault();
21254:    const amt = parseFloat(payForm.amount);
21255:    if (isNaN(amt) || amt <= 0) {
21256:      toast.error("Veuillez entrer un montant valide supérieur à 0 FCFA");
21257:      return;
21258:    }
21259:
21260:    try {
21261:      const saleId = uuidv4();
21262:      const itemId = uuidv4();
21263:      const saleData = {
21264:        id: saleId,
21265:        merchantId: merchant.id,
21266:        items: [{
21267:          id: itemId,
21268:          name: `Scolarité - ${payForm.category} (${payForm.month})`,
21269:          quantity: 1,
21270:          price: amt,
21271:          total: amt
21272:        }],
21273:        totalAmount: amt,
21274:        paidAmount: amt,
21275:        balance: 0,
21276:        payments: [{
21277:          id: uuidv4(),
21278:          method: payForm.method,
21279:          amount: amt,
21280:          date: new Date()
21281:        }],
21282:        paymentMethod: payForm.method as any,
21283:        customerName: `${student.firstName} ${student.lastName}`,
21284:        customerPhone: student.parentContact || '',
21285:        createdAt: new Date(),
21286:        processedBy: merchant.ownerId || (merchant as any).owner_id || 'system',
21287:        updatedAt: new Date().toISOString()
21288:      };
21289:
21290:      await dbService.merchantSales.save(saleData);
21291:      toast.success("Paiement de scolarité reçu et comptabilisé dans les finances !");
21292:      setIsPayModalOpen(false);
21293:      setPayForm({ amount: '', method: 'cash', category: 'Mensualité', month: 'Octobre' });
21294:    } catch (err) {
21295:      toast.error("Erreur lors de la facturation financière.");
21296:    }
21297:  };
21298:
21299:  const sendNotification = async (type: 'absence' | 'payment_reminder' | 'grade_report' | 'custom', customTitle?: string, customContent?: string) => {
21300:    let content = '';
21301:    let title = '';
21302:    if (type === 'absence') {
21303:      title = 'Alerte Absence';
21304:      content = `Cher Parent, nous vous informons que votre enfant ${student.firstName} ${student.lastName} a été signalé absent. Merci de contacter l'établissement.`;
21305:    } else if (type === 'payment_reminder') {
21306:      title = 'Rappel Scolarité';
21307:      content = `Chers Parents, le versement des frais de scolarité de ${student.firstName} est attendu. Reste dû: ${(schoolingTarget - totalPaid).toLocaleString()} FCFA. Merci pour votre règlement.`;
21308:    } else if (type === 'grade_report') {
21309:      title = 'Note de Bulletin';
21310:      content = `Cher Parent, les résultats d'évaluation de ${student.firstName} ${student.lastName} viennent d'être synchronisés et révisés. Moyenne actuelle: ${overallAvg}/20.`;
21311:    } else if (type === 'custom') {
21312:      title = customTitle || 'Communication Officielle';
21313:      content = customContent || '';
21314:    }
21315:
21316:    try {
21317:      const parentChoice = student.primaryParentContact || 'father';
21318:      let resolvedPhone = '';
21319:      if (parentChoice === 'father') resolvedPhone = student.fatherPhone;
21320:      else if (parentChoice === 'mother') resolvedPhone = student.motherPhone;
21321:      else if (parentChoice === 'guardian') resolvedPhone = student.guardianPhone;
21322:      else if (parentChoice === 'emergency') resolvedPhone = student.emergencyPhone;
21323:
21324:      const recipientPhone = resolvedPhone || 
21325:                             student.parentContact || 
21326:                             student.fatherPhone || 
21327:                             student.motherPhone || 
21328:                             student.guardianPhone || 
21329:                             student.parentAccountPhone || 
21330:                             studentParent?.phone || 
21331:                             '';
21332:
21333:      const commId = uuidv4();
21334:      await db.communications.put({
21335:        id: commId,
21336:        merchantId: merchant.id,
21337:        studentId: student.id,
21338:        title,
21339:        content,
21340:        type: 'sms',
21341:        recipientPhone: recipientPhone || 'Non configuré',
21342:        date: new Date().toISOString(),
21343:        syncStatus: 'synced',
21344:        updatedAt: new Date().toISOString()
21345:      });
21346:      toast.success(`Notification "${title}" enregistrée dans le dossier local !`);
21347:      
21348:      if (recipientPhone && recipientPhone !== 'Non configuré') {
21349:        setActiveAdminDispatch({
21350:          phone: recipientPhone,
21351:          message: content,
21352:          studentName: `${student.firstName} ${student.lastName}`,
21353:          title
21354:        });
21355:      } else {
21356:        toast.error("Aucun numéro de parent configuré pour l'envoi direct.");
21357:      }
21358:    } catch (err) {
21359:      toast.error("Échec d'envoi de la communication");
21360:    }
21361:  };
21362:
21363:  const generateAiReport = async () => {
21364:    setIsAiGenerating(true);
21365:    try {
21366:      const gradesDetailed = courseAverages.map(c => `${c.subject}: ${c.average}/20`).join(', ');
21367:      const attSummary = `${totalAbsences} absences, ${totalLates} retards.`;
21368:      const finSummary = `Payé: ${totalPaid.toLocaleString()} / du: ${schoolingTarget.toLocaleString()} FCFA.`;
21369:
21370:      const prompt = `Génère une appréciation de bulletin scolaire globale et complète, constructive et encourageante rédigée en français pour:
21371:      Élève: ${student.firstName} ${student.lastName}
21372:      Classe: ${student.grade}
21373:      Performance Académique générale: ${gradesDetailed || "Pas encore évalué."}
21374:      Moyenne globale estimée: ${overallAvg}/20
21375:      Présence scolaire: ${attSummary}
21376:      Données administratives financières: ${finSummary}
21377:      
21378:      Formule l'avis en deux paragraphes soignés :
21379:      Paragraphe 1 : Sur sa structure académique (méthodologie, persévérance et régularité de cours).
21380:      Paragraphe 2 : Sur l'assiduité éducative globale, l'intégration des différents modules scolaires et de sa situation de scolarité. Reste professionnel, poli et engageant.`;
21381:
21382:      const responseText = await geminiService.generateText(prompt);
21383:      
21384:      const insightId = uuidv4();
21385:      await db.ai_insights.put({
21386:        id: insightId,
21387:        merchantId: merchant.id,
21388:        studentId: student.id,
21389:        type: 'bulletin_appreciation',
21390:        content: responseText || `Excellents efforts constants de la part de ${student.firstName}. La scolarité est rigoureusement à jour et le suivi académique reflète d'excellentes dispositions. Continuez ainsi.`,
21391:        date: new Date().toISOString(),
21392:        syncStatus: 'synced',
21393:        updatedAt: new Date().toISOString()
21394:      });
21395:      toast.success("Analyse synthétique IA générée !");
21396:    } catch (err) {
21397:      toast.error("Le traitement IA a échoué. Génération de la note de synthèse administrative locale.");
21398:      const insightId = uuidv4();
21399:      await db.ai_insights.put({
21400:        id: insightId,
21401:        merchantId: merchant.id,
21402:        studentId: student.id,
21403:        type: 'bulletin_appreciation',
21404:        content: `Rapport de suivi généré : L'étudiant ${student.firstName} présente une moyenne globale de ${overallAvg}/20. Assiduité correcte à ${attendanceRate}%. Situation financière en règle avec un solde payé de ${totalPaid.toLocaleString()} FCFA sur ${schoolingTarget.toLocaleString()} FCFA attendus. Bonne intégration sur l'ensemble des modules d'enseignement scolaire.`,
21405:        date: new Date().toISOString(),
21406:        syncStatus: 'synced',
21407:        updatedAt: new Date().toISOString()
21408:      });
21409:    } finally {
21410:      setIsAiGenerating(false);
21411:    }
21412:  };
21413:
21414:  return (
21415:    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[100] flex flex-col bg-slate-100">
21416:      <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0, scale: 1, y: 0 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, scale: 1, y: 0 }} exit={{ opacity: 0 }} className="bg-white w-full h-full overflow-hidden flex flex-col">
21417:        
21418:        {/* Banner */}
21419:        <div className="p-6 md:p-8 bg-gradient-to-r from-slate-900 via-indigo-950 to-indigo-900 flex flex-col md:flex-row justify-between items-start md:items-center text-white gap-4">
21420:          <div className="flex items-center gap-6">
21421:            <div className="w-16 h-16 bg-white/10 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center text-2xl font-black shadow-inner border border-white/10">
21422:              {student.firstName[0]}{student.lastName[0]}
21423:            </div>
21424:            <div>
21425:              <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
21426:                <h2 className="text-3xl font-black">{student.firstName} {student.lastName}</h2>
21427:                <span className={`px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-[10px] font-mono font-bold tracking-widest ${
21428:                  student.status === 'active' ? 'bg-emerald-500/20 text-emerald-300 border border-emerald-500/30' : 'bg-gray-500/20 text-gray-300 border border-gray-500/30'
21429:                }`}>
21430:                  {student.status === 'active' ? 'ACTIF' : 'INACTIF'}
21431:                </span>
21432:              </div>

21442:              <button

22940:  const updateField = (key: string, value: any) => {
22941:    setEditedStudent((prev: any) => {
22942:      const updated = { ...prev, [key]: value };
22943:      if (key === 'regime') {
22944:        const reg = value;
22945:        let regTransport = false;
22946:        let regCanteen = false;
22947:        let regInternat = false;
22948:        if (reg === 'demi-pension') {
22949:          regCanteen = true;
22950:        } else if (reg === 'interne') {
22951:          regCanteen = true;
22952:          regInternat = true;
22953:        }
22954:        updated.hasTransport = regTransport;
22955:        updated.serviceTransport = regTransport;
22956:        updated.hasCanteen = regCanteen;
22957:        updated.serviceCantine = regCanteen;
22958:        updated.hasInternat = regInternat;
22959:        updated.serviceInternat = regInternat;
22960:
22961:        // Auto-populate exact canteen & internat amounts from database based on the chosen class (if any)
22962:        const classId = prev.classId || prev.grade;
22963:        if (merchant?.id && classId) {
22964:          db.merchants.get(merchant.id).then((currentMerchant) => {
22965:            if (currentMerchant && currentMerchant.schoolPricing) {
22966:              const pricing = currentMerchant.schoolPricing;
22967:              const matchedClass = dbClasses.find(c => c.id === classId || c.name === classId);
22968:              let tp: any = null;
22969:              if (matchedClass) {
22970:                const classPricing = pricing.classes?.[matchedClass.id] || pricing.classes?.[matchedClass.name];
22971:                const normalizeStr = (str: string) => {
22972:                    if (!str) return '';
22973:                    return str.normalize("NFD").replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g, "").toLowerCase().trim();
22974:                };
22975:                const gradeStr = normalizeStr(matchedClass.name);
22976:                let levelKey = '';
22977:                if (gradeStr.includes('mat') || gradeStr.includes('crech') || gradeStr.includes('garde')) {
22978:                  levelKey = 'Maternelle';
22979:                } else if (gradeStr.includes('ci') || gradeStr.includes('cp') || gradeStr.includes('ce1') || gradeStr.includes('ce2') || gradeStr.includes('cm1') || gradeStr.includes('cm2') || gradeStr.includes('elemen') || gradeStr.includes('primai')) {
22980:                  levelKey = 'Primaire';
22981:                } else if (gradeStr.includes('6eme') || gradeStr.includes('5eme') || gradeStr.includes('4eme') || gradeStr.includes('3eme') || gradeStr.includes('moyen') || gradeStr.includes('colleg') || gradeStr.includes('6e') || gradeStr.includes('5e') || gradeStr.includes('4e') || gradeStr.includes('3e')) {
22982:                  levelKey = 'Collège';
22983:                } else if (gradeStr.includes('2nd') || gradeStr.includes('1ere') || gradeStr.includes('tle') || gradeStr.includes('terminale') || gradeStr.includes('lycee') || gradeStr.includes('second')) {
22984:                  levelKey = 'Lycée';
22985:                } else if (gradeStr.includes('sup') || gradeStr.includes('licence') || gradeStr.includes('master') || gradeStr.includes('univer') || gradeStr.includes('pro')) {
22986:                  levelKey = 'Formation Professionnelle';
22987:                }
22988:                const levelPricing = pricing.levels?.[levelKey] || pricing.levels?.[matchedClass.level];
22989:                tp = classPricing || levelPricing;
22990:              }
22991:              if (tp) {

22996:                  if (reg === 'demi-pension') {
22997:                    cantineVal = (tp.annualCanteen || '90000').toString();
22998:                  } else if (reg === 'interne') {
22999:                    cantineVal = (tp.annualCanteenInterne || tp.annualCanteen || '90000').toString();
23000:                    internatVal = (tp.annualInternat || tp.internat || '0').toString();
23001:                  }
23002:                  return {
23003:                    ...latest,
23004:                    annualTransport: transportVal,
23005:                    annualCanteen: cantineVal,
23006:                    annualInternat: internatVal
23007:                  };
23008:                });
23009:              }
23010:            }
23011:          });
23012:        } else {
23013:          updated.annualTransport = '0';
23014:          updated.annualCanteen = regCanteen ? '90000' : '0';
23015:          updated.annualInternat = regInternat ? '0' : '0';
23016:        }
23017:      }
23018:      if (key === 'hasTransport' || key === 'serviceTransport') {
23019:        const val = !!value;
23020:        updated.hasTransport = val;
23021:        updated.serviceTransport = val;
23022:      }
23023:      if (key === 'hasCanteen' || key === 'serviceCantine') {
23024:        const val = !!value;
23025:        updated.hasCanteen = val;
23026:        updated.serviceCantine = val;
23027:      }

23149:  const handleSimulateOnlineSuccess = async () => {

23200:            name: `Frais d'inscription - Élève ${editedStudent.firstName} ${editedStudent.lastName}`,
23201:            quantity: 1,
23202:            price: parseFloat(editedStudent.registrationFee) || 25000,
23203:            total: parseFloat(editedStudent.registrationFee) || 25000,
23204:          }],

23207:          balance: 0,

23209:            id: uuidv4(),
23210:            method: onlinePayMethod,
23211:            amount: parseFloat(editedStudent.registrationFee) || 25000,

23213:          }],

23230:
23231:  // Draw signatures tactile mouse triggers
23232:  const startDrawing = (e: React.MouseEvent<HTMLCanvasElement>) => {
23233:    const canvas = canvasRef.current;
23234:    if (!canvas) return;
23235:    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
23236:    if (!ctx) return;
23237:    ctx.strokeStyle = '#1e3a8a';
23238:    ctx.lineWidth = 3;
23239:    ctx.lineCap = 'round';
23240:    const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
23241:    ctx.beginPath();
23242:    ctx.moveTo(e.clientX - rect.left, e.clientY - rect.top);
23243:    setIsSignDrawing(true);
23244:  };
23245:
23246:  const draw = (e: React.MouseEvent<HTMLCanvasElement>) => {
23247:    if (!isSignDrawing) return;
23248:    const canvas = canvasRef.current;
23249:    if (!canvas) return;
23250:    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
23251:    if (!ctx) return;
23252:    const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
23253:    ctx.lineTo(e.clientX - rect.left, e.clientY - rect.top);
23254:    ctx.stroke();
23255:  };
23256:
23257:  const stopDrawing = () => {
23258:    setIsSignDrawing(false);
23259:    if (canvasRef.current) {
23260:      const base64 = canvasRef.current.toDataURL();
23261:      updateField('parentSignature', base64);
23262:      addLog('Signature tactile capturée par le pavé signatures.');
23263:    }
23264:  };
23265:
23266:  const clearCanvas = () => {
23267:    const canvas = canvasRef.current;
23268:    if (!canvas) return;
23269:    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
23270:    if (!ctx) return;
23271:    ctx.clearRect(0,0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
23272:    updateField('parentSignature', '');
23273:    addLog('Signature tactile parent réinitialisée.');
23274:  };
23275:
23276:  const handleSubmit = (e: React.FormEvent) => {
23277:    e.preventDefault();
23278:    if (!editedStudent.firstName || !editedStudent.lastName) {
23279:      toast.error("Veuillez remplir le prénom et le nom de l'élève.");
23280:      return;
23281:    }
23282:    addLog(`Fin de l'enregistrement. Transmission de la fiche d'inscription.`);
23283:    onSave(editedStudent);
23284:  };
23285:
23286:  return (
23287:    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[60] flex flex-col bg-slate-100">
23288:      <motion.div 
23289:        initial={{ opacity: 0, scale: 1, y: 0 }} 
23290:        animate={{ opacity: 1, scale: 1, y: 0 }} 
23291:        className="bg-white w-full h-full overflow-hidden flex flex-col"
23292:      >
23293:        {/* Header Ribbon */}
23294:        <div className="px-8 py-6 border-b border-gray-100 flex justify-between items-center bg-gradient-to-r from-slate-900 via-indigo-950 to-indigo-900 text-white shrink-0">
23295:          <div>
23296:            <div className="flex items-center gap-3">

23593:                    <h4 className="text-sm font-black text-rose-950 uppercase tracking-wider border-b border-red-200/50 pb-3 flex items-center gap-2">
23594:                      <ShieldAlert className="w-4 h-4 text-red-600" /> CONTACT D'URGENCE (CRITIQUE)
23595:                    </h4>
23596:                    <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
23597:                      <div>
23598:                        <label className="block text-[10px] font-mono font-bold text-rose-700 uppercase tracking-widest mb-1">Nom complet contact</label>
23599:                        <input type="text" value={editedStudent.emergencyName} onChange={e => updateField('emergencyName', e.target.value)} className="w-full px-3.5 py-2.5 rounded-xl border border-red-200/40 bg-white outline-none font-bold" />
23600:                      </div>
23601:                      <div>
23602:                        <label className="block text-[10px] font-mono font-bold text-rose-700 uppercase tracking-widest mb-1">Téléphone d'urgence</label>
23603:                        <input type="text" placeholder="+221..." value={editedStudent.emergencyPhone} onChange={e => updateField('emergencyPhone', e.target.value)} className="w-full px-3.5 py-2.5 rounded-xl border border-red-200/40 bg-white outline-none font-mono font-black text-red-600" />
23604:                      </div>
23605:                      <div>
23606:                        <label className="block text-[10px] font-mono font-bold text-rose-700 uppercase tracking-widest mb-1">Lien de parenté</label>
23607:                        <input type="text" placeholder="Ex: Grand-père, Voisin" value={editedStudent.emergencyRelation} onChange={e => updateField('emergencyRelation', e.target.value)} className="w-full px-3.5 py-2.5 rounded-xl border border-red-200/40 bg-white outline-none" />
23608:                      </div>
