23610:                    <div>
23611:                      <label className="block text-[10px] font-mono font-bold text-rose-700 uppercase tracking-widest mb-1">Adresse contact urgence</label>
23612:                      <input type="text" value={editedStudent.emergencyAddress} onChange={e => updateField('emergencyAddress', e.target.value)} className="w-full px-3.5 py-2.5 rounded-xl border border-red-200/40 bg-white outline-none" />
23613:                    </div>
23614:                  </div>
23615:                </div>
23616:              )}
23617:
23618:              {/* Tab 3: Académique & Médical */}
23619:              {activeTab === 'academique' && (
23620:                <div className="space-y-6">
23621:                  {/* Academic Requirements */}
23622:                  <div className="bg-white p-6 rounded-3xl border border-gray-100 shadow-sm space-y-4">
23623:                    <h4 className="text-sm font-black text-gray-900 uppercase tracking-wider border-b border-gray-100 pb-3 flex items-center gap-2">
23624:                      <GraduationCap className="w-4 h-4 text-indigo-500" /> Informations Académiques Requises
23625:                    </h4>
23626:
23627:                    <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
23628:                      <div>
23629:                        <label className="block text-[10px] font-mono font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-1">Classe de l'élève (Pédagogie & Classes)</label>
23630:                        {dbClasses.length === 0 ? (
23631:                          <div className="p-3 bg-red-50 border border-red-100/80 text-red-900 rounded-2xl text-[11px] leading-relaxed">
23632:                            <span className="font-bold flex items-center gap-1.5 text-red-700 mb-1">
23633:                              ⚠️ Aucune classe configurée
23634:                            </span>
23635:                            Veuillez configurer l'onglet <span className="font-bold">Pédagogie & Classes</span>.
23636:                          </div>
23637:                        ) : (
23638:                          <select 
23639:                            required
23640:                            value={dbClasses.find((c: any) => c.name === editedStudent.grade)?.id || ''} 
23641:                            onChange={async (e) => {
23642:                              const val = e.target.value;
23643:                              const matchedClass = dbClasses.find((c: any) => c.id === val);
23644:                              if (matchedClass) {
23645:                                const mapClassLevelToStudentLevel = (classLevel: string) => {
23646:                                  if (!classLevel) return 'Secondaire';
23647:                                  const norm = classLevel.toLowerCase();
23648:                                  if (norm.includes('maternelle')) return 'Maternelle';
23649:                                  if (norm.includes('élémentaire') || norm.includes('primaire') || norm.includes('elementaire')) return 'Élémentaire';
23650:                                  if (norm.includes('moyen') || norm.includes('collège') || norm.includes('college')) return 'Moyen-Orientation';
23651:                                  if (norm.includes('lycée') || norm.includes('secondaire') || norm.includes('lycee')) return 'Secondaire';
23652:                                  if (norm.includes('supérieur') || norm.includes('université') || norm.includes('universitaire') || norm.includes('superieur')) return 'Université';
23653:                                  return 'Secondaire';
23654:                                };
23655:                                const requestedLvl = mapClassLevelToStudentLevel(matchedClass.level);
23656:
23657:                                let tp: any = null;
23658:
23659:                                // Auto-adopt billing settings fetching latest
23660:                                if (merchant?.id) {
23661:                                    const currentMerchant = await db.merchants.get(merchant.id);
23662:                                    if (currentMerchant && currentMerchant.schoolPricing) {
23663:                                      const pricing = currentMerchant.schoolPricing;
23664:                                      const classPricing = pricing.classes?.[matchedClass.id] || pricing.classes?.[matchedClass.name];
23665:                                      
23666:                                      const normalizeStr = (str: string) => {
23667:                                          if (!str) return '';
23668:                                          return str.normalize("NFD").replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g, "").toLowerCase().trim();
23669:                                      };
23670:                                      const gradeStr = normalizeStr(matchedClass.name);
23671:                                      let levelKey = '';
23672:                                      if (gradeStr.includes('mat') || gradeStr.includes('crech') || gradeStr.includes('garde')) {
23673:                                        levelKey = 'Maternelle';
23674:                                      } else if (gradeStr.includes('ci') || gradeStr.includes('cp') || gradeStr.includes('ce1') || gradeStr.includes('ce2') || gradeStr.includes('cm1') || gradeStr.includes('cm2') || gradeStr.includes('elemen') || gradeStr.includes('primai')) {
23675:                                        levelKey = 'Primaire';
23676:                                      } else if (gradeStr.includes('6eme') || gradeStr.includes('5eme') || gradeStr.includes('4eme') || gradeStr.includes('3eme') || gradeStr.includes('moyen') || gradeStr.includes('colleg') || gradeStr.includes('6e') || gradeStr.includes('5e') || gradeStr.includes('4e') || gradeStr.includes('3e')) {
23677:                                        levelKey = 'Collège';
23678:                                      } else if (gradeStr.includes('2nd') || gradeStr.includes('1ere') || gradeStr.includes('tle') || gradeStr.includes('terminale') || gradeStr.includes('lycee') || gradeStr.includes('second')) {
23679:                                        levelKey = 'Lycée';
23680:                                      } else if (gradeStr.includes('sup') || gradeStr.includes('licence') || gradeStr.includes('master') || gradeStr.includes('univer') || gradeStr.includes('pro')) {
23681:                                        levelKey = 'Formation Professionnelle';
23682:                                      }
23683:                                      
23684:                                      const levelPricing = pricing.levels?.[levelKey] || pricing.levels?.[matchedClass.level];
23685:                                      tp = classPricing || levelPricing;
23686:                                    }
23687:                                }
23688:                                
23689:                                setEditedStudent((prev: any) => {
23690:                                  const currentRegime = prev.regime || 'externe';
23691:                                  let regTransport = false;
23692:                                  let regCanteen = false;
23693:                                  let regInternat = false;
23694:                                  if (currentRegime === 'demi-pension') {
23695:                                    regCanteen = true;
23696:                                  } else if (currentRegime === 'interne') {
23697:                                    regCanteen = true;
23698:                                    regInternat = true;
23699:                                  }
23700:                                  
23701:                                  const pricingFields = tp ? {
23702:                                    registrationFee: tp.registrationFee?.toString() || prev.registrationFee,
23703:                                    annualTuition: tp.annualTuition?.toString() || prev.annualTuition,
23704:                                    uniformFee: tp.uniformFee?.toString() || prev.uniformFee,
23705:                                    annualTransport: regTransport ? (tp.annualTransport?.toString() || prev.annualTransport) : '0',
23706:                                    annualCanteen: currentRegime === 'interne' 
23707:                                      ? (tp.annualCanteenInterne || tp.annualCanteen || '90000').toString() 
23708:                                      : (currentRegime === 'demi-pension' ? (tp.annualCanteen || '90000').toString() : '0'),
23709:                                    annualInternat: currentRegime === 'interne' 
23710:                                      ? (tp.annualInternat || tp.internat || '0').toString() 
23711:                                      : '0',
23712:                                    monthsDuration: tp.monthsDuration?.toString() || prev.monthsDuration,
23713:                                    hasDiscount: 'non',
23714:                                    discountAmount: '0'
23715:                                  } : {};
23716:
23717:                                  return {
23718:                                    ...prev,
23719:                                    grade: matchedClass.name,
23720:                                    classId: matchedClass.id,
23721:                                    requestedLevel: requestedLvl,
23722:                                    hasTransport: regTransport,
23723:                                    serviceTransport: regTransport,
23724:                                    hasCanteen: regCanteen,
23725:                                    serviceCantine: regCanteen,
23726:                                    hasInternat: regInternat,
23727:                                    serviceInternat: regInternat,
23728:                                    ...pricingFields
23729:                                  };
23730:                                });
23731:
23732:                                addLog(`Classe affectée : ${matchedClass.name} - Niveau associé : ${matchedClass.level}`);
23733:                              } else {
23734:                                updateField('grade', '');
23735:                              }
23736:                            }} 
23737:                            className="w-full px-3.5 py-2.5 rounded-xl border border-gray-200 bg-gray-50/50 outline-none font-bold text-xs h-[42px]"
23738:                          >
23739:                            <option value="">Sélectionner une classe...</option>
23740:                            {dbClasses.map((cl: any) => (
23741:                              <option key={cl.id} value={cl.id}>
23742:                                {cl.name} ({cl.level || 'Sans Niveau'})
23743:                              </option>
23744:                            ))}
23745:                          </select>
23746:                        )}
23747:                      </div>
23748:                      <div>
23749:                        <label className="block text-[10px] font-mono font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-1">Niveau d'études (Automatique)</label>
23750:                        <input 
23751:                          type="text" 
23752:                          readOnly 
23753:                          placeholder="Calculé automatiquement par la classe..."
23754:                          value={
23755:                            dbClasses.find((c: any) => c.name === editedStudent.grade)?.level || 'Non attribué'
23756:                          } 
23757:                          className="w-full px-3.5 py-2.5 rounded-xl border border-gray-100 bg-gray-100/50 text-gray-500 font-bold outline-none text-xs h-[42px] select-none" 
23758:                        />
23759:                      </div>
23760:                      <div>
23761:                        <label className="block text-[10px] font-mono font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-1">Filière / Série d'études</label>

23770:                          {['externe', 'demi-pension', 'interne'].map((rg) => (

24666:
24667:const SchoolManager = ({ merchant }: { merchant: Merchant }) => {
24668:  const [isEditing, setIsEditing] = useState(false);
24669:  const [currentStudent, setCurrentStudent] = useState<any>(null);
24670:  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);
24671:  const [studentLimit, setStudentLimit] = useState(10);
24672:  const [showAcademicRecord, setShowAcademicRecord] = useState<any>(null);
24673:
24674:  // States for search and filters
24675:  const [studentsSearchQuery, setStudentsSearchQuery] = useState('');
24676:  const [studentsSelectedGrade, setStudentsSelectedGrade] = useState('Tous');
24677:  const [studentsSelectedStatus, setStudentsSelectedStatus] = useState('Tous');
24678:
24679:  const students = useLiveQuery(() => 
24680:    db.students.where('merchantId').equals(merchant.id).reverse().sortBy('updatedAt')
24681:  , [merchant.id]) || [];
24682:
24683:  const loading = false;
24684:
24685:  // Extract unique classes dynamically
24686:  const uniqueClassGrades = useMemo(() => {
24687:    const grades = new Set<string>();
24688:    students.forEach((s: any) => {
24689:      if (s.grade) {
24690:        grades.add(s.grade);
24691:      }
24692:    });
24693:    return ['Tous', ...Array.from(grades).sort()];
24694:  }, [students]);
24695:
24696:  // Combined search and filter logic
24697:  const filteredStudents = useMemo(() => {
24698:    return students.filter((s: any) => {
24699:      // 1. Search Query filter (matches first name, last name, matricule, parent contact, parents names)
24700:      const q = studentsSearchQuery.trim().toLowerCase();
24701:      const fName = (s.firstName || '').toLowerCase();
24702:      const lName = (s.lastName || '').toLowerCase();
24703:      const full = `${fName} ${lName}`;
24704:      const reversedFull = `${lName} ${fName}`;
24705:      const mat = (s.matricule || '').toLowerCase();
24706:      const contact = (s.parentContact || '').toLowerCase();
24707:      const father = (s.fatherName || '').toLowerCase();
24708:      const mother = (s.motherName || '').toLowerCase();
24709:      const guardian = (s.guardianName || '').toLowerCase();
24710:
24711:      const matchesSearch = !q || 
24712:        fName.includes(q) || 
24713:        lName.includes(q) || 
24714:        full.includes(q) ||
24715:        reversedFull.includes(q) ||
24716:        mat.includes(q) || 
24717:        contact.includes(q) ||
24718:        father.includes(q) ||
24719:        mother.includes(q) ||
24720:        guardian.includes(q);
24721:
24722:      // 2. Class / Grade filter
24723:      const matchesGrade = studentsSelectedGrade === 'Tous' || s.grade === studentsSelectedGrade;
24724:
24725:      // 3. Status filter ('active' or 'inactive')
24726:      const matchesStatus = studentsSelectedStatus === 'Tous' || s.status === studentsSelectedStatus;
24727:
24728:      return matchesSearch && matchesGrade && matchesStatus;
24729:    });
24730:  }, [students, studentsSearchQuery, studentsSelectedGrade, studentsSelectedStatus]);
24731:
24732:  const handleSave = async (updatedStudent: any) => {
24733:    setSaving(true);
24734:    try {
24735:      await dbService.students.save({
24736:        ...updatedStudent,
24737:        merchantId: merchant.id
24738:      });
24739:      toast.success('Étudiant enregistré');
24740:      setIsEditing(false);
24741:    } catch (error) {
24742:      toast.error('Erreur lors de l\'enregistrement');
24743:    } finally {
24744:      setSaving(false);
24745:    }
24746:  };
24747:
24748:  return (
24749:    <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0 }} animate={{ opacity: 1 }} className="space-y-6">
24750:      <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row justify-between items-center gap-4">
24751:        <div>
24752:          <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-ink">Gestion des Étudiants</h2>
24753:          <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 font-mono uppercase tracking-widest mt-1">
24754:            {filteredStudents.length !== students.length ? (
24755:              <span>Affichés : {filteredStudents.length} / {students.length} inscrits</span>
24756:            ) : (
24757:              <span>Effectif total : {students.length.toString().padStart(3, '0')}</span>
24758:            )}
24759:          </p>
24760:        </div>
24761:        <button 
24762:          onClick={() => {
24763:            setCurrentStudent({ firstName: '', lastName: '', grade: '', parentContact: '', status: 'active', email: '', phone: '', address: '', birthDate: '' });
24764:            setIsEditing(true);
24765:          }}
24766:          className="w-full sm:w-auto flex items-center justify-center space-x-2 px-6 py-3 bg-primary text-white rounded-2xl font-bold shadow-lg shadow-primary/20 hover:scale-105 transition-transform"
24767:        >
24768:          <Plus className="w-4 h-4" />
24769:          <span>Nouvel Étudiant</span>
24770:        </button>
24771:      </div>
24772:
24773:      {/* Dynamic Search & Filtering Toolbar */}
24774:      <div className="bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 p-4 rounded-3xl gap-4 flex flex-col md:flex-row items-stretch md:items-center justify-between shadow-sm">
24775:        {/* Search Field */}
24776:        <div className="relative flex-grow max-w-full md:max-w-md">
24777:          <Search className="absolute left-3.5 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-4 h-4 text-gray-400" />
24778:          <input
24779:            type="text"
24780:            placeholder="Rechercher par nom, matricule, parent..."
24781:            value={studentsSearchQuery}
24782:            onChange={(e) => setStudentsSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
24783:            className="w-full pl-10 pr-10 py-2.5 bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-2xl text-xs font-semibold text-gray-800 placeholder-gray-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 focus:border-primary transition-all shadow-sm"
24784:          />
24785:          {studentsSearchQuery && (
24786:            <button
24787:              onClick={() => setStudentsSearchQuery('')}
24788:              className="absolute right-3.5 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-400 hover:text-black hover:scale-110 transition-transform"
24789:              title="Effacer la recherche"
24790:            >
24791:              <X className="w-4 h-4" />
24792:            </button>
24793:          )}
24794:        </div>
24795:
24796:        {/* Filter Controls */}
24797:        <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3">
24798:          {/* Class / Grade filter selection */}
24799:          <div className="flex items-center space-x-2 bg-white rounded-2xl border border-gray-200 px-3 py-2 shadow-sm">
24800:            <SlidersHorizontal className="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-gray-400" />
24801:            <span className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase text-gray-400">Niveau :</span>
24802:            <select
24803:              value={studentsSelectedGrade}
24804:              onChange={(e) => setStudentsSelectedGrade(e.target.value)}
24805:              className="text-xs font-extrabold text-slate-700 bg-transparent focus:outline-none pr-1 cursor-pointer"
24806:            >
24807:              {uniqueClassGrades.map((grade) => (
24808:                <option key={grade} value={grade}>
24809:                  {grade === 'Tous' ? 'Tous les niveaux' : grade}
24810:                </option>
24811:              ))}
24812:            </select>
24813:          </div>
24814:

24816:          <div className="flex items-center space-x-2 bg-white rounded-2xl border border-gray-200 px-3 py-2 shadow-sm">
24817:            <Filter className="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-gray-400" />
24818:            <span className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase text-gray-400">Statut :</span>
24819:            <select

24827:            </select>
24828:          </div>

24831:          {(studentsSelectedGrade !== 'Tous' || studentsSelectedStatus !== 'Tous' || studentsSearchQuery) && (

24834:                setStudentsSearchQuery('');
24835:                setStudentsSelectedGrade('Tous');
24836:                setStudentsSelectedStatus('Tous');
24837:              }}

24840:            >
24841:              <X className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
24842:              Réinitialiser
24843:            </button>
24844:          )}
24845:        </div>
24846:      </div>
24847:
24848:      {loading ? (
24849:        <div className="py-20 flex justify-center"><Loader2 className="w-8 h-8 animate-spin text-primary" /></div>
24850:      ) : (

24852:          <div className="overflow-x-auto">
24853:            {filteredStudents.length === 0 ? (

24855:                <span className="text-3xl mb-3">🔍</span>
24856:                <p className="font-extrabold text-slate-700 text-sm">Aucun étudiant trouvé</p>

24863:                      setStudentsSearchQuery('');
24864:                      setStudentsSelectedGrade('Tous');

24973:  , [merchant.id]) || [];

24978:    e.preventDefault();
24979:    setSaving(true);

24981:      await dbService.patients.save({
24982:        ...currentPatient,
24983:        merchantId: merchant.id
24984:      });
24985:      toast.success('Patient enregistré');
24986:      setIsEditing(false);

25134:                  </select>

25157:              </div>
25158:            </form>

25163:                {saving ? <Loader2 className="w-5 h-5 animate-spin" /> : 'Enregistrer le dossier'}

25165:            </div>
25166:          </motion.div>

25173:// 7. Appointment Manager (Gestion des rendez-vous)
25174:const AppointmentManager = ({ merchant }: { merchant: Merchant }) => {
25175:  const [isEditing, setIsEditing] = useState(false);
25176:  const [currentAppointment, setCurrentAppointment] = useState<any>(null);
25177:  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);
25178:  const [appointmentLimit, setAppointmentLimit] = useState(10);
25179:
25180:  const appointments = useLiveQuery(() => 
25181:    db.appointments.where('merchantId').equals(merchant.id).reverse().sortBy('updatedAt')
25182:  , [merchant.id]) || [];
25183:
25184:  const loading = false;
25185:
25186:  const handleSave = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
25187:    e.preventDefault();
25188:    setSaving(true);
25189:    try {
25190:      await dbService.appointments.save({
25191:        ...currentAppointment,
25192:        merchantId: merchant.id
25193:      });
25194:      toast.success('Rendez-vous enregistré');
25195:      setIsEditing(false);
25196:    } catch (error) {
25197:      toast.error('Erreur lors de l\'enregistrement');
25198:    } finally {
25199:      setSaving(false);
25200:    }
25201:  };
25202:
25203:  return (
25204:    <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0 }} animate={{ opacity: 1 }} className="space-y-6">
25205:      <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row justify-between items-center gap-4">
25206:        <div>
25207:          <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-ink">Gestion des Rendez-vous</h2>
25208:          <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 font-mono uppercase tracking-widest mt-1">Total: {appointments.length.toString().padStart(3, '0')}</p>
25209:        </div>
25210:        <button 
25211:          onClick={() => {
25212:            setCurrentAppointment({ patientName: '', doctorName: '', date: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0], time: '09:00', status: 'scheduled', type: 'consultation' });
25213:            setIsEditing(true);
25214:          }}
25215:          className="w-full sm:w-auto flex items-center justify-center space-x-2 px-6 py-3 bg-primary text-white rounded-2xl font-bold shadow-lg shadow-primary/20 hover:scale-105 transition-transform"
25216:        >
25217:          <Plus className="w-4 h-4" />
25218:          <span>Nouveau Rendez-vous</span>
25219:        </button>
25220:      </div>
25221:
25222:      {loading ? (
25223:        <div className="py-20 flex justify-center"><Loader2 className="w-8 h-8 animate-spin text-primary" /></div>
25224:      ) : (
25225:        <div className="bg-white rounded-[2rem] border border-black/5 shadow-sm overflow-hidden">
25226:          <div className="overflow-x-auto">
25227:            <table className="w-full text-left">
25228:              <thead>
25229:                <tr className="bg-gray-50/50 text-[10px] font-mono font-black text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-[0.2em] border-b border-gray-100">
25230:                  <th className="px-8 py-5">Patient / Client</th>
25231:                  <th className="px-8 py-5">Praticien / Ressource</th>
25232:                  <th className="px-8 py-5">Date & Heure</th>
25233:                  <th className="px-8 py-5">Type</th>
25234:                  <th className="px-8 py-5">Statut</th>
25235:                  <th className="px-8 py-5 text-right">Actions</th>
25236:                </tr>
25237:              </thead>
25238:              <tbody className="divide-y divide-gray-100">
25239:                {appointments.slice(0, appointmentLimit).map((app: any) => (
25240:                  <tr key={app.id} className="hover:bg-gray-50/50 transition-colors group">
25241:                    <td className="px-8 py-5">
25242:                      <div className="flex flex-col">
25243:                        <span className="font-black text-ink text-sm leading-tight">{app.patientName}</span>
25244:                        <span className="text-[9px] font-mono text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mt-0.5">ID: {app.id?.substring(0, 8)}</span>
25245:                      </div>
25246:                    </td>
25247:                    <td className="px-8 py-5">
25248:                      <div className="flex items-center space-x-3">
25249:                        <div className="w-8 h-8 bg-primary/10 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center text-[10px] font-black text-primary border border-primary/10">
25250:                          {app.doctorName?.[0]}
25251:                        </div>
25252:                        <span className="text-sm font-black text-ink">{app.doctorName}</span>
25253:                      </div>
25254:                    </td>
25255:                    <td className="px-8 py-5">
25256:                      <div className="flex flex-col">
25257:                        <span className="text-[11px] font-mono font-black text-ink uppercase">{app.date}</span>
25258:                        <span className="text-[10px] text-gray-400 font-mono font-bold mt-0.5">à {app.time}</span>
25259:                      </div>
25260:                    </td>
25261:                    <td className="px-8 py-5">
25262:                      <span className="px-3 py-1 bg-gray-100 text-gray-500 text-[9px] font-black rounded-full uppercase tracking-widest border border-gray-200">
25263:                        {app.type}
25264:                      </span>
25265:                    </td>
25266:                    <td className="px-8 py-5">
25267:                      <span className={`px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest border ${
25268:                        app.status === 'completed' ? 'bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-600 border-emerald-100' : 
25269:                        app.status === 'scheduled' ? 'bg-blue-50 text-blue-600 border-blue-100' : 'bg-rose-50 text-rose-600 border-rose-100'
25270:                      }`}>
25271:                        {app.status === 'scheduled' ? 'PROGRAMMÉ' : app.status === 'completed' ? 'TERMINÉ' : 'ANNULÉ'}
25272:                      </span>
25273:                    </td>
25274:                    <td className="px-8 py-5 text-right">
25275:                      <button onClick={() => { setCurrentAppointment(app); setIsEditing(true); }} className="p-2.5 hover:bg-primary/10 text-primary rounded-xl opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-all border border-transparent hover:border-primary/20"><Edit2 className="w-4 h-4" /></button>
25276:                    </td>
25277:                  </tr>
25278:                ))}
25279:              </tbody>
25280:            </table>
25281:            {appointments.length > appointmentLimit && (
25282:              <div className="p-4 flex justify-center border-t border-gray-100">
25283:                <button 
25284:                  onClick={() => setAppointmentLimit(prev => prev + 10)}
25285:                  className="px-6 py-2 bg-gray-50 text-gray-600 font-bold text-[10px] rounded-xl hover:bg-gray-100 transition-colors uppercase tracking-widest"
25286:                >
25287:                  Voir plus
25288:                </button>
25289:              </div>
25290:            )}
25291:          </div>
25292:        </div>
25293:      )}
25294:
25295:      {isEditing && (
25296:        <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[60] flex items-center justify-center p-4 bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-sm">
25297:          <motion.div 
25298:            initial={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.95, y: 20 }} 
25299:            animate={{ opacity: 1, scale: 1, y: 0 }} 
25300:            className="bg-white w-full max-w-2xl rounded-[2rem] shadow-2xl overflow-hidden flex flex-col max-h-[90vh]"
25301:          >
25302:            <div className="px-8 py-6 border-b border-gray-100 flex justify-between items-center bg-gray-50/50">
25303:              <div>
25304:                <h3 className="text-xl font-bold text-ink">Détails du Rendez-vous</h3>
25305:                <p className="text-[10px] font-mono text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mt-1">Planification & Ressources</p>
25306:              </div>
25307:              <button type="button" onClick={() => setIsEditing(false)} className="p-2 hover:bg-white rounded-xl transition-colors shadow-sm border border-black/5">
25308:                <X className="w-5 h-5 text-gray-400" />
25309:              </button>
25310:            </div>
25311:
25312:            <form onSubmit={handleSave} className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-8 space-y-6">
25313:              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
25314:                <div>
25315:                  <label className="block text-[10px] font-mono font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-2">Nom du Patient / Client</label>
25316:                  <input type="text" required value={currentAppointment.patientName} onChange={e => setCurrentAppointment({...currentAppointment, patientName: e.target.value})} className="w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-xl border border-gray-100 outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 bg-gray-50/30 font-bold" />
25317:                </div>
25318:                <div>
25319:                  <label className="block text-[10px] font-mono font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-2">Praticien / Ressource</label>
25320:                  <input type="text" required value={currentAppointment.doctorName} onChange={e => setCurrentAppointment({...currentAppointment, doctorName: e.target.value})} className="w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-xl border border-gray-100 outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 bg-gray-50/30 font-bold" />
25321:                </div>
25322:              </div>
25323:
25324:              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6 pt-4 border-t border-dashed border-gray-100">
25325:                <div>
25326:                  <label className="block text-[10px] font-mono font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-2">Date du rendez-vous</label>

25395:
25396:const compressAndSetImage = (file: File, onCompressed: (base64: string) => void) => {
25397:  const reader = new FileReader();
25398:  reader.onload = (e) => {
25399:    const img = new Image();
25400:    img.onload = () => {
25401:      const maxDim = 300;
25402:      let width = img.width;
25403:      let height = img.height;
25404:      if (width > maxDim || height > maxDim) {
25405:        if (width > height) {
25406:          height = Math.round((height * maxDim) / width);
25407:          width = maxDim;
25408:        } else {
25409:          width = Math.round((width * maxDim) / height);
25410:          height = maxDim;
25411:        }
25412:      }
25413:      const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
25414:      canvas.width = width;
25415:      canvas.height = height;
25416:      const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
25417:      if (ctx) {
25418:        ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0, width, height);
25419:        const compressedBase64 = canvas.toDataURL('image/jpeg', 0.7);
25420:        onCompressed(compressedBase64);
25421:      } else {
25422:        onCompressed(e.target?.result as string);
25423:      }
25424:    };
25425:    img.src = e.target?.result as string;
25426:  };
25427:  reader.readAsDataURL(file);
25428:};

25517:  discountValue?: number;
25518:  subtotal: number;
25519:  supplementTotal: number;
25520:  total: number;
25521:  totalCost?: number;
25522:  status: 'quotation' | 'deposed' | 'in_progress' | 'ready' | 'delivered';
25523:  paymentStatus?: 'unpaid' | 'partial' | 'paid';
25524:  paymentMethod?: 'cash' | 'mobile_money' | 'card' | 'other';
25525:  amountPaid?: number;
25526:  amountPaidAtDeposit?: number;
25527:  balanceCollectedAmount?: number;
25528:  balanceCollectedDate?: string;
25529:  balanceCollectedMethod?: 'cash' | 'mobile_money' | 'card' | 'other';
25530:  notes?: string;
25531:  sentNotifications?: { id: string; type: 'whatsapp' | 'email'; templateName: string; msg: string; timestamp: string }[];
25532:  selectedStockProducts?: { id: string; name: string; qty: number; price: number; costPrice: number }[];
25533:}
25534:
25535:// Beautiful customized Alert Popup like the "Notification Gérant" layout
25536:interface AcomAlertPopupProps {
25537:  isOpen: boolean;
25538:  onClose: () => void;
25539:  title: string;
25540:  subtitle?: string;
25541:  message: string;
25542:  type?: 'success' | 'warning' | 'error' | 'info';
25543:  onConfirm?: () => void;
25544:  confirmText?: string;
25545:  showCancel?: boolean;
25546:}
25547:
25548:const AcomAlertPopup: React.FC<AcomAlertPopupProps> = ({
25549:  isOpen,
25550:  onClose,
25551:  title,
25552:  subtitle = 'ALERTE SYSTÈME',
25553:  message,
25554:  type = 'info',
25555:  onConfirm,
25556:  confirmText = "D'ACCORD",
25557:  showCancel = false
25558:}) => {
25559:  if (!isOpen) return null;
25560:
25561:  let colorBg = 'bg-indigo-50';
25562:  let colorText = 'text-indigo-600';
25563:  let btnColors = 'bg-rose-500 hover:bg-rose-600 shadow-rose-500/25';
25564:  let IconComponent = Info;
25565:
25566:  if (type === 'success') {
25567:    colorBg = 'bg-indigo-50';
25568:    colorText = 'text-indigo-600';
25569:    btnColors = 'bg-rose-500 hover:bg-rose-600 shadow-rose-500/25';
25570:    IconComponent = CheckCircle;
25571:  } else if (type === 'error') {
25572:    colorBg = 'bg-rose-50';
25573:    colorText = 'text-rose-600';
25574:    btnColors = 'bg-rose-500 hover:bg-rose-600 shadow-rose-500/25';
25575:    IconComponent = AlertCircle;
25576:  } else if (type === 'warning') {
25577:    colorBg = 'bg-amber-50';
25578:    colorText = 'text-amber-600';
25579:    btnColors = 'bg-amber-500 hover:bg-amber-600 shadow-amber-500/25';
25580:    IconComponent = AlertCircle;
25581:  }
25582:
25583:  return (
25584:    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[1000] flex items-center justify-center p-4 bg-slate-900/60 backdrop-blur-sm">
25585:      <div className="relative max-w-sm w-full bg-white rounded-[2.5rem] border border-gray-100 shadow-2xl p-8 pt-16 text-center space-y-6 mt-10 transition-all transform scale-100">
25586:        
25587:        {/* Floating Circle Overlay */}
25588:        <div className="absolute -top-12 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-24 h-24 bg-white rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg border border-gray-100/50">
25589:          <div className={`w-20 h-20 ${colorBg} ${colorText} rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-inner relative`}>
25590:            {type === 'success' ? (
25591:              <svg className="w-10 h-10" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth={2.5}>
25592:                <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M3 19v-8.93a2 2 0 01.89-1.664l8-5.333a2 2 0 012.22 0l8 5.333A2 2 0 0121 10.07V19M3 19a2 2 0 002 2h14a2 2 0 002-2M3 19l6.75-4.5M21 19l-6.75-4.5M3 10l6.75 4.5M21 10l-6.75 4.5m0 0l-1.14.76a2 2 0 01-2.22 0l-1.14-.76" />
25593:              </svg>
25594:            ) : (
25595:              <IconComponent className="w-10 h-10 stroke-[2.5]" />
25596:            )}
25597:            {type === 'success' && (
25598:              <span className="absolute -top-1 -right-1 bg-rose-500 text-white rounded-full w-6 h-6 text-xs font-black flex items-center justify-center border-2 border-white shadow-sm">1</span>
25599:            )}
25600:          </div>
25601:        </div>
25602:
25603:        {/* Text Area */}
25604:        <div className="space-y-2">
25605:          {subtitle && (
25606:            <span className="text-[10px] tracking-widest font-black uppercase text-gray-400 block">{subtitle}</span>
25607:          )}
25608:          <h4 className="text-lg font-black text-slate-800 leading-tight">{title}</h4>
25609:          <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 font-medium leading-relaxed px-1 whitespace-pre-line">{message}</p>
25610:        </div>
25611:
25612:        {/* Buttons */}
25613:        <div className="flex gap-2.5 pt-2">
25614:          {showCancel && (
25615:            <button
25616:              type="button"
25617:              onClick={onClose}
25618:              className="flex-1 py-4 text-xs font-bold text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600 bg-gray-50 border border-gray-100 rounded-2xl active:scale-95 transition-all outline-none"
25619:            >
25620:              ANNULER
25621:            </button>
25622:          )}
25623:          <button
25624:            type="button"
25625:            onClick={() => {
25626:              if (onConfirm) {
25627:                onConfirm();
25628:              } else {
25629:                onClose();
25630:              }
25631:            }}
25632:            className={`flex-1 py-4 text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-wider text-white ${btnColors} rounded-2xl active:scale-95 transition-all shadow-md`}
25633:          >
25634:            {confirmText}
25635:          </button>
25636:        </div>
25637:
25638:      </div>
25639:    </div>
25640:  );
25641:};
25642:
25643:const PressingTarifsManager = ({ merchant }: { merchant: Merchant }) => {
25644:  const [tarifs, setTarifs] = useState<PressingTarifs>(() => {
25645:    const saved = localStorage.getItem(`pressing_tarifs_${merchant.id}`);
25646:    const parsed = saved ? JSON.parse(saved) : DEFAULT_TARIFS;
25647:    if (!parsed.supplements) {
25648:      parsed.supplements = { ...DEFAULT_TARIFS.supplements };
25649:    }
25650:    if (!parsed.articles_costs) {
25651:      parsed.articles_costs = { ...DEFAULT_TARIFS.articles_costs };
25652:    }
25653:    if (!parsed.poids_costs) {
25654:      parsed.poids_costs = { ...DEFAULT_TARIFS.poids_costs };
25655:    }
25656:    if (!parsed.supplements_costs) {
25657:      parsed.supplements_costs = { ...DEFAULT_TARIFS.supplements_costs };
25658:    }
25659:    if (!parsed.articles_images) {
25660:      parsed.articles_images = {};
25661:    }
25662:    return parsed;
25663:  });
25664:
25665:  const [syncing, setSyncing] = useState(false);
25666:
25667:  // Unified pop-up state
25668:  const [popup, setPopup] = useState<{
25669:    isOpen: boolean;
25670:    title: string;
25671:    subtitle?: string;
25672:    message: string;
25673:    type: 'success' | 'warning' | 'error' | 'info';
25674:    onConfirm?: () => void;
25675:    confirmText?: string;
25676:    showCancel?: boolean;
25677:  }>({
25678:    isOpen: false,
25679:    title: '',
25680:    subtitle: '',
25681:    message: '',
25682:    type: 'info'
25683:  });
25684:
25685:  const showAlert = (
25686:    title: string,
25687:    message: string,
25688:    type: 'success' | 'warning' | 'error' | 'info' = 'info',
25689:    onConfirm?: () => void,
25690:    showCancel?: boolean,
25691:    confirmText: string = "D'ACCORD",
25692:    subtitle: string = 'ALERTE SYSTÈME'
25693:  ) => {
25694:    setPopup({
25695:      isOpen: true,
25696:      title,
25697:      subtitle,
25698:      message,
25699:      type,
25700:      onConfirm: onConfirm ? () => {
25701:        onConfirm();
25702:        setPopup(prev => ({ ...prev, isOpen: false }));
25703:      } : undefined,
25704:      showCancel,
25705:      confirmText
25706:    });
25707:  };
25708:
25709:
25710:  // States for adding dynamic items
25711:  const [newArticleName, setNewArticleName] = useState('');
25712:  const [newArticlePrice, setNewArticlePrice] = useState<number | ''>('');
25713:  const [newArticleCost, setNewArticleCost] = useState<number | ''>('');
25714:  const [newArticleImage, setNewArticleImage] = useState('');
25715:  const [showAddArticle, setShowAddArticle] = useState(false);
25716:
25717:  const [newPoidsName, setNewPoidsName] = useState('');
25718:  const [newPoidsPrice, setNewPoidsPrice] = useState<number | ''>('');
25719:  const [newPoidsCost, setNewPoidsCost] = useState<number | ''>('');
25720:  const [showAddPoids, setShowAddPoids] = useState(false);
25721:
25722:  const [newSupplementName, setNewSupplementName] = useState('');
25723:  const [newSupplementDesc, setNewSupplementDesc] = useState('');
25724:  const [newSupplementPrice, setNewSupplementPrice] = useState<number | ''>('');
25725:  const [newSupplementCost, setNewSupplementCost] = useState<number | ''>('');
25726:  const [showAddSupplement, setShowAddSupplement] = useState(false);
25727:
25728:  const handleAddArticle = (e: React.FormEvent) => {
25729:    e.preventDefault();
25730:    if (!newArticleName.trim()) {
25731:      showAlert('Vêtement manquant', 'Veuillez spécifier le nom du vêtement.', 'error');
25732:      return;
25733:    }
25734:    const nameKey = newArticleName.trim().toLowerCase();
25735:    const price = typeof newArticlePrice === 'number' ? newArticlePrice : 0;
25736:    const cost = typeof newArticleCost === 'number' ? newArticleCost : 0;
25737:
25738:    if (tarifs.articles[nameKey] !== undefined) {
25739:      showAlert('Article existant', "Cet article existe déjà dans votre grille tarifaire.", 'error');
25740:      return;
25741:    }
25742:
25743:    setTarifs(prev => ({
25744:      ...prev,
25745:      articles: {
25746:        ...prev.articles,
25747:        [nameKey]: price
25748:      },
25749:      articles_costs: {
25750:        ...(prev.articles_costs || {}),
25751:        [nameKey]: cost
25752:      },
25753:      articles_images: {
25754:        ...(prev.articles_images || {}),
25755:        [nameKey]: newArticleImage
25756:      }
25757:    }));
25758:
25759:    setNewArticleName('');
25760:    setNewArticlePrice('');
25761:    setNewArticleCost('');
25762:    setNewArticleImage('');
25763:    setShowAddArticle(false);
25764:    showAlert('Félicitations !', 'Nouvel article ajouté financièrement ! Cliquez sur Enregistrer pour confirmer.', 'success', undefined, false, "D'ACCORD", "AJOUT CAPTURE");
25765:  };
25766:
25767:  const handleAddPoids = (e: React.FormEvent) => {
25768:    e.preventDefault();
25769:    if (!newPoidsName.trim()) {
25770:      showAlert('Nom manquant', 'Veuillez spécifier le nom du forfait ou formule.', 'error');
25771:      return;
25772:    }
25773:    const poidsKey = newPoidsName.trim().toLowerCase();
25774:    const price = typeof newPoidsPrice === 'number' ? newPoidsPrice : 0;
25775:    const cost = typeof newPoidsCost === 'number' ? newPoidsCost : 0;
25776:
25777:    if (tarifs.poids[poidsKey] !== undefined) {
25778:      showAlert('Formule existante', 'Cette formule Kg existe déjà.', 'error');
25779:      return;
25780:    }
25781:
25782:    setTarifs(prev => ({
25783:      ...prev,
25784:      poids: {
25785:        ...prev.poids,
25786:        [poidsKey]: price
25787:      },
25788:      poids_costs: {
25789:        ...(prev.poids_costs || {}),
25790:        [poidsKey]: cost
25791:      }
25792:    }));
25793:
25794:    setNewPoidsName('');
25795:    setNewPoidsPrice('');
25796:    setNewPoidsCost('');
25797:    setShowAddPoids(false);
25798:    showAlert('Félicitations !', 'Nouveau forfait Kg ajouté financièrement ! Cliquez sur Enregistrer pour confirmer.', 'success', undefined, false, "D'ACCORD", "AJOUT CAPTURE");
25799:  };
25800:
25801:  const handleRemoveArticle = (key: string) => {
25802:    showAlert(
25803:      'Supprimer un article ?',
25804:      `Attention : Vous allez retirer temporairement l'article "${key}" de votre grille.\nCliquez sur Enregistrer pour confirmer définitivement.`,
25805:      'warning',
25806:      () => {
25807:        const updatedArticles = { ...tarifs.articles };
25808:        delete updatedArticles[key];
25809:        const updatedCosts = { ...tarifs.articles_costs };
25810:        delete updatedCosts[key];
25811:        setTarifs(prev => ({
25812:          ...prev,
25813:          articles: updatedArticles,
25814:          articles_costs: updatedCosts
25815:        }));
25816:        showAlert('Retiré !', "L'article a été retiré de la grille temporaire.", 'success');
25817:      },
25818:      true,
25819:      'SUPPRIMER'
25820:    );
25821:  };
25822:
25823:  const handleRemovePoids = (key: string) => {
25824:    showAlert(
25825:      'Supprimer un forfait ?',
25826:      `Attention : Vous allez retirer temporairement la formule Kg "${key}" de votre grille.\nCliquez sur Enregistrer pour confirmer définitivement.`,
25827:      'warning',
25828:      () => {
25829:        const updatedPoids = { ...tarifs.poids };
25830:        delete updatedPoids[key];
25831:        const updatedCosts = { ...tarifs.poids_costs };
25832:        delete updatedCosts[key];
25833:        setTarifs(prev => ({
25834:          ...prev,
25835:          poids: updatedPoids,
25836:          poids_costs: updatedCosts
25837:        }));
25838:        showAlert('Retiré !', "La formule de lavage a été retirée de la grille.", 'success');
25839:      },
25840:      true,
25841:      'SUPPRIMER'
25842:    );
25843:  };
25844:
25845:  const handleAddSupplement = (e: React.FormEvent) => {
25846:    e.preventDefault();
25847:    if (!newSupplementName.trim()) {
25848:      showAlert('Prestation manquante', 'Veuillez spécifier le nom de la prestation optionnelle.', 'error');
25849:      return;
25850:    }
25851:    const rawName = newSupplementName.trim();
25852:    const key = rawName.toLowerCase().normalize("NFD").replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g, "").replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, "-").replace(/(^-|-$)+/g, "");
25853:    
25854:    if (!key) {
25855:      showAlert('Nom non valide', "Le nom de la prestation contient des caractères non autorisés.", 'error');
25856:      return;
25857:    }
25858:
25859:    const currentSupplements = tarifs.supplements || DEFAULT_TARIFS.supplements || {};
25860:    if (currentSupplements[key] !== undefined) {
25861:      showAlert('Prestation existante', "Cette prestation optionnelle existe déjà.", 'error');
25862:      return;
25863:    }
25864:
25865:    const price = typeof newSupplementPrice === 'number' ? newSupplementPrice : 0;
25866:    const cost = typeof newSupplementCost === 'number' ? newSupplementCost : 0;
25867:    const desc = newSupplementDesc.trim() || 'Prestation optionnelle complémentaire';
25868:
25869:    setTarifs(prev => ({
25870:      ...prev,
25871:      supplements: {
25872:        ...(prev.supplements || DEFAULT_TARIFS.supplements || {}),
25873:        [key]: price
25874:      },
25875:      supplements_labels: {
25876:        ...prev.supplements_labels,
25877:        [key]: desc
25878:      },
25879:      supplements_display_names: {
25880:        ...(prev as any).supplements_display_names,
25881:        [key]: rawName
25882:      },
25883:      supplements_costs: {
25884:        ...(prev.supplements_costs || {}),
25885:        [key]: cost
25886:      }
25887:    }));
25888:
25889:    setNewSupplementName('');
25890:    setNewSupplementDesc('');
25891:    setNewSupplementPrice('');
25892:    setNewSupplementCost('');
25893:    setShowAddSupplement(false);
25894:    showAlert('Félicitations !', 'Nouvelle prestation optionnelle ajoutée financièrement ! Cliquez sur Enregistrer pour confirmer.', 'success', undefined, false, "D'ACCORD", "AJOUT CAPTURE");
25895:  };
25896:
25897:  const handleRemoveSupplement = (key: string) => {
25898:    showAlert(
25899:      'Supprimer une prestation ?',
25900:      `Attention : Vous allez retirer la prestation optionnelle "${key}" de votre grille.\nCliquez sur Enregistrer pour confirmer définitivement.`,
25901:      'warning',
25902:      () => {
25903:        const updatedSupplements = { ...(tarifs.supplements || DEFAULT_TARIFS.supplements || {}) };
25904:        delete updatedSupplements[key];
25905:        const updatedLabels = { ...tarifs.supplements_labels };
25906:        delete updatedLabels[key];
25907:        setTarifs(prev => ({
25908:          ...prev,
25909:          supplements: updatedSupplements,
25910:          supplements_labels: updatedLabels
25911:        }));
25912:        showAlert('Retirée !', "La prestation optionnelle a été retirée de la grille temporaire.", 'success');
25913:      },
25914:      true,
25915:      'SUPPRIMER'
25916:    );
25917:  };
25918:
25919:  const handleSave = async () => {
25920:    setSyncing(true);
25921:    try {
25922:      localStorage.setItem(`pressing_tarifs_${merchant.id}`, JSON.stringify(tarifs));
25923:      
25924:      // Auto-sync these articles as products so AcomZone clients can see them
25925:      const articleNames: Record<string, string> = {
25926:        chemise: 'Chemise', pantalon: 'Pantalon', costume: 'Costume',
25927:        robe: 'Robe', drap: 'Drap', couverture: 'Couverture',
25928:        rideau: 'Rideau', autre: 'Autre (Pièce)'
25929:      };
25930:
25931:      const promises = Object.entries(tarifs.articles).map(([key, price]) => {
25932:        return dbService.merchantProducts.save({
25933:          id: `press_art_${key}_${merchant.id}`,
25934:          merchantId: merchant.id,
25935:          name: articleNames[key] || key.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + key.slice(1),
25936:          price: price,
25937:          category: 'Pressing & Nettoyage',
25938:          description: `Service de nettoyage et repassage professionnel pour ${articleNames[key] || key}.`,
25939:          stockQuantity: 999, // infinite
25940:          images: ["https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1545155998-20bedb51d206?auto=format&fit=crop&w=600&q=80"]
25941:        } as any);
25942:      });
25943:
25944:      const weightProducts = Object.entries(tarifs.poids).map(([key, price]) => {
25945:        const weightNames: Record<string, string> = {
25946:          standard: 'Lavage au Poids (Standard) - Par Kg',
25947:          premium: 'Lavage au Poids (Premium) - Par Kg',
25948:          express: 'Lavage au Poids (Express) - Par Kg'
25949:        };
25950:        return dbService.merchantProducts.save({
25951:          id: `press_poids_${key}_${merchant.id}`,
25952:          merchantId: merchant.id,
25953:          name: weightNames[key] || `Lavage au poids (${key.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + key.slice(1)})`,
25954:          price: price,
25955:          category: 'Service au Kilo',
25956:          description: `Tarification au kilo pour le nettoyage en mode ${key}.`,
25957:          stockQuantity: 999,
25958:          images: ["https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1545155998-20bedb51d206?auto=format&fit=crop&w=600&q=80"]
25959:        } as any);
25960:      });
25961:
25962:      await Promise.all([...promises, ...weightProducts]);
25963:
25964:      showAlert('Enregistrement Réussi', 'Les tarifs de pressing et prestations optionnelles ont été sauvegardés avec succès !', 'success', undefined, false, "D'ACCORD", "SAAS PRESSING");
25965:    } catch (e) {
25966:      showAlert('Erreur de sauvegarde', 'Erreur lors de la synchronisation de vos tarifs.', 'error');
25967:    } finally {
25968:      setSyncing(false);
25969:    }
25970:  };
25971:
25972:  return (
25973:    <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} className="space-y-8">
25974:      <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row justify-between sm:items-center gap-4 bg-white p-6 rounded-3xl border border-gray-100 shadow-sm">
25975:        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
25976:          <span className="p-3 bg-[#faf5ff] text-[#5c2197] rounded-2xl border border-purple-100 flex items-center justify-center">
25977:            <WashingMachine className="w-7 h-7 animate-pulse" />
25978:          </span>
25979:          <div>
25980:            <h2 className="text-2xl font-black text-ink tracking-tight">
25981:              Paramétrage des Tarifs
25982:            </h2>
25983:            <p className="text-gray-500 text-xs mt-1">Définissez vos grilles tarifaires par article ou par kilo (Kg).</p>
25984:          </div>
25985:        </div>
25986:        <button
25987:          onClick={handleSave}
25988:          disabled={syncing}
25989:          className="px-6 py-3 bg-[#5c2197] hover:bg-[#481977] text-white rounded-full font-bold text-xs uppercase tracking-widest shadow-lg shadow-purple-900/10 transition-all flex items-center gap-2 disabled:opacity-50"
25990:        >
25991:          <Save className="w-4 h-4" /> Enregistrer les Tarifs
25992:        </button>
25993:      </div>
25994:
25995:      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-8">
25996:        {/* Article Billing */}
25997:        <div className="bg-white rounded-[2rem] border border-gray-100 shadow-sm p-8 space-y-6 flex flex-col justify-between overflow-hidden">
25998:          <div className="space-y-6">
25999:            <div className="border-b border-gray-100 pb-4 flex justify-between items-center bg-white">
26000:              <div>
26001:                <h3 className="text-lg font-black text-ink flex items-center gap-2">
26002:                  <Calculator className="w-5 h-5 text-[#5c2197]" /> Tarifs par Article (Vêtements)
26003:                </h3>
26004:                <p className="text-gray-400 text-xs mt-0.5">Tarifs unitaires et coûts intrants appliqués lors du dépôt de vêtements individuels.</p>
26005:              </div>
26006:            </div>
26007:
26008:            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
26009:              {Object.keys(tarifs.articles).map((key) => {
26010:                const typedKey = key as keyof typeof tarifs.articles;
26011:                return (
26012:                  <div key={key} className="p-4 bg-gray-50 rounded-2xl border border-gray-100/50 flex flex-col gap-2 relative group transition-all hover:shadow-sm">
26013:                    <div className="flex justify-between items-center gap-2">
26014:                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 max-w-[75%]">
26015:                        <div className="relative group/img flex-shrink-0">
26016:                          <img 
26017:                            src={tarifs.articles_images?.[key] || tarifs.articles_images?.[key.toLowerCase()] || ARTICLE_IMAGES[key.toLowerCase()] || ARTICLE_IMAGES['autre']} 
26018:                            alt={key}
26019:                            referrerPolicy="no-referrer"
26020:                            className="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl object-cover border border-purple-100/60 shadow-3xs bg-slate-100"
26021:                          />

26023:                            <span className="text-[7.5px] text-white font-bold uppercase tracking-wider">Joindre</span>
26024:                            <input

26026:                              accept="image/*" 
26027:                              className="hidden"

26030:                                if (file) {

26034:                                      articles_images: {
26035:                                        ...(prev.articles_images || {}),
26036:                                        [key]: base64
26037:                                      }
26038:                                    }));
26039:                                  });
26040:                                }
26041:                              }}
26042:                            />
26043:                          </label>
26044:                          {tarifs.articles_images?.[key] && (
26045:                            <button
26046:                              type="button"
26047:                              onClick={() => {
26048:                                setTarifs(prev => {
26049:                                  const updated = { ...(prev.articles_images || {}) };
26050:                                  delete updated[key];
26051:                                  return { ...prev, articles_images: updated };
26052:                                });
26053:                              }}
26054:                              className="absolute -top-1 -right-1 bg-rose-500 hover:bg-rose-600 text-white rounded-full p-0.5 shadow-md active:scale-95 transition-all border border-white"
26055:                              title="Restaurer l'image par défaut"
26056:                            >
26057:                              <X className="w-2.5 h-2.5" />
26058:                            </button>
26059:                          )}
26060:                        </div>
26061:                        <span className="font-bold text-xs text-ink uppercase tracking-wider capitalize truncate">{key}</span>
26062:                      </div>
26063:                      <button
26064:                        type="button"
26065:                        onClick={() => handleRemoveArticle(key)}
26066:                        className="text-gray-300 hover:text-rose-500 hover:bg-rose-50 rounded-lg p-1.5 transition-all opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 flex-shrink-0"
26067:                        title="Détruire cette ligne d'article"
26068:                      >

26080:                          setTarifs({

26095:                        onChange={(e) => {
