26447:            {showAddSupplement ? (
26448:              <form onSubmit={handleAddSupplement} className="p-5 bg-gray-50/50 rounded-2xl border border-gray-200/60 space-y-4">
26449:                <span className="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-[#5c2197] font-bold block flex items-center gap-1.5">
26450:                  <Sparkles className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin-slow text-[#5c2197]" /> Nouvelle Prestation Optionnelle (Supplément)
26451:                </span>
26452:                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-3">
26453:                  <div>
26454:                    <label className="block text-[9px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wider mb-1">Nom du service</label>
26455:                    <input
26456:                      type="text"
26457:                      required
26458:                      placeholder="ex: Parfumage, Pliage sous vide"
26459:                      value={newSupplementName}
26460:                      onChange={e => setNewSupplementName(e.target.value)}
26461:                      className="w-full px-3 py-2 bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-200 text-xs font-bold font-sans text-ink outline-none"
26462:                    />
26463:                  </div>
26464:                  <div>
26465:                    <label className="block text-[9px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wider mb-1">Description / Détails</label>
26466:                    <input
26467:                      type="text"
26468:                      placeholder="ex: Parfum de luxe"
26469:                      value={newSupplementDesc}
26470:                      onChange={e => setNewSupplementDesc(e.target.value)}
26471:                      className="w-full px-3 py-2 bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-200 text-xs font-bold font-sans text-ink outline-none"
26472:                    />
26473:                  </div>
26474:                  <div>
26475:                    <label className="block text-[9px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wider mb-1">Tarif Supplément (FCFA)</label>
26476:                    <input
26477:                      type="number"
26478:                      required
26479:                      placeholder="ex: 500"
26480:                      value={newSupplementPrice}
26481:                      onChange={e => setNewSupplementPrice(e.target.value === '' ? '' : Math.max(0, parseInt(e.target.value) || 0))}
26482:                      className="w-full px-3 py-2 bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-200 font-mono text-xs font-bold text-ink text-right pr-4 outline-none"
26483:                    />
26484:                  </div>
26485:                  <div>
26486:                    <label className="block text-[9px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wider mb-1">Coût Intrant (FCFA)</label>
26487:                    <input
26488:                      type="number"
26489:                      placeholder="ex: 100"
26490:                      value={newSupplementCost}
26491:                      onChange={e => setNewSupplementCost(e.target.value === '' ? '' : Math.max(0, parseInt(e.target.value) || 0))}
26492:                      className="w-full px-3 py-2 bg-white rounded-xl border border-dashed border-purple-200 font-mono text-xs text-[#5c2197] text-right pr-4 outline-none"
26493:                    />
26494:                  </div>
26495:                </div>
26496:                <div className="flex gap-2 justify-end">
26497:                  <button
26498:                    type="button"
26499:                    onClick={() => { setShowAddSupplement(false); setNewSupplementName(''); setNewSupplementDesc(''); setNewSupplementPrice(''); setNewSupplementCost(''); }}
26500:                    className="px-4 py-2 text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600 bg-white border border-gray-100 rounded-lg"
26501:                  >
26502:                    Annuler
26503:                  </button>
26504:                  <button
26505:                    type="submit"
26506:                    className="px-4 py-2 text-[10px] font-bold text-white bg-[#5c2197] hover:bg-[#481977] rounded-lg flex items-center gap-1.5 shadow-sm"
26507:                  >
26508:                    <Plus className="w-3.5 h-3.5" /> Ajouter
26509:                  </button>
26510:                </div>
26511:              </form>
26512:            ) : (
26513:              <button
26514:                type="button"
26515:                onClick={() => setShowAddSupplement(true)}
26516:                className="w-full py-4 border-2 border-dashed border-gray-200 hover:border-purple-400/55 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center gap-2 text-xs font-black text-gray-500 hover:text-[#5c2197] transition-all bg-gray-50/10 hover:bg-[#5c2197]/5 pb-4"
26517:              >
26518:                <Plus className="w-4 h-4 text-[#5c2197]" /> AJOUTER UNE PRESTATION OPTIONNELLE
26519:              </button>
26520:            )}
26521:          </div>
26522:        </div>
26523:
26524:      </div>
26525:
26526:      {/* Modern custom Alert Popup for all messages and notifications in tariffs */}
26527:      <AcomAlertPopup
26528:        isOpen={popup.isOpen}
26529:        onClose={() => setPopup(prev => ({ ...prev, isOpen: false }))}
26530:        {...popup}
26531:      />
26532:    </motion.div>
26533:  );
26534:};
26535:
26536:interface PressingClosure {
26537:  id: string;
26538:  date: string;
26539:  timestamp: string;
26540:  cashierName: string;
26541:  totalPressingRevenue: number;
26542:  totalDetergentRevenue: number;
26543:  totalExpenses?: number; // added to support expenses
26544:  totalTheoreticalRevenue: number;
26545:  actualCashCounted: number;
26546:  discrepancy: number; // actual - theoretical
26547:  notes: string;
26548:  status: 'closed';
26549:  sentToManager?: boolean;
26550:}
26551:
26552:const PressingClosureManager = ({ merchant }: { merchant: Merchant }) => {
26553:  const [closures, setClosures] = useState<PressingClosure[]>(() => {
26554:    const saved = localStorage.getItem(`pressing_closures_${merchant.id}`);
26555:    return saved ? JSON.parse(saved) : [];
26556:  });
26557:
26558:  const [closureMailFeedback, setClosureMailFeedback] = useState<Record<string, boolean>>({});
26559:
26560:  const [closureDate, setClosureDate] = useState(() => format(new Date(), 'yyyy-MM-dd'));
26561:  const [cashierName, setCashierName] = useState('');
26562:  const [actualCash, setActualCash] = useState<number>(0);
26563:  const [closureNotes, setClosureNotes] = useState('');
26564:
26565:  // Unified pop-up state for PressingClosureManager
26566:  const [popup, setPopup] = useState<{
26567:    isOpen: boolean;
26568:    title: string;
26569:    subtitle?: string;
26570:    message: string;
26571:    type: 'success' | 'warning' | 'error' | 'info';
26572:    onConfirm?: () => void;
26573:    confirmText?: string;
26574:    showCancel?: boolean;
26575:  }>({
26576:    isOpen: false,
26577:    title: '',
26578:    subtitle: '',
26579:    message: '',
26580:    type: 'info'
26581:  });
26582:
26583:  const showAlert = (
26584:    title: string,
26585:    message: string,
26586:    type: 'success' | 'warning' | 'error' | 'info' = 'info',
26587:    onConfirm?: () => void,
26588:    showCancel?: boolean,
26589:    confirmText: string = "D'ACCORD",
26590:    subtitle: string = 'ALERTE SYSTÈME'
26591:  ) => {
26592:    setPopup({
26593:      isOpen: true,
26594:      title,
26595:      subtitle,
26596:      message,
26597:      type,
26598:      onConfirm: onConfirm ? () => {
26599:        onConfirm();
26600:        setPopup(prev => ({ ...prev, isOpen: false }));
26601:      } : undefined,
26602:      showCancel,
26603:      confirmText
26604:    });
26605:  };
26606:
26607:  const managerPhone = merchant.managerNotifications?.whatsappPhone || '';
26608:  const managerEmail = merchant.managerNotifications?.email || '';
26609:  const autoEmailManager = merchant.managerNotifications?.notifyOnCashClosure !== false;
26610:
26611:  useEffect(() => {
26612:    localStorage.setItem(`pressing_closures_${merchant.id}`, JSON.stringify(closures));
26613:  }, [closures, merchant.id]);
26614:
26615:  // Read direct database inputs
26616:  const tickets = useMemo<PressingTicket[]>(() => {
26617:    try {
26618:      const saved = localStorage.getItem(`pressing_tickets_${merchant.id}`);
26619:      return saved ? JSON.parse(saved) : [];
26620:    } catch {
26621:      return [];
26622:    }
26623:  }, [merchant.id, closures]);
26624:
26625:  const detergentSales = useMemo<any[]>(() => {
26626:    try {
26627:      const saved = localStorage.getItem(`pressing_stock_sales_${merchant.id}`);
26628:      return saved ? JSON.parse(saved) : [];
26629:    } catch {
26630:      return [];
26631:    }
26632:  }, [merchant.id, closures]);
26633:
26634:  // Fetch local expenses using safe useLiveQuery
26635:  const expenses = useLiveQuery(() => 
26636:    db.expenses.where('merchantId').equals(merchant.id).reverse().sortBy('createdAt')
26637:  , []) || [];
26638:
26639:  const products = useMemo(() => {
26640:    try {
26641:      const saved = localStorage.getItem(`pressing_stock_products_${merchant.id}`);
26642:      return saved ? JSON.parse(saved) : [];
26643:    } catch {
26644:      return [];
26645:    }
26646:  }, [merchant.id]);
26647:
26648:  const lowStockItems = useMemo(() => products.filter((p: any) => Number(p.stock || 0) > 0 && Number(p.stock || 0) <= (Number(p.minStock) || 5)), [products]);
26649:  const outOfStockItems = useMemo(() => products.filter((p: any) => Number(p.stock || 0) <= 0), [products]);
26650:
26651:  // Memos for daily stats
26652:  const dailyPressingTickets = useMemo(() => {
26653:    return tickets.filter(t => t.depositDate === closureDate && t.status !== 'quotation');
26654:  }, [tickets, closureDate]);
26655:
26656:  const dailyDepositsRevenue = useMemo(() => {
26657:    return dailyPressingTickets.reduce((sum, t) => {
26658:      const atDeposit = t.amountPaidAtDeposit !== undefined ? t.amountPaidAtDeposit : (t.amountPaid || 0);
26659:      return sum + atDeposit;
26660:    }, 0);
26661:  }, [dailyPressingTickets]);
26662:
26663:  const dailyBalancesCollected = useMemo(() => {
26664:    return tickets.filter(t => t.balanceCollectedDate === closureDate);
26665:  }, [tickets, closureDate]);
26666:
26667:  const dailyBalancesRevenue = useMemo(() => {
26668:    return dailyBalancesCollected.reduce((sum, t) => sum + (t.balanceCollectedAmount || 0), 0);
26669:  }, [dailyBalancesCollected]);
26670:
26671:  const dailyPressingRevenue = useMemo(() => {
26672:    return dailyDepositsRevenue + dailyBalancesRevenue;
26673:  }, [dailyDepositsRevenue, dailyBalancesRevenue]);
26674:
26675:  const dailyDetergentSales = useMemo(() => {
26676:    return detergentSales.filter(s => s.date && s.date.startsWith(closureDate));
26677:  }, [detergentSales, closureDate]);
26678:
26679:  const dailyDetergentRevenue = useMemo(() => {
26680:    return dailyDetergentSales.reduce((sum, s) => sum + (s.total || 0), 0);
26681:  }, [dailyDetergentSales]);
26682:
26683:  // Expenses filter
26684:  const dailyExpenses = useMemo(() => {
26685:    return expenses.filter(e => {
26686:      if (e.date && e.date.startsWith(closureDate)) return true;
26687:      if (e.createdAt) {
26688:        try {
26689:          const d = e.createdAt.seconds ? new Date(e.createdAt.seconds * 1000) : new Date(e.createdAt);
26690:          return d.toISOString().startsWith(closureDate);
26691:        } catch {
26692:          return false;
26693:        }
26694:      }
26695:      return false;
26696:    });
26697:  }, [expenses, closureDate]);
26698:
26699:  const dailyExpensesTotal = useMemo(() => {
26700:    return dailyExpenses.reduce((sum, e) => sum + (e.amount || 0), 0);
26701:  }, [dailyExpenses]);
26702:
26703:  // Expected cash in hand including expenditures
26704:  const totalTheoreticalRevenue = useMemo(() => {
26705:    return Math.max(0, dailyPressingRevenue + dailyDetergentRevenue - dailyExpensesTotal);
26706:  }, [dailyPressingRevenue, dailyDetergentRevenue, dailyExpensesTotal]);
26707:
26708:  const getManagerClosureNotificationMessage = useCallback((c: PressingClosure) => {
26709:    const diffSign = c.discrepancy >= 0 ? '+' : '';
26710:    const diffText = c.discrepancy === 0 ? 'Parfait (0 FCFA)' : `${diffSign}${c.discrepancy} FCFA`;
26711:    
26712:    let message = `👑 [CLÔTURE DE CAISSE DE PRESSING] 📊\n` +
26713:           `--------------------------------\n` +
26714:           `• Date d'Activité : ${c.date}\n` +
26715:           `• Date Clôture : ${new Date(c.timestamp).toLocaleString('fr-FR')}\n` +
26716:           `• Caissier / Opérateur : ${c.cashierName || 'Non renseigné'}\n` +
26717:           `--------------------------------\n` +
26718:           `RÉSUMÉ DES FLUX :\n` +
26719:           `• Recettes Services Pressing : +${c.totalPressingRevenue.toLocaleString()} FCFA\n` +
26720:           `• Ventes Produits Détergents : +${c.totalDetergentRevenue.toLocaleString()} FCFA\n` +
26721:           `• Dépenses Enregistrées : -${(c.totalExpenses || 0).toLocaleString()} FCFA\n` +
26722:           `--------------------------------\n` +
26723:           `• SOLDE ATTENDU (Théorique) : ${c.totalTheoreticalRevenue.toLocaleString()} FCFA\n` +
26724:           `• ESPÈCES RÉELLES COMPTÉES : ${c.actualCashCounted.toLocaleString()} FCFA\n` +
26725:           `• ÉCART DE CAISSE : ${diffText} (${c.discrepancy < 0 ? '⚠️ MANQUANT' : c.discrepancy > 0 ? '🟢 SURPLUS' : '✅ EQUILIBRE'})\n` +
26726:           `--------------------------------\n`;
26727:
26728:    if (lowStockItems.length > 0 || outOfStockItems.length > 0) {
26729:      message += `🚨 ALERTES STOCK :\n`;
26730:      if (outOfStockItems.length > 0) {
26731:        message += `❌ Épuisés : ${outOfStockItems.map(p => p.name).join(', ')}\n`;
26732:      }
26733:      if (lowStockItems.length > 0) {
26734:        message += `⚠️ Point de rupture : ${lowStockItems.map(p => `${p.name} (${p.stock || 0})`).join(', ')}\n`;
26735:      }
26736:      message += `--------------------------------\n`;
26737:    }
26738:
26739:    message += `OBSERVATIONS :\n` +
26740:           `"${c.notes || 'Aucun commentaire.'}"\n` +
26741:           `--------------------------------\n` +
26742:           `Rapport de clôture journalier transmis en Temps Réel via l'application SaaS ${merchant.name || 'ACOM'}.`;
26743:
26744:    return message;
26745:  }, [merchant, lowStockItems, outOfStockItems]);
26746:
26747:  const sendSilentBackgroundClosureEmailToManager = useCallback(async (c: PressingClosure) => {
26748:    if (!managerEmail || !managerEmail.trim()) return false;
26749:
26750:    const title = `📊 CLÔTURE DE CAISSE JOURNALIÈRE — ${c.date}`;
26751:    const themeColor = '#1e1b4b'; // Deep Navy indigo
26752:    const diffColor = c.discrepancy < 0 ? '#ef4444' : c.discrepancy > 0 ? '#10b981' : '#64748b';
26753:    const diffLabel = c.discrepancy < 0 ? 'MANQUANT (Perte) ⚠️' : c.discrepancy > 0 ? 'SURPLUS (Excédent) 🟢' : 'ÉQUILIBRÉ 👍';
26754:
26755:    const mailHtml = `
26756:      <div style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 20px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 12px; color: #1e293b; background-color: #ffffff;">
26757:        <div style="background-color: ${themeColor}; color: white; padding: 20px; border-radius: 8px; text-align: center;">
26758:          <h2 style="margin: 0; font-size: 20px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px;">${merchant.name || 'Pressing'}</h2>
26759:          <p style="margin: 5px 0 0; font-size: 13px; opacity: 0.9;">Rapport de Clôture de Caisse Journalier</p>
26760:        </div>
26761:
26762:        <div style="margin-top: 25px;">
26763:          <h3 style="color: ${themeColor}; border-bottom: 2px solid #e2e8f0; padding-bottom: 8px; margin-bottom: 15px;">📊 État de la Caisse (Intègre les dépenses)</h3>
26764:          
26765:          <table style="width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-size: 13px;">
26766:            <tr>
26767:              <td style="padding: 10px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; color: #64748b; width: 200px;"><strong>Date d'Activité :</strong></td>
26768:              <td style="padding: 10px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; font-weight: bold; color: #0f172a;">${c.date}</td>
26769:            </tr>
26770:            <tr>
26771:              <td style="padding: 10px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; color: #64748b;"><strong>Heure de Clôture :</strong></td>
26772:              <td style="padding: 10px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9;">${new Date(c.timestamp).toLocaleTimeString('fr-FR')}</td>
26773:            </tr>
26774:            <tr>
26775:              <td style="padding: 10px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; color: #64748b;"><strong>Caissier / Gestionnaire :</strong></td>
26776:              <td style="padding: 10px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; font-weight: bold;">${c.cashierName || 'Non renseigné'}</td>
26777:            </tr>
26778:            
26779:            <tr>
26780:              <td colspan="2" style="padding: 15px 0 5px 0; font-weight: bold; color: ${themeColor}; font-size: 14px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px;">DÉTAIL DES FLUX :</td>
26781:            </tr>
26782:            <tr>
26783:              <td style="padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; color: #64748b; padding-left: 10px;">• Recettes Services Pressing :</td>
26784:              <td style="padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; font-weight: bold; color: #10b981;">+${c.totalPressingRevenue.toLocaleString()} FCFA</td>
26785:            </tr>
26786:            <tr>
26787:              <td style="padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; color: #64748b; padding-left: 10px;">• Ventes Détergents & Produits :</td>
26788:              <td style="padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; font-weight: bold; color: #10b981;">+${c.totalDetergentRevenue.toLocaleString()} FCFA</td>
26789:            </tr>
26790:            <tr>
26791:              <td style="padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; color: #64748b; padding-left: 10px;">• Total Dépenses du Jour :</td>
26792:              <td style="padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; font-weight: bold; color: #ef4444;">-${(c.totalExpenses || 0).toLocaleString()} FCFA</td>
26793:            </tr>
26794:            
26795:            <tr>
26796:              <td colspan="2" style="padding: 15px 0 5px 0; font-weight: bold; color: ${themeColor}; font-size: 14px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px;">RAPPROCHEMENT DE CAISSE :</td>
26797:            </tr>
26798:            <tr>
26799:              <td style="padding: 10px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; color: #64748b;"><strong>Total Théorique Attendu :</strong></td>
26800:              <td style="padding: 10px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; font-weight: bold; font-size: 14px;">${c.totalTheoreticalRevenue.toLocaleString()} FCFA</td>
26801:            </tr>
26802:            <tr>
26803:              <td style="padding: 10px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; color: #64748b;"><strong>Espèces Réelles Comptées :</strong></td>
26804:              <td style="padding: 10px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; font-weight: bold; font-size: 14px; color: #1e1b4b;">${c.actualCashCounted.toLocaleString()} FCFA</td>
26805:            </tr>
26806:            <tr style="background-color: #f8fafc;">
26807:              <td style="padding: 12px 10px; color: #0f172a; font-weight: bold;"><strong>ÉCART DE CAISSE :</strong></td>
26808:              <td style="padding: 12px 10px; font-weight: bold; font-size: 15px; color: ${diffColor};">
26809:                ${c.discrepancy >= 0 ? '+' : ''}${c.discrepancy.toLocaleString()} FCFA
26810:                <div style="font-size: 11px; font-weight: normal; margin-top: 2px;">${diffLabel}</div>
26811:              </td>
26812:            </tr>
26813:            ${c.notes ? `
26814:            <tr>
26815:              <td style="padding: 12px 0 0 0; color: #64748b;" valign="top"><strong>Notes & Observations :</strong></td>
26816:              <td style="padding: 12px 0 0 0; font-style: italic; color: #475569;">"${c.notes}"</td>
26817:            </tr>
26818:            ` : ''}
26819:            ${(lowStockItems.length > 0 || outOfStockItems.length > 0) ? `
26820:            <tr>
26821:              <td colspan="2" style="padding: 15px 0 5px 0; font-weight: bold; color: #ef4444; font-size: 14px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px;">🚨 ALERTES STOCK :</td>
26822:            </tr>
26823:            ${outOfStockItems.length > 0 ? `
26824:            <tr>
26825:              <td style="padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; color: #64748b; padding-left: 10px;">❌ Articles Épuisés :</td>
26826:              <td style="padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; font-weight: bold; color: #ef4444;">${outOfStockItems.map(p => p.name).join(', ')}</td>
26827:            </tr>
26828:            ` : ''}
26829:            ${lowStockItems.length > 0 ? `
26830:            <tr>
26831:              <td style="padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; color: #64748b; padding-left: 10px;">⚠️ Point de Rupture :</td>
26832:              <td style="padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; font-weight: bold; color: #f59e0b;">${lowStockItems.map(p => `${p.name} (${p.stock || 0})`).join(', ')}</td>
26833:            </tr>
26834:            ` : ''}
26835:            ` : ''}
26836:          </table>
26837:        </div>
26838:
26839:        <div style="margin-top: 35px; padding-top: 15px; border-top: 1px solid #f1f5f9; text-align: center; font-size: 11px; color: #94a3b8;">
26840:          Ce rapport de clôture intégrant les dépenses a été expédié automatiquement en temps réel au gérant.<br/>
26841:          <strong>Système de Suivi SaaS ${merchant.name || 'ACOM'}</strong>.
26842:        </div>
26843:      </div>
26844:    `;
26845:
26846:    try {
26847:      const response = await sendEmailDirectlyOrViaBackend({
26848:        to: managerEmail,
26849:        from: merchant.managerNotifications?.emailFrom || undefined,
26850:        subject: `📊 [CLÔTURE CAISSE] Rapport du ${c.date} - ${merchant.name || 'Pressing'}`,
26851:        html: mailHtml
26852:      }, {
26853:        resendApiKey: merchant.managerNotifications?.resendApiKey,
26854:        defaultFrom: merchant.managerNotifications?.emailFrom
26855:      });
26856:
26857:      if (!response.ok) {
26858:        const errorData = await response.json().catch(() => null);
26859:        console.error('Error dispatching silent manager background mail:', errorData || response.statusText);
26860:        showAlert("Erreur d'envoi Email (Clôture)", `L'envoi automatique au gérant a échoué. ${errorData?.error || response.statusText}`, "error");
26861:      }
26862:      return response.ok;
26863:    } catch (error) {
26864:      console.error('Error dispatching silent manager background mail:', error);
26865:      return false;
26866:    }
26867:  }, [managerEmail, merchant, lowStockItems, outOfStockItems]);
26868:
26869:  const dispatchManagerClosureNotif = (c: PressingClosure, method: 'whatsapp' | 'email') => {
26870:    const textNotif = getManagerClosureNotificationMessage(c);
26871:    
26872:    if (method === 'whatsapp') {
26873:      const isMobile = /iPhone|iPad|iPod|Android/i.test(navigator.userAgent);
26874:      const url = `https://${isMobile ? 'api' : 'web'}.whatsapp.com/send?phone=${managerPhone.replace(/\s+/g, '')}&text=${encodeURIComponent(textNotif)}`;
26875:      window.open(url, '_blank');
26876:      showAlert('Rapport WhatsApp', 'Rapport de clôture prêt pour envoi via WhatsApp ! Nous avons ouvert la messagerie.', 'success', undefined, false, "D'ACCORD", "COMMUNICATION EN COURS");
26877:    } else {
26878:      const url = `mailto:${managerEmail}?subject=${encodeURIComponent(`📊 CLÔTURE DE CAISSE JOURNALIÈRE — ${c.date}`)}&body=${encodeURIComponent(textNotif)}`;
26879:      window.open(url, '_blank');
26880:      showAlert('Rapport Email', "Rapport de clôture prêt dans votre logiciel d'e-mail !", 'success', undefined, false, "D'ACCORD", "COMMUNICATION EN COURS");
26881:    }
26882:  };
26883:
26884:  return (
26885:    <motion.div 
26886:      initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
26887:      animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
26888:      exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -20 }}
26889:      className="space-y-6"
26890:    >
26891:      <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row justify-between items-start sm:items-center gap-4">
26892:        <div>
26893:          <h2 className="text-2xl font-black text-ink">🔒 Clôture de Caisse & Rapport Journalier</h2>
26894:          <p className="text-[10px] font-mono text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mt-1">Supervision journalière & rapprochement financier</p>
26895:        </div>
26896:      </div>
26897:
26898:      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8">
26899:        {/* Closure Form & Reconciliation Card */}
26900:        <div className="lg:col-span-6 space-y-6">
26901:          <div className="bg-white rounded-[2rem] border border-gray-100 shadow-sm p-8 space-y-6">
26902:            <div className="border-b border-gray-100 pb-4 flex justify-between items-center">
26903:              <div>
26904:                <h3 className="text-lg font-black text-ink">🔑 Clôturer la caisse d'aujourd'hui</h3>
26905:                <p className="text-gray-400 text-xs mt-0.5">Vérifiez les calculs puis saisissez l'encours en espèces.</p>
26906:              </div>

26908:                type="date"
26909:                value={closureDate}
26910:                onChange={e => setClosureDate(e.target.value)}
26911:                className="px-3 py-1.5 rounded-xl border border-gray-200 text-xs font-bold text-gray-700 outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#5c2197]/20 bg-gray-50/50"
26912:              />
26913:            </div>

26918:                  <span className="block text-[8px] font-mono text-[#5c2197] uppercase tracking-wider">Recettes Pressing (+)</span>
26919:                  <strong className="block text-base font-black text-[#481977] mt-1">{dailyPressingRevenue.toLocaleString()} F</strong>
26920:                  <span className="text-[8px] text-[#5c2197] font-mono mt-0.5 block">
26921:                    {dailyDepositsRevenue.toLocaleString()} F ({dailyPressingTickets.length} dép) + {dailyBalancesRevenue.toLocaleString()} F ({dailyBalancesCollected.length} soldes)

26982:                          ? 'text-emerald-700' 
26983:                          : actualCash > totalTheoreticalRevenue 
26984:                            ? 'text-blue-700' 
26985:                            : 'text-rose-700'
26986:                      }`}>
26987:                        {actualCash === totalTheoreticalRevenue 
26988:                          ? '✅ Caisse parfaitement équilibrée' 
26989:                          : actualCash > totalTheoreticalRevenue 
26990:                            ? `🟢 Surplus de caisse (+${(actualCash - totalTheoreticalRevenue).toLocaleString()} FCFA)` 
26991:                            : `⚠️ Manquant détecté (${(actualCash - totalTheoreticalRevenue).toLocaleString()} FCFA)`}
26992:                      </strong>
26993:                    </div>
26994:                    <span className="font-mono font-bold text-xs">
26995:                      {actualCash === totalTheoreticalRevenue ? 'OK' : `${actualCash - totalTheoreticalRevenue > 0 ? '+' : ''}${(actualCash - totalTheoreticalRevenue).toLocaleString()} F`}
26996:                    </span>
26997:                  </div>
26998:                </div>
26999:              )}
27000:
27001:              {(lowStockItems.length > 0 || outOfStockItems.length > 0) && (

27003:                  <h4 className="text-sm font-bold text-orange-800 mb-2">🚨 Alertes de Stock</h4>

27007:                    </div>

27012:                    </div>
27013:                  )}
27014:                </div>

27033:                    return;
27034:                  }
27035:                  
27036:                  const runClosureCreation = async () => {
27037:                    const newClosure: PressingClosure = {
27038:                      id: `closure_${Date.now()}`,
27039:                      date: closureDate,
27040:                      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
27041:                      cashierName: cashierName.trim(),
27042:                      totalPressingRevenue: dailyPressingRevenue,
27043:                      totalDetergentRevenue: dailyDetergentRevenue,
27044:                      totalExpenses: dailyExpensesTotal,
27045:                      totalTheoreticalRevenue,
27046:                      actualCashCounted: actualCash,
27047:                      discrepancy: actualCash - totalTheoreticalRevenue,
27048:                      notes: closureNotes.trim(),
27049:                      status: 'closed',
27050:                      sentToManager: false
27051:                    };
27052:
27053:                    let sentEmail = false;
27054:                    let hasAttemptedEmail = false;
27055:                    if (autoEmailManager && managerEmail && managerEmail.trim()) {
27056:                      hasAttemptedEmail = true;
27057:                      const toastId = toast.loading('Envoi automatique du rapport de clôture au Gérant...');
27058:                      const success = await sendSilentBackgroundClosureEmailToManager(newClosure);
27059:                      sentEmail = success;
27060:                      newClosure.sentToManager = success;
27061:                      toast.dismiss(toastId);
27062:                      if (success) {
27063:                        showAlert(
27064:                          'Notification Gérant',
27065:                          'Ce mail envoyé en arrière-plan avec succès !',
27066:                          'success',
27067:                          undefined,
27068:                          false,
27069:                          "D'ACCORD",
27070:                          "ENVOI D'E-MAIL"
27071:                        );
27072:                      } else {
27073:                        showAlert(
27074:                          'Notification Échouée',
27075:                          'Échec de l\'envoi du rapport par email en arrière-plan.',
27076:                          'error',
27077:                          undefined,
27078:                          false,
27079:                          "D'ACCORD",
27080:                          "E-MAIL INTROUVABLE"
27081:                        );
27082:                      }
27083:                    }
27084:
27085:                    // Update State & localstorage
27086:                    setClosures(prev => {
27087:                      const filtered = prev.filter(c => c.date !== closureDate);
27088:                      return [newClosure, ...filtered];
27089:                    });
27090:
27091:                    // Reset inputs
27092:                    setActualCash(0);
27093:                    setClosureNotes('');
27094:                    
27095:                    if (!hasAttemptedEmail) {
27096:                      showAlert('Clôture Enregistrée', `Clôture du ${closureDate} enregistrée à l'instant avec succès !`, 'success', undefined, false, "D'ACCORD", "COFFRE FORT");
27097:                    }
27098:                  };
27099:
27100:                  // Check if closure already exists for this date to prevent duplicate
27101:                  if (closures.some(c => c.date === closureDate)) {
27102:                    showAlert(
27103:                      'Écraser la clôture existante ?',
27104:                      `Une clôture de caisse existe déjà pour le ${closureDate}.\nVoulez-vous la remplacer par ce nouveau rapprochement ?`,
27105:                      'warning',
27106:                      runClosureCreation,
27107:                      true,
27108:                      'REMPLACER'
27109:                    );
27110:                  } else {
27111:                    await runClosureCreation();
27112:                  }
27113:                }}
27114:                className="w-full bg-primary hover:bg-[#c93b3b] text-white font-black text-xs uppercase tracking-widest py-3.5 rounded-2xl transition duration-200 flex items-center justify-center gap-2 shadow"
27115:              >
27116:                🔒 Valider & Verrouiller la Caisse
27117:              </button>
27118:            </div>
27119:          </div>
27120:        </div>
27121:

27125:            📜 Historique des Clôtures Journalières

27132:            </div>

27137:                const isPerfect = errorVal === 0;
27138:                const isLoss = errorVal < 0;
27139:
27140:                return (
27141:                  <div key={c.id} className="bg-white p-5 rounded-3xl border border-gray-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition space-y-3 font-sans">
27142:                    <div className="flex justify-between items-start">
27143:                      <div>
27144:                        <span className="px-2 py-0.5 bg-indigo-50 text-indigo-700 text-[9px] font-bold font-mono rounded-md uppercase">
27145:                          Date: {c.date}
27146:                        </span>
27147:                        <h4 className="text-xs font-black text-ink mt-1">Clôture par {c.cashierName}</h4>
27148:                        <span className="text-[9px] text-gray-400 font-mono">Clos le {new Date(c.timestamp).toLocaleString('fr-FR')}</span>
27149:                      </div>
27150:                      
27151:                      <div className="text-right">
27152:                        <span className="text-[9px] text-gray-400 font-mono block">Écart caisse:</span>
27153:                        <span className={`text-xs font-mono font-black ${
27154:                          isPerfect ? 'text-emerald-600' : isLoss ? 'text-rose-600' : 'text-blue-600'
27155:                        }`}>
27156:                          {isPerfect ? '0 FCFA' : `${errorVal > 0 ? '+' : ''}${errorVal.toLocaleString()} FCFA`}
27157:                        </span>
27158:                      </div>
27159:                    </div>
27160:
27161:                    <div className="grid grid-cols-4 gap-1.5 bg-gray-50 p-2.5 rounded-xl text-[10px] text-gray-500 font-mono text-center font-bold">

27177:                      </div>

27198:                        </button>

27204:                            toast.dismiss(toastId);
27205:                            if (ok) {
27206:                              showAlert(
27207:                                'Notification Gérant',

27214:                              );

27216:                            } else {
27217:                              dispatchManagerClosureNotif(c, 'email');
27218:                            }
27219:                          }}

27223:                        </button>
27224:                      </div>

27227:                          <span className="w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-emerald-500"></span>

27235:            </div>

27237:        </div>

27239:
27240:      {/* Modern custom Alert Popup for all messages and notifications in closure manager */}
27241:      <AcomAlertPopup
27242:        isOpen={popup.isOpen}
27243:        onClose={() => setPopup(prev => ({ ...prev, isOpen: false }))}
27244:        {...popup}
27245:      />
27246:    </motion.div>
27247:  );
27248:};
27249:
27250:const PressingReceiptManager = ({ merchant }: { merchant: Merchant }) => {
27251:  const [activeSubTab, setActiveSubTab] = useState<'create' | 'active' | 'history' | 'closures' | 'quotes'>('create');
27252:  
27253:  const [tarifs, setTarifs] = useState<PressingTarifs>(() => {
27254:    const saved = localStorage.getItem(`pressing_tarifs_${merchant.id}`);
27255:    const parsed = saved ? JSON.parse(saved) : DEFAULT_TARIFS;
27256:    if (!parsed.supplements) {
27257:      parsed.supplements = { ...DEFAULT_TARIFS.supplements };
27258:    }
27259:    if (!parsed.articles_costs) {
27260:      parsed.articles_costs = { ...DEFAULT_TARIFS.articles_costs };
27261:    }
27262:    if (!parsed.poids_costs) {
27263:      parsed.poids_costs = { ...DEFAULT_TARIFS.poids_costs };
27264:    }
27265:    if (!parsed.supplements_costs) {
27266:      parsed.supplements_costs = { ...DEFAULT_TARIFS.supplements_costs };
27267:    }
27268:    if (!parsed.articles_images) {
27269:      parsed.articles_images = {};
27270:    }
27271:    return parsed;
27272:  });
27273:
27274:  // Re-sync tariffs from localStorage whenever the component is active to ensure newly added items display instantly
27275:  useEffect(() => {
27276:    const saved = localStorage.getItem(`pressing_tarifs_${merchant.id}`);
27277:    if (saved) {
27278:      try {
27279:        const parsed = JSON.parse(saved);
27280:        if (!parsed.supplements) {
27281:          parsed.supplements = { ...DEFAULT_TARIFS.supplements };
27282:        }
27283:        if (!parsed.articles_costs) {
27284:          parsed.articles_costs = { ...DEFAULT_TARIFS.articles_costs };
27285:        }
27286:        if (!parsed.poids_costs) {
27287:          parsed.poids_costs = { ...DEFAULT_TARIFS.poids_costs };
27288:        }
27289:        if (!parsed.supplements_costs) {
27290:          parsed.supplements_costs = { ...DEFAULT_TARIFS.supplements_costs };
27291:        }
27292:        if (!parsed.articles_images) {
27293:          parsed.articles_images = {};
27294:        }
27295:        setTarifs(parsed);
27296:      } catch (err) {
27297:        console.error("Syntax loading tariffs in PressingReceiptManager", err);
27298:      }
27299:    }
27300:  }, [merchant.id]);
27301:
27302:  const getSupplementDisplayName = (key: string) => {
27303:    const staticLabels: Record<string, string> = {
27304:      repassage: '👔 Repassage',
27305:      express: '⚡ Lavage Express (unit.)',
27306:      detachage: '🔬 Détachage spécial',
27307:      livraison: '🚚 Livraison à domicile',
27308:      premiumPack: '💎 Emballage Premium',
27309:    };
27310:    const rawName = (tarifs as any).supplements_display_names?.[key];
27311:    if (rawName) return `✨ ${rawName}`;
27312:    return staticLabels[key] || `✨ ${key.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + key.slice(1)}`;
27313:  };

27317:    return saved ? JSON.parse(saved) : [];
27318:  });

27320:  // Unified pop-up state for PressingReceiptManager
27321:  const [popup, setPopup] = useState<{
27322:    isOpen: boolean;
27323:    title: string;
27324:    subtitle?: string;
27325:    message: string;
27326:    type: 'success' | 'warning' | 'error' | 'info';
27327:    onConfirm?: () => void;
27328:    confirmText?: string;
27329:    showCancel?: boolean;
27330:  }>({
27331:    isOpen: false,
27332:    title: '',
27333:    subtitle: '',
27334:    message: '',
27335:    type: 'info'
27336:  });
27337:
27338:  const showAlert = (
27339:    title: string,
27340:    message: string,
27341:    type: 'success' | 'warning' | 'error' | 'info' = 'info',
27342:    onConfirm?: () => void,
27343:    showCancel?: boolean,
27344:    confirmText: string = "D'ACCORD",
27345:    subtitle: string = 'ALERTE SYSTÈME'
27346:  ) => {
27347:    setPopup({
27348:      isOpen: true,
27349:      title,
27350:      subtitle,
27351:      message,
27352:      type,
27353:      onConfirm: onConfirm ? () => {
27354:        onConfirm();
27355:        setPopup(prev => ({ ...prev, isOpen: false }));
27356:      } : undefined,
27357:      showCancel,
27358:      confirmText
27359:    });
27360:  };

27364:  // Form states
27365:  const [clientName, setClientName] = useState('');
27366:  const [clientPhone, setClientPhone] = useState('');
27367:  const [clientEmail, setClientEmail] = useState('');
27368:  const [depositDate, setDepositDate] = useState(() => format(new Date(), 'yyyy-MM-dd'));
27369:  const [expectedDeliveryDate, setExpectedDeliveryDate] = useState(() => {
27370:    const d = new Date();
27371:    d.setDate(d.getDate() + 3);
27372:    return format(d, 'yyyy-MM-dd');
27373:  });
27374:  const [billingType, setBillingType] = useState<'article' | 'poids'>('article');
27375:  
27376:  const [articlesQty, setArticlesQty] = useState<{ [key: string]: number }>(() => {
27377:    const initialQty: { [key: string]: number } = {};
27378:    Object.keys(tarifs.articles).forEach(key => {
27379:      initialQty[key] = 0;
27380:    });
27381:    return initialQty;
27382:  });
27383:
27384:  // Dynamic articlesQty keys synchronization with current tarifs.articles keys
27385:  useEffect(() => {
27386:    setArticlesQty(prev => {
27387:      const next = { ...prev };
27388:      let changed = false;
27389:      Object.keys(tarifs.articles).forEach(key => {
27390:        if (next[key] === undefined) {
27391:          next[key] = 0;
27392:          changed = true;
27393:        }
27394:      });
27395:      Object.keys(next).forEach(key => {
27396:        if (tarifs.articles[key] === undefined) {
27397:          delete next[key];
27398:          changed = true;
27399:        }
27400:      });
27401:      return changed ? next : prev;
27402:    });
27403:  }, [tarifs]);
27404:
27405:  const [weightService, setWeightService] = useState<string>(() => {
27406:    const keys = Object.keys(tarifs.poids);
27407:    return keys.includes('standard') ? 'standard' : keys[0] || '';
27408:  });
27409:
27410:  useEffect(() => {
27411:    const keys = Object.keys(tarifs.poids);
27412:    if (keys.length > 0 && !keys.includes(weightService)) {
27413:      setWeightService(keys[0]);
27414:    }
27415:  }, [tarifs, weightService]);
27416:
27417:  const [weightKg, setWeightKg] = useState<number>(0);
27418:
27419:  const [supplements, setSupplements] = useState<Record<string, boolean>>(() => {
27420:    const initial: Record<string, boolean> = {};
27421:    const currentSupps = tarifs.supplements || DEFAULT_TARIFS.supplements || {};
27422:    Object.keys(currentSupps).forEach(key => {
27423:      initial[key] = false;
27424:    });
27425:    return initial;
27426:  });
27427:
27428:  const supplementTarifs = useMemo(() => {
27429:    const prices: Record<string, number> = {};
27430:    const defaultSupps = DEFAULT_TARIFS.supplements || {};
27431:    const currentSupps = tarifs.supplements || {};
27432:    const keys = new Set([...Object.keys(defaultSupps), ...Object.keys(currentSupps)]);
27433:    keys.forEach(key => {
27434:      prices[key] = currentSupps[key] !== undefined ? currentSupps[key] : (defaultSupps[key] || 0);
27435:    });
27436:    return prices;
27437:  }, [tarifs]);
27438:
27439:  // Synchronize dynamic keys of supplements when tarifs change
27440:  useEffect(() => {
27441:    setSupplements(prev => {
27442:      const next = { ...prev };
27443:      let changed = false;
27444:      const currentSupps = tarifs.supplements || DEFAULT_TARIFS.supplements || {};
27445:      Object.keys(currentSupps).forEach(key => {
27446:        if (next[key] === undefined) {
27447:          next[key] = false;
27448:          changed = true;
27449:        }
27450:      });
27451:      Object.keys(next).forEach(key => {
27452:        if (currentSupps[key] === undefined) {
27453:          delete next[key];
27454:          changed = true;
27455:        }
27456:      });
27457:      return changed ? next : prev;
27458:    });
27459:  }, [tarifs]);
27460:
27461:  const [discountValue, setDiscountValue] = useState<number>(0);
27462:  const [discountType, setDiscountType] = useState<'amount' | 'percent'>('amount');
27463:  const [selectedTicket, setSelectedTicket] = useState<PressingTicket | null>(null);
27464:

27466:  const [notes, setNotes] = useState('');

27468:  const [paymentMethod, setPaymentMethod] = useState<'cash' | 'mobile_money' | 'card' | 'other'>('cash');
27469:  const [amountPaid, setAmountPaid] = useState<number>(0);
27470:  const [viewingTicket, setViewingTicket] = useState<PressingTicket | null>(null);
27471:  const [washStatusFilter, setWashStatusFilter] = useState<'all' | 'deposed' | 'in_progress' | 'ready'>('all');

27477:  const [editedEmail, setEditedEmail] = useState('');

27481:  const managerEmail = merchant.managerNotifications?.email || '';
27482:  const autoEmailManager = merchant.managerNotifications?.notifyOnCashClosure !== false;

27495:
27496:  // Clôture de caisse states
27497:  const [closures, setClosures] = useState<PressingClosure[]>(() => {

27499:    return saved ? JSON.parse(saved) : [];
27500:  });
27501:
27502:  const [closureDate, setClosureDate] = useState(() => format(new Date(), 'yyyy-MM-dd'));
27503:  const [cashierName, setCashierName] = useState('');
27504:  const [actualCash, setActualCash] = useState<number>(0);

27509:  }, [closures, merchant.id]);
27510:
27511:  // Totals computations
27512:  const subtotal = useMemo(() => {
27513:    if (billingType === 'article') {
27514:      return Object.keys(articlesQty).reduce((acc, key) => {
27515:        const qty = articlesQty[key];
27516:        const price = tarifs.articles[key as keyof typeof tarifs.articles] || 0;
27517:        return acc + (qty * price);
27518:      }, 0);
27519:    } else {
27520:      const pricePerKg = tarifs.poids[weightService] || 0;
27521:      return weightKg * pricePerKg;
27522:    }
27523:  }, [billingType, articlesQty, weightService, weightKg, tarifs]);
27524:
27525:  const supplementTotal = useMemo(() => {
27526:    return Object.keys(supplements).reduce((acc, key) => {
27527:      const active = supplements[key as keyof typeof supplements];
27528:      const cost = supplementTarifs[key as keyof typeof supplementTarifs] || 0;
27529:      return acc + (active ? cost : 0);
27530:    }, 0);
27531:  }, [supplements]);
27532:
27533:  const discountAmount = useMemo(() => {
27534:    if (discountType === 'percent') {
27535:      return Math.floor(((subtotal + supplementTotal) * discountValue) / 100);
27536:    }
27537:    return discountValue;
27538:  }, [discountType, discountValue, subtotal, supplementTotal]);
27539:
27540:  const total = useMemo(() => {
27541:    const val = (subtotal + supplementTotal) - discountAmount;
27542:    return Math.max(0, val);
27543:  }, [subtotal, supplementTotal, discountAmount]);
27544:
27545:  const totalCost = useMemo(() => {
27546:    let cost = 0;
27547:    if (billingType === 'article') {
27548:      cost += Object.keys(articlesQty).reduce((acc, key) => {
27549:        const qty = articlesQty[key];
27550:        const unitCost = tarifs.articles_costs?.[key as keyof typeof tarifs.articles_costs] || (DEFAULT_TARIFS.articles_costs as any)[key] || 0;
27551:        return acc + (qty * unitCost);
27552:      }, 0);
27553:    } else {
27554:      const costPerKg = tarifs.poids_costs?.[weightService] || (DEFAULT_TARIFS.poids_costs as any)[weightService] || 0;
27555:      cost += weightKg * costPerKg;
27556:    }
27557:
27558:    cost += Object.keys(supplements).reduce((acc, key) => {
27559:      const active = supplements[key as keyof typeof supplements];
27560:      const suppCost = tarifs.supplements_costs?.[key as keyof typeof tarifs.supplements_costs] || (DEFAULT_TARIFS.supplements_costs as any)[key] || 0;
27561:      return acc + (active ? suppCost : 0);
27562:    }, 0);
27563:    return cost;
27564:  }, [billingType, articlesQty, weightService, weightKg, supplements, tarifs]);
27565:
27566:  // Synchronize amountPaid automatically with dynamic changes
27567:  useEffect(() => {
27568:    if (paymentStatus === 'paid') {
27569:      setAmountPaid(total);
27570:    } else if (paymentStatus === 'unpaid') {
27571:      setAmountPaid(0);
27572:    }
27573:  }, [total, paymentStatus]);
27574:
27575:  // Calculate high-fidelity stats for subheader
27576:  const pressingStats = useMemo(() => {
27577:    const activeOnes = tickets.filter(t => t.status !== 'delivered' && t.status !== 'quotation');
27578:    const totalDue = activeOnes.reduce((acc, t) => {
27579:      const paid = t.amountPaid || 0;
27580:      return acc + Math.max(0, t.total - paid);
27581:    }, 0);
27582:    const inProgressCount = activeOnes.filter(t => t.status === 'in_progress').length;
27583:    const readyCount = activeOnes.filter(t => t.status === 'ready').length;
27584:    const deposedCount = activeOnes.filter(t => t.status === 'deposed').length;
27585:    const totalActiveValue = activeOnes.reduce((acc, t) => acc + t.total, 0);
27586:
27587:    const activePaid = activeOnes.filter(t => t.paymentStatus === 'paid').length;
27588:    const activeUnpaid = activeOnes.filter(t => t.paymentStatus === 'unpaid').length;
27589:    const activePartial = activeOnes.filter(t => t.paymentStatus === 'partial').length;
27590:
27591:    return {
27592:      activeCount: activeOnes.length,
27593:      totalDue,
27594:      inProgressCount,
27595:      readyCount,
27596:      deposedCount,
27597:      totalActiveValue,
27598:      activePaid,
27599:      activeUnpaid,
27600:      activePartial
27601:    };
27602:  }, [tickets]);
27603:
27604:  // Templates Map for client notifications
27605:  const NOTIFICATION_TEMPLATES = useMemo<{ [key: string]: { label: string; subject: string; body: (ticket: PressingTicket) => string } }>(() => ({
27606:    deposit: {
27607:      label: '📥 Réception / Dépôt enregistré',
27608:      subject: `Confirmation de dépôt - ${merchant.name || 'Pressing'}`,

Prix : ${t.total} FCFA. Versé: ${t.amountPaid || 0} FCFA. Retrait prévu: ${t.expectedDeliveryDate || 'N/A'}. Merci de votre fidélité !`
27610:    },
27611:    in_progress: {
27612:      label: '🧼 Lavage en cours',
27613:      subject: `Traitement de votre linge - ${merchant.name || 'Pressing'}`,
27614:      body: (t: PressingTicket) => `Bonjour ${t.clientName}, votre linge du ticket N°: ${t.ticketNumber} est actuellement en cours de traitement et de lavage par notre équipe.`
27615:    },
27616:    ready: {
27617:      label: '👔 Linge Prêt pour Retrait',
27618:      subject: `Votre commande est prête ! - ${merchant.name || 'Pressing'}`,
27619:      body: (t: PressingTicket) => `Bonjour ${t.clientName}, bonne nouvelle ! Votre linge est lavé, repassé et disponible (Ticket N°: ${t.ticketNumber}). Montant total: ${t.total} FCFA, reste à payer: ${Math.max(0, t.total - (t.amountPaid || 0))} FCFA. À très bientôt !`
27620:    },
27621:    delivered: {
27622:      label: '✅ Commande Livrée',
27623:      subject: `Merci pour votre visite ! - ${merchant.name || 'Pressing'}`,
27624:      body: (t: PressingTicket) => `Bonjour ${t.clientName}, votre commande ticket N°: ${t.ticketNumber} vous a été délivrée. Merci pour votre confiance !`
27625:    },
27626:    payment_reminder: {
27627:      label: '💰 Solde dû (Rappel de paiement)',
27628:      subject: `Rappel de règlement - ${merchant.name || 'Pressing'}`,
27629:      body: (t: PressingTicket) => `Bonjour ${t.clientName}, nous vous rappelons qu'un solde de ${Math.max(0, t.total - (t.amountPaid || 0))} FCFA reste à régler pour votre commande N°: ${t.ticketNumber}. Merci de régulariser lors du retrait.`
27630:    }
27631:  }), [merchant]);
27632:

27634:  useEffect(() => {
27635:    if (viewingTicket) {

27641:      }

27643:  }, [viewingTicket, selectedNotifTemplate, NOTIFICATION_TEMPLATES]);
27644:
27645:  const logNotificationSent = (type: 'whatsapp' | 'email', templateKey: string, matchedMsg: string) => {
27646:    if (!viewingTicket) return;
27647:    
27648:    const newLog = {
27649:      id: `notif_${Date.now()}`,
27650:      type,
27651:      templateName: NOTIFICATION_TEMPLATES[templateKey]?.label || templateKey,
27652:      msg: matchedMsg,
27653:      timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
27654:    };
27655:    
27656:    const updatedNotifications = [...(viewingTicket.sentNotifications || []), newLog];
27657:    
27658:    const updatedTicket: PressingTicket = {
27659:      ...viewingTicket,
27660:      clientPhone: editedPhone,
27661:      clientEmail: editedEmail,
27662:      sentNotifications: updatedNotifications
27663:    };
27664:    
27665:    const updatedTickets = tickets.map(t => t.id === viewingTicket.id ? updatedTicket : t);
27666:    setTickets(updatedTickets);
27667:    localStorage.setItem(`pressing_tickets_${merchant.id}`, JSON.stringify(updatedTickets));
27668:    setViewingTicket(updatedTicket);
27669:    if (selectedTicket && selectedTicket.id === viewingTicket.id) {
27670:      setSelectedTicket(updatedTicket);
27671:    }
27672:  };
27673:
27674:  const getManagerNotificationMessage = useCallback((t: PressingTicket, type: 'entrée' | 'sortie') => {
27675:    const isEntry = type === 'entrée';
27676:    const statusLabel = t.status === 'delivered' ? 'LIVRÉ ✅' : t.status === 'ready' ? 'PRÊT 👔' : t.status === 'in_progress' ? 'EN LAVAGE 🧼' : 'REÇU COMPTÉ 🧺';
27677:    
27678:    const articlesDesc = t.billingType === 'article' 
27679:      ? Object.entries(t.articles || {})
27680:          .filter(([_, qty]) => (qty as number) > 0)
27681:          .map(([name, qty]) => `${qty}x ${name}`)
27682:          .join(', ')
27683:      : `${t.weightKg} Kg (${t.weightService})`;
27684:
27685:    const paidText = t.paymentStatus === 'paid' ? 'ENTIÈREMENT PAYÉ 👍' : (t.paymentStatus === 'partial' && (t.amountPaid || 0) > 0) ? `ACOMPTE PAYÉ DE ${t.amountPaid} FCFA 🟡` : 'NON REGLE (À payer au retrait) 🔴';
27686:
27687:    if (isEntry) {
27688:      return `📢 [SUIVI GÉRANT - ENTRÉE REÇUE] 📥\n` +
27689:             `--------------------------------\n` +
27690:             `• Ticket N° : ${t.ticketNumber}\n` +
27691:             `• Client : ${t.clientName} (${t.clientPhone || 'Aucun contact'})\n` +
27692:             `• Linge / Lots : ${articlesDesc || '0 article'}\n` +
27693:             (t.discount > 0 ? `• Remise : ${t.discount} FCFA\n` : '') +
27694:             `• Valeur Nette : ${t.total} FCFA\n` +
27695:             `• Versé initial : ${t.amountPaid || 0} FCFA\n` +
27696:             `• Reste à encaisser : ${Math.max(0, t.total - (t.amountPaid || 0))} FCFA\n` +
27697:             `• Statut de paiement : ${paidText}\n` +
27698:             `• Date dépôt : ${t.depositDate}\n` +
27699:             `• Retrait prévu : ${t.expectedDeliveryDate || 'N/A'}\n` +
27700:             `--------------------------------\n` +
27701:             `Rapport d'activité temps réel généré sur l'application SaaS ${merchant.name || 'ACOM'}.`;
27702:    } else {
27703:      return `📢 [SUIVI GÉRANT - SORTIE / STATUT CHANGÉ] 👔\n` +
27704:             `--------------------------------\n` +
27705:             `• Ticket N° : ${t.ticketNumber}\n` +
27706:             `• Client : ${t.clientName}\n` +
27707:             `• Nouveau Statut : ${statusLabel}\n` +
27708:             (t.discount > 0 ? `• Remise : ${t.discount} FCFA\n` : '') +
27709:             `• Valeur Nette : ${t.total} FCFA\n` +
27710:             `• Total Perçu : ${t.amountPaid || 0} FCFA\n` +
27711:             `• Solde Résiduel : ${Math.max(0, t.total - (t.amountPaid || 0))} FCFA\n` +
27712:             `• Statut de règlement : ${paidText}\n` +
27713:             `--------------------------------\n` +
27714:             `Rapport d'activité temps réel généré sur l'application SaaS ${merchant.name || 'ACOM'}.`;
27715:    }
27716:  }, [merchant]);
27717:
27718:  const dispatchManagerNotif = async (t: PressingTicket, flowType: 'entrée' | 'sortie', method: 'whatsapp' | 'email') => {
27719:    const message = getManagerNotificationMessage(t, flowType);
27720:    if (method === 'whatsapp') {
27721:      if (!managerPhone.trim()) {
27722:        showAlert('Numéro non configuré', "Veuillez configurer le numéro WhatsApp du Gérant dans l'onglet Réglages.", 'error');
27723:        return;
27724:      }
27725:      let cleaned = managerPhone.replace(/[^0-9]/g, '');
27726:      if (cleaned.length === 9 && cleaned.startsWith('7')) {
27727:        cleaned = '221' + cleaned;
27728:      }
27729:      const waUrl = `https://api.whatsapp.com/send?phone=${cleaned}&text=${encodeURIComponent(message)}`;
27730:      window.open(waUrl, '_blank');
27731:      showAlert('Rapport Envoyé', "Le rapport de suivi pour WhatsApp a été généré et ouvert !", 'success');
27732:      
27733:      // Add to local history
27734:      const newLog = {
27735:        id: `mnotif_${Date.now()}`,
27736:        ticketNumber: t.ticketNumber,
27737:        type: flowType,
27738:        method,
27739:        timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
27740:      };
27741:      setManagerNotifsHistory(prev => [newLog, ...prev]);
27742:    } else {
27743:      if (!managerEmail.trim()) {
27744:        showAlert('Email non configuré', "Veuillez configurer l'adresse email du Gérant dans l'onglet Réglages.", 'error');
27745:        return;
27746:      }
27747:      toast.loading('Envoi du rapport par mail...');
27748:      const ok = await sendSilentBackgroundEmailToManager(t, flowType);
27749:      toast.dismiss();
27750:      if (ok) {
27751:        setTicketMailFeedback(prev => ({ ...prev, [t.id]: true }));
27752:        showAlert('Rapport Envoyé', "Le rapport de suivi par e-mail a été envoyé avec succès au Gérant !", 'success');
27753:      } else {
27754:        const subject = `[TEMPS RÉEL] ${flowType.toUpperCase()} - Ticket ${t.ticketNumber} - ${merchant.name || 'Pressing'}`;
27755:        const mailtoUrl = `mailto:${managerEmail}?subject=${encodeURIComponent(subject)}&body=${encodeURIComponent(message)}`;
27756:        window.open(mailtoUrl, '_blank');
27757:        showAlert("Messagerie Ouverte", "Nous avons configuré l'email de suivi. Veuillez appuyer sur Envoyer dans votre boîte mail !", 'success');
27758:        
27759:        // Add to local history
27760:        const newLog = {
27761:          id: `mnotif_${Date.now()}`,
27762:          ticketNumber: t.ticketNumber,
27763:          type: flowType,
27764:          method,
27765:          timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
27766:        };
27767:        setManagerNotifsHistory(prev => [newLog, ...prev]);
27768:      }
27769:    }
27770:  };
27771:
27772:  const sendSilentBackgroundEmailToManager = async (ticket: PressingTicket, flowType: 'entrée' | 'sortie') => {
27773:    if (!managerEmail || !managerEmail.trim()) {
27774:      return;
27775:    }
27776:
27777:    const isEntry = flowType === 'entrée';
27778:    const title = isEntry ? `📥 Notification d'Entrée (Nouveau Dépôt)` : `👔 Notification de Sortie / Changement de Statut`;
27779:    const themeColor = isEntry ? '#0d9488' : '#4f46e5'; // Teal for entries, Indigo for exits
27780:    
27781:    // Format articles list
27782:    const articlesDesc = ticket.billingType === 'article'
27783:      ? Object.entries(ticket.articles || {})
27784:          .filter(([_, qty]) => (qty as number) > 0)
27785:          .map(([name, qty]) => `<li style="margin: 4px 0;"><strong>${qty}x</strong> ${name}</li>`)
27786:          .join('')
27787:      : `<li style="margin: 4px 0;"><strong>${ticket.weightKg} Kg</strong> (${ticket.weightService})</li>`;
27788:
27789:    // Supplements HTML
27790:    const activeSupps = Object.entries(ticket.supplements || {})
27791:      .filter(([_, active]) => active)
27792:      .map(([name]) => `<span style="background-color: #f1f5f9; padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 11px; margin-right: 4px; display: inline-block;">${name}</span>`)
27793:      .join(' ');
27794:
27795:    const statusLabel = ticket.status === 'delivered' ? 'LIVRÉ ✅' : ticket.status === 'ready' ? 'PRÊT 👔' : ticket.status === 'in_progress' ? 'EN LAVAGE 🧼' : 'REÇU COMPTÉ 🧺';
27796:    const paymentLabel = ticket.paymentStatus === 'paid' ? 'ENTIÈREMENT PAYÉ 👍' : (ticket.paymentStatus === 'partial' && (ticket.amountPaid || 0) > 0) ? `ACOMPTE DE ${ticket.amountPaid} FCFA 🟡` : 'NON RÉGLÉ 🔴';
27797:
27798:    const mailHtml = `
27799:      <div style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 20px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 12px; color: #1e293b; background-color: #ffffff;">
27800:        <div style="background-color: ${themeColor}; color: white; padding: 15px; border-radius: 8px; text-align: center;">
27801:          <h2 style="margin: 0; font-size: 18px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px;">${merchant.name || 'Pressing'}</h2>
27802:          <p style="margin: 5px 0 0; font-size: 12px; opacity: 0.9;">Suivi d'Activité en Temps Réel — Gérant</p>
27803:        </div>
27804:
27805:        <div style="margin-top: 20px;">
27806:          <h3 style="color: ${themeColor}; border-bottom: 2px solid ${themeColor}; padding-bottom: 5px; margin-bottom: 15px;">${title}</h3>
27807:          
27808:          <table style="width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-size: 13px;">
27809:            <tr>
27810:              <td style="padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; color: #64748b; width: 150px;"><strong>N° Ticket :</strong></td>
27811:              <td style="padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; font-weight: bold; color: #0f172a;">${ticket.ticketNumber}</td>
27812:            </tr>
27813:            <tr>
27814:              <td style="padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; color: #64748b;"><strong>Client :</strong></td>
27815:              <td style="padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9;">${ticket.clientName} (${ticket.clientPhone || 'Aucun contact'})</td>
27816:            </tr>
27817:            <tr>
27818:              <td style="padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; color: #64748b;"><strong>Type Facturation :</strong></td>
27819:              <td style="padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; text-transform: capitalize;">Par ${ticket.billingType}</td>
27820:            </tr>
27821:            <tr>
27822:              <td style="padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; color: #64748b;" valign="top"><strong>Articles / Poids :</strong></td>
27823:              <td style="padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9;">
27824:                <ul style="margin: 0; padding-left: 20px;">${articlesDesc || 'Aucun article renseigné'}</ul>
27825:              </td>
27826:            </tr>
27827:            ${activeSupps ? `
27828:            <tr>
27829:              <td style="padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; color: #64748b;"><strong>Suppléments :</strong></td>
27830:              <td style="padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9;">${activeSupps}</td>
27831:            </tr>
27832:            ` : ''}
27833:            ${ticket.discount > 0 ? `
27834:            <tr>
27835:              <td style="padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; color: #64748b;"><strong>Remise :</strong></td>
27836:              <td style="padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; color: #ef4444; font-weight: bold;">-${ticket.discount} FCFA</td>
27837:            </tr>
27838:            <tr>
27839:              <td style="padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; color: #64748b;"><strong>Valeur Nette :</strong></td>
27840:              <td style="padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; font-weight: bold; color: #1e293b; font-size: 14px;">${ticket.total} FCFA</td>
27841:            </tr>
27842:            ` : `
27843:            <tr>
27844:              <td style="padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; color: #64748b;"><strong>Montant Total :</strong></td>
27845:              <td style="padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; font-weight: bold; color: #1e293b; font-size: 14px;">${ticket.total} FCFA</td>
27846:            </tr>
27847:            `}
27848:            <tr>
27849:              <td style="padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; color: #64748b;"><strong>Acompte Payé :</strong></td>
27850:              <td style="padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; color: #0d9488; font-weight: bold;">${ticket.amountPaid || 0} FCFA</td>
27851:            </tr>
27852:            <tr>
27853:              <td style="padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; color: #64748b;"><strong>Reste à Payer :</strong></td>
27854:              <td style="padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; color: #ef4444; font-weight: bold; font-size: 14px;">${Math.max(0, ticket.total - (ticket.amountPaid || 0))} FCFA</td>
27855:            </tr>
27856:            <tr>
27857:              <td style="padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; color: #64748b;"><strong>Règlement :</strong></td>
27858:              <td style="padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; font-weight: bold;">${paymentLabel}</td>
27859:            </tr>
27860:            <tr>
27861:              <td style="padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; color: #64748b;"><strong>Statut Linge :</strong></td>
27862:              <td style="padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; font-weight: bold; color: ${themeColor};">${statusLabel}</td>
27863:            </tr>
27864:            ${ticket.notes ? `
27865:            <tr>
27866:              <td style="padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; color: #64748b;"><strong>Notes :</strong></td>
27867:              <td style="padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; font-style: italic; color: #475569;">"${ticket.notes}"</td>
27868:            </tr>
27869:            ` : ''}
27870:            <tr>
27871:              <td style="padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; color: #64748b;"><strong>Date Dépôt :</strong></td>
27872:              <td style="padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9;">${ticket.depositDate}</td>
27873:            </tr>
27874:            <tr>
27875:              <td style="padding: 8px 0; color: #64748b;"><strong>Date Retrait Prévue :</strong></td>
27876:              <td style="padding: 8px 0; font-weight: bold;">${ticket.expectedDeliveryDate || 'N/A'}</td>
27877:            </tr>
27878:          </table>
27879:        </div>
27880:
27881:        <div style="margin-top: 30px; padding-top: 15px; border-top: 1px solid #f1f5f9; text-align: center; font-size: 11px; color: #94a3b8;">
27882:          Ce rapport automatique en direct a été envoyé en arrière-plan sans action requise de l'opérateur.<br/>
27883:          <strong>Système de Suivi SaaS ${merchant.name || 'ACOM'}</strong>.
27884:        </div>
27885:      </div>
27886:    `;
27887:
27888:    try {
27889:      const response = await sendEmailDirectlyOrViaBackend({
27890:        to: managerEmail,
27891:        from: merchant.managerNotifications?.emailFrom || undefined,
27892:        subject: `⚡ [${flowType.toUpperCase()}] Ticket n°${ticket.ticketNumber} - ${merchant.name || 'Pressing'}`,
27893:        html: mailHtml
27894:      }, {
27895:        resendApiKey: merchant.managerNotifications?.resendApiKey,
27896:        defaultFrom: merchant.managerNotifications?.emailFrom
27897:      });
27898:
27899:      if (response.ok) {
27900:        showMailSuccessToast("Ce mail envoyé en arrière-plan avec succès !");
27901:        
27902:        // Add to local history
27903:        const newLog = {
27904:          id: `mnotif_${Date.now()}`,
27905:          ticketNumber: ticket.ticketNumber,
27906:          type: flowType,
27907:          method: 'email' as const,
27908:          timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
27909:        };
27910:        setManagerNotifsHistory(prev => [newLog, ...prev]);
27911:        return true;
27912:      } else {
27913:        const errorData = await response.json().catch(() => null);
27914:        console.error('Failed to send background email to manager:', errorData || response.statusText);
27915:        showAlert("Erreur d'envoi", `L'envoi automatique au gérant a échoué. ${errorData?.error || response.statusText}`, "error");
27916:        return false;
27917:      }
27918:    } catch (error) {
27919:      console.error('Error dispatching silent manager background mail:', error);
27920:      return false;
27921:    }
27922:  };
27923:
27924:  const sendSilentBackgroundBalanceCollectionEmailToManager = async (ticket: PressingTicket, dueAmount: number, method: PressingTicket['paymentMethod']) => {
27925:    if (!managerEmail || !managerEmail.trim()) {
27926:      return;
27927:    }
27928:
27929:    const title = `💸 Encaissement de Solde (Règlement Restant)`;
27930:    const themeColor = '#16a34a'; // Beautiful Green for revenue/payment success
27931:    const methodLabel = method === 'cash' ? 'Espèces 💵' : method === 'mobile_money' ? 'Mobile Money 📱' : method === 'card' ? 'Carte Bancaire 💳' : 'Autre Moyen 🔄';
27932:    const previousPaid = (ticket.total - dueAmount);
27933:
27934:    const articlesDesc = ticket.billingType === 'article'
27935:      ? Object.entries(ticket.articles || {})
27936:          .filter(([_, qty]) => (qty as number) > 0)
27937:          .map(([name, qty]) => `<li style="margin: 4px 0;"><strong>${qty}x</strong> ${name}</li>`)
27938:          .join('')
27939:      : `<li style="margin: 4px 0;"><strong>${ticket.weightKg} Kg</strong> (${ticket.weightService})</li>`;
27940:
27941:    const statusLabel = ticket.status === 'delivered' ? 'LIVRÉ ✅' : ticket.status === 'ready' ? 'PRÊT 👔' : ticket.status === 'in_progress' ? 'EN LAVAGE 🧼' : 'REÇU COMPTÉ 🧺';
27942:

27944:      <div style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 20px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 12px; color: #1e293b; background-color: #ffffff;">
27945:        <div style="background-color: ${themeColor}; color: white; padding: 15px; border-radius: 8px; text-align: center;">

27948:        </div>

27952:          
27953:          <table style="width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-size: 13px;">
27954:            <tr>
27955:              <td style="padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; color: #64748b; width: 150px;"><strong>N° Ticket :</strong></td>
27956:              <td style="padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; font-weight: bold; color: #0f172a;">${ticket.ticketNumber}</td>
27957:            </tr>
27958:            <tr>
27959:              <td style="padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; color: #64748b;"><strong>Client :</strong></td>
27960:              <td style="padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9;"><strong>${ticket.clientName}</strong> (${ticket.clientPhone || 'Aucun contact'})</td>
27961:            </tr>
27962:            <tr>
27963:              <td style="padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; color: #64748b;" valign="top"><strong>Articles / Poids :</strong></td>
27964:              <td style="padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9;">
27965:                <ul style="margin: 0; padding-left: 20px;">${articlesDesc || 'Aucun article'}</ul>
27966:              </td>
27967:            </tr>
27968:            <tr>
27969:              <td style="padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; color: #64748b;"><strong>Montant Total Fiche :</strong></td>
27970:              <td style="padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; font-weight: bold; color: #1e293b; font-size: 14px;">${ticket.total.toLocaleString()} FCFA</td>
27971:            </tr>
27972:            <tr>
27973:              <td style="padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; color: #64748b;"><strong>Acompte Déposé Précédemment :</strong></td>

27975:            </tr>

27978:              <td style="padding: 10px 6px; border-bottom: 1px solid #bbf7d0; color: #15803d; font-weight: bold; font-size: 15px;">+${dueAmount.toLocaleString()} FCFA</td>
27979:            </tr>

27983:            </tr>

27987:            </tr>
27988:            <tr>
27989:              <td style="padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; color: #64748b;"><strong>Date Encaissement :</strong></td>
27990:              <td style="padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9;">${new Date().toLocaleDateString('fr-FR')} &agrave; ${new Date().toLocaleTimeString('fr-FR', {hour: '2-digit', minute:'2-digit'})}</td>
27991:            </tr>
27992:            <tr>
27993:              <td style="padding: 8px 0; color: #64748b;"><strong>Statut Actuel Linge :</strong></td>
27994:              <td style="padding: 8px 0; font-weight: bold; color: #4f46e5;">${statusLabel}</td>
27995:            </tr>
27996:          </table>
27997:        </div>
27998:
27999:        <div style="margin-top: 30px; padding-top: 15px; border-top: 1px solid #f1f5f9; text-align: center; font-size: 11px; color: #94a3b8;">
28000:          Ce message d'alerte à l'encaissement de solde s'est exécuté automatiquement en tâche de fond.<br/>
28001:          <strong>Système de Suivi SaaS ${merchant.name || 'ACOM'}</strong>.
28002:        </div>
28003:      </div>
28004:    `;
28005:
28006:    try {
28007:      const response = await sendEmailDirectlyOrViaBackend({
28008:        to: managerEmail,
28009:        from: merchant.managerNotifications?.emailFrom || undefined,
28010:        subject: `💸 [SOLDE PAYÉ] Ticket n°${ticket.ticketNumber} - ${merchant.name || 'Pressing'}`,
28011:        html: mailHtml
28012:      }, {
28013:        resendApiKey: merchant.managerNotifications?.resendApiKey,
28014:        defaultFrom: merchant.managerNotifications?.emailFrom
28015:      });
28016:
28017:      if (response.ok) {
28018:        showMailSuccessToast("Mail d'encaissement de solde envoyé au gérant avec succès !");
28019:        
28020:        // Add to local history
28021:        const newLog = {
28022:          id: `mnotif_${Date.now()}`,
28023:          ticketNumber: ticket.ticketNumber,
28024:          type: 'sortie' as const,
28025:          method: 'email' as const,
28026:          timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
28027:        };
28028:        setManagerNotifsHistory(prev => [newLog, ...prev]);
28029:        return true;
28030:      } else {
28031:        const errorData = await response.json().catch(() => null);
28032:        console.error('Failed to send background balance email to manager:', errorData || response.statusText);
28033:        return false;
28034:      }
28035:    } catch (error) {
28036:      console.error('Error dispatching silent manager background balance mail:', error);
28037:      return false;
28038:    }
28039:  };
28040:
28041:  const products = useMemo(() => {
28042:    try {
28043:      const saved = localStorage.getItem(`pressing_stock_products_${merchant.id}`);
28044:      return saved ? JSON.parse(saved) : [];
28045:    } catch {
28046:      return [];
28047:    }
28048:  }, [merchant.id]);
28049:
28050:  const lowStockItems = useMemo(() => products.filter((p: any) => Number(p.stock || 0) > 0 && Number(p.stock || 0) <= (Number(p.minStock) || 5)), [products]);
28051:  const outOfStockItems = useMemo(() => products.filter((p: any) => Number(p.stock || 0) <= 0), [products]);
28052:
28053:  const dailyPressingTickets = useMemo(() => {
28054:    return tickets.filter(t => t.depositDate === closureDate && t.status !== 'quotation');
28055:  }, [tickets, closureDate]);
28056:
28057:  const dailyDepositsRevenue = useMemo(() => {
28058:    return dailyPressingTickets.reduce((sum, t) => {
28059:      const atDeposit = t.amountPaidAtDeposit !== undefined ? t.amountPaidAtDeposit : (t.amountPaid || 0);
28060:      return sum + atDeposit;
28061:    }, 0);
28062:  }, [dailyPressingTickets]);
28063:
28064:  const dailyBalancesCollected = useMemo(() => {
28065:    return tickets.filter(t => t.balanceCollectedDate === closureDate);
28066:  }, [tickets, closureDate]);
28067:
28068:  const dailyBalancesRevenue = useMemo(() => {
28069:    return dailyBalancesCollected.reduce((sum, t) => sum + (t.balanceCollectedAmount || 0), 0);
28070:  }, [dailyBalancesCollected]);
28071:
28072:  const dailyPressingRevenue = useMemo(() => {
28073:    return dailyDepositsRevenue + dailyBalancesRevenue;
28074:  }, [dailyDepositsRevenue, dailyBalancesRevenue]);
28075:
28076:  const dailyDetergentSales = useMemo(() => {
28077:    try {
28078:      const savedSales = localStorage.getItem(`pressing_stock_sales_${merchant.id}`);
28079:      const parsedSales: DetergentSale[] = savedSales ? JSON.parse(savedSales) : [];
28080:      return parsedSales.filter(s => s.date.startsWith(closureDate));
28081:    } catch {
28082:      return [];
28083:    }
28084:  }, [closureDate, merchant.id]);
28085:
28086:  const dailyDetergentRevenue = useMemo(() => {
28087:    return dailyDetergentSales.reduce((sum, s) => sum + (s.total || 0), 0);
28088:  }, [dailyDetergentSales]);
28089:
28090:  const totalTheoreticalRevenue = dailyPressingRevenue + dailyDetergentRevenue;
28091:
28092:  const getManagerClosureNotificationMessage = useCallback((c: PressingClosure) => {
28093:    const diffSign = c.discrepancy >= 0 ? '+' : '';
28094:    const diffText = c.discrepancy === 0 ? 'Parfait (0 FCFA)' : `${diffSign}${c.discrepancy} FCFA`;
28095:    
28096:    let message = `👑 [CLÔTURE DE CAISSE DE PRESSING] 📊\n` +
28097:           `--------------------------------\n` +
28098:           `• Date d'Activité : ${c.date}\n` +
28099:           `• Date Clôture : ${new Date(c.timestamp).toLocaleString('fr-FR')}\n` +
28100:           `• Caissier / Opérateur : ${c.cashierName || 'Non renseigné'}\n` +
28101:           `--------------------------------\n` +
28102:           `RÉSUMÉ DES RECETTES :\n` +
28103:           `• Recettes Services Pressing : ${c.totalPressingRevenue} FCFA\n` +
28104:           `• Ventes Produits Détergents : ${c.totalDetergentRevenue} FCFA\n` +
28105:           `--------------------------------\n` +
28106:           `• TOTAL ATTENDU : ${c.totalTheoreticalRevenue} FCFA\n` +
28107:           `• ESPÈCES RÉELLES : ${c.actualCashCounted} FCFA\n` +
28108:           `• ÉCART DE CAISSE : ${diffText} (${c.discrepancy < 0 ? '⚠️ MANQUANT' : c.discrepancy > 0 ? '🟢 SURPLUS' : '✅ EQUILIBRE'})\n` +
28109:           `--------------------------------\n`;
28110:
28111:    if (dailyPressingTickets.length > 0) {
28112:      message += `📥 DETAIL ENREGISTREMENTS ACOMPTES (${dailyPressingTickets.length}) :\n`;
28113:      dailyPressingTickets.forEach(t => {
28114:        const depositPaid = t.amountPaidAtDeposit !== undefined ? t.amountPaidAtDeposit : (t.amountPaid || 0);
28115:        message += `• ${t.ticketNumber} - ${t.clientName} : ${depositPaid.toLocaleString()} FCFA\n`;
28116:      });
28117:      message += `--------------------------------\n`;
28118:    }
28119:
28120:    if (dailyBalancesCollected.length > 0) {
28121:      message += `💸 DETAIL SOLDES PERCUS AU RETRAIT (${dailyBalancesCollected.length}) :\n`;
28122:      dailyBalancesCollected.forEach(t => {
28123:        message += `• ${t.ticketNumber} - ${t.clientName} : ${(t.balanceCollectedAmount || 0).toLocaleString()} FCFA\n`;
28124:      });
28125:      message += `--------------------------------\n`;
28126:    }
28127:
28128:    if (lowStockItems.length > 0 || outOfStockItems.length > 0) {
28129:      message += `🚨 ALERTES STOCK :\n`;
28130:      if (outOfStockItems.length > 0) {
28131:        message += `❌ Épuisés : ${outOfStockItems.map(p => p.name).join(', ')}\n`;
28132:      }
28133:      if (lowStockItems.length > 0) {
28134:        message += `⚠️ Point de rupture : ${lowStockItems.map(p => `${p.name} (${p.stock || 0})`).join(', ')}\n`;
28135:      }
28136:      message += `--------------------------------\n`;
28137:    }
28138:
28139:    message += `OBSERVATIONS :\n` +
28140:           `"${c.notes || 'Aucun commentaire.'}"\n` +
28141:           `--------------------------------\n` +
28142:           `Rapport de clôture journalier transmis en Temps Réel via l'application SaaS ${merchant.name || 'ACOM'}.`;
28143:
28144:    return message;
28145:  }, [merchant, lowStockItems, outOfStockItems, dailyPressingTickets, dailyBalancesCollected]);
28146:
28147:  const sendSilentBackgroundClosureEmailToManager = useCallback(async (c: PressingClosure) => {

28239:            ${dailyPressingTickets.length > 0 ? `

28267:

28269:            <tr>

28271:            </tr>
28272:            ` : ''}
28273:          </table>
28274:        </div>
