28278:          <strong>Système de Suivi SaaS ${merchant.name || 'ACOM'}</strong>.
28279:        </div>
28280:      </div>
28281:    `;
28282:

28284:      const response = await sendEmailDirectlyOrViaBackend({

28288:        html: mailHtml
28289:      }, {
28290:        resendApiKey: merchant.managerNotifications?.resendApiKey,
28291:        defaultFrom: merchant.managerNotifications?.emailFrom
28292:      });
28293:
28294:      if (!response.ok) {
28295:        const errorData = await response.json().catch(() => null);
28296:        console.error('Error dispatching silent manager background mail:', errorData || response.statusText);
28297:        showAlert("Erreur d'envoi Email (Clôture)", `L'envoi automatique au gérant a échoué. ${errorData?.error || response.statusText}`, "error");
28298:      }
28299:      return response.ok;
28300:    } catch {
28301:      return false;
28302:    }
28303:  }, [managerEmail, merchant, lowStockItems, outOfStockItems]);
28304:
28305:  const dispatchManagerClosureNotif = useCallback((c: PressingClosure, method: 'whatsapp' | 'email') => {
28306:    const message = getManagerClosureNotificationMessage(c);
28307:    if (method === 'whatsapp') {
28308:      if (!managerPhone.trim()) {
28309:        showAlert('Numéro non configuré', 'Veuillez configurer le numéro de téléphone WhatsApp du Gérant.', 'error');
28310:        return;
28311:      }
28312:      let cleaned = managerPhone.replace(/[^0-9]/g, '');
28313:      if (cleaned.length === 9 && cleaned.startsWith('7')) {
28314:        cleaned = '221' + cleaned;
28315:      }
28316:      const waUrl = `https://api.whatsapp.com/send?phone=${cleaned}&text=${encodeURIComponent(message)}`;
28317:      window.open(waUrl, '_blank');
28318:      showAlert('Rapport WhatsApp', 'Rapport de clôture WhatsApp ouvert avec succès ! Vous pouvez maintenant l\'envoyer.', 'success', undefined, false, "D'ACCORD", "RAPPORTS");
28319:    } else {
28320:      if (!managerEmail.trim()) {
28321:        showAlert('Email non configuré', "Veuillez configurer l'adresse email du Gérant.", 'error');
28322:        return;
28323:      }
28324:      const subject = `📊 [CLÔTURE CAISSE] Rapport du ${c.date} - ${merchant.name || 'Pressing'}`;
28325:      const mailtoUrl = `mailto:${managerEmail}?subject=${encodeURIComponent(subject)}&body=${encodeURIComponent(message)}`;
28326:      window.open(mailtoUrl, '_blank');
28327:      showAlert('Rapport Email', 'Le rapport Email de clôture a été ouvert dans votre messagerie avec succès !', 'success', undefined, false, "D'ACCORD", "RAPPORTS");
28328:    }
28329:  }, [managerPhone, managerEmail, merchant, getManagerClosureNotificationMessage, showAlert]);
28330:
28331:  const resetFormFields = () => {
28332:    setClientName('');
28333:    setClientPhone('');
28334:    setClientEmail('');
28335:    const resetQty: { [key: string]: number } = {};
28336:    Object.keys(tarifs.articles).forEach(k => {
28337:      resetQty[k] = 0;
28338:    });
28339:    setArticlesQty(resetQty);
28340:    setWeightKg(0);
28341:    setSupplements(prev => {
28342:      const reset: Record<string, boolean> = {};
28343:      Object.keys(prev).forEach(k => {
28344:        reset[k] = false;
28345:      });
28346:      return reset;
28347:    });
28348:    setDiscountValue(0);
28349:    setDiscountType('amount');
28350:    setNotes('');
28351:    setPaymentStatus('unpaid');
28352:    setPaymentMethod('cash');
28353:    setAmountPaid(0);
28354:    setSelectedTicket(null);
28355:    showAlert('Formulaire Réinitialisé', 'Le formulaire de réception a été vidé.', 'success');
28356:  };
28357:
28358:  const handleSendClientWhatsApp = (t: PressingTicket) => {
28359:    if (!t.clientPhone || !t.clientPhone.trim()) {
28360:      showAlert('Téléphone Manquant', "Veuillez renseigner le téléphone du client.", 'warning');
28361:      return;
28362:    }
28363:    const message = `Bonjour ${t.clientName}, votre dépôt du ${t.depositDate} au pressing ${merchant.name || 'ACOM'} a bien été enregistré. Ticket N°: ${t.ticketNumber}. Prix : ${t.total} FCFA. Versé: ${t.amountPaid || 0} FCFA. Retrait prévu: ${t.expectedDeliveryDate || 'N/A'}. Merci de votre confiance !`;
28364:    let cleaned = t.clientPhone.replace(/[^0-9]/g, '');
28365:    if (cleaned.length === 9 && cleaned.startsWith('7')) {
28366:      cleaned = '221' + cleaned;
28367:    }
28368:    const url = `https://api.whatsapp.com/send?phone=${cleaned}&text=${encodeURIComponent(message)}`;
28369:    window.open(url, '_blank');
28370:    showAlert('Message Prêt', 'Le message de suivi WhatsApp pour le client a bien été généré.', 'success');
28371:  };
28372:
28373:  const handleCreateTicket = (e: React.FormEvent) => {
28374:    e.preventDefault();
28375:    if (!clientName.trim()) {
28376:      showAlert('Nom Client Obligatoire', 'Veuillez renseigner le nom du client pour enregistrer la réception.', 'warning');
28377:      return;
28378:    }
28379:
28380:    const nextNumber = tickets.length + 1;
28381:    const ticketNumber = `PR-2026-${String(nextNumber).padStart(4, '0')}`;
28382:
28383:    const newTicket: PressingTicket = {
28384:      id: `t_${Date.now()}`,
28385:      ticketNumber,
28386:      clientName,
28387:      clientPhone,
28388:      clientEmail,
28389:      depositDate,
28390:      expectedDeliveryDate,
28391:      billingType,
28392:      articles: billingType === 'article' ? { ...articlesQty } : {},
28393:      weightService,
28394:      weightKg: billingType === 'poids' ? weightKg : 0,
28395:      supplements: { ...supplements },
28396:      supplementTarifs: { ...supplementTarifs },
28397:      discount: discountAmount,
28398:      discountType,
28399:      discountValue,
28400:      subtotal,
28401:      supplementTotal,
28402:      total,
28403:      totalCost,
28404:      status: 'deposed',
28405:      paymentStatus,
28406:      paymentMethod,
28407:      amountPaid: paymentStatus === 'unpaid' ? 0 : amountPaid,
28408:      amountPaidAtDeposit: paymentStatus === 'unpaid' ? 0 : amountPaid,
28409:      notes,
28410:      sentNotifications: []
28411:    };
28412:
28413:    const updated = [newTicket, ...tickets];
28414:    setTickets(updated);
28415:    localStorage.setItem(`pressing_tickets_${merchant.id}`, JSON.stringify(updated));
28416:    showAlert('Fiche Enregistrée', `La fiche de réception a été enregistrée avec succès !\nTicket N° : ${ticketNumber}`, 'success', undefined, false, "D'ACCORD", "RÉCEPTION");
28417:
28418:    // Track as Sales inside system DB
28419:    try {
28420:      db.sales.add({
28421:        id: newTicket.id,
28422:        merchantId: merchant.id,
28423:        items: [],
28424:        totalAmount: total,
28425:        paidAmount: paymentStatus === 'unpaid' ? 0 : amountPaid,
28426:        balance: Math.max(0, total - amountPaid),
28427:        payments: [{
28428:          id: `p_${Date.now()}`,
28429:          amount: paymentStatus === 'unpaid' ? 0 : amountPaid,
28430:          method: paymentMethod === 'other' ? 'transfer' : paymentMethod,
28431:          date: new Date().toISOString()
28432:        }],
28433:        paymentMethod: paymentMethod === 'other' ? 'mobile_money' : paymentMethod,
28434:        customerName: clientName,
28435:        customerPhone: clientPhone,
28436:        processedBy: 'system',
28437:        createdAt: new Date().toISOString()
28438:      });
28439:    } catch (err) {
28440:      console.error(err);
28441:    }
28442:
28443:    // Do not reset form states immediately to allow printing/WhatsApp/PDF options
28444:    // Open detail simulator immediately
28445:    setSelectedTicket(newTicket);
28446:
28447:    // Auto-email to manager in background on entry
28448:    if (autoEmailManager && managerEmail && managerEmail.trim()) {
28449:      sendSilentBackgroundEmailToManager(newTicket, 'entrée');
28450:    }
28451:  };
28452:
28453:  const handleGenerateTicketQuote = () => {
28454:    if (!clientName.trim()) {
28455:      showAlert('Nom Client Obligatoire', 'Le nom du client est obligatoire pour établir un devis.', 'warning');
28456:      return;
28457:    }
28458:    if (billingType === 'article' && Object.values(articlesQty).every(qty => qty === 0)) {
28459:      showAlert('Linge Obligatoire', 'Veuillez ajouter au moins un article pour le devis.', 'warning');
28460:      return;
28461:    }
28462:    if (billingType === 'poids' && weightKg <= 0) {
28463:      showAlert('Poids Non Valide', 'Le poids doit être supérieur à 0 pour le devis.', 'warning');
28464:      return;
28465:    }
28466:
28467:    const nextNumber = tickets.length + 1;
28468:    const quoteNumber = `D-PR-${String(nextNumber).padStart(4, '0')}`;
28469:
28470:    const newQuote: PressingTicket = {
28471:      id: `q_${Date.now()}`,
28472:      ticketNumber: quoteNumber,
28473:      clientName,
28474:      clientPhone,
28475:      clientEmail,
28476:      depositDate: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0],
28477:      expectedDeliveryDate: '',
28478:      billingType,
28479:      articles: billingType === 'article' ? { ...articlesQty } : {},
28480:      weightService,
28481:      weightKg: billingType === 'poids' ? weightKg : 0,
28482:      supplements: { ...supplements },
28483:      supplementTarifs: { ...supplementTarifs },
28484:      discount: discountAmount,
28485:      discountType,
28486:      discountValue,
28487:      subtotal,
28488:      supplementTotal,
28489:      total,
28490:      totalCost,
28491:      status: 'quotation',
28492:      paymentStatus: 'unpaid',
28493:      paymentMethod: 'other',
28494:      amountPaid: 0,
28495:      notes,
28496:      sentNotifications: []
28497:    };
28498:
28499:    const updated = [newQuote, ...tickets];
28500:    setTickets(updated);
28501:    localStorage.setItem(`pressing_tickets_${merchant.id}`, JSON.stringify(updated));
28502:    setSelectedTicket(newQuote);
28503:    showAlert('Devis Généré', `Le devis proforma ${quoteNumber} a été généré avec succès !`, 'success', undefined, false, "D'ACCORD", "COMMERCIAL");
28504:  };
28505:
28506:  const updateStatus = (ticketId: string, nextStatus: PressingTicket['status']) => {
28507:    const targetTicketBefore = tickets.find(t => t.id === ticketId);
28508:    if (nextStatus === 'delivered' && targetTicketBefore) {
28509:      const due = targetTicketBefore.total - (targetTicketBefore.amountPaid || 0);
28510:      if (due > 0) {
28511:        showAlert(
28512:          'Paiement requis 💸',
28513:          `Impossible de passer le linge en statut "Livré" ! Il reste un solde de ${due.toLocaleString()} FCFA à régler. Veuillez d'abord encaisser le solde restant ou l'acompte avant de livrer.`,
28514:          'warning',
28515:          undefined,
28516:          false,
28517:          "COMPRIS",
28518:          "CONTRÔLE DE LIVRAISON"
28519:        );
28520:        return;
28521:      }
28522:    }
28523:
28524:    const updated = tickets.map(t => {
28525:      if (t.id === ticketId) {
28526:        const isConvertingFromQuote = t.status === 'quotation' && nextStatus === 'deposed';
28527:        
28528:        if (isConvertingFromQuote) {
28529:          try {
28530:            db.sales.add({
28531:              id: t.id,
28532:              merchantId: merchant.id,
28533:              items: [],
28534:              totalAmount: t.total,
28535:              paidAmount: t.amountPaid || 0,
28536:              balance: Math.max(0, t.total - (t.amountPaid || 0)),
28537:              payments: [{
28538:                id: `p_${Date.now()}`,
28539:                amount: t.amountPaid || 0,
28540:                method: t.paymentMethod === 'other' ? 'transfer' : t.paymentMethod,
28541:                date: new Date().toISOString()
28542:              }],
28543:              paymentMethod: t.paymentMethod === 'other' ? 'mobile_money' : t.paymentMethod,
28544:              customerName: t.clientName,
28545:              customerPhone: t.clientPhone,
28546:              processedBy: 'system',
28547:              createdAt: new Date().toISOString()
28548:            });
28549:          } catch (err) {
28550:            console.error("Error adding converted quote to sales DB:", err);
28551:          }
28552:        }
28553:
28554:        return {
28555:          ...t,
28556:          status: nextStatus,
28557:          amountPaidAtDeposit: isConvertingFromQuote ? (t.amountPaid || 0) : (t.amountPaidAtDeposit !== undefined ? t.amountPaidAtDeposit : (t.amountPaid || 0))
28558:        };
28559:      }
28560:      return t;
28561:    });
28562:    setTickets(updated);
28563:    localStorage.setItem(`pressing_tickets_${merchant.id}`, JSON.stringify(updated));
28564:    
28565:    const targetTicket = updated.find(t => t.id === ticketId);
28566:    if (selectedTicket && selectedTicket.id === ticketId) {
28567:      setSelectedTicket({ ...selectedTicket, status: nextStatus });
28568:    }
28569:    showAlert('Statut Mis à Jour', 'Le statut de suivi réception a été mis à jour avec succès !', 'success', undefined, false, "D'ACCORD", "SUIVI AUTOMATIQUE");
28570:
28571:    // Auto-email to manager in background on status change (exit/outing alerts)
28572:    if (targetTicket && autoEmailManager && managerEmail && managerEmail.trim()) {
28573:      sendSilentBackgroundEmailToManager(targetTicket, 'sortie');
28574:    }
28575:  };
28576:
28577:  const deleteTicket = (ticketId: string) => {
28578:    showAlert(
28579:      'Suppression Ticket ?',
28580:      'Voulez-vous supprimer définitivement ce ticket ? Cette action efface définitivement la fiche locale.',
28581:      'warning',
28582:      () => {
28583:        const updated = tickets.filter(t => t.id !== ticketId);
28584:        setTickets(updated);
28585:        localStorage.setItem(`pressing_tickets_${merchant.id}`, JSON.stringify(updated));
28586:        setSelectedTicket(null);
28587:        if (viewingTicket && viewingTicket.id === ticketId) {
28588:          setViewingTicket(null);
28589:        }
28590:        showAlert('Ticket Supprimé', 'Le ticket de pressing a été supprimé de la base locale !', 'success', undefined, false, "D'ACCORD", "CORBEILLE");
28591:      },
28592:      true,
28593:      'SUPPRIMER'
28594:    );
28595:  };
28596:
28597:  const handleCollectBalance = (ticketId: string, method: PressingTicket['paymentMethod'] = 'cash') => {
28598:    const targetTicket = tickets.find(t => t.id === ticketId);
28599:    if (!targetTicket) return;
28600:    const due = targetTicket.total - (targetTicket.amountPaid || 0);
28601:    if (due <= 0) return;
28602:
28603:    let methodLabel = method === 'cash' ? 'Espèces 💵' : method === 'mobile_money' ? 'Mobile Money 📱' : 'Carte 💳';
28604:
28605:    showAlert(
28606:      'Encaisser le solde dû',
28607:      `Voulez-vous encaisser le solde restant de ${due.toLocaleString()} FCFA par ${methodLabel} pour le ticket ${targetTicket.ticketNumber} ?`,
28608:      'info',
28609:      () => {
28610:        const todayStr = format(new Date(), 'yyyy-MM-dd');
28611:        const updated = tickets.map(t => {
28612:          if (t.id === ticketId) {
28613:            const initialPaidAtDeposit = t.amountPaidAtDeposit !== undefined ? t.amountPaidAtDeposit : (t.amountPaid || 0);
28614:            return {
28615:              ...t,
28616:              paymentStatus: 'paid' as const,
28617:              paymentMethod: method,
28618:              amountPaid: t.total,
28619:              amountPaidAtDeposit: initialPaidAtDeposit,
28620:              balanceCollectedAmount: due,
28621:              balanceCollectedDate: todayStr,
28622:              balanceCollectedMethod: method,
28623:            };
28624:          }
28625:          return t;
28626:        });
28627:        setTickets(updated);
28628:        localStorage.setItem(`pressing_tickets_${merchant.id}`, JSON.stringify(updated));
28629:
28630:        // Track payment update in deep local db.sales
28631:        try {
28632:          db.sales.get(ticketId).then(existingSale => {
28633:            if (existingSale) {
28634:              const currentPayments = existingSale.payments || [];
28635:              const newPaymentRecord = {
28636:                id: `p_${Date.now()}`,
28637:                amount: due,
28638:                method: (method === 'other' ? 'transfer' : method) as 'cash' | 'card' | 'mobile_money' | 'transfer',
28639:                date: new Date().toISOString()
28640:              };
28641:              db.sales.update(ticketId, {
28642:                paidAmount: targetTicket.total,
28643:                balance: 0,
28644:                payments: [...currentPayments, newPaymentRecord]
28645:              });
28646:            }
28647:          });
28648:        } catch (err) {
28649:          console.error("Erreur de traçabilité de vente :", err);
28650:        }
28651:
28652:        const ticketUpdateData = {
28653:          paymentStatus: 'paid' as const,
28654:          paymentMethod: method,
28655:          amountPaid: targetTicket.total,
28656:          amountPaidAtDeposit: targetTicket.amountPaidAtDeposit !== undefined ? targetTicket.amountPaidAtDeposit : (targetTicket.amountPaid || 0),
28657:          balanceCollectedAmount: due,
28658:          balanceCollectedDate: todayStr,
28659:          balanceCollectedMethod: method,
28660:        };
28661:
28662:        if (viewingTicket && viewingTicket.id === ticketId) {
28663:          setViewingTicket({
28664:            ...viewingTicket,
28665:            ...ticketUpdateData
28666:          });
28667:        }
28668:        if (selectedTicket && selectedTicket.id === ticketId) {
28669:          setSelectedTicket({
28670:            ...selectedTicket,
28671:            ...ticketUpdateData
28672:          });
28673:        }
28674:        showAlert('Paiement Enregistré', `Le solde de ${due.toLocaleString()} FCFA a été encaissé avec succès via ${methodLabel} !`, 'success', undefined, false, "D'ACCORD", "RÈGLEMENT");
28675:        
28676:        // Auto-email summary to the manager in background on balance payment collection
28677:        if (autoEmailManager && managerEmail && managerEmail.trim()) {
28678:          sendSilentBackgroundBalanceCollectionEmailToManager(targetTicket, due, method);
28679:        }
28680:      },
28681:      true,
28682:      'ENCAISSER'
28683:    );
28684:  };
28685:
28686:  const filteredTickets = useMemo(() => {
28687:    return tickets.filter(t => {
28688:      const matchSearch = t.ticketNumber.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
28689:                          t.clientName.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
28690:                          t.clientPhone.includes(searchQuery);
28691:      
28692:      if (activeSubTab === 'active') {
28693:        const isNotDelivered = t.status !== 'delivered' && t.status !== 'quotation';
28694:        const isWashMatched = washStatusFilter === 'all' || t.status === washStatusFilter;
28695:        return matchSearch && isNotDelivered && isWashMatched;
28696:      } else if (activeSubTab === 'history') {
28697:        return matchSearch && t.status === 'delivered';
28698:      } else if (activeSubTab === 'quotes') {
28699:        return matchSearch && t.status === 'quotation';
28700:      }
28701:      return matchSearch;
28702:    });
28703:  }, [tickets, searchQuery, activeSubTab, washStatusFilter]);
28704:
28705:  const handleDownloadPDF = (ticket: PressingTicket, formatType: '80mm' | '58mm' = '80mm') => {
28706:    const widthMm = formatType === '58mm' ? 58 : 80;
28707:    const heightMm = formatType === '58mm' ? (ticket.status === 'quotation' ? 240 : 225) : (ticket.status === 'quotation' ? 220 : 205);
28708:    const pdf = new jsPDF('p', 'mm', [widthMm, heightMm]);
28709:    pdf.setFont('courier', 'normal');
28710:    pdf.setFontSize(formatType === '58mm' ? 8.5 : 10);
28711:    
28712:    let y = 10;
28713:    const centerX = formatType === '58mm' ? 29 : 40;
28714:    const lineStartX = formatType === '58mm' ? 3 : 5;
28715:    const lineEndX = formatType === '58mm' ? 55 : 75;
28716:    const paddingLeft = formatType === '58mm' ? 3 : 5;
28717:    const splitWidth = formatType === '58mm' ? 52 : 70;
28718:    const maxCharName = formatType === '58mm' ? 18 : 25;
28719:    const maxCharItem = formatType === '58mm' ? 8 : 10;
28720:    const smallFontSize = formatType === '58mm' ? 7 : 8;
28721:    const extraSmallFontSize = formatType === '58mm' ? 6 : 7;
28722:    
28723:    pdf.text(merchant.name || 'ACOM Pressing', centerX, y, { align: 'center' });
28724:    y += 5;
28725:    pdf.setFontSize(smallFontSize);
28726:    pdf.text(merchant.address || 'Service de Pressing', centerX, y, { align: 'center' });
28727:    y += 7;
28728:    pdf.line(lineStartX, y, lineEndX, y);
28729:    y += 6;
28730:    
28731:    pdf.setFont('courier', 'bold');
28732:    const docTitle = ticket.status === 'quotation' ? 'DEVIS PROFORMA' : 'TICKET RÉCEPTION';
28733:    pdf.text(docTitle, centerX, y, { align: 'center' });
28734:    y += 5;
28735:    pdf.text(`NUMÉRO : ${ticket.ticketNumber}`, paddingLeft, y);
28736:    y += 5;
28737:    pdf.setFont('courier', 'normal');
28738:    pdf.text(`Client  : ${ticket.clientName.slice(0, maxCharName)}`, paddingLeft, y);
28739:    y += 4;
28740:    pdf.text(`Contact : ${ticket.clientPhone || 'N/A'}`, paddingLeft, y);
28741:    y += 4;
28742:    if (ticket.clientEmail) {
28743:      const emailTrunc = ticket.clientEmail.length > maxCharName ? ticket.clientEmail.slice(0, maxCharName - 2) + '..' : ticket.clientEmail;
28744:      pdf.text(`E-mail  : ${emailTrunc}`, paddingLeft, y);
28745:      y += 4;
28746:    }
28747:    pdf.text(`Dépôt   : ${ticket.depositDate}`, paddingLeft, y);
28748:    y += 4;
28749:    if (ticket.expectedDeliveryDate) {
28750:      pdf.text(`Retrait : ${ticket.expectedDeliveryDate} (Prévu)`, paddingLeft, y);
28751:      y += 4;
28752:    }
28753:    if (ticket.notes) {
28754:      const trimmedNotes = ticket.notes.length > maxCharName ? ticket.notes.slice(0, maxCharName - 2) + '..' : ticket.notes;
28755:      pdf.text(`Note    : ${trimmedNotes}`, paddingLeft, y);
28756:      y += 4;
28757:    }
28758:    y += 1;
28759:    pdf.line(lineStartX, y, lineEndX, y);
28760:    y += 5;
28761:
28762:    pdf.setFont('courier', 'bold');
28763:    pdf.text('Détails Prestation', paddingLeft, y);
28764:    y += 5;
28765:    pdf.setFont('courier', 'normal');
28766:
28767:    if (ticket.billingType === 'article') {
28768:      Object.keys(ticket.articles).forEach(key => {
28769:        const qty = ticket.articles[key];
28770:        if (qty > 0) {
28771:          const price = tarifs.articles[key as keyof typeof tarifs.articles] || 0;
28772:          const totalItem = qty * price;
28773:          pdf.text(`- ${key.slice(0, maxCharItem).padEnd(maxCharItem, ' ')} x${qty} : ${totalItem} FCFA`, paddingLeft, y);
28774:          y += 4;
28775:        }
28776:      });
28777:    } else {
28778:      const serviceName = ticket.weightService === 'standard' ? 'Stnd.' : ticket.weightService === 'premium' ? 'Prem.' : 'Exp.';
28779:      const pricePerKg = tarifs.poids[ticket.weightService] || 0;
28780:      pdf.text(`- Poids : ${ticket.weightKg} Kg (${serviceName})`, paddingLeft, y);
28781:      y += 4;
28782:      pdf.text(`  Tarif : ${pricePerKg} FCFA/Kg`, paddingLeft, y);
28783:      y += 4;
28784:    }
28785:
28786:    const activeSupps = Object.keys(ticket.supplements).filter(k => ticket.supplements[k as keyof typeof ticket.supplements]);
28787:    if (activeSupps.length > 0) {
28788:      pdf.text('Suppléments :', paddingLeft, y);
28789:      y += 4;
28790:      activeSupps.forEach(k => {
28791:        const cost = ticket.supplementTarifs[k] || 0;
28792:        let displayName = (tarifs as any).supplements_display_names?.[k] || k;
28793:        displayName = displayName.replace(/[\u2700-\u27BF]|[\uE000-\uF8FF]|\uD83C[\uDC00-\uDFFF]|\uD83D[\uDC00-\uDFFF]|[\u2011-\u26FF]|\uD83E[\uDD10-\uDDFF]/g, '').trim();
28794:        if (!displayName) {
28795:          const fallbackLabels: Record<string, string> = {
28796:            repassage: 'Repassage',
28797:            express: 'Lavage Express',
28798:            detachage: 'Detachage',
28799:            livraison: 'Livraison',
28800:            premiumPack: 'Emballage Premium'
28801:          };
28802:          displayName = fallbackLabels[k] || k;
28803:        }
28804:        pdf.text(`  + ${displayName.slice(0, maxCharItem + 3).padEnd(maxCharItem + 3, ' ')} : ${cost} FCFA`, paddingLeft, y);
28805:        y += 4;
28806:      });
28807:    }
28808:
28809:    y += 2;
28810:    pdf.line(lineStartX, y, lineEndX, y);
28811:    y += 5;
28812:
28813:    pdf.text(`Sous-total: ${ticket.subtotal + ticket.supplementTotal} FCFA`, paddingLeft, y);
28814:    y += 4;
28815:    if (ticket.discount > 0) {
28816:      pdf.text(`Remise: -${ticket.discount} FCFA`, paddingLeft, y);
28817:      y += 4;
28818:    }
28819:    
28820:    pdf.setFont('courier', 'bold');
28821:    pdf.setFontSize(formatType === '58mm' ? 8.5 : 10);
28822:    pdf.text(ticket.status === 'quotation' ? `MONTANT DEVIS : ${ticket.total} FCFA` : `TOTAL NET : ${ticket.total} FCFA`, paddingLeft, y);
28823:    y += 5;
28824:
28825:    pdf.setFont('courier', 'normal');
28826:    pdf.setFontSize(smallFontSize);
28827:    
28828:    if (ticket.status !== 'quotation') {
28829:      const pStatusLabel = ticket.paymentStatus === 'paid' ? 'PAYE D\'AVANCE' : (ticket.paymentStatus === 'partial' && (ticket.amountPaid || 0) > 0) ? 'ACOMPTE PAYE' : 'IMPAYE AT RETRAIT';
28830:      pdf.text(`Règlement : ${pStatusLabel}`, paddingLeft, y);
28831:      y += 4;
28832:
28833:      const paidVal = ticket.amountPaid || 0;
28834:      const remainingVal = Math.max(0, ticket.total - paidVal);
28835:      pdf.text(`Versé     : ${paidVal} FCFA`, paddingLeft, y);
28836:      y += 4;
28837:      pdf.setFont('courier', 'bold');
28838:      pdf.text(`Reste dû  : ${remainingVal} FCFA`, paddingLeft, y);
28839:      y += 5;
28840:    }
28841:
28842:    pdf.line(lineStartX, y, lineEndX, y);
28843:    y += 5;
28844:    pdf.setFont('courier', 'normal');
28845:    pdf.setFontSize(smallFontSize);
28846:
28847:    if (ticket.status === 'quotation') {
28848:      pdf.setFont('courier', 'bold');
28849:      pdf.text('Conditions Générales de Dépôt', centerX, y, { align: 'center' });
28850:      y += 5;
28851:      pdf.setFont('courier', 'normal');
28852:      pdf.setFontSize(extraSmallFontSize);
28853:      
28854:      const p1 = "Nous apportons le plus grand soin au traitement de votre linge. Toutefois, les articles délicats ou ne comportant pas d’étiquette d’entretien claire sont pris en charge sous l’entière responsabilité de leur propriétaire.";
28855:      const p2 = "Le linge est à retirer à la date prévue et mentionnée sur la facture. Tout retrait effectué au-delà de cette date pourra entraîner l'application de frais de garde.";
28856:      const p3 = "Ce devis devra être présenté lors de la confirmation du dépôt afin de valider les prestations demandées.";
28857:      
28858:      const lines1 = pdf.splitTextToSize(p1, splitWidth);
28859:      lines1.forEach((line: string) => {
28860:        pdf.text(line, centerX, y, { align: 'center' });
28861:        y += 4;
28862:      });
28863:      y += 2.5;
28864:      
28865:      const lines2 = pdf.splitTextToSize(p2, splitWidth);
28866:      lines2.forEach((line: string) => {
28867:        pdf.text(line, centerX, y, { align: 'center' });
28868:        y += 4;
28869:      });
28870:      y += 3;
28871:
28872:      pdf.setFont('courier', 'bold');
28873:      pdf.setFontSize(extraSmallFontSize + 0.5);
28874:      const lines3 = pdf.splitTextToSize(p3, splitWidth);
28875:      lines3.forEach((line: string) => {
28876:        pdf.text(line, centerX, y, { align: 'center' });
28877:        y += 4;
28878:      });
28879:    } else {
28880:      pdf.text('Merci de votre confiance !', centerX, y, { align: 'center' });
28881:      y += 5;
28882:
28883:      pdf.setFontSize(extraSmallFontSize);
28884:      const noticeMsg = "Le linge est à retirer à la date prévue et mentionnée sur la facture. Tout retrait effectué au-delà de cette date pourra entraîner l'application de frais de garde.";
28885:      const noticeLines = pdf.splitTextToSize(noticeMsg, splitWidth);
28886:      noticeLines.forEach((line: string) => {
28887:        pdf.text(line, centerX, y, { align: 'center' });
28888:        y += 4;
28889:      });
28890:      y += 2.5;
28891:
28892:      pdf.setFontSize(smallFontSize);
28893:      let statusMsg = "";
28894:      if (ticket.status === 'in_progress') {
28895:        statusMsg = "Votre linge est actuellement en cours de traitement. Ce document devra être présenté lors du retrait de votre commande.";
28896:      } else if (ticket.status === 'ready') {
28897:        statusMsg = "Votre linge est prêt à être retiré. Veuillez présenter ce document lors de la remise de vos articles.";
28898:      } else if (ticket.status === 'delivered') {
28899:        statusMsg = "Le linge a été retiré et la prestation est considérée comme terminée. Merci d'avoir fait confiance à notre service de pressing.";
28900:      } else if ((ticket.status as string) === 'cancelled') {
28901:        statusMsg = "Cette commande a été annulée. Ce document est conservé à titre d'archive et ne peut plus être utilisé pour un retrait.";
28902:      } else {
28903:        statusMsg = "Ce bon de réception / facture devra être présenté obligatoirement lors du retrait de votre linge. Veuillez le conserver soigneusement jusqu'à la restitution complète de vos articles.";
28904:      }
28905:
28906:      const lines = pdf.splitTextToSize(statusMsg, splitWidth);
28907:      lines.forEach((line: string) => {
28908:        pdf.text(line, centerX, y, { align: 'center' });
28909:        y += 4;
28910:      });
28911:    }
28912:
28913:    pdf.save(`Ticket_Pressing_${ticket.ticketNumber}_${formatType}.pdf`);
28914:    showAlert('Reçu Téléchargé', `Le reçu au format ticket ${formatType} a été généré et téléchargé avec succès !`, 'success');
28915:  };
28916:
28917:  return (
28918:    <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0 }} animate={{ opacity: 1 }} className="space-y-8">
28919:      {/* Header bar */}
28920:      <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row justify-between md:items-center bg-white p-6 rounded-3xl border border-gray-100 shadow-sm gap-4">
28921:        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
28922:          <span className="p-3 bg-[#faf5ff] text-[#5c2197] rounded-2xl border border-purple-100 flex items-center justify-center">
28923:            <ClipboardList className="w-7 h-7" />
28924:          </span>
28925:          <div>
28926:            <h2 className="text-2xl font-black text-ink tracking-tight">Fiche de Réception Client</h2>
28927:            <p className="text-gray-500 text-xs mt-1">Enregistrement et suivi des dépôts, factures unitaires et par kg.</p>
28928:          </div>
28929:        </div>
28930:        <div className="flex bg-gray-100 p-1.5 rounded-2xl w-fit border border-black/5 shrink-0 overflow-x-auto max-w-full">
28931:          <button
28932:            onClick={() => { setActiveSubTab('create'); setSelectedTicket(null); }}
28933:            className={`px-5 py-2.5 rounded-xl font-bold text-xs uppercase tracking-wider transition-all duration-200 whitespace-nowrap ${
28934:              activeSubTab === 'create' ? 'bg-white text-[#5c2197] shadow-sm' : 'text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-900'
28935:            }`}
28936:          >
28937:            🧾 Nouveau Ticket
28938:          </button>
28939:          <button
28940:            onClick={() => setActiveSubTab('active')}
28941:            className={`px-5 py-2.5 rounded-xl font-bold text-xs uppercase tracking-wider transition-all duration-200 whitespace-nowrap ${
28942:              activeSubTab === 'active' ? 'bg-white text-[#5c2197] shadow-sm' : 'text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-900'
28943:            }`}
28944:          >
28945:            ⏳ En Cours ({tickets.filter(t => t.status !== 'delivered' && t.status !== 'quotation').length})
28946:          </button>
28947:          <button
28948:            onClick={() => setActiveSubTab('history')}
28949:            className={`px-5 py-2.5 rounded-xl font-bold text-xs uppercase tracking-wider transition-all duration-200 whitespace-nowrap ${
28950:              activeSubTab === 'history' ? 'bg-white text-[#5c2197] shadow-sm' : 'text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-900'
28951:            }`}
28952:          >
28953:            ✅ Historique ({tickets.filter(t => t.status === 'delivered').length})
28954:          </button>
28955:          <button
28956:            onClick={() => setActiveSubTab('quotes')}
28957:            className={`px-5 py-2.5 rounded-xl font-bold text-xs uppercase tracking-wider transition-all duration-200 whitespace-nowrap ${
28958:              activeSubTab === 'quotes' ? 'bg-white text-[#5c2197] shadow-sm' : 'text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-900'
28959:            }`}
28960:          >
28961:            📋 Devis ({tickets.filter(t => t.status === 'quotation').length})
28962:          </button>
28963:          <button
28964:            onClick={() => setActiveSubTab('closures')}
28965:            className={`px-5 py-2.5 rounded-xl font-bold text-xs uppercase tracking-wider transition-all duration-200 whitespace-nowrap ${
28966:              activeSubTab === 'closures' ? 'bg-white text-[#5c2197] shadow-sm' : 'text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-900'
28967:            }`}
28968:          >
28969:            👑 Clôtures ({closures.length})
28970:          </button>
28971:        </div>
28972:      </div>
28973:
28974:      {/* KPI Stats Bar Widget */}

28979:        </div>

28991:        </div>

28995:        </div>

28997:
28998:      {activeSubTab === 'create' ? (

29008:              >
29009:                <RefreshCw className="w-3.5 h-3.5" /> NOUVEAU CLIENT
29010:              </button>
29011:            </div>
29012:            
29013:            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
29014:              <div>
29015:                <label className="block text-[10px] font-mono font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-1.5">Nom du Client</label>

29033:                />
29034:              </div>
29035:              <div>

29037:                <input
29038:                  type="email"
29039:                  placeholder="client@mail.com"
29040:                  value={clientEmail}
29041:                  onChange={e => setClientEmail(e.target.value)}

29043:                />
29044:              </div>
29045:            </div>
29046:
29047:            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
29048:              <div>

29052:                  required
29053:                  value={depositDate}
29054:                  onChange={e => {
29055:                    setDepositDate(e.target.value);
29056:                    const parts = e.target.value.split('-');
29057:                    if (parts.length === 3) {
29058:                      const d = new Date(parseInt(parts[0]), parseInt(parts[1]) - 1, parseInt(parts[2]));
29059:                      d.setDate(d.getDate() + 3);
29060:                      setExpectedDeliveryDate(format(d, 'yyyy-MM-dd'));
29061:                    }
29062:                  }}
29063:                  className="w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-xl border border-gray-200 outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#5c2197]/20 bg-gray-50/50 font-mono text-sm"

29069:                  type="date"
29070:                  required
29071:                  value={expectedDeliveryDate}
29072:                  onChange={e => setExpectedDeliveryDate(e.target.value)}
29073:                  className="w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-xl border border-gray-200 outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#5c2197]/20 bg-gray-50/50 font-mono text-sm"
29074:                />
29075:              </div>
29076:            </div>

29127:                          <img

29143:                              setArticlesQty({ ...articlesQty, [key]: val });
29144:                            }}
29145:                            className="w-8 h-8 rounded-lg bg-gray-100 hover:bg-gray-200 font-bold text-gray-600 flex items-center justify-center transition-all"
29146:                          >
29147:                            -
29148:                          </button>

29150:                          <button
29151:                            type="button"
29152:                            onClick={() => {
29153:                              setArticlesQty({ ...articlesQty, [key]: articlesQty[key] + 1 });
29154:                            }}
29155:                            className="w-8 h-8 rounded-lg bg-[#5c2197]/10 hover:bg-[#5c2197]/20 font-bold text-[#5c2197] flex items-center justify-center transition-all"
29156:                          >
29157:                            +
29158:                          </button>
29159:                        </div>
29160:                      </div>
29161:                    );
29162:                  })}
29163:                </div>
29164:              </div>
29165:            )}

29183:                            express: 'Lavage Express 24h'
29184:                          };

29187:                              {labels[key] || key.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + key.slice(1)} ({tarifs.poids[key]} FCFA/Kg)

29189:                          );
29190:                        })}
29191:                      </select>
29192:                    </div>

29198:                        min="0"

29200:                        value={weightKg || ''}
29201:                        onChange={(e) => setWeightKg(Math.max(0, parseFloat(e.target.value) || 0))}
29202:                        className="w-full px-4 py-2.5 rounded-xl border border-gray-200 bg-white text-right font-mono font-bold text-xs outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#5c2197]/20"
29203:                      />
29204:                    </div>
29205:                  </div>
29206:                  <div className="flex justify-between items-center text-xs font-bold text-gray-700 pt-2 border-t border-purple-100">

29209:                  </div>
29210:                </div>
29211:              </div>
29212:            )}
29213:

29215:            <div className="space-y-3 pt-4 border-t border-dashed border-gray-100">
29216:              <label className="block text-[10px] font-mono font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest">Prestations optionnelles</label>
29217:              <div className="grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3 gap-3">
29218:                {Object.keys(supplements).map((key) => {
29219:                  const active = supplements[key as keyof typeof supplements];
29220:                  const price = supplementTarifs[key as keyof typeof supplementTarifs];
29221:                  const staticLabels: Record<string, string> = {
29222:                    repassage: '👔 Repassage',

29269:                  className="w-full px-4 py-2.5 rounded-xl border border-gray-200 outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#5c2197]/20 bg-gray-50/50 font-mono font-bold text-xs text-ink"

29284:                      setPaymentStatus(status);
29285:                      if (status === 'paid') {
29286:                        setAmountPaid(total);
29287:                      } else if (status === 'unpaid') {
29288:                        setAmountPaid(0);
29289:                      } else {

29291:                      }

29319:                    value={paymentMethod}
29320:                    onChange={e => setPaymentMethod(e.target.value as any)}

29359:

29369:                <div className="space-y-1 text-gray-500">
29370:                  <p className="text-gray-900 font-bold">
29371:                    {selectedTicket ? `N° d'enregistrement : ${selectedTicket.ticketNumber}` : "N° : PR-2026-#### (Généré à la création)"}
29372:                  </p>
29373:                  <p>Client : <span className="text-ink font-bold">{clientName || '________________'}</span></p>
29374:                  <p>Contact : <span className="text-ink font-bold">{clientPhone || '________________'}</span></p>
29375:                  <p>Dépôt : <span className="font-bold">{depositDate}</span></p>
29376:                  <p className="text-[#5c2197] font-bold">Retrait prévu : <span>{expectedDeliveryDate}</span></p>
29377:                  {notes.trim() && (
29378:                    <p className="text-amber-600 italic text-[10px]">Notes : {notes}</p>
29379:                  )}
29380:                </div>
29381:
29382:                <div className="border-t border-dashed border-gray-200 pt-3">
29383:                  <p className="font-bold uppercase text-ink mb-1.5 text-xs">Prestations :</p>
29384:                  {billingType === 'article' ? (
29385:                    <div className="space-y-1">
29386:                      {Object.keys(articlesQty).filter(k => articlesQty[k] > 0).map(k => (
29387:                        <div key={k} className="flex justify-between">
29388:                          <span>- {k} x{articlesQty[k]}</span>
29389:                          <span className="font-bold">{(articlesQty[k] * tarifs.articles[k as keyof typeof tarifs.articles]).toLocaleString()} FCFA</span>
29390:                        </div>
29391:                      ))}
29392:                      {Object.keys(articlesQty).filter(k => articlesQty[k] > 0).length === 0 && (
29393:                        <p className="text-gray-400 italic">Aucun article sélectionné</p>
29394:                      )}
29395:                    </div>
29396:                  ) : (
29397:                    <div className="space-y-1">
29398:                      {weightKg > 0 ? (
29399:                        <div className="flex justify-between">
29400:                          <span>- Poids ({weightKg} Kg × {tarifs.poids[weightService]} FCFA)</span>
29401:                          <span className="font-bold">{(weightKg * tarifs.poids[weightService]).toLocaleString()} FCFA</span>
29402:                        </div>
29403:                      ) : (
29404:                        <p className="text-gray-400 italic font-bold text-[10px]">Indiquez le poids total pour calculer</p>
29405:                      )}
29406:                    </div>
29407:                  )}
29408:                </div>
29409:
29410:                {/* Supplement active items list */}
29411:                {Object.keys(supplements).some(k => supplements[k as keyof typeof supplements]) && (
29412:                  <div className="border-t border-dashed border-gray-200 pt-3">
29413:                    <p className="font-bold uppercase text-ink mb-1">Suppléments actifs :</p>
29414:                    <div className="space-y-1">
29415:                      {Object.keys(supplements).filter(k => supplements[k]).map(k => (
29416:                        <div key={k} className="flex justify-between text-[#5c2197]">
29417:                          <span>+ {getSupplementDisplayName(k)}</span>
29418:                          <span>+{supplementTarifs[k] || 0} FCFA</span>
29419:                        </div>
29420:                      ))}
29421:                    </div>
29422:                  </div>
29423:                )}
29424:
29425:                <div className="border-t border-dashed border-gray-200 pt-3 space-y-1 text-xs">
29426:                  <div className="flex justify-between text-gray-500 text-[10px]">
29427:                    <span>Sous-total prestations :</span>
29428:                    <span className="font-bold">{(subtotal).toLocaleString()} FCFA</span>
29429:                  </div>
29430:                  <div className="flex justify-between text-gray-500 text-[10px]">
29431:                    <span>Total suppléments :</span>
29432:                    <span className="font-bold">{(supplementTotal).toLocaleString()} FCFA</span>
29433:                  </div>
29434:                  {discountAmount > 0 && (
29435:                    <div className="flex justify-between text-red-500 text-[10px]">
29436:                      <span>Remise adhérent :</span>
29437:                      <span>-{discountAmount.toLocaleString()} FCFA</span>
29438:                    </div>
29439:                  )}
29440:                  <div className="flex justify-between text-ink font-black pt-1 border-t border-gray-200 text-sm">
29441:                    <span>{selectedTicket?.status === 'quotation' ? 'Montant Devis :' : 'Net à Payer :'}</span>
29442:                    <span className="text-[#5c2197]">{total.toLocaleString()} FCFA</span>
29443:                  </div>
29444:                  
29445:                  {/* Enhanced settlement rows on ticket preview */}
29446:                  {selectedTicket?.status !== 'quotation' && (
29447:                    <div className="border-t border-dotted border-gray-200 pt-1.5 space-y-0.5 mt-1">
29448:                      <div className="flex justify-between text-gray-500 text-[9px] font-bold">
29449:                        <span>Règlement :</span>
29450:                        <span>
29451:                          {paymentStatus === 'paid' ? 'PAYÉ D\'AVANCE' : paymentStatus === 'partial' ? 'ACOMPTE VERSÉ' : 'À LA LIVRAISON'}
29452:                        </span>
29453:                      </div>
29454:                      <div className="flex justify-between text-emerald-600 text-[9px] font-bold">
29455:                        <span>Montant Versé :</span>
29456:                        <span>{(paymentStatus === 'unpaid' ? 0 : amountPaid).toLocaleString()} FCFA</span>
29457:                      </div>
29458:                      {total - (paymentStatus === 'unpaid' ? 0 : amountPaid) > 0 && (
29459:                        <div className="flex justify-between text-rose-500 text-[9px] font-extrabold animate-pulse">
29460:                          <span>Reste dû :</span>
29461:                          <span>{(total - (paymentStatus === 'unpaid' ? 0 : amountPaid)).toLocaleString()} FCFA</span>
29462:                        </div>
29463:                      )}
29464:                    </div>
29465:                  )}
29466:                </div>
29467:
29468:                <div className="text-center pt-3 border-t border-dashed border-gray-200 text-[9px] text-gray-400 space-y-1">
29469:                  <p className="font-bold text-ink">Merci de votre confiance !</p>
29470:                  <p>Ticket requis pour retirer votre linge.</p>
29471:                </div>
29472:              </div>
29473:
29474:              {selectedTicket && (
29475:                <div className="flex flex-col gap-2.5 bg-[#faf5ff] p-5 rounded-2xl border border-purple-100 shadow-inner">
29476:                  <p className="text-xs font-black text-[#5c2197] text-center animate-pulse">🎉 Nouveau ticket enregistré : {selectedTicket.ticketNumber}</p>
29477:                  
29478:                  {/* Print & PDF Buttons */}
29479:                  <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-1.5 mt-1">
29480:                    <button
29481:                      type="button"
29482:                      onClick={() => printPressingTicketDirect(merchant, selectedTicket, '80mm', tarifs, handleDownloadPDF)}
29483:                      className="bg-[#1e293b] hover:bg-black text-white font-bold text-[9px] py-3 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center gap-1 transition text-center shadow-sm"
29484:                      title="Imprimer direct Roll 80mm"
29485:                    >
29486:                      <Printer className="w-3.5 h-3.5" /> Roll (80)
29487:                    </button>
29488:                    <button
29489:                      type="button"
29490:                      onClick={() => printPressingTicketDirect(merchant, selectedTicket, '58mm', tarifs, handleDownloadPDF)}
29491:                      className="bg-[#4b5563] hover:bg-gray-800 text-white font-bold text-[9px] py-3 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center gap-1 transition text-center shadow-sm"
29492:                      title="Imprimer direct Roll 58mm"
29493:                    >
29494:                      <Printer className="w-3.5 h-3.5" /> Roll (58)
29495:                    </button>

29497:                      type="button"
29498:                      onClick={() => printPressingTicketDirect(merchant, selectedTicket, 'A4', tarifs, handleDownloadPDF)}
29499:                      className="bg-indigo-600 hover:bg-indigo-700 text-white font-bold text-[9px] py-3 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center gap-1 transition text-center shadow-sm"
29500:                      title="Imprimer direct A4"
29501:                    >
29502:                      <FileText className="w-3.5 h-3.5" /> Format A4
29503:                    </button>
29504:                  </div>
29505:
29506:                  {/* Actions Area */}
29507:                  <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2">
29508:                    {/* Download PDF button as requested ("téléchargement par pdf") */}
29509:                    <button
29510:                      type="button"
29511:                      onClick={() => handleDownloadPDF(selectedTicket)}
29512:                      className="py-2 px-2.5 bg-gray-100 hover:bg-gray-200 text-gray-800 text-[10px] sm:text-xs font-black rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center gap-1.5 transition shadow-sm border border-gray-200"
29513:                    >
29514:                      <Download className="w-3.5 h-3.5" /> Télécharger PDF
29515:                    </button>
29516:
29517:                    {/* WhatsApp Client button as requested ("envois de par WhatsApp") */}
29518:                    <button
29519:                      type="button"
29520:                      onClick={() => handleSendClientWhatsApp(selectedTicket)}
29521:                      className="py-2 px-2.5 bg-emerald-600 hover:bg-emerald-700 text-white text-[10px] sm:text-xs font-black rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center gap-1.5 transition shadow-sm"
29522:                    >
29523:                      <MessageSquare className="w-3.5 h-3.5" /> WhatsApp Client
29524:                    </button>
29525:                  </div>
29526:
29527:                  {/* Supervisor notifications */}
29528:                  <div className="border-t border-indigo-200/50 mt-1.5 pt-2">
29529:                    <p className="text-[9px] font-mono font-bold text-indigo-700 uppercase tracking-widest text-center flex items-center justify-center gap-1.5 mb-1.5">
29530:                      <span>👑</span> Suivi Temps Réel du Gérant (Dépôt / Entrée)
29531:                    </p>

29533:                      <button

29536:                        className="py-1.5 px-2 bg-emerald-100 hover:bg-emerald-200 text-emerald-800 text-[9px] font-bold rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center gap-1 transition shadow-sm"

29538:                        <MessageSquare className="w-3 h-3 text-emerald-600" /> WhatsApp Gérant
29539:                      </button>
29540:                      <button
29541:                        type="button"
29542:                        onClick={() => dispatchManagerNotif(selectedTicket, 'entrée', 'email')}
29543:                        className="py-1.5 px-2 bg-indigo-100 hover:bg-indigo-200 text-indigo-800 text-[9px] font-bold rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center gap-1 transition shadow-sm"
29544:                      >
29545:                        <Mail className="w-3 h-3 text-indigo-600" /> E-mail Gérant
29546:                      </button>
29547:                    </div>
29548:                    {ticketMailFeedback[selectedTicket.id] && (
29549:                      <div className="mt-1.5 flex items-center gap-1 text-[9px] text-emerald-600 font-semibold bg-emerald-50 p-1.5 rounded-lg justify-center border border-emerald-100">

29551:                        Ce mail envoyé en arrière-plan avec succès !
29552:                      </div>
29553:                    )}
29554:                  </div>
29555:
29556:                  {/* Reset form for a fresh client order */}
29557:                  <div className="border-t border-indigo-200/50 mt-1 pt-2">
29558:                    <button
29559:                      type="button"
29560:                      onClick={resetFormFields}
29561:                      className="w-full py-2.5 px-3 bg-rose-500 hover:bg-rose-600 text-white font-extrabold text-[11px] uppercase tracking-wider rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center gap-2 transition hover:scale-[1.02] duration-150 shadow-md"
29562:                    >
29563:                      <RefreshCw className="w-3.5 h-3.5 animate-spin" style={{ animationDuration: '4s' }} /> Commencer un Nouveau Client
29564:                    </button>
29565:                  </div>
29566:                </div>
29567:              )}
29568:            </div>
29569:          </div>
29570:        </div>
29571:      ) : activeSubTab === 'closures' ? (
29572:        /* Clôture de caisse interactive view */
29573:        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8 items-start">
29574:          {/* New Closure Form */}
29575:          <div className="lg:col-span-6 bg-white p-8 rounded-[2rem] border border-gray-100 shadow-sm space-y-6">
29576:            <div>
29577:              <h3 className="text-lg font-black text-ink flex items-center gap-2">
29578:                🔒 Nouvelle Clôture de Caisse
29579:              </h3>
29580:              <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">
29581:                Calculez les recettes théoriques de la journée et déclarez les espèces physiques en caisse.
29582:              </p>
29583:            </div>
29584:
29585:            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
29586:              <div>
29587:                <label className="block text-[10px] font-mono font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-1.5">Date d'Activité</label>
29588:                <input
29589:                  type="date"
29590:                  value={closureDate}
29591:                  onChange={e => setClosureDate(e.target.value)}
29592:                  className="w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-xl border border-gray-200 outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 bg-gray-50/50 font-bold text-sm text-ink"
29593:                />
29594:              </div>
29595:              <div>
29596:                <label className="block text-[10px] font-mono font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-1.5">Caissier / Opérateur</label>
29597:                <input
29598:                  type="text"
29599:                  placeholder="Ex: Abdoulaye"
29600:                  value={cashierName}
29601:                  onChange={e => setCashierName(e.target.value)}
29602:                  className="w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-xl border border-gray-200 outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 bg-gray-50/50 font-bold text-sm text-ink"
29603:                />
29604:              </div>
29605:            </div>
29606:
29607:            {/* Recalculated Theoretical State */}
29608:            <div className="bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl p-5 border border-slate-100 space-y-4">
29609:              <span className="text-[9px] font-mono font-black text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-widest block">📊 Chiffre d'Affaires Théorique ({closureDate})</span>
29610:              
29611:              <div className="space-y-2.5">
29612:                <div className="flex flex-col space-y-1 text-xs">
29613:                  <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
29614:                    <span className="text-gray-600 flex items-center gap-1.5 font-medium">🧺 Recettes Pressing (Total) :</span>
29615:                    <span className="font-mono font-bold text-ink">{dailyPressingRevenue.toLocaleString()} FCFA</span>
29616:                  </div>
29617:                  <div className="pl-5 text-[10px] text-gray-400 flex flex-col space-y-0.5">
29618:                    <span>• {dailyDepositsRevenue.toLocaleString()} FCFA (Acomptes sur {dailyPressingTickets.length} dépôts)</span>
29619:                    <span>• {dailyBalancesRevenue.toLocaleString()} FCFA (Soldes sur {dailyBalancesCollected.length} retraits)</span>
29620:                  </div>
29621:                </div>
29622:                <div className="flex justify-between items-center text-xs">
29623:                  <span className="text-gray-600 flex items-center gap-1.5 font-medium">🛒 Ventes Détergents ({dailyDetergentSales.length} ventes) :</span>
29624:                  <span className="font-mono font-bold text-ink">{dailyDetergentRevenue.toLocaleString()} FCFA</span>
29625:                </div>
29626:                <div className="border-t border-slate-200/60 pt-2.5 flex justify-between items-center">
29627:                  <span className="font-black text-xs text-ink uppercase tracking-wider">💰 Total Théorique :</span>
29628:                  <span className="font-mono font-black text-sm text-primary">{totalTheoreticalRevenue.toLocaleString()} FCFA</span>
29629:                </div>
29630:              </div>
29631:            </div>
29632:
29633:            {/* Traces and Detailed Receipts Ledger */}
29634:            <div className="bg-indigo-50/50 rounded-2xl p-5 border border-indigo-100/60 space-y-4">
29635:              <span className="text-[9px] font-mono font-black text-indigo-400 uppercase tracking-widest block">📜 Traces des Encaisses de la Journée ({closureDate})</span>
29636:              
29637:              {/* Deposits / Acomptes */}
29638:              <div className="space-y-2">
29639:                <span className="text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wide block">📥 Acomptes reçus au Dépôt ({dailyPressingTickets.length}) :</span>
29640:                {dailyPressingTickets.length === 0 ? (
29641:                  <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-400 italic font-mono pl-3">Aucun acompte encaissé aujourd'hui.</p>
29642:                ) : (
29643:                  <div className="max-h-24 overflow-y-auto space-y-1 border border-indigo-100/50 rounded-xl p-2.5 bg-white">
29644:                    {dailyPressingTickets.map(t => {
29645:                      const depositPaid = t.amountPaidAtDeposit !== undefined ? t.amountPaidAtDeposit : (t.amountPaid || 0);
29646:                      const methodLabel = t.paymentMethod === 'cash' ? '💵' : t.paymentMethod === 'mobile_money' ? '📱' : '💳';
29647:                      return (
29648:                        <div key={t.id} className="flex justify-between items-center text-[10px] py-0.5 border-b border-slate-50 last:border-0">
29649:                          <span className="font-semibold text-gray-700">{t.ticketNumber} • {t.clientName}</span>
29650:                          <span className="font-mono font-black text-emerald-600">{methodLabel} +{depositPaid.toLocaleString()} F</span>
29651:                        </div>
29652:                      );
29653:                    })}
29654:                  </div>
29655:                )}
29656:              </div>
29657:
29658:              {/* Balances / Soldes */}
29659:              <div className="space-y-2 pt-2 border-t border-indigo-100/30">
29660:                <span className="text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wide block">💸 Règlements de Soldes au Retrait ({dailyBalancesCollected.length}) :</span>
29661:                {dailyBalancesCollected.length === 0 ? (
29662:                  <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-400 italic font-mono pl-3">Aucun solde collecté aujourd'hui.</p>
29663:                ) : (
29664:                  <div className="max-h-24 overflow-y-auto space-y-1 border border-indigo-100/50 rounded-xl p-2.5 bg-white">
29665:                    {dailyBalancesCollected.map(t => {
29666:                      const methodLabel = t.balanceCollectedMethod === 'cash' ? '💵' : t.balanceCollectedMethod === 'mobile_money' ? '📱' : '💳';
29667:                      return (
29668:                        <div key={t.id} className="flex justify-between items-center text-[10px] py-0.5 border-b border-slate-50 last:border-0">
29669:                          <span className="font-semibold text-gray-700">{t.ticketNumber} • {t.clientName}</span>
29670:                          <span className="font-mono font-black text-[#1e1b4b]">{methodLabel} +{(t.balanceCollectedAmount || 0).toLocaleString()} F</span>
29671:                        </div>
29672:                      );
29673:                    })}
29674:                  </div>
29675:                )}
29676:              </div>
29677:            </div>
29678:
29679:            {/* Interactive Inputs */}
29680:            <div className="space-y-4">
29681:              <div>
29682:                <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-1.5">
29683:                  <label className="block text-[10px] font-mono font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest">Espèces Réelles Comptées</label>
29684:                  <span className="text-[10px] font-mono font-semibold text-gray-400">Pour rapprochement</span>
29685:                </div>
29686:                <div className="relative">
29687:                  <input
29688:                    type="number"
29689:                    min="0"
29690:                    placeholder="Entrez le montant cash réel"
29691:                    value={actualCash || ''}
29692:                    onChange={e => setActualCash(Number(e.target.value))}
29693:                    className="w-full pl-4 pr-16 py-3 rounded-xl border border-gray-200 outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 bg-gray-50/50 font-black text-sm text-ink font-mono"
29694:                  />
29695:                  <span className="absolute right-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-xs font-bold text-gray-400">FCFA</span>
29696:                </div>
29697:              </div>
29698:
29699:              {/* Rapprochement Renders */}
29700:              {actualCash > 0 && (
29701:                <div className={`p-4 rounded-xl border transition ${
29702:                  actualCash === totalTheoreticalRevenue 
29703:                    ? 'bg-emerald-50 border-emerald-100' 
29704:                    : actualCash > totalTheoreticalRevenue 
29705:                      ? 'bg-blue-50 border-blue-100' 
29706:                      : 'bg-rose-50 border-rose-100'
29707:                }`}>
29708:                  <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
29709:                    <div>
29710:                      <span className="text-[9px] font-mono font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wider block">Rapprochement de caisse ({closureDate})</span>
29711:                      <strong className={`text-sm font-black ${
29712:                        actualCash === totalTheoreticalRevenue 
29713:                          ? 'text-emerald-700' 
29714:                          : actualCash > totalTheoreticalRevenue 
29715:                            ? 'text-blue-700' 
29716:                            : 'text-rose-700'
29717:                      }`}>
29718:                        {actualCash === totalTheoreticalRevenue 
29719:                          ? '✅ Caisse parfaitement équilibrée' 
29720:                          : actualCash > totalTheoreticalRevenue 
29721:                            ? `🟢 Surplus de caisse (+${(actualCash - totalTheoreticalRevenue).toLocaleString()} FCFA)` 
29722:                            : `⚠️ Manquant détecté (${(actualCash - totalTheoreticalRevenue).toLocaleString()} FCFA)`}
29723:                      </strong>
29724:                    </div>
29725:                    <span className="font-mono font-bold text-xs">
29726:                      {actualCash === totalTheoreticalRevenue ? 'OK' : `${actualCash - totalTheoreticalRevenue > 0 ? '+' : ''}${(actualCash - totalTheoreticalRevenue).toLocaleString()} F`}
29727:                    </span>
29728:                  </div>
29729:                </div>
29730:              )}
29731:
29732:              <div>
29733:                <label className="block text-[10px] font-mono font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-1.5">Observations / Justifications</label>
29734:                <textarea
29735:                  rows={2}
29736:                  placeholder="Ex: Écart de caisse justifié par un acompte différé, commentaires..."
29737:                  value={closureNotes}
29738:                  onChange={e => setClosureNotes(e.target.value)}
29739:                  className="w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-xl border border-gray-200 outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 bg-gray-50/50 text-xs text-ink font-sans"
29740:                />
29741:              </div>
29742:
29743:              <button
29744:                type="button"
29745:                onClick={async () => {
29746:                  if (!cashierName.trim()) {
29747:                    showAlert('Nom Opérateur Manquant', 'Veuillez spécifier votre nom de Caissier pour valider la clôture.', 'warning');
29748:                    return;
29749:                  }
29750:                  
29751:                  // Check if closure already exists for this date to prevent duplicate
29752:                  if (closures.some(c => c.date === closureDate)) {
29753:                    if (!confirm(`Une clôture de caisse existe déjà pour le ${closureDate}. Voulez-vous la remplacer ?`)) {
29754:                      return;
29755:                    }
29756:                  }
29757:
29758:                  const newClosure: PressingClosure = {
29759:                    id: `closure_${Date.now()}`,
29760:                    date: closureDate,
29761:                    timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
29762:                    cashierName: cashierName.trim(),
29763:                    totalPressingRevenue: dailyPressingRevenue,
29764:                    totalDetergentRevenue: dailyDetergentRevenue,
29765:                    totalTheoreticalRevenue,
29766:                    actualCashCounted: actualCash,
29767:                    discrepancy: actualCash - totalTheoreticalRevenue,
29768:                    notes: closureNotes.trim(),
29769:                    status: 'closed',
29770:                    sentToManager: false
29771:                  };
29772:
29773:                  let sentEmail = false;
29774:                  if (autoEmailManager && managerEmail && managerEmail.trim()) {
29775:                    toast.loading('Envoi automatique du rapport de clôture au Gérant...');
29776:                    const success = await sendSilentBackgroundClosureEmailToManager(newClosure);
29777:                    sentEmail = success;
29778:                    newClosure.sentToManager = success;
29779:                    if (success) {
29780:                      showMailSuccessToast("Ce mail envoyé en arrière-plan avec succès !");
29781:                    }
29782:                  }
29783:
29784:                  // Update State & localstorage
29785:                  setClosures(prev => {
29786:                    const filtered = prev.filter(c => c.date !== closureDate);
29787:                    return [newClosure, ...filtered];
29788:                  });
29789:
29790:                  // Reset inputs
29791:                  setActualCash(0);
29792:                  setClosureNotes('');
29793:                  toast.dismiss();
29794:                  showAlert('Caisse Clause', `La clôture du ${closureDate} a bien été enregistrée avec succès !`, 'success');
29795:                }}
29796:                className="w-full bg-primary hover:bg-[#c93b3b] text-white font-black text-xs uppercase tracking-widest py-3.5 rounded-2xl transition duration-200 flex items-center justify-center gap-2 shadow"
29797:              >
29798:                🔒 Valider & Verrouiller la Caisse
29799:              </button>
29800:            </div>
29801:          </div>
29802:
29803:          {/* Historical Closures List */}
29804:          <div className="lg:col-span-6 space-y-4">
29805:            <h3 className="text-base font-black text-ink flex items-center gap-2">
29806:              📜 Historique des Clôtures Journalières
29807:            </h3>
29808:
29809:            {closures.length === 0 ? (
29810:              <div className="bg-gray-50 p-8 rounded-3xl border border-gray-100 text-center text-gray-400 space-y-2">
29811:                <p className="text-xs font-bold font-mono">Aucun rapport de clôture archivé pour le moment.</p>
29812:                <p className="text-[10px]">Utilisez le formulaire de gauche pour effectuer votre premier rapprochement.</p>
29813:              </div>
29814:            ) : (
29815:              <div className="space-y-4 max-h-[500px] overflow-y-auto pr-1">
29816:                {closures.map(c => {
29817:                  const errorVal = c.discrepancy;
29818:                  const isPerfect = errorVal === 0;
29819:                  const isLoss = errorVal < 0;
29820:
29821:                  return (
29822:                    <div key={c.id} className="bg-white p-5 rounded-3xl border border-gray-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition space-y-3 font-sans">
29823:                      <div className="flex justify-between items-start">
29824:                        <div>
29825:                          <span className="px-2 py-0.5 bg-indigo-50 text-indigo-700 text-[9px] font-bold font-mono rounded-md uppercase">
29826:                            Date: {c.date}
29827:                          </span>
29828:                          <h4 className="text-xs font-black text-ink mt-1">Clôture par {c.cashierName}</h4>
29829:                          <span className="text-[9px] text-gray-400 font-mono">Clos le {new Date(c.timestamp).toLocaleString('fr-FR')}</span>
29830:                        </div>
29831:                        
29832:                        <div className="text-right">
29833:                          <span className="text-[9px] text-gray-400 font-mono block">Écart caisse:</span>
29834:                          <span className={`text-xs font-mono font-black ${
29835:                            isPerfect ? 'text-emerald-600' : isLoss ? 'text-rose-600' : 'text-blue-600'
29836:                          }`}>
29837:                            {isPerfect ? '0 FCFA' : `${errorVal > 0 ? '+' : ''}${errorVal.toLocaleString()} FCFA`}
29838:                          </span>
29839:                        </div>
29840:                      </div>
29841:
29842:                      <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-2 bg-gray-50 p-2.5 rounded-xl text-[10px] text-gray-500 font-mono text-center font-bold">
29843:                        <div>
29844:                          <span className="block text-[8px] text-gray-400">Pressing</span>
29845:                          <strong className="text-ink text-xs block mt-1">{c.totalPressingRevenue.toLocaleString()} F</strong>
29846:                        </div>
29847:                        <div>
29848:                          <span className="block text-[8px] text-gray-400">Détergents</span>
29849:                          <strong className="text-ink text-xs block mt-1">{c.totalDetergentRevenue.toLocaleString()} F</strong>
29850:                        </div>
29851:                        <div>
29852:                          <span className="block text-[8px] text-gray-400 font-bold">Total Réel</span>
29853:                          <strong className="text-primary text-xs block mt-1 font-black">{c.actualCashCounted.toLocaleString()} F</strong>
29854:                        </div>
29855:                      </div>
29856:
29857:                      {c.notes && (
29858:                        <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-500 italic bg-amber-50/50 rounded-lg p-2 border border-amber-100/30">
29859:                          <strong>Note :</strong> "{c.notes}"
29860:                        </p>
29861:                      )}
29862:
29863:                      {/* Communication / manual Send buttons */}
29864:                      <div className="border-t border-gray-100/80 pt-3 space-y-2">
29865:                        <p className="text-[9px] font-mono font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest text-center">
29866:                          Transférer au Manager
29867:                        </p>
29868:                        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2">
29869:                          <button
29870:                            type="button"
29871:                            onClick={() => dispatchManagerClosureNotif(c, 'whatsapp')}
29872:                            className="py-1.5 px-2 bg-emerald-600 hover:bg-emerald-700 text-white text-[9px] font-extrabold rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center gap-1 transition"
29873:                          >
29874:                            <MessageSquare className="w-3.5 h-3.5" /> WhatsApp Gérant
29875:                          </button>
29876:                          <button
29877:                            type="button"
29878:                            onClick={async () => {
29879:                              toast.loading('Envoi du rapport par mail...');
29880:                              const ok = await sendSilentBackgroundClosureEmailToManager(c);
29881:                              toast.dismiss();
29882:                              if (ok) {
29883:                                showMailSuccessToast("Ce mail envoyé en arrière-plan avec succès !");
29884:                                setClosureMailFeedback(prev => ({ ...prev, [c.id]: true }));
29885:                              } else {
29886:                                dispatchManagerClosureNotif(c, 'email');
29887:                              }
29888:                            }}
29889:                            className="py-1.5 px-2 bg-indigo-600 hover:bg-indigo-700 text-white text-[9px] font-extrabold rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center gap-1 transition"
29890:                          >
29891:                            <Mail className="w-3.5 h-3.5" /> E-mail Direct
29892:                          </button>
29893:                        </div>
29894:                        {closureMailFeedback[c.id] && (
29895:                          <div className="flex items-center gap-1 text-[9px] text-emerald-600 font-semibold bg-emerald-50 p-1.5 rounded-lg justify-center border border-emerald-100">
29896:                            <span className="w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-emerald-500"></span>
29897:                            Ce mail envoyé en arrière-plan avec succès !
29898:                          </div>
29899:                        )}
29900:                      </div>
29901:                    </div>
29902:                  );
29903:                })}
29904:              </div>
29905:            )}
29906:          </div>
29907:        </div>

29910:        <div className="bg-white rounded-[2rem] border border-gray-100 shadow-sm overflow-hidden p-8 space-y-6">

29914:            </h3>

29916:              <Search className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-4 h-4 text-gray-400" />

29923:              />
29924:            </div>
29925:          </div>
29926:
29927:          {/* Status Sub-Filters for Active Tickets */}
29928:          {activeSubTab === 'active' && (
29929:            <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2 pb-2.5 border-b border-gray-100">
29930:              <button
29931:                type="button"

29934:                  washStatusFilter === 'all'
29935:                    ? 'bg-ink text-white shadow-sm'
29936:                    : 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-200 hover:text-gray-900'
29937:                }`}

29976:

29980:            </div>
29981:          ) : (
29982:            <div className="overflow-x-auto">
29983:              <table className="w-full text-left border-collapse">

29999:                      <td className="px-6 py-4 font-bold">
30000:                        <div>{ticket.clientName}</div>

30004:                            📝 {ticket.notes}
30005:                          </div>

30007:                      </td>

30009:                        <div>{ticket.depositDate}</div>
