30177:                  <div className="p-3.5 bg-amber-50 border border-amber-100 rounded-xl">
30178:                    <span className="block text-[9px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-amber-500 mb-1">Observations / Remarques :</span>
30179:                    <p className="text-xs text-amber-900 font-medium">{viewingTicket.notes}</p>
30180:                  </div>
30181:                )}
30182:
30183:                {/* Prestations */}
30184:                <div className="space-y-2">
30185:                  <span className="block text-[9px] font-mono font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wider">Détail des Prestations</span>
30186:                  <div className="divide-y divide-gray-100 border border-gray-100 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden bg-white">
30187:                    {viewingTicket.billingType === 'article' ? (
30188:                      Object.keys(viewingTicket.articles).filter(k => viewingTicket.articles[k] > 0).map(k => {
30189:                        const q = viewingTicket.articles[k];
30190:                        const singlePrice = tarifs.articles[k as keyof typeof tarifs.articles] || 0;
30191:                        return (
30192:                          <div key={k} className="flex justify-between p-3 text-xs">
30193:                            <span className="capitalize font-medium text-ink">- {k} <span className="text-gray-400 font-mono">x{q}</span></span>
30194:                            <span className="font-mono font-bold text-ink">{(q * singlePrice).toLocaleString()} FCFA</span>
30195:                          </div>
30196:                        )
30197:                      })
30198:                    ) : (
30199:                      <div className="flex justify-between p-3 text-xs">
30200:                        <span className="font-medium text-ink">- Lavage au poids <span className="text-gray-400 font-mono">({viewingTicket.weightKg} Kg, {viewingTicket.weightService})</span></span>
30201:                        <span className="font-mono font-bold text-ink">{(viewingTicket.weightKg * (tarifs.poids[viewingTicket.weightService] || 0)).toLocaleString()} FCFA</span>
30202:                      </div>
30203:                    )}
30204:
30205:                    {/* Supplements */}
30206:                    {Object.keys(viewingTicket.supplements).filter(k => viewingTicket.supplements[k]).map(k => {
30207:                      const cost = viewingTicket.supplementTarifs[k] || 0;
30208:                      const displayName = getSupplementDisplayName(k);
30209:                      return (
30210:                        <div key={k} className="flex justify-between p-3 text-xs bg-indigo-50/10 text-indigo-700">
30211:                          <span>+ {displayName}</span>
30212:                          <span className="font-mono font-bold">+{cost.toLocaleString()} FCFA</span>
30213:                        </div>
30214:                      )
30215:                    })}
30216:                  </div>
30217:                </div>
30218:
30219:                {/* Financial Summary */}
30220:                <div className="pt-3 border-t border-dashed border-gray-200 space-y-1.5 font-mono text-xs">
30221:                  <div className="flex justify-between text-gray-500 font-bold">
30222:                    <span>Sous-total prest. :</span>
30223:                    <span>{(viewingTicket.subtotal + viewingTicket.supplementTotal).toLocaleString()} FCFA</span>
30224:                  </div>
30225:                  {viewingTicket.discount > 0 && (
30226:                    <div className="flex justify-between text-rose-500">
30227:                      <span>Remise accordée :</span>
30228:                      <span>-{viewingTicket.discount.toLocaleString()} FCFA</span>
30229:                    </div>
30230:                  )}
30231:                  <div className="flex justify-between text-slate-900 font-black text-sm pt-1 border-t border-slate-100">
30232:                    <span>{viewingTicket.status === 'quotation' ? 'Montant Devis :' : 'Prix global net :'}</span>
30233:                    <span>{viewingTicket.total.toLocaleString()} FCFA</span>
30234:                  </div>
30235:
30236:                  {viewingTicket.status !== 'quotation' && (
30237:                    <div className="bg-gray-50 p-3 rounded-xl border border-gray-100 space-y-1 mt-3">
30238:                      <div className="flex justify-between text-[10px] text-gray-500 font-sans">
30239:                        <span>Statut de paiement :</span>
30240:                        <span className="font-bold uppercase tracking-wider">
30241:                          {viewingTicket.paymentStatus === 'paid' ? "Payé d'avance 🟢" : (viewingTicket.paymentStatus === 'partial' && (viewingTicket.amountPaid || 0) > 0) ? 'Acompte versé 🟡' : 'Impayé au retrait 🔴'}
30242:                        </span>
30243:                      </div>
30244:                      <div className="flex justify-between text-indigo-600 font-sans font-bold">
30245:                        <span>Montant Versé :</span>
30246:                        <span>{(viewingTicket.amountPaid || 0).toLocaleString()} FCFA</span>
30247:                      </div>
30248:                      {viewingTicket.total - (viewingTicket.amountPaid || 0) > 0 && (
30249:                        <>
30250:                          <div className="flex justify-between text-rose-600 font-sans font-black">
30251:                            <span>Solde dû :</span>
30252:                            <span>{(viewingTicket.total - (viewingTicket.amountPaid || 0)).toLocaleString()} FCFA</span>
30253:                          </div>
30254:                          <div className="mt-2.5 pt-2.5 border-t border-dashed border-gray-200">
30255:                            <span className="block text-[8px] font-mono font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-1.5 text-center">
30256:                              💸 ENCAISSER LE SOLDE DÛ
30257:                            </span>
30258:                            <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-1.5">
30259:                              <button
30260:                                type="button"
30261:                                onClick={() => handleCollectBalance(viewingTicket.id, 'cash')}
30262:                                className="py-1.5 px-1 bg-emerald-600 hover:bg-emerald-700 text-white font-black text-[9px] rounded-lg transition text-center shadow-xs cursor-pointer uppercase tracking-wider"
30263:                              >
30264:                                Espèces
30265:                              </button>
30266:                              <button
30267:                                type="button"
30268:                                onClick={() => handleCollectBalance(viewingTicket.id, 'mobile_money')}
30269:                                className="py-1.5 px-1 bg-sky-600 hover:bg-sky-700 text-white font-black text-[9px] rounded-lg transition text-center shadow-xs cursor-pointer uppercase tracking-wider"
30270:                              >
30271:                                Mobile
30272:                              </button>
30273:                              <button
30274:                                type="button"
30275:                                onClick={() => handleCollectBalance(viewingTicket.id, 'card')}
30276:                                className="py-1.5 px-1 bg-amber-600 hover:bg-amber-700 text-white font-black text-[9px] rounded-lg transition text-center shadow-xs cursor-pointer uppercase tracking-wider"
30277:                              >
30278:                                Carte
30279:                              </button>
30280:                            </div>
30281:                          </div>
30282:                        </>
30283:                      )}

30285:                  )}
30286:                </div>
30287:

30290:                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between border-b border-slate-200/60 pb-2">
30291:                    <h4 className="text-[11px] font-mono font-bold text-slate-700 uppercase tracking-widest flex items-center gap-1.5">
30292:                      <span>🔔</span> Suivi & Relance Client (Temps Réel)
30293:                    </h4>

30296:                    </span>
30297:                  </div>
30298:
30299:                  {/* Destinataires variables */}
30300:                  <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">

30316:                        value={editedEmail}

30319:                      />
30320:                    </div>

30368:                        if (!editedPhone.trim()) {
30369:                          showAlert('Téléphone Requis', 'Veuillez renseigner un numéro de téléphone.', 'warning');
30370:                          return;
30371:                        }
30372:                        let cleaned = editedPhone.replace(/[^0-9]/g, '');
30373:                        if (cleaned.length === 9 && cleaned.startsWith('7')) {
30374:                          cleaned = '221' + cleaned;
30375:                        }
30376:

30378:                        window.open(waUrl, '_blank');
30379:

30381:                        showAlert('Lien Généré', 'Le lien de suivi WhatsApp client a bien été généré !', 'success');
30382:                      }}

30384:                    >

30386:                    </button>
30387:

30389:                    <button
30390:                      type="button"
30391:                      onClick={() => {

30394:                          return;
30395:                        }

30397:                        const mailtoUrl = `mailto:${editedEmail}?subject=${encodeURIComponent(subject)}&body=${encodeURIComponent(notifMessage)}`;
30398:                        window.open(mailtoUrl, '_blank');
30399:                        
30400:                        logNotificationSent('email', selectedNotifTemplate, notifMessage);
30401:                        showAlert('Messagerie Ouverte', 'Le message de relance client a bien été généré et ouvert dans votre application mail !', 'success');
30402:                      }}
30403:                      className="py-2.5 px-4 bg-indigo-600 hover:bg-indigo-700 text-white text-xs font-bold rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center gap-2 transition shadow-sm border border-indigo-500"

30406:                    </button>
30407:                  </div>
30408:

30417:                              {l.type === 'whatsapp' ? '🟢 WhatsApp :' : '🔵 Email :'} <strong className="font-bold text-slate-800">{l.templateName}</strong>
30418:                            </span>
30419:                            <span className="text-[8px] font-mono text-gray-400 shrink-0">
30420:                              {new Date(l.timestamp).toLocaleDateString()}
30421:                            </span>
30422:                          </div>
30423:                        ))}
30424:                      </div>
30425:                    </div>
30426:                  )}
30427:                </div>
30428:

30430:                <div className="p-4 bg-indigo-50/40 rounded-2xl border border-indigo-100/60 space-y-3">

30432:                    <h4 className="text-[11px] font-mono font-bold text-indigo-800 uppercase tracking-widest flex items-center gap-1.5">
30433:                      <span>👑</span> Relais Temps Réel Gérant
30434:                    </h4>

30436:                      Manager Alert
30437:                    </span>
30438:                  </div>
30439:
30440:                  <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-500 leading-relaxed font-semibold">
30441:                    Notification formatée envoyée au Gérant pour le suivi des <strong className="text-indigo-600 font-bold">entrées et les sorties (depuis la distance)</strong>.
30442:                  </p>
30443:
30444:                  <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2 pb-1 bg-white p-2.5 rounded-xl border border-indigo-100/50">
30445:                    <div className="col-span-2 text-[9px] font-mono font-black text-indigo-700 uppercase tracking-wider mb-0.5 text-center">
30446:                      📥 ENTRÉE (Dépôt Enregistré)
30447:                    </div>

30454:                    </button>

30459:                    >
30460:                      <Mail className="w-3 h-3" /> E-mail
30461:                    </button>
30462:                  </div>

30534:      <AcomAlertPopup
30535:        isOpen={popup.isOpen}
30536:        onClose={() => setPopup(prev => ({ ...prev, isOpen: false }))}
30537:        {...popup}
30538:      />
30539:    </motion.div>
30540:  );
30541:};
30542:

30544:// 8.1 Pressing Stock & Detergent Sales Manager
30545:// ==========================================
30546:
30547:interface DetergentProduct {
30548:  id: string;
30549:  name: string;
30550:  price: number;
30551:  costPrice?: number;
30552:  stock: number;
30553:  minStock: number;
30554:  category: string;
30555:  description: string;
30556:  sku?: string;
30557:  imageUrl?: string;
30558:}
30559:
30560:interface DetergentSale {
30561:  id: string;
30562:  saleNumber: string;
30563:  customerName: string;
30564:  customerPhone: string;
30565:  date: string;
30566:  items: {
30567:    productId: string;
30568:    productName: string;
30569:    price: number;
30570:    costPrice?: number;
30571:    quantity: number;
30572:    total: number;
30573:  }[];
30574:  discount: number;
30575:  discountType?: 'amount' | 'percent';
30576:  discountValue?: number;
30577:  subtotal: number;
30578:  total: number;
30579:  totalCost?: number;
30580:}
30581:
30582:interface DetergentQuote {
30583:  id: string;
30584:  quoteNumber: string;
30585:  customerName: string;
30586:  customerPhone: string;
30587:  customerEmail?: string;
30588:  date: string;
30589:  items: {
30590:    productId: string;
30591:    productName: string;
30592:    price: number;
30593:    costPrice?: number;
30594:    quantity: number;
30595:    total: number;
30596:  }[];
30597:  discount: number;
30598:  discountType?: 'amount' | 'percent';
30599:  discountValue?: number;
30600:  subtotal: number;
30601:  total: number;
30602:  totalCost?: number;
30603:  notes?: string;
30604:  sentNotifications?: any[];
30605:}
30606:
30607:const DEFAULT_DETERGENTS: DetergentProduct[] = [
30608:  {
30609:    id: 'det_1',
30610:    name: 'Lessive Liquide Parfum Royale (1.5L)',
30611:    price: 3500,
30612:    stock: 25,
30613:    minStock: 5,
30614:    category: 'liquid',
30615:    description: 'Lessive concentrée universelle, parfum d\'origine végétale intense.'
30616:  },
30617:  {
30618:    id: 'det_2',
30619:    name: 'Adoucissant Souffle Satiné (1L)',

30828:    if (method === 'whatsapp') {

30830:        showAlert('Numéro non configuré', "Veuillez configurer le numéro WhatsApp du Gérant dans l'onglet Réglages.", 'error');
30831:        return;
30832:      }
30833:      let cleaned = managerPhone.replace(/[^0-9]/g, '');
30834:      if (cleaned.length === 9 && cleaned.startsWith('7')) {
30835:        cleaned = '221' + cleaned;
30836:      }
30837:      const waUrl = `https://api.whatsapp.com/send?phone=${cleaned}&text=${encodeURIComponent(message)}`;
30838:      window.open(waUrl, '_blank');
30839:      showAlert('Rapport Envoyé', "Le rapport de suivi pour WhatsApp a été généré et ouvert !", 'success');
30840:      
30841:      // Add to local history
30842:      const newLog = {
30843:        id: `mnotif_${Date.now()}`,
30844:        ticketNumber: q.quoteNumber,
30845:        type: flowType,
30846:        method,
30847:        timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
30848:      };
30849:      setManagerNotifsHistory(prev => [newLog, ...prev]);
30850:    } else {
30851:      if (!managerEmail.trim()) {
30852:        showAlert('Email non configuré', "Veuillez configurer l'adresse email du Gérant dans l'onglet Réglages.", 'error');
30853:        return;
30854:      }
30855:      const subject = `⚡ [${flowType.toUpperCase()}] Devis n°${q.quoteNumber} - ${merchant.name || 'Pressing'}`;
30856:      const mailtoUrl = `mailto:${managerEmail}?subject=${encodeURIComponent(subject)}&body=${encodeURIComponent(message)}`;
30857:      window.open(mailtoUrl, '_blank');
30858:      showAlert("Messagerie Ouverte", "Nous avons configuré l'email de suivi. Veuillez appuyer sur Envoyer dans votre boîte mail !", 'success');
30859:      
30860:      // Add to local history
30861:      const newLog = {
30862:        id: `mnotif_${Date.now()}`,
30863:        ticketNumber: q.quoteNumber,
30864:        type: flowType,
30865:        method,
30866:        timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
30867:      };

30942:  const sendSilentBackgroundSaleEmailToManager = async (sale: DetergentSale) => {

30988:            </tr>

30990:              <td style="padding: 8px 0; color: #64748b;"><strong>Date / Heure :</strong></td>
30991:              <td style="padding: 8px 0;">${new Date(sale.date).toLocaleString('fr-FR')}</td>
30992:            </tr>
30993:          </table>
30994:        </div>

30998:          <strong>Système de Suivi de Ventes SaaS ${merchant.name || 'ACOM'}</strong>.
30999:        </div>
31000:      </div>
31001:    `;
31002:
31003:    try {
31004:      const response = await sendEmailDirectlyOrViaBackend({
31005:        to: managerEmail,
31006:        from: merchant.managerNotifications?.emailFrom || undefined,
31007:        subject: `🛒 [VENTE PRODUIT] Vente n°${sale.saleNumber} - ${merchant.name || 'Pressing'}`,

31009:      }, {
31010:        resendApiKey: merchant.managerNotifications?.resendApiKey,
31011:        defaultFrom: merchant.managerNotifications?.emailFrom
31012:      });
31013:
31014:      if (response.ok) {
31015:        showMailSuccessToast("Ce mail envoyé en arrière-plan avec succès !");
31016:        
31017:        // Add to history
31018:        const newLog = {
31019:          id: `mnotif_s_${Date.now()}`,
31020:          ticketNumber: sale.saleNumber,
31021:          type: 'sortie' as const,
31022:          method: 'email' as const,
31023:          timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
31024:        };
31025:        const savedNotifs = localStorage.getItem(`pressing_manager_notifs_${merchant.id}`);
31026:        const currentNotifs = savedNotifs ? JSON.parse(savedNotifs) : [];
31027:        localStorage.setItem(`pressing_manager_notifs_${merchant.id}`, JSON.stringify([newLog, ...currentNotifs]));
31028:        return true;
31029:      } else {
31030:        const errorData = await response.json().catch(() => null);
31031:        console.error('Failed to send background email to manager for sale:', errorData || response.statusText);
31032:        showAlert("Erreur d'envoi Email (Vente)", `L'envoi automatique au gérant a échoué. ${errorData?.error || response.statusText}`, "error");
31033:        return false;
31034:      }
31035:    } catch (err) {
31036:      console.error('Error dispatching silent manager background sale mail:', err);
31037:      return false;
31038:    }
31039:  };

31041:  const dispatchManagerSaleNotif = async (s: DetergentSale, method: 'whatsapp' | 'email') => {
31042:    const message = getManagerSaleNotificationMessage(s);
31043:    if (method === 'whatsapp') {
31044:      if (!managerPhone.trim()) {

31050:        cleaned = '221' + cleaned;
31051:      }
31052:      const waUrl = `https://api.whatsapp.com/send?phone=${cleaned}&text=${encodeURIComponent(message)}`;
31053:      window.open(waUrl, '_blank');
31054:      showAlert('Suivi WhatsApp', "Le lien de suivi WhatsApp pour le Gérant a été préparé et ouvert !", 'success');
31055:      
31056:      // Add to history
31057:      const newLog = {
31058:        id: `mnotif_s_${Date.now()}`,
31059:        ticketNumber: s.saleNumber,
31060:        type: 'sortie' as const,
31061:        method,
31062:        timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
31063:      };
31064:      const savedNotifs = localStorage.getItem(`pressing_manager_notifs_${merchant.id}`);
31065:      const currentNotifs = savedNotifs ? JSON.parse(savedNotifs) : [];
31066:      localStorage.setItem(`pressing_manager_notifs_${merchant.id}`, JSON.stringify([newLog, ...currentNotifs]));
31067:    } else {
31068:      if (!managerEmail.trim()) {
31069:        showAlert('Email non configuré', "Veuillez configurer l'adresse email du Gérant.", 'error');
31070:        return;
31071:      }
31072:      toast.loading('Envoi du rapport par mail...');
31073:      const ok = await sendSilentBackgroundSaleEmailToManager(s);
31074:      toast.dismiss();
31075:      if (ok) {
31076:        setSaleMailFeedback(prev => ({ ...prev, [s.id]: true }));
31077:        showAlert('Rapport Envoyé', "Le rapport de vente de détergent a été transmis avec succès par mail au Gérant !", 'success');
31078:      } else {
31079:        const subject = `🛒 [DÉTERGENTS] Rapport de Vente ${s.saleNumber} - ${merchant.name || 'Pressing'}`;
31080:        const mailtoUrl = `mailto:${managerEmail}?subject=${encodeURIComponent(subject)}&body=${encodeURIComponent(message)}`;
31081:        window.open(mailtoUrl, '_blank');
31082:        showAlert('Messagerie Ouverte', "Le brouillon d'e-mail de suivi de vente de détergent a été ouvert. Veuillez cliquer sur Envoyer !", 'success');
31083:        
31084:        // Add to history
31085:        const newLog = {
31086:          id: `mnotif_s_${Date.now()}`,
31087:          ticketNumber: s.saleNumber,
31088:          type: 'sortie' as const,
31089:          method,
31090:          timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
31091:        };
31092:        const savedNotifs = localStorage.getItem(`pressing_manager_notifs_${merchant.id}`);
31093:        const currentNotifs = savedNotifs ? JSON.parse(savedNotifs) : [];
31094:        localStorage.setItem(`pressing_manager_notifs_${merchant.id}`, JSON.stringify([newLog, ...currentNotifs]));
31095:      }
31096:    }
31097:  };
31098:
31099:  // Form states (Create / Edit)
31100:  const [formName, setFormName] = useState('');
31101:  const [formPrice, setFormPrice] = useState<number>(0);
31102:  const [formCostPrice, setFormCostPrice] = useState<number>(0);
31103:  const [formStock, setFormStock] = useState<number>(0);
31104:  const [formMinStock, setFormMinStock] = useState<number>(3);
31105:  const [formCategory, setFormCategory] = useState<string>('liquid');
31106:  const [formDescription, setFormDescription] = useState('');
31107:  const [formSku, setFormSku] = useState('');
31108:  const [formImageUrl, setFormImageUrl] = useState('');
31109:  const [showFormSkuScanner, setShowFormSkuScanner] = useState(false);
31110:  const [showSearchScanner, setShowSearchScanner] = useState(false);
31111:  const [isAddingNewCategory, setIsAddingNewCategory] = useState(false);
31112:  const [newCategoryLabelInput, setNewCategoryLabelInput] = useState('');
31113:
31114:  const deleteCustomCategory = (keyToDel: string) => {
31115:    showAlert(
31116:      'Supprimer la catégorie ?',
31117:      `Voulez-vous supprimer la catégorie "${customCategories[keyToDel]}" ? Les produits de cette catégorie resteront mais leur rayon sera à réajuster.`,
31118:      'warning',
31119:      () => {
31120:        const updated = { ...customCategories };
31121:        delete updated[keyToDel];
31122:        setCustomCategories(updated);
31123:        localStorage.setItem(`pressing_custom_categories_${merchant.id}`, JSON.stringify(updated));
31124:        
31125:        if (formCategory === keyToDel) {
31126:          setFormCategory('liquid');
31127:        }
31128:        if (categoryFilter === keyToDel) {
31129:          setCategoryFilter('all');
31130:        }
31131:        showAlert('Catégorie Supprimée', 'Le rayon personnalisé a été supprimé avec succès.', 'success');
31132:      },
31133:      true,
31134:      'SUPPRIMER',
31135:      'RAYONS'
31136:    );
31137:  };
31138:
31139:  // Calculate cart total
31140:  const cartSubtotal = useMemo(() => {
31141:    return cart.reduce((acc, item) => acc + (item.product.price * item.quantity), 0);
31142:  }, [cart]);
31143:
31144:  const discountAmount = useMemo(() => {
31145:    if (discountType === 'percent') {
31146:      return Math.floor((cartSubtotal * discountValue) / 100);
31147:    }
31148:    return discountValue;
31149:  }, [cartSubtotal, discountType, discountValue]);
31150:
31151:  const cartTotal = useMemo(() => {
31152:    return Math.max(0, cartSubtotal - discountAmount);
31153:  }, [cartSubtotal, discountAmount]);
31154:
31155:  // Alert count (low stock)
31156:  const lowStockCount = useMemo(() => {
31157:    return products.filter(p => p.stock > 0 && p.stock <= p.minStock).length;
31158:  }, [products]);
31159:
31160:  // Alert count (out of stock)
31161:  const outOfStockCount = useMemo(() => {
31162:    return products.filter(p => p.stock <= 0).length;
31163:  }, [products]);
31164:
31165:  // Save stocks to storage
31166:  const saveProductsToStorage = (updatedProducts: DetergentProduct[]) => {
31167:    setProducts(updatedProducts);
31168:    localStorage.setItem(`pressing_stock_products_${merchant.id}`, JSON.stringify(updatedProducts));
31169:  };
31170:
31171:  // Add Item to cart
31172:  const addToCart = (product: DetergentProduct) => {
31173:    if (product.stock <= 0) {
31174:      showAlert('Rupture de Stock', 'Ce produit est en rupture de stock totale !', 'error');
31175:      return;
31176:    }
31177:    const existing = cart.find(it => it.product.id === product.id);
31178:    if (existing) {
31179:      if (existing.quantity >= product.stock) {
31180:        showAlert('Stock Insuffisant', `Stock disponible insuffisant (${product.stock} max) !`, 'warning');
31181:        return;
31182:      }
31183:      setCart(cart.map(it => it.product.id === product.id ? { ...it, quantity: it.quantity + 1 } : it));
31184:    } else {
31185:      setCart([...cart, { product, quantity: 1 }]);
31186:    }
31187:    showAlert('Ajouté au Panier', `${product.name} ajouté au panier.`, 'success');
31188:  };
31189:
31190:  // Update cart item quantity
31191:  const updateCartQuantity = (productId: string, qty: number) => {
31192:    const item = cart.find(it => it.product.id === productId);
31193:    if (!item) return;
31194:
31195:    if (qty <= 0) {
31196:      setCart(cart.filter(it => it.product.id !== productId));
31197:    } else if (qty > item.product.stock) {
31198:      showAlert('Maximum Atteint', `Maximum de stock disponible : ${item.product.stock}`, 'warning');
31199:    } else {
31200:      setCart(cart.map(it => it.product.id === productId ? { ...it, quantity: qty } : it));
31201:    }
31202:  };
31203:
31204:  // Finalize Sale
31205:  const handleCheckout = (e: React.FormEvent) => {
31206:    e.preventDefault();
31207:    if (cart.length === 0) {
31208:      showAlert('Panier Vide', 'Votre panier est totalement vide !', 'warning');
31209:      return;
31210:    }
31211:
31212:    // Verify stock one last time
31213:    for (const item of cart) {
31214:      const realProduct = products.find(p => p.id === item.product.id);
31215:      if (!realProduct || realProduct.stock < item.quantity) {
31216:        showAlert('Stock Indisponible', `Stock indisponible pour ${item.product.name} !`, 'error');
31217:        return;
31218:      }
31219:    }
31220:
31221:    const saleNumber = `D-SL-${Date.now().toString().slice(-6)}`;
31222:    const newSaleItems = cart.map(item => ({
31223:      productId: item.product.id,
31224:      productName: item.product.name,
31225:      price: item.product.price,
31226:      costPrice: item.product.costPrice || 0,
31227:      quantity: item.quantity,
31228:      total: item.product.price * item.quantity
31229:    }));
31230:    
31231:    const newSaleTotalCost = newSaleItems.reduce((acc, item) => acc + (item.costPrice * item.quantity), 0);
31232:
31233:    const newSale: DetergentSale = {
31234:      id: `sale_${Date.now()}`,
31235:      saleNumber,
31236:      customerName: customerName.trim() || 'Client de Passage',
31237:      customerPhone: customerPhone.trim(),
31238:      date: new Date().toISOString(),
31239:      items: newSaleItems,
31240:      discount: discountAmount,
31241:      discountType,
31242:      discountValue,
31243:      subtotal: cartSubtotal,
31244:      total: cartTotal,
31245:      totalCost: newSaleTotalCost
31246:    };
31247:
31248:    // Update stocks
31249:    const updatedProducts = products.map(p => {
31250:      const cartItem = cart.find(it => it.product.id === p.id);
31251:      if (cartItem) {
31252:        return { ...p, stock: Math.max(0, p.stock - cartItem.quantity) };
31253:      }
31254:      return p;
31255:    });
31256:
31257:    saveProductsToStorage(updatedProducts);
31258:
31259:    // Save sales
31260:    const updatedSales = [newSale, ...sales];
31261:    setSales(updatedSales);
31262:    localStorage.setItem(`pressing_stock_sales_${merchant.id}`, JSON.stringify(updatedSales));
31263:
31264:    // Register Sale in dexie central system DB for Accounting / Compta
31265:    try {
31266:      db.sales.add({
31267:        id: newSale.id,
31268:        merchantId: merchant.id,
31269:        items: cart.map(item => ({
31270:          id: item.product.id,
31271:          productId: item.product.id,
31272:          name: item.product.name,
31273:          quantity: item.quantity,
31274:          price: item.product.price,
31275:          total: item.quantity * item.product.price
31276:        })),
31277:        totalAmount: cartTotal,
31278:        paidAmount: cartTotal,
31279:        balance: 0,
31280:        payments: [{
31281:          id: `p_${Date.now()}`,
31282:          amount: cartTotal,
31283:          method: 'cash',
31284:          date: new Date().toISOString()
31285:        }],
31286:        paymentMethod: 'cash',
31287:        customerName: newSale.customerName,
31288:        customerPhone: newSale.customerPhone,
31289:        processedBy: 'system',
31290:        createdAt: new Date().toISOString()
31291:      });
31292:    } catch (err) {
31293:      console.error('Dexie integration failed:', err);
31294:    }
31295:
31296:    // Reset checkout fields
31297:    setCart([]);
31298:    setDiscountValue(0);
31299:    setDiscountType('amount');
31300:    setCustomerName('');
31301:    setCustomerPhone('');
31302:    setSelectedSale(newSale); // show details simulator
31303:    showAlert('Encaissement Validé', `Encaissement validé ! N° ${saleNumber}`, 'success');
31304:
31305:    // Auto-email summary to the manager in the background
31306:    if (autoEmailManager && managerEmail && managerEmail.trim()) {
31307:      sendSilentBackgroundSaleEmailToManager(newSale);
31308:    }
31309:  };
31310:
31311:  // Generate Proforma Quote Handler
31312:  const handleGenerateQuote = () => {
31313:    if (cart.length === 0) {
31314:      showAlert('Panier Vide', "Votre panier est vide ! Impossible d'émettre un devis proforma.", 'warning');
31315:      return;
31316:    }
31317:
31318:    const quoteNumber = `D-QT-${Date.now().toString().slice(-6)}`;
31319:    const newQuoteItems = cart.map(item => ({
31320:      productId: item.product.id,
31321:      productName: item.product.name,
31322:      price: item.product.price,
31323:      costPrice: item.product.costPrice || 0,
31324:      quantity: item.quantity,
31325:      total: item.product.price * item.quantity
31326:    }));
31327:

31329:

31331:      id: `quote_${Date.now()}`,
31332:      quoteNumber,

31334:      customerPhone: customerPhone.trim(),

31336:      items: newQuoteItems,
31337:      discount: discountAmount,
31338:      discountType,
31339:      discountValue,
31340:      subtotal: cartSubtotal,
31341:      total: cartTotal,
31342:      totalCost: newQuoteTotalCost
31343:    };
31344:

31346:    setQuotes(updatedQuotes);
31347:    localStorage.setItem(`pressing_stock_quotes_${merchant.id}`, JSON.stringify(updatedQuotes));
31348:
31349:    const mockSaleFromQuote: DetergentSale = {
31350:      id: newQuote.id,
31351:      saleNumber: newQuote.quoteNumber,
31352:      customerName: newQuote.customerName,
31353:      customerPhone: newQuote.customerPhone,
31354:      date: newQuote.date,
31355:      items: newQuote.items.map(it => ({
31356:        productId: it.productId,
31357:        productName: it.productName,
31358:        price: it.price,
31359:        costPrice: it.costPrice,
31360:        quantity: it.quantity,
31361:        total: it.total
31362:      })),
31363:      discount: newQuote.discount,
31364:      discountType: newQuote.discountType,
31365:      discountValue: newQuote.discountValue,
31366:      subtotal: newQuote.subtotal,
31367:      total: newQuote.total,
31368:      totalCost: newQuote.totalCost
31369:    };
31370:
31371:    // Reset fields & clear cart
31372:    setCart([]);
31373:    setDiscountValue(0);
31374:    setDiscountType('amount');
31375:    setCustomerName('');
31376:    setCustomerPhone('');
31377:    setSelectedSale(mockSaleFromQuote); // Render as a mock sale inside the sidebar ticket simulator!
31378:    showAlert('Devis Enregistré', `Devis proforma enregistré ! N° ${quoteNumber}`, 'success');
31379:  };
31380:
31381:  // Convert Quote To Cart
31382:  const handleConvertQuoteToCart = (quote: DetergentQuote) => {
31383:    const loadedCart: { product: DetergentProduct; quantity: number }[] = [];
31384:    
31385:    quote.items.forEach(it => {
31386:      const foundProd = products.find(p => p.id === it.productId);
31387:      if (foundProd) {
31388:        loadedCart.push({ product: foundProd, quantity: it.quantity });
31389:      } else {
31390:        loadedCart.push({
31391:          product: {
31392:            id: it.productId,
31393:            name: it.productName,
31394:            price: it.price,
31395:            stock: 0,
31396:            minStock: 2,
31397:            category: 'other',
31398:            description: 'Produit du Devis'
31399:          },
31400:          quantity: it.quantity
31401:        });
31402:      }
31403:    });
31404:
31405:    setCart(loadedCart);
31406:    setDiscountValue(quote.discountValue || quote.discount);
31407:    setDiscountType(quote.discountType || 'amount');
31408:    setCustomerName(quote.customerName === 'Client de Passage' ? '' : quote.customerName);
31409:    setCustomerPhone(quote.customerPhone);
31410:    setActiveSubTab('sales');
31411:    showAlert('Devis Chargé', `Le devis ${quote.quoteNumber} a été chargé avec succès dans votre panier de vente active !`, 'success');
31412:  };
31413:
31414:  const handleDeleteQuote = (quoteId: string) => {
31415:    if (window.confirm('Voulez-vous supprimer définitivement ce devis proforma ?')) {
31416:      const updated = quotes.filter(q => q.id !== quoteId);
31417:      setQuotes(updated);
31418:      localStorage.setItem(`pressing_stock_quotes_${merchant.id}`, JSON.stringify(updated));
31419:      showAlert('Devis Supprimé', 'Devis proforma supprimé.', 'success');
31420:      if (viewingQuote?.id === quoteId) {
31421:        setViewingQuote(null);
31422:      }
31423:    }
31424:  };

31427:  const handleSaveProduct = (e: React.FormEvent) => {
31428:    e.preventDefault();
31429:    if (!formName.trim() || formPrice <= 0) {
31430:      showAlert('Formulaire Invalide', 'Veuillez renseigner le nom et un prix valide.', 'warning');
31431:      return;
31432:    }
31433:
31434:    if (editingProduct) {
31435:      const updated = products.map(p => p.id === editingProduct.id ? {
31436:        ...p,
31437:        name: formName,
31438:        price: formPrice,

31446:      } : p);

31462:      };

31464:      showAlert('Produit Crée', 'Nouveau détergent référencé avec succès au catalogue !', 'success');
31465:      setShowAddModal(false);
31466:    }
31467:
31468:    // Reset Form
31469:    setFormName('');
31470:    setFormPrice(0);
31471:    setFormCostPrice(0);
31472:    setFormStock(0);
31473:    setFormMinStock(3);
31474:    setFormCategory('liquid');
31475:    setFormDescription('');
31476:    setFormSku('');
31477:    setFormImageUrl('');
31478:  };

31487:    setFormMinStock(prod.minStock);

31492:  };
31493:

31495:  const deleteProduct = (id: string) => {

31497:      const updated = products.filter(p => p.id !== id);
31498:      saveProductsToStorage(updated);

31500:    }
31501:  };
31502:

31509:
31510:  // Print Sale/Detergent receipt PDF
31511:  const handleDownloadSalePDF = (sale: DetergentSale, formatType: '80mm' | '58mm' = '80mm') => {
31512:    const isQuote = sale.saleNumber.startsWith('D-QT') || sale.saleNumber.startsWith('DEV') || sale.saleNumber.includes('QT');
31513:    const widthMm = formatType === '58mm' ? 58 : 80;
31514:    const heightMm = formatType === '58mm' ? 145 : 140;
31515:    const pdf = new jsPDF('p', 'mm', [widthMm, heightMm]);
31516:    pdf.setFont('courier', 'normal');
31517:    pdf.setFontSize(formatType === '58mm' ? 8.5 : 10);
31518:    
31519:    let y = 10;
31520:    const centerX = formatType === '58mm' ? 29 : 40;
31521:    const lineStartX = formatType === '58mm' ? 3 : 5;
31522:    const lineEndX = formatType === '58mm' ? 55 : 75;
31523:    const linePadding = formatType === '58mm' ? 3 : 4;
31524:    
31525:    pdf.text(merchant.name || 'ACOM Pressing', centerX, y, { align: 'center' });
31526:    y += 5;
31527:    pdf.setFontSize(formatType === '58mm' ? 7 : 8);
31528:    pdf.text(merchant.address || 'Service de Lavage Professionnel', centerX, y, { align: 'center' });
31529:    y += 7;
31530:    pdf.line(lineStartX, y, lineEndX, y);
31531:    y += 6;
31532:    
31533:    pdf.setFont('courier', 'bold');
31534:    pdf.text(`${isQuote ? 'DEVIS CLIENT' : 'RECU CLIENT'} : ${sale.saleNumber}`, lineStartX, y);
31535:    y += 5;
31536:    pdf.setFont('courier', 'normal');
31537:    pdf.text(`Client  : ${sale.customerName}`, lineStartX, y);
31538:    y += 4;
31539:    pdf.text(`Contact : ${sale.customerPhone || 'N/A'}`, lineStartX, y);
31540:    y += 4;
31541:    pdf.text(`Date    : ${format(new Date(sale.date), 'dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm')}`, lineStartX, y);
31542:    y += 5;
31543:    pdf.line(lineStartX, y, lineEndX, y);
31544:    y += 5;
31545:
31546:    pdf.setFont('courier', 'bold');
31547:    pdf.text(isQuote ? 'Services & Produits' : 'Detergents & Produits', lineStartX, y);
31548:    y += 5;
31549:    pdf.setFont('courier', 'normal');
31550:
31551:    sale.items.forEach(item => {
31552:      pdf.text(`- ${item.productName.slice(0, formatType === '58mm' ? 10 : 14).padEnd(formatType === '58mm' ? 10 : 14, ' ')} ${item.quantity}x : ${item.total} F`, lineStartX, y);
31553:      y += 4;
31554:    });
31555:
31556:    y += 2;
31557:    pdf.line(lineStartX, y, lineEndX, y);
31558:    y += 5;
31559:
31560:    pdf.text(`Sous-total  : ${sale.subtotal} FCFA`, lineStartX, y);
31561:    y += 4;
31562:    if (sale.discount > 0) {
31563:      pdf.text(`Remise accordé: -${sale.discount} FCFA`, lineStartX, y);
31564:      y += 4;
31565:    }
31566:    
31567:    pdf.setFont('courier', 'bold');
31568:    pdf.setFontSize(formatType === '58mm' ? 8.5 : 10);
31569:    pdf.text(`${isQuote ? 'TOTAL ESTIME' : 'TOTAL PAYE'}  : ${sale.total} FCFA`, lineStartX, y);
31570:    y += 7;
31571:    pdf.setFont('courier', 'normal');
31572:    pdf.setFontSize(formatType === '58mm' ? 7 : 8);
31573:    pdf.text(isQuote ? 'Valable 15 jours.' : 'Merci de votre achat !', centerX, y, { align: 'center' });

31575:    pdf.text('ACOM Technologie Workspace', centerX, y, { align: 'center' });

31578:    showAlert(isQuote ? 'Devis Généré' : 'Reçu Généré', `Impression lancée... Le document PDF pour ${sale.customerName} au format ${formatType} a bien été généré et téléchargé !`, 'success');

31581:  // Print Sale/Detergent receipt A4 PDF as requested
31582:  const handleDownloadSaleA4PDF = (sale: DetergentSale) => {
31583:    const isQuote = sale.saleNumber.startsWith('D-QT') || sale.saleNumber.startsWith('DEV') || sale.saleNumber.includes('QT');
31584:    const pdf = new jsPDF('p', 'mm', 'a4');
31585:    
31586:    // Header Style
31587:    pdf.setFillColor(30, 41, 59); // Dark blue grey matching #1e293b
31588:    pdf.rect(0, 0, 210, 40, 'F');
31589:

31591:    pdf.setFont('helvetica', 'bold');

31609:    pdf.setTextColor(30, 41, 59);
31610:

31612:    pdf.setFont('helvetica', 'bold');
31613:    pdf.setFontSize(12);

31615:    pdf.setFont('helvetica', 'normal');

31618:    pdf.text(`Téléphone: ${sale.customerPhone || 'Client de Passage'}`, 20, 68);
31619:

31621:    let y = 80;
31622:    pdf.setFillColor(241, 245, 249); // light blue gray
31623:    pdf.rect(20, y, 170, 8, 'F');
31624:

31631:

31633:    y += 8;
31634:    
31635:    // Table Rows
31636:    sale.items.forEach((item, index) => {
31637:      // Row highlighting
31638:      if (index % 2 === 1) {
31639:        pdf.setFillColor(248, 250, 252);
31640:        pdf.rect(20, y, 170, 8, 'F');
31641:      }
31642:      pdf.text(item.productName, 25, y + 5.5);
31643:      pdf.text(item.quantity.toString(), 115, y + 5.5, { align: 'center' });
31644:      pdf.text(item.price.toLocaleString(), 145, y + 5.5, { align: 'right' });
31645:      pdf.text(item.total.toLocaleString(), 185, y + 5.5, { align: 'right' });
31646:      y += 8;
31647:    });
31648:

31650:    pdf.line(20, y, 190, y);
31651:    y += 8;
31652:    
31653:    // Totals
31654:    pdf.setFont('helvetica', 'normal');
31655:    pdf.text('Sous-total:', 140, y);
31656:    pdf.text(`${sale.subtotal.toLocaleString()} FCFA`, 185, y, { align: 'right' });

31660:      pdf.setFillColor(225, 29, 72); // rose dark
31661:      pdf.text('Remise accordée:', 140, y);
31662:      pdf.text(`-${sale.discount.toLocaleString()} FCFA`, 185, y, { align: 'right' });
31663:      pdf.setTextColor(30, 41, 59);
31664:      y += 6;
31665:    }
31666:    
31667:    pdf.setFont('helvetica', 'bold');
31668:    pdf.setFontSize(11);
31669:    pdf.text(isQuote ? 'TOTAL ESTIMÉ NET:' : 'TOTAL PAYÉ CAISSE:', 140, y);
31670:    pdf.text(`${sale.total.toLocaleString()} FCFA`, 185, y, { align: 'right' });
31671:

31673:    y = 260;
31674:    pdf.setFont('helvetica', 'italic');
31675:    pdf.setFontSize(9);
31676:    pdf.setTextColor(100, 116, 139);
31677:    pdf.text(isQuote ? 'Ce devis est valable pendant 15 jours.' : 'Merci pour votre confiance & votre fidélité !', 105, y, { align: 'center' });

31679:    pdf.setFont('helvetica', 'normal');
31680:    pdf.setFontSize(8);
31681:    pdf.text('Document généré numériquement via Acom Gestion Workspace', 105, y, { align: 'center' });

31691:      return;

31695:      .map(item => `• ${item.quantity}x ${item.productName} (${item.price} FCFA/u) = ${item.total} FCFA`)
31696:      .join('\n');
31697:

31699:           `--------------------------------\n` +
31700:           `• N° Devis : *${quote.quoteNumber}*\n` +

31705:           `${itemsList}\n` +
31706:           `--------------------------------\n` +
31707:           `• Sous-total : ${quote.subtotal} FCFA\n` +
31708:           (quote.discount > 0 ? `• Remise : ${quote.discount} FCFA\n` : '') +
31709:           `• *TOTAL ESTIMÉ : ${quote.total} FCFA* 📋\n` +
31710:           `--------------------------------\n` +
31711:           `Ce devis est valable pendant 15 jours. Merci de votre confiance !`;

31715:      cleaned = '221' + cleaned;
31716:    }

31719:    const waUrl = `https://${isMobile ? 'api' : 'web'}.whatsapp.com/send?phone=${cleaned}&text=${encodeURIComponent(textNotif)}`;
31720:    window.open(waUrl, '_blank');

31760:
31761:  const totalStockValue = useMemo(() => {
31762:    return products.reduce((acc, p) => acc + (p.stock * p.price), 0);
31763:  }, [products]);
31764:

31766:    return products.reduce((acc, p) => acc + p.stock, 0);
31767:  }, [products]);
31768:
31769:  // Filters search product
31770:  const filteredProducts = useMemo(() => {
31771:    return products.filter(p => {
31772:      const matchSearch = p.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) || 
31773:                          p.description.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
31774:                          (p.sku && p.sku.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()));
31775:      const matchCat = categoryFilter === 'all' || p.category === categoryFilter;
31776:      
31777:      let matchStock = true;
31778:      if (stockFilter === 'out_of_stock') {
31779:        matchStock = p.stock <= 0;
31780:      } else if (stockFilter === 'low') {
31781:        matchStock = p.stock <= p.minStock && p.stock > 0;
31782:      } else if (stockFilter === 'ok') {
31783:        matchStock = p.stock > p.minStock;
31784:      }
31785:      return matchSearch && matchCat && matchStock;
31786:    });
31787:  }, [products, searchQuery, categoryFilter, stockFilter]);
31788:
31789:  // Filters search quotes
31790:  const filteredQuotes = useMemo(() => {
31791:    return quotes.filter(q => {
31792:      const query = searchQuery.trim().toLowerCase();
31793:      if (!query) return true;
31794:      return q.quoteNumber.toLowerCase().includes(query) ||
31795:             q.customerName.toLowerCase().includes(query) ||
31796:             (q.customerPhone && q.customerPhone.includes(query)) ||
31797:             q.items.some(it => it.productName.toLowerCase().includes(query));
31798:    });
31799:  }, [quotes, searchQuery]);
31800:

31987:          {/* POS Catalog Left */}
31988:          <div className="lg:col-span-7 space-y-4">
31989:            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
31990:              {filteredProducts.map(p => {

31992:                const isOutOfStock = p.stock <= 0;
31993:                return (
31994:                  <div

33343:                      if (cleaned.length === 9 && cleaned.startsWith('7')) {

33404:                  </h4>

33406:                    Manager Alert
33407:                  </span>
33408:                </div>
33409:

33412:                </p>

33486:            </div>

33488:        </div>
33489:      )}
33490:
33491:      <AcomAlertPopup
33492:        isOpen={popup.isOpen}
33493:        onClose={() => setPopup(prev => ({ ...prev, isOpen: false }))}
33494:        {...popup}
33495:      />
33496:    </motion.div>
33497:  );
33498:};

33500:// ==========================================
33501:// SAAS ATELIERS DE COUTURE COMPONENTS
33502:// ==========================================
33503:
33504:const TailleurClientsManager = ({ merchant }: { merchant: Merchant }) => {
33505:  const [clients, setClients] = useState<any[]>([]);
33506:  const [search, setSearch] = useState('');
33507:  const [isFormOpen, setIsFormOpen] = useState(false);
33508:  const [currentClient, setCurrentClient] = useState<any>(null);
33509:  const [focusedField, setFocusedField] = useState<string | null>(null);
33510:  const [isSyncing, setIsSyncing] = useState(false);
33511:
33512:  // Trigger sync and reload
33513:  const triggerSync = async (force: boolean = false) => {
33514:    setIsSyncing(true);
33515:    try {
33516:      await syncService.syncTailoringCollection(merchant.id, 'clients', force);
33517:      const saved = localStorage.getItem(`tailleur_clients_${merchant.id}`);
33518:      if (saved) setClients(JSON.parse(saved));
33519:    } catch (e) {
33520:      console.error(e);
33521:    } finally {
33522:      setIsSyncing(false);
33523:    }
33524:  };
33525:
33526:  // Load clients
33527:  useEffect(() => {
33528:    try {
33529:      const saved = localStorage.getItem(`tailleur_clients_${merchant.id}`);
33530:      if (saved) setClients(JSON.parse(saved));
33531:    } catch (e) {
33532:      console.error(e);
33533:    }
33534:    triggerSync();
33535:  }, [merchant.id]);
33536:
33537:  const saveClients = (newClients: any[]) => {
33538:    setClients(newClients);
33539:    localStorage.setItem(`tailleur_clients_${merchant.id}`, JSON.stringify(newClients));
33540:  };
33541:
33542:  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
33543:    e.preventDefault();
33544:    if (!currentClient.firstName || !currentClient.lastName) {
33545:      toast.error('Veuillez saisir le prénom et le nom');
33546:      return;
33547:    }
33548:
33549:    let updated;
33550:    if (currentClient.id) {
33551:      updated = clients.map(c => c.id === currentClient.id ? { ...currentClient, syncStatus: 'pending', updatedAt: new Date().toISOString() } : c);
33552:      toast.success('Fiche client mise à jour');
33553:    } else {
33554:      const newCl = {
33555:        ...currentClient,
33556:        id: crypto.randomUUID(),
33557:        syncStatus: 'pending',
33558:        createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
33559:        updatedAt: new Date().toISOString()
33560:      };
33561:      updated = [newCl, ...clients];
33562:      toast.success('Nouveau client enregistré');
33563:    }
33564:    saveClients(updated);
33565:    setIsFormOpen(false);
33566:    setCurrentClient(null);
33567:    triggerSync();
33568:  };
33569:
33570:  const handleDelete = async (id: string) => {
33571:    if (confirm('Voulez-vous vraiment supprimer ce client ? Toutes ses mesures seront perdues.')) {
33572:      const target = clients.find(c => c.id === id);
33573:      let updated;
33574:      if (target) {
33575:        if (target.syncStatus === 'synced') {
33576:          updated = clients.map(c => c.id === id ? { ...c, isDeleted: true, syncStatus: 'pending', updatedAt: new Date().toISOString() } : c);
33577:        } else {
33578:          updated = clients.filter(c => c.id !== id);
33579:        }
33580:        saveClients(updated);
33581:        toast.success('Fiche client supprimée');
33582:        triggerSync();
33583:      }
33584:    }
33585:  };
33586:
33587:  const exportClientsToCSV = () => {
33588:    try {
33589:      const activeClients = clients.filter(c => !c.isDeleted);
33590:      if (activeClients.length === 0) {
33591:        toast.error("Aucun client à exporter");
33592:        return;
33593:      }
33594:
33595:      let csvContent = "\uFEFF";
33596:      csvContent += "Prénom,Nom,Téléphone,Email,Genre,Adresse,Tour de Cou (cm),Tour de Poitrine (cm),Épaule à Épaule (cm),Longueur Manche (cm),Tour de Bras (cm),Tour de Taille (cm),Tour de Hanches (cm),Longueur Pantalon (cm),Tour de Cuisse (cm),Longueur Grand Boubou (cm),Notes,Date de Création\n";
33597:
33598:      activeClients.forEach(c => {
33599:        const m = c.measurements || {};
33600:        const row = [
33601:          c.firstName || '',
33602:          c.lastName || '',
33603:          c.phone || '',
33604:          c.email || '',
33605:          c.gender || '',
33606:          (c.address || '').replace(/"/g, '""'),
33607:          m.cou || '',
33608:          m.poitrine || '',
33609:          m.epaule || '',
33610:          m.manche || '',
33611:          m.tourBras || '',
33612:          m.taille || '',
33613:          m.hanches || '',
33614:          m.pantalon || '',
33615:          m.cuisse || '',
33616:          m.boubou || '',
33617:          (c.notes || '').replace(/"/g, '""'),
33618:          c.createdAt || ''
33619:        ].map(val => `"${String(val).replace(/\n/g, ' ')}"`).join(",");
33620:        csvContent += row + "\n";
33621:      });
33622:
33623:      const blob = new Blob([csvContent], { type: 'text/csv;charset=utf-8;' });
33624:      const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
33625:      const link = document.createElement("a");
33626:      link.setAttribute("href", url);
33627:      link.setAttribute("download", `Mesures_Clients_Couture_${new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]}.csv`);
33628:      document.body.appendChild(link);
33629:      link.click();
33630:      document.body.removeChild(link);
33631:      toast.success("Listing des mesures exporté avec succès (Excel CSV)");
33632:    } catch (error) {
33633:      console.error(error);
33634:      toast.error("Échec de l'export Excel CSV");
33635:    }
33636:  };
33637:
33638:  const exportClientsToPDF = () => {
33639:    const activeClients = clients.filter(c => !c.isDeleted);
33640:    if (activeClients.length === 0) {
33641:      toast.error("Aucun client à exporter");
33642:      return;
33643:    }
33644:
33645:    const printWindow = window.open('', '_blank');
33646:    if (!printWindow) {
33647:      toast.error("Veuillez autoriser les fenêtres pop-up pour générer le PDF");
33648:      return;
33649:    }
33650:
33651:    const html = `
33652:      <html>
33653:        <head>
33654:          <title>Fiches de Mesures Clients - ${merchant.name}</title>
33655:          <style>
33656:            body { font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; color: #1e293b; padding: 40px; }
33657:            h1 { font-size: 24px; font-weight: 900; margin-bottom: 5px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: -0.5px; }
33658:            .header-info { font-size: 11px; font-family: monospace; color: #64748b; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 30px; border-bottom: 2px solid #e2e8f0; padding-bottom: 15px; }
33659:            .client-card { border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 12px; padding: 20px; margin-bottom: 20px; page-break-inside: avoid; }
33660:            .client-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 15px; border-bottom: 1px dashed #e2e8f0; padding-bottom: 10px; }
33661:            .client-name { font-size: 16px; font-weight: bold; color: #7c3aed; }
33662:            .client-contact { font-size: 12px; color: #64748b; font-family: monospace; }
33663:            .measures-grid { display: grid; grid-template-cols: repeat(4, 1fr); gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 10px; }
33664:            .measure-item { background: #f8fafc; border: 1px solid #f1f5f9; padding: 8px; border-radius: 8px; text-align: center; }
33665:            .measure-label { font-size: 8px; font-weight: bold; color: #94a3b8; text-transform: uppercase; display: block; }
33666:            .measure-value { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 900; font-family: monospace; color: #0f172a; margin-top: 2px; display: block; }
33667:            .notes { font-size: 11px; color: #475569; background: #fafafa; padding: 10px; border-radius: 8px; border-left: 3px solid #7c3aed; margin-top: 10px; }
33668:          </style>
33669:        </head>
33670:        <body>
33671:          <h1>Listing des Mesures Clients</h1>
33672:          <div class="header-info">Atelier : ${merchant.name} | Date : ${new Date().toLocaleDateString('fr-FR')} | Clients Couture : ${activeClients.length}</div>
33673:          
33674:          ${activeClients.map(c => {
33675:            const m = c.measurements || {};
33676:            return `
33677:              <div class="client-card">
33678:                <div class="client-header">
33679:                  <div class="client-name">${c.firstName} ${c.lastName} (${c.gender === 'F' ? 'Femme' : 'Homme'})</div>
33680:                  <div class="client-contact">${c.phone || 'Pas de numéro'} ${c.email ? `| ${c.email}` : ''}</div>
33681:                </div>
33682:                <div class="measures-grid">
33683:                  <div class="measure-item"><span class="measure-label">Cou</span><span class="measure-value">${m.cou ? `${m.cou} cm` : '—'}</span></div>
33684:                  <div class="measure-item"><span class="measure-label">Poitrine</span><span class="measure-value">${m.poitrine ? `${m.poitrine} cm` : '—'}</span></div>
33685:                  <div class="measure-item"><span class="measure-label">Épaule</span><span class="measure-value">${m.epaule ? `${m.epaule} cm` : '—'}</span></div>
33686:                  <div class="measure-item"><span class="measure-label">Manche</span><span class="measure-value">${m.manche ? `${m.manche} cm` : '—'}</span></div>
33687:                  <div class="measure-item"><span class="measure-label">Tour de Bras</span><span class="measure-value">${m.tourBras ? `${m.tourBras} cm` : '—'}</span></div>
33688:                  <div class="measure-item"><span class="measure-label">Taille</span><span class="measure-value">${m.taille ? `${m.taille} cm` : '—'}</span></div>
33689:                  <div class="measure-item"><span class="measure-label">Hanches</span><span class="measure-value">${m.hanches ? `${m.hanches} cm` : '—'}</span></div>
33690:                  <div class="measure-item"><span class="measure-label">Longueur Pantalon</span><span class="measure-value">${m.pantalon ? `${m.pantalon} cm` : '—'}</span></div>
33691:                  <div class="measure-item"><span class="measure-label">Cuisse</span><span class="measure-value">${m.cuisse ? `${m.cuisse} cm` : '—'}</span></div>
33692:                  <div class="measure-item"><span class="measure-label">Grand Boubou</span><span class="measure-value">${m.boubou ? `${m.boubou} cm` : '—'}</span></div>
33693:                </div>
33694:                ${c.notes ? `<div class="notes"><strong>Notes de l'atelier :</strong> ${c.notes}</div>` : ''}
33695:              </div>
33696:            `;
33697:          }).join('')}
33698:          <script>
33699:            window.onload = function() {
33700:              window.print();
33701:              setTimeout(() => { window.close(); }, 500);
33702:            };
33703:          </script>
33704:        </body>
33705:      </html>
33706:    `;
33707:    
33708:    printWindow.document.write(html);
33709:    printWindow.document.close();
33710:  };
33711:
33712:  const filteredClients = clients
33713:    .filter(c => !c.isDeleted)
33714:    .filter(c => 
33715:      `${c.firstName} ${c.lastName}`.toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase()) || 
33716:      (c.phone && c.phone.includes(search))
33717:    );
33718:

33720:    cou: 'Tour de Cou (cm)',
33721:    poitrine: 'Tour de Poitrine (cm)',
33722:    epaule: 'Épaule à Épaule (cm)',
33723:    manche: 'Longueur Manche (cm)',
33724:    tourBras: 'Tour de Bras (cm)',
33725:    taille: 'Tour de Taille (cm)',
33726:    hanches: 'Tour de Hanches (cm)',
33727:    pantalon: 'Longueur Pantalon / Jupe (cm)',
33728:    cuisse: 'Tour de Cuisse (cm)',
33729:    boubou: 'Longueur Grand Boubou (cm)'
33730:  };
33731:

33733:    firstName: '',

33760:        </div>

34036:                    {focusedField === 'boubou' && "Longueur totale pour un grand boubou, mesurée du haut de l'épaule jusqu'au sol."}
34037:                    {!focusedField && "Cliquez sur l'un des champs de mesure pour voir l'aide d'atelier s'afficher ici."}
34038:                  </p>
34039:                </div>
34040:              </div>
34041:
34042:              <div className="bg-violet-50/50 p-4 rounded-2xl border border-violet-100/50 text-left">
34043:                <span className="text-[9px] font-black text-violet-600 uppercase tracking-widest block mb-1">Rappel de Coupe</span>
34044:                <p className="text-[10px] text-violet-700/80 leading-normal font-medium">Pour les tissus non extensibles (Bazin, Wax), prévoyez une marge d'aisance standard de 4 à 6 cm pour les vêtements amples.</p>
34045:              </div>
34046:            </div>
34047:          </div>
34048:
34049:              {/* Footer Actions */}
34050:              <div className="border-t border-gray-100 pt-6 flex justify-end gap-3">
34051:                <button 
34052:                  type="button" 
34053:                  onClick={() => setIsFormOpen(false)}
34054:                  className="px-5 py-2.5 bg-gray-150 hover:bg-gray-200 text-ink rounded-xl font-bold text-sm transition-colors cursor-pointer"
34055:                >
34056:                  Annuler
34057:                </button>
34058:                <button 
34059:                  type="submit" 
34060:                  className="px-6 py-2.5 bg-violet-600 hover:bg-violet-700 text-white rounded-xl font-bold text-sm flex items-center gap-2 transition-all shadow-md cursor-pointer"
34061:                >
34062:                  <Save className="w-4 h-4" /> Enregistrer le Client
34063:                </button>
34064:              </div>
34065:            </form>
34066:          </motion.div>
34067:        </div>
34068:      )}
34069:
34070:      {/* Liste des Clients */}
34071:      {filteredClients.length === 0 ? (
34072:        <div className="bg-white py-16 text-center rounded-[2rem] border border-gray-150 shadow-sm flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-left">
34073:          <div className="w-16 h-16 bg-violet-50 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mb-4 border border-violet-100">
34074:            <Users className="w-8 h-8 text-violet-400" />
34075:          </div>
34076:          <p className="text-gray-500 font-bold mb-1">Aucun client trouvé</p>
34077:          <p className="text-xs text-gray-400">Ajoutez des clients pour stocker leurs mesures de couture métriques.</p>
34078:        </div>
34079:      ) : (
34080:        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6 text-left">
34081:          {filteredClients.map((client) => (
34082:            <div key={client.id} className="bg-white p-6 rounded-[2rem] border border-black/5 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all flex flex-col justify-between">
34083:              <div>
34084:                <div className="flex justify-between items-start mb-4">
34085:                  <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
34086:                    <div className={`w-12 h-12 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center text-lg font-black ${client.gender === 'F' ? 'bg-pink-50 text-pink-600' : 'bg-blue-50 text-blue-600'}`}>
34087:                      {client.gender === 'F' ? '🚺' : '🚹'}
34088:                    </div>
34089:                    <div>
34090:                      <h3 className="font-black text-ink text-lg leading-tight">{client.firstName} {client.lastName}</h3>
34091:                      <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 font-medium">Modifié le {format(new Date(client.updatedAt), 'dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm')}</p>
34092:                    </div>
34093:                  </div>
34094:
34095:                  <div className="flex gap-1.5 bg-slate-50 p-1 rounded-xl">
34096:                    <button 
34097:                      onClick={() => {
34098:                        setCurrentClient(client);
34099:                        setIsFormOpen(true);
34100:                      }}
34101:                      className="p-1.5 hover:bg-white hover:text-violet-600 hover:shadow-sm text-gray-500 rounded-lg transition-transform"
34102:                      title="Modifier"
34103:                    >
34104:                      <Edit2 className="w-4 h-4" />
34105:                    </button>
34106:                    <button 
34107:                      onClick={() => handleDelete(client.id)}
34108:                      className="p-1.5 hover:bg-white hover:text-red-600 hover:shadow-sm text-gray-500 rounded-lg transition-transform"
34109:                      title="Supprimer"
34110:                    >
34111:                      <Trash2 className="w-4 h-4" />
34112:                    </button>
34113:                  </div>
34114:                </div>
34115:
34116:                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 text-xs text-gray-500 border-t border-gray-100 pt-3">
34117:                  {client.phone && (
34118:                    <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 font-medium">
34119:                      <Phone className="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-gray-400" />
34120:                      <span>{client.phone}</span>
34121:                    </div>
34122:                  )}
34123:                  {client.address && (
34124:                    <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 font-medium col-span-2">
34125:                      <MapPin className="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-gray-400" />
34126:                      <span className="truncate">{client.address}</span>
34127:                    </div>
34128:                  )}
34129:                </div>
34130:
34131:                <div className="mt-4 bg-slate-50/50 p-4 rounded-2xl border border-slate-100">
34132:                  <h4 className="text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-2 flex items-center gap-1.5">
34133:                    <Scissors className="w-3 h-3 text-violet-500" /> Principales Mesures
34134:                  </h4>
34135:                  <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-2">
34136:                    {Object.keys(MEASUREMENT_LABELS).slice(0, 6).map((key) => (
34137:                      <div key={key} className="bg-white p-2 rounded-xl text-center border border-black/[0.02]">
34138:                        <span className="block text-[8px] font-black text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest">{key}</span>
34139:                        <span className="font-mono text-xs font-black text-ink">{client.measurements?.[key] ? `${client.measurements[key]} cm` : '—'}</span>
34140:                      </div>
34141:                    ))}
34142:                  </div>
34143:                </div>
34144:              </div>
34145:            </div>
34146:          ))}
34147:        </div>
34148:      )}
34149:    </motion.div>
34150:  );
34151:};

34161:  const [filterStatus, setFilterStatus] = useState<string>('all');
